authors_text: Oshada Jayasinghe,Sahan Hemachandra,Damith Anhettigama,Shenali Kariyawasam,Tharindu Wickremasinghe,Chalani Ekanayake,Ranga Rodrigo,Peshala Jayasekara
title: Towards Real-time Traffic Sign and Traffic Light Detection on Embedded Systems
title_zh: 嵌入式系统上的实时交通标志和交通灯检测
comment: Accepted to 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles (IV) Symposium 2022
comments: Accepted to 33rd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles (IV) Symposium 2022
abstract: Recent work done on traffic sign and traffic light detection focus on improving detection accuracy in complex scenarios, yet many fail to deliver real-time performance, specifically with limited computational resources. In this work, we propose a simple deep learning based end-to-end detection framework, which effectively tackles challenges inherent to traffic sign and traffic light detection such as small size, large number of classes and complex road scenarios. We optimize the detection models using TensorRT and integrate with Robot Operating System to deploy on an Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier as our embedded device. The overall system achieves a high inference speed of 63 frames per second, demonstrating the capability of our system to perform in real-time. Furthermore, we introduce CeyRo, which is the first ever large-scale traffic sign and traffic light detection dataset for the Sri Lankan context. Our dataset consists of 7984 total images with 10176 traffic sign and traffic light instances covering 70 traffic sign and 5 traffic light classes. The images have a high resolution of 1920 x 1080 and capture a wide range of challenging road scenarios with different weather and lighting conditions. Our work is publicly available at https://github.com/oshadajay/CeyRo.

The overall system achieves a high inference speed of 63 frames per second, demonstrating the capability of our system to perform in real-time. abstract_zh: 最近在交通标志和交通灯检测方面所做的工作侧重于提高复杂场景中的检测精度，但许多工作无法提供实时性能，特别是在计算资源有限的情况下。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单的基于深度学习的端到端检测框架，该框架有效地解决了交通标志和交通灯检测固有的挑战，例如小尺寸、大量类别和复杂的道路场景。我们使用 TensorRT 优化检测模型，并与机器人操作系统集成，以部署在 Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier 作为我们的嵌入式设备。整个系统实现了每秒 63 帧的高推理速度，展示了我们系统的实时执行能力。此外，我们还介绍了 CeyRo，这是斯里兰卡第一个大规模交通标志和交通灯检测数据集。我们的数据集总共包含 7984 张图像，其中包含 10176 个交通标志和交通灯实例，涵盖 70 个交通标志和 5 个交通灯类别。这些图像具有 1920 x 1080 的高分辨率，可捕捉不同天气和照明条件下各种具有挑战性的道路场景。我们的工作可在 https://github.com/oshadajay/CeyRo 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的端到端交通标志和信号灯检测框架，并在嵌入式系统上实现实时检测，同时构建了首个面向斯里兰卡场景的大型检测数据集CeyRo。
AI.motivation: 现有交通标志检测方法在复杂场景下精度不足且难以在计算资源受限的嵌入式设备上实现实时性，同时缺乏针对斯里兰卡本地交通场景的大型数据集。
AI.method: 采用TensorRT优化检测模型并集成到ROS系统，部署于Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier嵌入式设备；构建包含7984张高分辨率图像的CeyRo数据集，涵盖70类交通标志和5类信号灯，覆盖多种天气和光照条件。
AI.result: 系统在嵌入式设备上实现63帧/秒的实时检测速度；CeyRo数据集包含10176个标注实例，为斯里兰卡交通场景研究提供基准数据。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量化框架与本地化数据集共同推动了交通检测技术在嵌入式系统中的实际应用，为资源受限环境下的智能交通系统开发提供参考方案。

title: Quasi-SMC based on MPC for a constrained continuous-time nonlinear system with external disturbances
title_zh: 具有外部扰动的约束连续时间非线性系统的基于MPC的准SMC
comment: This paper exists a lot of mistakes. Therefore, I want to withdraw it
comments: This paper exists a lot of mistakes. Therefore, I want to withdraw it
abstract: In this article, a quasi-sliding mode control (QSMC) based on MPC is proposed for the constrained continuous-time nonlinear system with external disturbances. The MPC problem is formulated relating to the design of QSMC, to generate the control input, which can imitate the control process of QSMC and guarantee the satisfaction of state and input constraints. Meanwhile, the cost function of MPC problem is reconstructed, in which the QSMC based on MPC can show better convergence rate by tuning the weight parameters. Finally, a simulation case is provided to demonstate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: In this article, a quasi-sliding mode control (QSMC) based on MPC is proposed for the constrained continuous-time nonlinear system with external disturbances. The MPC problem is formulated relating to the design of QSMC, to generate the control input, which can imitate the control process of QSMC and guarantee the satisfaction of state and input constraints. Meanwhile, the cost function of MPC problem is reconstructed, in which the QSMC based on MPC can show better convergence rate by tuning the weight parameters. Finally, a simulation case is provided to demonstate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 本文针对具有外部扰动的约束连续时间非线性系统，提出了一种基于MPC的准滑模控制（QSMC）。与QSMC的设计相关的MPC问题被表述为产生控制输入，它可以模仿QSMC的控制过程并保证状态和输入约束的满足。同时，重构了MPC问题的代价函数，其中基于MPC的QSMC通过调整权重参数可以表现出更好的收敛速度。最后，提供了一个仿真案例来证明所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的准滑模控制（QSMC）方法，用于解决受约束的连续时间非线性系统在外部扰动下的控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统滑模控制在约束处理和收敛速度方面存在不足，而MPC能够有效处理系统约束，因此结合两者以提升控制性能。
AI.method: 将MPC与QSMC结合，构建满足状态和输入约束的控制输入，并通过调整权重参数重构MPC成本函数以优化收敛速度。
AI.result: 仿真案例验证了所提方法在约束满足和收敛速度上的有效性，表现出优于传统方法的控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于MPC的准滑模控制方法能够有效处理非线性系统的约束和外部扰动，且具有更优的收敛特性。

authors_text: Zhangjin Huang,Yuxin Wen,Zihao Wang,Jinjuan Ren,Kui Jia
title: Surface Reconstruction from Point Clouds: A Survey and a Benchmark
title_zh: 从点云重建表面：调查和基准
abstract: Reconstruction of a continuous surface of two-dimensional manifold from its raw, discrete point cloud observation is a long-standing problem. The problem is technically ill-posed, and becomes more difficult considering that various sensing imperfections would appear in the point clouds obtained by practical depth scanning. In literature, a rich set of methods has been proposed, and reviews of existing methods are also provided. However, existing reviews are short of thorough investigations on a common benchmark. The present paper aims to review and benchmark existing methods in the new era of deep learning surface reconstruction. To this end, we contribute a large-scale benchmarking dataset consisting of both synthetic and real-scanned data; the benchmark includes object- and scene-level surfaces and takes into account various sensing imperfections that are commonly encountered in practical depth scanning. We conduct thorough empirical studies by comparing existing methods on the constructed benchmark, and pay special attention on robustness of existing methods against various scanning imperfections; we also study how different methods generalize in terms of reconstructing complex surface shapes. Our studies help identify the best conditions under which different methods work, and suggest some empirical findings. For example, while deep learning methods are increasingly popular, our systematic studies suggest that, surprisingly, a few classical methods perform even better in terms of both robustness and generalization; our studies also suggest that the practical challenges of misalignment of point sets from multi-view scanning, missing of surface points, and point outliers remain unsolved by all the existing surface reconstruction methods. We expect that the benchmark and our studies would be valuable both for practitioners and as a guidance for new innovations in future research.
summary: Reconstruction of a continuous surface of two-dimensional manifold from its raw, discrete point cloud observation is a long-standing problem. The problem is technically ill-posed, and becomes more difficult considering that various sensing imperfections would appear in the point clouds obtained by practical depth scanning. In literature, a rich set of methods has been proposed, and reviews of existing methods are also provided. However, existing reviews are short of thorough investigations on a common benchmark. The present paper aims to review and benchmark existing methods in the new era of deep learning surface reconstruction. To this end, we contribute a large-scale benchmarking dataset consisting of both synthetic and real-scanned data; the benchmark includes object- and scene-level surfaces and takes into account various sensing imperfections that are commonly encountered in practical depth scanning. We conduct thorough empirical studies by comparing existing methods on the constructed benchmark, and pay special attention on robustness of existing methods against various scanning imperfections; we also study how different methods generalize in terms of reconstructing complex surface shapes. Our studies help identify the best conditions under which different methods work, and suggest some empirical findings. For example, while deep learning methods are increasingly popular, our systematic studies suggest that, surprisingly, a few classical methods perform even better in terms of both robustness and generalization; our studies also suggest that the practical challenges of misalignment of point sets from multi-view scanning, missing of surface points, and point outliers remain unsolved by all the existing surface reconstruction methods. We expect that the benchmark and our studies would be valuable both for practitioners and as a guidance for new innovations in future research.
abstract_zh: 从原始的、离散的点云观测中重建二维流形的连续表面是一个长期存在的问题。这个问题在技术上是不适定的，并且考虑到实际深度扫描获得的点云中会出现各种传感缺陷，并且变得更加困难。在文献中，已经提出了一组丰富的方法，并且还提供了对现有方法的回顾。然而，现有的审查缺乏对共同基准的彻底调查。本文旨在回顾和基准深度学习表面重建新时代的现有方法。为此，我们提供了一个由合成数据和真实扫描数据组成的大规模基准数据集；该基准包括物体级和场景级表面，并考虑了实际深度扫描中常见的各种传感缺陷。我们通过在构建的基准上比较现有方法来进行彻底的实证研究，并特别关注现有方法针对各种扫描缺陷的稳健性；我们还研究了不同的方法如何在重建复杂表面形状方面进行推广。我们的研究有助于确定不同方法发挥作用的最佳条件，并提出一些实证结果。例如，虽然深度学习方法越来越流行，但我们的系统研究表明，令人惊讶的是，一些经典方法在鲁棒性和泛化性方面表现得更好；我们的研究还表明，所有现有的表面重建方法仍然无法解决多视图扫描导致的点集未对准、表面点缺失和点异常值等实际挑战。我们预计该基准和我们的研究对于从业者和未来研究中的新创新都将很有价值。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了点云表面重建方法，并构建了一个包含合成与真实数据的大规模基准数据集，用于评估现有方法在不同扫描缺陷下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有综述缺乏对统一基准的深入研究，且深度学习方法在实际扫描中的鲁棒性与泛化能力尚未充分验证，需系统评估不同方法在复杂场景下的性能。
AI.method: 构建包含多种扫描缺陷的基准数据集，对比分析经典方法与深度学习方法在表面重建任务中的鲁棒性、泛化能力及对复杂形状的适应性。
AI.result: 经典方法在鲁棒性与泛化性上表现更优，但所有方法均无法解决多视角扫描点集对齐误差、表面点缺失及离群点等实际问题。
AI.conclusion: 基准数据集为实践应用与未来研究提供指导，揭示了当前方法在处理实际扫描缺陷时的局限性，需进一步探索鲁棒性更强的重建技术。

search_text: Surface Reconstruction from Point Clouds: A Survey and a Benchmark 从点云重建表面：调查和基准 Reconstruction of a continuous surface of two-dimensional manifold from its raw, discrete point cloud observation is a long-standing problem. The problem is technically ill-posed, and becomes more difficult considering that various sensing imperfections would appear in the point clouds obtained by practical depth scanning. In literature, a rich set of methods has been proposed, and reviews of existing methods are also provided. However, existing reviews are short of thorough investigations on a common benchmark. The present paper aims to review and benchmark existing methods in the new era of deep learning surface reconstruction. To this end, we contribute a large-scale benchmarking dataset consisting of both synthetic and real-scanned data; the benchmark includes object- and scene-level surfaces and takes into account various sensing imperfections that are commonly encountered in practical depth scanning. We conduct thorough empirical studies by comparing existing methods on the constructed benchmark, and pay special attention on robustness of existing methods against various scanning imperfections; we also study how different methods generalize in terms of reconstructing complex surface shapes. Our studies help identify the best conditions under which different methods work, and suggest some empirical findings. For example, while deep learning methods are increasingly popular, our systematic studies suggest that, surprisingly, a few classical methods perform even better in terms of both robustness and generalization; our studies also suggest that the practical challenges of misalignment of point sets from multi-view scanning, missing of surface points, and point outliers remain unsolved by all the existing surface reconstruction methods. We expect that the benchmark and our studies would be valuable both for practitioners and as a guidance for new innovations in future research. 从原始的、离散的点云观测中重建二维流形的连续表面是一个长期存在的问题。这个问题在技术上是不适定的，并且考虑到实际深度扫描获得的点云中会出现各种传感缺陷，并且变得更加困难。在文献中，已经提出了一组丰富的方法，并且还提供了对现有方法的回顾。然而，现有的审查缺乏对共同基准的彻底调查。本文旨在回顾和基准深度学习表面重建新时代的现有方法。为此，我们提供了一个由合成数据和真实扫描数据组成的大规模基准数据集；该基准包括物体级和场景级表面，并考虑了实际深度扫描中常见的各种传感缺陷。我们通过在构建的基准上比较现有方法来进行彻底的实证研究，并特别关注现有方法针对各种扫描缺陷的稳健性；我们还研究了不同的方法如何在重建复杂表面形状方面进行推广。我们的研究有助于确定不同方法发挥作用的最佳条件，并提出一些实证结果。例如，虽然深度学习方法越来越流行，但我们的系统研究表明，令人惊讶的是，一些经典方法在鲁棒性和泛化性方面表现得更好；我们的研究还表明，所有现有的表面重建方法仍然无法解决多视图扫描导致的点集未对准、表面点缺失和点异常值等实际挑战。我们预计该基准和我们的研究对于从业者和未来研究中的新创新都将很有价值。 本文综述了点云表面重建方法，并构建了一个包含合成与真实数据的大规模基准数据集，用于评估现有方法在不同扫描缺陷下的表现。 Zhangjin Huang,Yuxin Wen,Zihao Wang,Jinjuan Ren,Kui Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Juncheng Liu,Zequn Sun,Bryan Hooi,Yiwei Wang,Dayiheng Liu,Baosong Yang,Xiaokui Xiao,Muhao Chen
title: Dangling-Aware Entity Alignment with Mixed High-Order Proximities
title_zh: 具有混合高阶邻近度的悬挂感知实体对齐
abstract: We study dangling-aware entity alignment in knowledge graphs (KGs), which is an underexplored but important problem. As different KGs are naturally constructed by different sets of entities, a KG commonly contains some dangling entities that cannot find counterparts in other KGs. Therefore, dangling-aware entity alignment is more realistic than the conventional entity alignment where prior studies simply ignore dangling entities. We propose a framework using mixed high-order proximities on dangling-aware entity alignment. Our framework utilizes both the local high-order proximity in a nearest neighbor subgraph and the global high-order proximity in an embedding space for both dangling detection and entity alignment. Extensive experiments with two evaluation settings shows that our framework more precisely detects dangling entities, and better aligns matchable entities. Further investigations demonstrate that our framework can mitigate the hubness problem on dangling-aware entity alignment.
summary: We study dangling-aware entity alignment in knowledge graphs (KGs), which is an underexplored but important problem. As different KGs are naturally constructed by different sets of entities, a KG commonly contains some dangling entities that cannot find counterparts in other KGs. Therefore, dangling-aware entity alignment is more realistic than the conventional entity alignment where prior studies simply ignore dangling entities. We propose a framework using mixed high-order proximities on dangling-aware entity alignment. Our framework utilizes both the local high-order proximity in a nearest neighbor subgraph and the global high-order proximity in an embedding space for both dangling detection and entity alignment. Extensive experiments with two evaluation settings shows that our framework more precisely detects dangling entities, and better aligns matchable entities. Further investigations demonstrate that our framework can mitigate the hubness problem on dangling-aware entity alignment.
abstract_zh: 我们研究知识图（KG）中的悬挂感知实体对齐，这是一个尚未充分探索但很重要的问题。由于不同的知识图谱自然是由不同的实体集构建的，因此知识图谱通常包含一些无法在其他知识图谱中找到对应项的悬空实体。因此，悬挂感知实体对齐比传统实体对齐更现实，传统实体对齐之前的研究只是忽略悬挂实体。我们提出了一个在悬空感知实体对齐上使用混合高阶近似的框架。我们的框架利用最近邻子图中的局部高阶邻近度和嵌入空间中的全局高阶邻近度来进行悬空检测和实体对齐。使用两种评估设置的大量实验表明，我们的框架可以更精确地检测悬挂实体，并更好地对齐可匹配的实体。进一步的研究表明，我们的框架可以缓解悬空感知实体对齐的中心问题。

AI.tldr: 研究考虑悬挂实体的实体对齐问题，提出结合局部与全局高阶近邻的框架以提高对齐精度和悬挂实体检测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统实体对齐方法忽略悬挂实体，导致现实场景中对齐效果受限，需更精确的检测与对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出结合局部最近邻子图高阶近邻与全局嵌入空间高阶近邻的混合框架，用于悬挂实体检测与实体对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在悬挂实体检测与实体对齐任务中表现更优，并有效缓解枢纽问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合高阶近邻框架有效提升悬挂感知实体对齐性能，为实际应用提供更精准的解决方案。

title: Spot-adaptive Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 现场自适应知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) has become a well established paradigm for compressing deep neural networks. The typical way of conducting knowledge distillation is to train the student network under the supervision of the teacher network to harness the knowledge at one or multiple spots (i.e., layers) in the teacher network. The distillation spots, once specified, will not change for all the training samples, throughout the whole distillation process. In this work, we argue that distillation spots should be adaptive to training samples and distillation epochs. We thus propose a new distillation strategy, termed spot-adaptive KD (SAKD), to adaptively determine the distillation spots in the teacher network per sample, at every training iteration during the whole distillation period. As SAKD actually focuses on "where to distill" instead of "what to distill" that is widely investigated by most existing works, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing distillation methods to further improve their performance. Extensive experiments with 10 state-of-the-art distillers are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of SAKD for improving their distillation performance, under both homogeneous and heterogeneous distillation settings. Code is available at https://github.com/zju-vipa/spot-adaptive-pytorch
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) has become a well established paradigm for compressing deep neural networks. The typical way of conducting knowledge distillation is to train the student network under the supervision of the teacher network to harness the knowledge at one or multiple spots (i.e., layers) in the teacher network. The distillation spots, once specified, will not change for all the training samples, throughout the whole distillation process. In this work, we argue that distillation spots should be adaptive to training samples and distillation epochs. We thus propose a new distillation strategy, termed spot-adaptive KD (SAKD), to adaptively determine the distillation spots in the teacher network per sample, at every training iteration during the whole distillation period. As SAKD actually focuses on "where to distill" instead of "what to distill" that is widely investigated by most existing works, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing distillation methods to further improve their performance. Extensive experiments with 10 state-of-the-art distillers are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of SAKD for improving their distillation performance, under both homogeneous and heterogeneous distillation settings. Code is available at https://github.com/zju-vipa/spot-adaptive-pytorch
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）已成为压缩深度神经网络的成熟范例。进行知识蒸馏的典型方法是在教师网络的监督下训练学生网络，以利用教师网络中一个或多个点（即层）的知识。蒸馏点一旦指定，在整个蒸馏过程中，所有训练样本都不会改变。在这项工作中，我们认为蒸馏点应该适应训练样本和蒸馏时期。因此，我们提出了一种新的蒸馏策略，称为点自适应 KD (SAKD)，以在整个蒸馏期间的每次训练迭代中自适应地确定每个样本的教师网络中的蒸馏点。由于 SAKD 实际上关注的是“在哪里蒸馏”，而不是大多数现有作品广泛研究的“蒸馏什么”，因此它可以无缝集成到现有的蒸馏方法中，以进一步提高其性能。使用 10 台最先进的蒸馏器进行了广泛的实验，以证明 SAKD 在均相和非均相蒸馏设置下提高蒸馏性能的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/zju-vipa/spot-adaptive-pytorch 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spot-adaptive Knowledge Distillation (SAKD)的新策略，通过动态调整知识蒸馏过程中的蒸馏位置来提升模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法在训练过程中固定蒸馏位置，无法适应不同样本和训练阶段的需求，限制了性能提升空间。
AI.method: SAKD通过在每个训练迭代中根据样本特征动态选择教师网络中的蒸馏位置，专注于解决'在哪里蒸馏'的问题，可与现有蒸馏方法无缝集成。
AI.result: 在同构和异构蒸馏设置下，SAKD与10种先进蒸馏方法结合后均取得性能提升，代码已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: 动态调整蒸馏位置能有效提升知识蒸馏效果，SAKD为改进现有蒸馏方法提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spot-adaptive Knowledge Distillation (SAKD)的新策略，通过动态调整知识蒸馏过程中的蒸馏位置来提升模型压缩效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法在训练过程中固定蒸馏位置，无法适应不同样本和训练阶段的需求，限制了性能提升空间。
ai_content.method: SAKD通过在每个训练迭代中根据样本特征动态选择教师网络中的蒸馏位置，专注于解决'在哪里蒸馏'的问题，可与现有蒸馏方法无缝集成。
ai_content.result: 在同构和异构蒸馏设置下，SAKD与10种先进蒸馏方法结合后均取得性能提升，代码已在GitHub开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态调整蒸馏位置能有效提升知识蒸馏效果，SAKD为改进现有蒸馏方法提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Spot-adaptive Knowledge Distillation 现场自适应知识蒸馏 Knowledge distillation (KD) has become a well established paradigm for compressing deep neural networks. The typical way of conducting knowledge distillation is to train the student network under the supervision of the teacher network to harness the knowledge at one or multiple spots (i.e., layers) in the teacher network. The distillation spots, once specified, will not change for all the training samples, throughout the whole distillation process. In this work, we argue that distillation spots should be adaptive to training samples and distillation epochs. We thus propose a new distillation strategy, termed spot-adaptive KD (SAKD), to adaptively determine the distillation spots in the teacher network per sample, at every training iteration during the whole distillation period. As SAKD actually focuses on "where to distill" instead of "what to distill" that is widely investigated by most existing works, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing distillation methods to further improve their performance. Extensive experiments with 10 state-of-the-art distillers are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of SAKD for improving their distillation performance, under both homogeneous and heterogeneous distillation settings. Code is available at https://github.com/zju-vipa/spot-adaptive-pytorch 知识蒸馏（KD）已成为压缩深度神经网络的成熟范例。进行知识蒸馏的典型方法是在教师网络的监督下训练学生网络，以利用教师网络中一个或多个点（即层）的知识。蒸馏点一旦指定，在整个蒸馏过程中，所有训练样本都不会改变。在这项工作中，我们认为蒸馏点应该适应训练样本和蒸馏时期。因此，我们提出了一种新的蒸馏策略，称为点自适应 KD (SAKD)，以在整个蒸馏期间的每次训练迭代中自适应地确定每个样本的教师网络中的蒸馏点。由于 SAKD 实际上关注的是“在哪里蒸馏”，而不是大多数现有作品广泛研究的“蒸馏什么”，因此它可以无缝集成到现有的蒸馏方法中，以进一步提高其性能。使用 10 台最先进的蒸馏器进行了广泛的实验，以证明 SAKD 在均相和非均相蒸馏设置下提高蒸馏性能的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/zju-vipa/spot-adaptive-pytorch 获取 本文提出了一种名为Spot-adaptive Knowledge Distillation (SAKD)的新策略，通过动态调整知识蒸馏过程中的蒸馏位置来提升模型压缩效果。 Jie Song,Ying Chen,Jingwen Ye,Mingli Song cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Compressive Ptychography using Deep Image and Generative Priors
title_zh: 使用深度图像和生成先验的压缩 Ptychography
abstract: Ptychography is a well-established coherent diffraction imaging technique that enables non-invasive imaging of samples at a nanometer scale. It has been extensively used in various areas such as the defense industry or materials science. One major limitation of ptychography is the long data acquisition time due to mechanical scanning of the sample; therefore, approaches to reduce the scan points are highly desired. However, reconstructions with less number of scan points lead to imaging artifacts and significant distortions, hindering a quantitative evaluation of the results. To address this bottleneck, we propose a generative model combining deep image priors with deep generative priors. The self-training approach optimizes the deep generative neural network to create a solution for a given dataset. We complement our approach with a prior acquired from a previously trained discriminator network to avoid a possible divergence from the desired output caused by the noise in the measurements. We also suggest using the total variation as a complementary before combat artifacts due to measurement noise. We analyze our approach with numerical experiments through different probe overlap percentages and varying noise levels. We also demonstrate improved reconstruction accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art method and discuss the advantages and disadvantages of our approach.
summary: Ptychography is a well-established coherent diffraction imaging technique that enables non-invasive imaging of samples at a nanometer scale. It has been extensively used in various areas such as the defense industry or materials science. One major limitation of ptychography is the long data acquisition time due to mechanical scanning of the sample; therefore, approaches to reduce the scan points are highly desired. However, reconstructions with less number of scan points lead to imaging artifacts and significant distortions, hindering a quantitative evaluation of the results. To address this bottleneck, we propose a generative model combining deep image priors with deep generative priors. The self-training approach optimizes the deep generative neural network to create a solution for a given dataset. We complement our approach with a prior acquired from a previously trained discriminator network to avoid a possible divergence from the desired output caused by the noise in the measurements. We also suggest using the total variation as a complementary before combat artifacts due to measurement noise. We analyze our approach with numerical experiments through different probe overlap percentages and varying noise levels. We also demonstrate improved reconstruction accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art method and discuss the advantages and disadvantages of our approach.
abstract_zh: Ptychography 是一种成熟的相干衍射成像技术，可实现纳米级样品的非侵入性成像。它已广泛应用于国防工业或材料科学等各个领域。叠层描记法的一个主要限制是由于对样品进行机械扫描而导致数据采集时间较长。因此，非常需要减少扫描点的方法。然而，扫描点数量较少的重建会导致成像伪影和明显的失真，从而阻碍对结果的定量评估。为了解决这个瓶颈，我们提出了一种将深度图像先验与深度生成先验相结合的生成模型。自训练方法优化深度生成神经网络，为给定数据集创建解决方案。我们用从先前训练的鉴别器网络获取的先验信息来补充我们的方法，以避免测量中的噪声引起的与期望输出可能的偏差。我们还建议在由于测量噪声而导致的战斗伪影之前使用总变化作为补充。我们通过不同的探针重叠百分比和不同的噪声水平通过数值实验来分析我们的方法。与最先进的方法相比，我们还展示了改进的重建精度，并讨论了我们的方法的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度图像先验与生成先验的压缩叠层成像方法，以减少扫描点数量并提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 叠层成像因机械扫描导致数据采集时间长，减少扫描点会引发重建伪影和失真，亟需提升重建精度的新方法。
AI.method: 构建融合深度图像先验与生成先验的模型，通过自训练优化生成网络，结合预训练判别器先验抑制噪声，并引入总变分减少测量噪声伪影。
AI.result: 在不同重叠率和噪声水平下实验表明，该方法较现有技术显著提升重建精度，同时分析了其优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 联合两种先验可有效提升压缩叠层成像质量，但计算复杂度较高，需权衡实际应用需求。

title: Robust Conversational Agents against Imperceptible Toxicity Triggers
title_zh: 针对难以察觉的毒性触发的强大对话代理
abstract: Warning: this paper contains content that maybe offensive or upsetting. Recent research in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has advanced the development of various toxicity detection models with the intention of identifying and mitigating toxic language from existing systems. Despite the abundance of research in this area, less attention has been given to adversarial attacks that force the system to generate toxic language and the defense against them. Existing work to generate such attacks is either based on human-generated attacks which is costly and not scalable or, in case of automatic attacks, the attack vector does not conform to human-like language, which can be detected using a language model loss. In this work, we propose attacks against conversational agents that are imperceptible, i.e., they fit the conversation in terms of coherency, relevancy, and fluency, while they are effective and scalable, i.e., they can automatically trigger the system into generating toxic language. We then propose a defense mechanism against such attacks which not only mitigates the attack but also attempts to maintain the conversational flow. Through automatic and human evaluations, we show that our defense is effective at avoiding toxic language generation even against imperceptible toxicity triggers while the generated language fits the conversation in terms of coherency and relevancy. Lastly, we establish the generalizability of such a defense mechanism on language generation models beyond conversational agents.
summary: Warning: this paper contains content that maybe offensive or upsetting. Recent research in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has advanced the development of various toxicity detection models with the intention of identifying and mitigating toxic language from existing systems. Despite the abundance of research in this area, less attention has been given to adversarial attacks that force the system to generate toxic language and the defense against them. Existing work to generate such attacks is either based on human-generated attacks which is costly and not scalable or, in case of automatic attacks, the attack vector does not conform to human-like language, which can be detected using a language model loss. In this work, we propose attacks against conversational agents that are imperceptible, i.e., they fit the conversation in terms of coherency, relevancy, and fluency, while they are effective and scalable, i.e., they can automatically trigger the system into generating toxic language. We then propose a defense mechanism against such attacks which not only mitigates the attack but also attempts to maintain the conversational flow. Through automatic and human evaluations, we show that our defense is effective at avoiding toxic language generation even against imperceptible toxicity triggers while the generated language fits the conversation in terms of coherency and relevancy. Lastly, we establish the generalizability of such a defense mechanism on language generation models beyond conversational agents.
abstract_zh: 警告：本文包含可能令人反感或令人不安的内容。自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域的最新研究推动了各种毒性检测模型的开发，旨在识别和减轻现有系统中的有毒语言。尽管该领域有大量研究，但对迫使系统生成有毒语言的对抗性攻击以及针对这些语言的防御的关注较少。生成此类攻击的现有工作要么基于成本高昂且不可扩展的人为攻击，要么在自动攻击的情况下，攻击向量不符合类人语言，这可以使用语言模型丢失来检测。在这项工作中，我们提出了针对难以察觉的会话代理的攻击，即它们在连贯性、相关性和流畅性方面适合会话，同时它们是有效且可扩展的，即它们可以自动触发系统生成有毒语言。然后，我们提出了一种针对此类攻击的防御机制，该机制不仅可以减轻攻击，还可以尝试维持对话流。通过自动和人工评估，我们表明，即使针对难以察觉的毒性触发因素，我们的防御也能有效避免有毒语言的生成，同时生成的语言在连贯性和相关性方面适合对话。最后，我们在会话代理之外的语言生成模型上建立了这种防御机制的普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对对话代理的不可感知毒性触发攻击方法，并设计防御机制以抵御此类攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有毒性检测模型未充分关注对抗性攻击问题，人工生成攻击成本高且自动攻击方法易被语言模型检测到。
AI.method: 设计符合对话连贯性、相关性和流畅性的自动攻击向量，并提出兼顾攻击缓解与对话流畅性的防御机制。
AI.result: 防御机制通过自动与人工评估验证，能有效阻止毒性语言生成且保持对话质量，且防御方法适用于更广泛的语言生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的防御机制具有普适性，可推广至除对话代理外的其他语言生成场景。

Recent research in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has advanced the development of various toxicity detection models with the intention of identifying and mitigating toxic language from existing systems. Despite the abundance of research in this area, less attention has been given to adversarial attacks that force the system to generate toxic language and the defense against them. Existing work to generate such attacks is either based on human-generated attacks which is costly and not scalable or, in case of automatic attacks, the attack vector does not conform to human-like language, which can be detected using a language model loss. In this work, we propose attacks against conversational agents that are imperceptible, i.e., they fit the conversation in terms of coherency, relevancy, and fluency, while they are effective and scalable, i.e., they can automatically trigger the system into generating toxic language. We then propose a defense mechanism against such attacks which not only mitigates the attack but also attempts to maintain the conversational flow. Through automatic and human evaluations, we show that our defense is effective at avoiding toxic language generation even against imperceptible toxicity triggers while the generated language fits the conversation in terms of coherency and relevancy. Lastly, we establish the generalizability of such a defense mechanism on language generation models beyond conversational agents. 警告：本文包含可能令人反感或令人不安的内容。自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域的最新研究推动了各种毒性检测模型的开发，旨在识别和减轻现有系统中的有毒语言。尽管该领域有大量研究，但对迫使系统生成有毒语言的对抗性攻击以及针对这些语言的防御的关注较少。生成此类攻击的现有工作要么基于成本高昂且不可扩展的人为攻击，要么在自动攻击的情况下，攻击向量不符合类人语言，这可以使用语言模型丢失来检测。在这项工作中，我们提出了针对难以察觉的会话代理的攻击，即它们在连贯性、相关性和流畅性方面适合会话，同时它们是有效且可扩展的，即它们可以自动触发系统生成有毒语言。然后，我们提出了一种针对此类攻击的防御机制，该机制不仅可以减轻攻击，还可以尝试维持对话流。通过自动和人工评估，我们表明，即使针对难以察觉的毒性触发因素，我们的防御也能有效避免有毒语言的生成，同时生成的语言在连贯性和相关性方面适合对话。最后，我们在会话代理之外的语言生成模型上建立了这种防御机制的普遍性。 本文提出针对对话代理的不可感知毒性触发攻击方法，并设计防御机制以抵御此类攻击。 Ninareh Mehrabi,Ahmad Beirami,Fred Morstatter,Aram Galstyan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Julia Kiseleva,Ziming Li,Mohammad Aliannejadi,Shrestha Mohanty,Maartje ter Hoeve,Mikhail Burtsev,Alexey Skrynnik,Artem Zholus,Aleksandr Panov,Kavya Srinet,Arthur Szlam,Yuxuan Sun,Marc-Alexandre Côté,Katja Hofmann,Ahmed Awadallah,Linar Abdrazakov,Igor Churin,Putra Manggala,Kata Naszadi,Michiel van der Meer,Taewoon Kim
title: Interactive Grounded Language Understanding in a Collaborative Environment: IGLU 2021
title_zh: 协作环境中的交互式基础语言理解：IGLU 2021
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.06536
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.06536
abstract: Human intelligence has the remarkable ability to quickly adapt to new tasks and environments. Starting from a very young age, humans acquire new skills and learn how to solve new tasks either by imitating the behavior of others or by following provided natural language instructions. To facilitate research in this direction, we propose \emph{IGLU: Interactive Grounded Language Understanding in a Collaborative Environment}. The primary goal of the competition is to approach the problem of how to build interactive agents that learn to solve a task while provided with grounded natural language instructions in a collaborative environment. Understanding the complexity of the challenge, we split it into sub-tasks to make it feasible for participants.
summary: Human intelligence has the remarkable ability to quickly adapt to new tasks and environments. Starting from a very young age, humans acquire new skills and learn how to solve new tasks either by imitating the behavior of others or by following provided natural language instructions. To facilitate research in this direction, we propose \emph{IGLU: Interactive Grounded Language Understanding in a Collaborative Environment}. The primary goal of the competition is to approach the problem of how to build interactive agents that learn to solve a task while provided with grounded natural language instructions in a collaborative environment. Understanding the complexity of the challenge, we split it into sub-tasks to make it feasible for participants.
abstract_zh: 人类智能具有快速适应新任务和环境的卓越能力。从很小的时候开始，人类就通过模仿他人的行为或遵循提供的自然语言指令来获得新技能并学习如何解决新任务。为了促进这个方向的研究，我们提出\emph{IGLU：协作环境中的交互式基础语言理解}。竞赛的主要目标是解决如何构建交互式代理的问题，该代理能够学习解决任务，同时在协作环境中提供基础的自然语言指令。了解挑战的复杂性后，我们将其分解为子任务，以使参与者能够实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IGLU 2021竞赛，旨在研究如何构建交互式智能体，在协作环境中通过自然语言指令学习解决新任务。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过模仿或语言指令快速适应新任务，但现有研究缺乏对协作环境中交互式语言理解的系统性探索。
AI.method: 设计包含多子任务的竞赛框架，要求智能体在协作场景中解析自然语言指令并完成任务。
AI.result: 通过竞赛形式推动了交互式语言理解算法的发展，为后续研究提供了标准化测试平台。
AI.conclusion: 交互式语言理解需结合环境交互与语言解析，竞赛形式有效促进了该领域技术进步。

authors_text: Nathan K. Long,Daniel Sgarioto,Matthew Garratt,Karl Sammut
title: Response Component Analysis for Sea State Estimation Using Artificial Neural Networks and Vessel Response Spectral Data
title_zh: 使用人工神经网络和船舶响应谱数据进行海况估计的响应分量分析
abstract: The use of the `ship as a wave buoy analogy' (SAWB) provides a novel means to estimate sea states, where relationships are established between causal wave properties and vessel motion response information. This study focuses on a model-free machine learning approach to SAWB-based sea state estimation (SSE), using neural networks (NNs) to map vessel response spectral data to statistical wave properties for a small uninhabited surface vessel. Results showed a strong correlation between heave responses and significant wave height estimates, whilst the accuracy of mean wave period and wave heading predictions were observed to improve considerably when data from multiple vessel degrees of freedom (DOFs) was utilized. Overall, 3-DOF (heave, pitch and roll) NNs for SSE were shown to perform well when compared to existing SSE approaches that use similar simulation setups. One advantage of using small vessels for SAWB was shown as SSE accuracy was reasonable even when motion responses were low (in high-frequency, low wave height sea states). Given the information-dense statistical representation of vessel motion responses in spectral form, as well as the ability of NNs to effectively model complex relationships between variables, the designed SSE method shows promise for future adaptation to mobile SSE systems using the SAWB approach.
summary: The use of the `ship as a wave buoy analogy' (SAWB) provides a novel means to estimate sea states, where relationships are established between causal wave properties and vessel motion response information. This study focuses on a model-free machine learning approach to SAWB-based sea state estimation (SSE), using neural networks (NNs) to map vessel response spectral data to statistical wave properties for a small uninhabited surface vessel. Results showed a strong correlation between heave responses and significant wave height estimates, whilst the accuracy of mean wave period and wave heading predictions were observed to improve considerably when data from multiple vessel degrees of freedom (DOFs) was utilized. Overall, 3-DOF (heave, pitch and roll) NNs for SSE were shown to perform well when compared to existing SSE approaches that use similar simulation setups. One advantage of using small vessels for SAWB was shown as SSE accuracy was reasonable even when motion responses were low (in high-frequency, low wave height sea states). Given the information-dense statistical representation of vessel motion responses in spectral form, as well as the ability of NNs to effectively model complex relationships between variables, the designed SSE method shows promise for future adaptation to mobile SSE systems using the SAWB approach.
abstract_zh: “船舶作为波浪浮标类比”（SAWB）的使用提供了一种估计海况的新方法，其中在因果波特性和船舶运动响应信息之间建立了关系。本研究重点关注基于 SAWB 的海况估计 (SSE) 的无模型机器学习方法，使用神经网络 (NN) 将船只响应光谱数据映射到小型无人居住水面船只的统计波浪特性。结果显示，升沉响应与有效波高估计之间存在很强的相关性，同时，当使用来自多个船舶自由度 (DOF) 的数据时，观察到平均波周期和波向预测的准确性显着提高。总体而言，与使用类似模拟设置的现有 SSE 方法相比，SSE 的 3-DOF（起伏、俯仰和横滚）神经网络表现良好。使用小型船舶进行 SAWB 的优点之一是，即使运动响应较低（在高频、低波高海况下），SSE 精度也是合理的。考虑到船舶运动响应的频谱形式的信息密集统计表示，以及神经网络有效建模变量之间复杂关系的能力，所设计的 SSE 方法有望在未来适应使用 SAWB 方法的移动 SSE 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工神经网络和船舶响应谱数据的无模型机器学习方法，用于通过船舶作为波浪浮标（SAWB）估算海况。
AI.motivation: 传统海况估算方法存在局限性，而利用小型无人船舶的多自由度响应数据可提升估算精度，尤其在低波高高频海况下表现更优。
AI.method: 采用神经网络将船舶响应谱数据（包括纵摇、横摇、垂荡）映射到统计波浪特性，通过多自由度数据融合提升预测准确性。
AI.result: 垂荡响应与有效波高估计呈强相关性，利用多自由度数据后平均波周期和波向预测精度显著提升，3-DOF神经网络性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过谱域数据密集表征和神经网络建模能力，为未来移动式海况估算系统提供了可行的SAWB技术路径。

title: A Bayesian Detect to Track System for Robust Visual Object Tracking and Semi-Supervised Model Learning
title_zh: 用于鲁棒视觉对象跟踪和半监督模型学习的贝叶斯检测跟踪系统
abstract: Object tracking is one of the fundamental problems in visual recognition tasks and has achieved significant improvements in recent years. The achievements often come with the price of enormous hardware consumption and expensive labor effort for consecutive labeling. A missing ingredient for robust tracking is achieving performance with minimal modification on network structure and semi-supervised learning intermittent labeled frames. In this paper, we ad-dress these problems in a Bayesian tracking and detection framework parameterized by neural network outputs. In our framework, the tracking and detection process is formulated in a probabilistic way as multi-objects dynamics and network detection uncertainties. With our formulation, we propose a particle filter-based approximate sampling algorithm for tracking object state estimation. Based on our particle filter inference algorithm, a semi-supervised learn-ing algorithm is utilized for learning tracking network on intermittent labeled frames by variational inference. In our experiments, we provide both mAP and probability-based detection measurements for comparison between our algorithm with non-Bayesian solutions. We also train a semi-supervised tracking network on M2Cai16-Tool-Locations Dataset and compare our results with supervised learning on fully labeled frames.
summary: Object tracking is one of the fundamental problems in visual recognition tasks and has achieved significant improvements in recent years. The achievements often come with the price of enormous hardware consumption and expensive labor effort for consecutive labeling. A missing ingredient for robust tracking is achieving performance with minimal modification on network structure and semi-supervised learning intermittent labeled frames. In this paper, we ad-dress these problems in a Bayesian tracking and detection framework parameterized by neural network outputs. In our framework, the tracking and detection process is formulated in a probabilistic way as multi-objects dynamics and network detection uncertainties. With our formulation, we propose a particle filter-based approximate sampling algorithm for tracking object state estimation. Based on our particle filter inference algorithm, a semi-supervised learn-ing algorithm is utilized for learning tracking network on intermittent labeled frames by variational inference. In our experiments, we provide both mAP and probability-based detection measurements for comparison between our algorithm with non-Bayesian solutions. We also train a semi-supervised tracking network on M2Cai16-Tool-Locations Dataset and compare our results with supervised learning on fully labeled frames.
abstract_zh: 目标跟踪是视觉识别任务中的基本问题之一，近年来取得了显着的进步。这些成就往往是以巨大的硬件消耗和连续贴标的昂贵劳动力为代价的。鲁棒跟踪所缺少的一个要素是通过对网络结构和半监督学习间歇性标记帧进行最小修改来实现性能。在本文中，我们在由神经网络输出参数化的贝叶斯跟踪和检测框架中解决了这些问题。在我们的框架中，跟踪和检测过程以概率方式表示为多目标动力学和网络检测不确定性。通过我们的公式，我们提出了一种基于粒子滤波器的近似采样算法，用于跟踪对象状态估计。基于我们的粒子过滤推理算法，半监督学习算法用于通过变分推理在间歇标记帧上学习跟踪网络。在我们的实验中，我们提供了 mAP 和基于概率的检测测量，以便将我们的算法与非贝叶斯解决方案进行比较。我们还在 M2Cai16-Tool-Locations 数据集上训练半监督跟踪网络，并将我们的结果与完全标记帧上的监督学习进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯框架的检测跟踪系统，旨在通过减少网络结构修改和利用半监督学习实现鲁棒的视觉目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统目标跟踪方法依赖大量标注数据和硬件资源，而半监督学习可减少标注依赖，但如何有效结合贝叶斯方法处理检测不确定性及间歇性标注是关键挑战。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯跟踪检测框架，通过粒子滤波近似采样算法估计目标状态，并基于变分推断实现半监督学习，利用间歇标注帧训练跟踪网络。
AI.result: 在M2Cai16数据集上，通过mAP和概率检测指标验证了方法在间歇标注场景下优于非贝叶斯方案，且半监督模型性能接近全监督结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了标注效率与跟踪鲁棒性，为减少人工标注依赖的视觉跟踪提供了新思路，未来可拓展至更多动态场景。

search_text: A Bayesian Detect to Track System for Robust Visual Object Tracking and Semi-Supervised Model Learning 用于鲁棒视觉对象跟踪和半监督模型学习的贝叶斯检测跟踪系统 Object tracking is one of the fundamental problems in visual recognition tasks and has achieved significant improvements in recent years. The achievements often come with the price of enormous hardware consumption and expensive labor effort for consecutive labeling. A missing ingredient for robust tracking is achieving performance with minimal modification on network structure and semi-supervised learning intermittent labeled frames. In this paper, we ad-dress these problems in a Bayesian tracking and detection framework parameterized by neural network outputs. In our framework, the tracking and detection process is formulated in a probabilistic way as multi-objects dynamics and network detection uncertainties. With our formulation, we propose a particle filter-based approximate sampling algorithm for tracking object state estimation. Based on our particle filter inference algorithm, a semi-supervised learn-ing algorithm is utilized for learning tracking network on intermittent labeled frames by variational inference. In our experiments, we provide both mAP and probability-based detection measurements for comparison between our algorithm with non-Bayesian solutions. We also train a semi-supervised tracking network on M2Cai16-Tool-Locations Dataset and compare our results with supervised learning on fully labeled frames. 目标跟踪是视觉识别任务中的基本问题之一，近年来取得了显着的进步。这些成就往往是以巨大的硬件消耗和连续贴标的昂贵劳动力为代价的。鲁棒跟踪所缺少的一个要素是通过对网络结构和半监督学习间歇性标记帧进行最小修改来实现性能。在本文中，我们在由神经网络输出参数化的贝叶斯跟踪和检测框架中解决了这些问题。在我们的框架中，跟踪和检测过程以概率方式表示为多目标动力学和网络检测不确定性。通过我们的公式，我们提出了一种基于粒子滤波器的近似采样算法，用于跟踪对象状态估计。基于我们的粒子过滤推理算法，半监督学习算法用于通过变分推理在间歇标记帧上学习跟踪网络。在我们的实验中，我们提供了 mAP 和基于概率的检测测量，以便将我们的算法与非贝叶斯解决方案进行比较。我们还在 M2Cai16-Tool-Locations 数据集上训练半监督跟踪网络，并将我们的结果与完全标记帧上的监督学习进行比较。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯框架的检测跟踪系统，旨在通过减少网络结构修改和利用半监督学习实现鲁棒的视觉目标跟踪。 Yan Shen,Zhanghexuan Ji,Chunwei Ma,Mingchen Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Negar Arabzadeh,Ali Ahmadvand,Julia Kiseleva,Yang Liu,Ahmed Hassan Awadallah,Ming Zhong,Milad Shokouhi
title: PREME: Preference-based Meeting Exploration through an Interactive Questionnaire
title_zh: PREME：通过交互式问卷进行基于偏好的会议探索
abstract: The recent increase in the volume of online meetings necessitates automated tools for managing and organizing the material, especially when an attendee has missed the discussion and needs assistance in quickly exploring it. In this work, we propose a novel end-to-end framework for generating interactive questionnaires for preference-based meeting exploration. As a result, users are supplied with a list of suggested questions reflecting their preferences. Since the task is new, we introduce an automatic evaluation strategy. Namely, it measures how much the generated questions via questionnaire are answerable to ensure factual correctness and covers the source meeting for the depth of possible exploration.
summary: The recent increase in the volume of online meetings necessitates automated tools for managing and organizing the material, especially when an attendee has missed the discussion and needs assistance in quickly exploring it. In this work, we propose a novel end-to-end framework for generating interactive questionnaires for preference-based meeting exploration. As a result, users are supplied with a list of suggested questions reflecting their preferences. Since the task is new, we introduce an automatic evaluation strategy. Namely, it measures how much the generated questions via questionnaire are answerable to ensure factual correctness and covers the source meeting for the depth of possible exploration.
abstract_zh: 最近在线会议数量的增加需要自动化工具来管理和组织材料，特别是当与会者错过了讨论并需要快速探索讨论的帮助时。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，用于生成基于偏好的会议探索的交互式问卷。结果，向用户提供了反映他们偏好的建议问题列表。由于任务是新的，我们引入了自动评估策略。也就是说，它衡量通过问卷生成的问题有多少是可以回答的，以确保事实正确性，并覆盖源会议以实现可能探索的深度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于偏好的交互式问卷框架PREME，用于帮助用户快速探索在线会议内容。
AI.motivation: 在线会议数量激增导致参会者难以高效获取错过讨论的核心信息，传统方法无法满足个性化探索需求。
AI.method: 设计端到端框架生成交互式问卷，结合用户偏好生成问题列表，并引入自动评估策略验证问题的可回答性与覆盖范围。
AI.result: 实验验证了框架生成问卷的有效性，自动评估策略能准确衡量问题质量与会议内容覆盖深度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为个性化会议内容探索提供新思路，自动评估策略为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Suyeon Choi,Manu Gopakumar,Yifan,Peng,Jonghyun Kim,Matthew O'Toole,Gordon Wetzstein
title: Time-multiplexed Neural Holography: A flexible framework for holographic near-eye displays with fast heavily-quantized spatial light modulators
title_zh: 时分复用神经全息术：具有快速重量化空间光调制器的全息近眼显示器的灵活框架
abstract: Holographic near-eye displays offer unprecedented capabilities for virtual and augmented reality systems, including perceptually important focus cues. Although artificial intelligence--driven algorithms for computer-generated holography (CGH) have recently made much progress in improving the image quality and synthesis efficiency of holograms, these algorithms are not directly applicable to emerging phase-only spatial light modulators (SLM) that are extremely fast but offer phase control with very limited precision. The speed of these SLMs offers time multiplexing capabilities, essentially enabling partially-coherent holographic display modes. Here we report advances in camera-calibrated wave propagation models for these types of holographic near-eye displays and we develop a CGH framework that robustly optimizes the heavily quantized phase patterns of fast SLMs. Our framework is flexible in supporting runtime supervision with different types of content, including 2D and 2.5D RGBD images, 3D focal stacks, and 4D light fields. Using our framework, we demonstrate state-of-the-art results for all of these scenarios in simulation and experiment.
summary: Holographic near-eye displays offer unprecedented capabilities for virtual and augmented reality systems, including perceptually important focus cues. Although artificial intelligence--driven algorithms for computer-generated holography (CGH) have recently made much progress in improving the image quality and synthesis efficiency of holograms, these algorithms are not directly applicable to emerging phase-only spatial light modulators (SLM) that are extremely fast but offer phase control with very limited precision. The speed of these SLMs offers time multiplexing capabilities, essentially enabling partially-coherent holographic display modes. Here we report advances in camera-calibrated wave propagation models for these types of holographic near-eye displays and we develop a CGH framework that robustly optimizes the heavily quantized phase patterns of fast SLMs. Our framework is flexible in supporting runtime supervision with different types of content, including 2D and 2.5D RGBD images, 3D focal stacks, and 4D light fields. Using our framework, we demonstrate state-of-the-art results for all of these scenarios in simulation and experiment.
abstract_zh: 全息近眼显示器为虚拟和增强现实系统提供了前所未有的功能，包括感知上重要的焦点线索。尽管人工智能驱动的计算机生成全息术（CGH）算法最近在提高全息图的图像质量和合成效率方面取得了很大进展，但这些算法并不直接适用于新兴的纯相位空间光调制器（SLM），这种调制器速度极快，但提供精度非常有限的相位控制。这些 SLM 的速度提供了时间复用功能，基本上实现了部分相干的全息显示模式。在这里，我们报告了这些类型的全息近眼显示器的相机校准波传播模型的进展，并且我们开发了一个 CGH 框架，可以稳健地优化快速 SLM 的高度量化相位模式。我们的框架可以灵活地支持不同类型内容的运行时监控，包括 2D 和 2.5D RGBD 图像、3D 焦点堆栈和 4D 光场。使用我们的框架，我们在模拟和实验中展示了所有这些场景的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间复用的神经全息框架，用于支持快速高度量化空间光调制器的全息近眼显示。
AI.motivation: 现有AI驱动的全息算法无法直接应用于新兴的高速低精度相位型空间光调制器，需开发适配该硬件特性的全息生成框架。
AI.method: 建立相机校准的波传播模型，开发可稳健优化高度量化相位模式的CGH框架，支持运行时监督的多类型内容处理（2D/2.5D/3D/4D）。
AI.result: 在模拟和实验中实现了针对多种内容场景的最先进全息显示效果，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为全息近眼显示提供了灵活解决方案，可适配不同内容类型并发挥高速SLM的时间复用优势。

method: 建立相机校准的波传播模型，开发可稳健优化高度量化相位模式的CGH框架，支持运行时监督的多类型内容处理（2D/2.5D/3D/4D）。
result: 在模拟和实验中实现了针对多种内容场景的最先进全息显示效果，验证了框架的有效性。
conclusion: 该框架为全息近眼显示提供了灵活解决方案，可适配不同内容类型并发挥高速SLM的时间复用优势。
search_text: Time-multiplexed Neural Holography: A flexible framework for holographic near-eye displays with fast heavily-quantized spatial light modulators 时分复用神经全息术：具有快速重量化空间光调制器的全息近眼显示器的灵活框架 Holographic near-eye displays offer unprecedented capabilities for virtual and augmented reality systems, including perceptually important focus cues. Although artificial intelligence--driven algorithms for computer-generated holography (CGH) have recently made much progress in improving the image quality and synthesis efficiency of holograms, these algorithms are not directly applicable to emerging phase-only spatial light modulators (SLM) that are extremely fast but offer phase control with very limited precision. The speed of these SLMs offers time multiplexing capabilities, essentially enabling partially-coherent holographic display modes. Here we report advances in camera-calibrated wave propagation models for these types of holographic near-eye displays and we develop a CGH framework that robustly optimizes the heavily quantized phase patterns of fast SLMs. Our framework is flexible in supporting runtime supervision with different types of content, including 2D and 2.5D RGBD images, 3D focal stacks, and 4D light fields. Using our framework, we demonstrate state-of-the-art results for all of these scenarios in simulation and experiment. 全息近眼显示器为虚拟和增强现实系统提供了前所未有的功能，包括感知上重要的焦点线索。尽管人工智能驱动的计算机生成全息术（CGH）算法最近在提高全息图的图像质量和合成效率方面取得了很大进展，但这些算法并不直接适用于新兴的纯相位空间光调制器（SLM），这种调制器速度极快，但提供精度非常有限的相位控制。这些 SLM 的速度提供了时间复用功能，基本上实现了部分相干的全息显示模式。在这里，我们报告了这些类型的全息近眼显示器的相机校准波传播模型的进展，并且我们开发了一个 CGH 框架，可以稳健地优化快速 SLM 的高度量化相位模式。我们的框架可以灵活地支持不同类型内容的运行时监控，包括 2D 和 2.5D RGBD 图像、3D 焦点堆栈和 4D 光场。使用我们的框架，我们在模拟和实验中展示了所有这些场景的最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于时间复用的神经全息框架，用于支持快速高度量化空间光调制器的全息近眼显示。 Suyeon Choi,Manu Gopakumar,Yifan,Peng,Jonghyun Kim,Matthew O'Toole,Gordon Wetzstein cs.GR,cs.AI,physics.comp-ph,physics.optics

authors_text: Samia Shafique,Bailey Kong,Shu Kong,Charless C. Fowlkes
title: Creating a Forensic Database of Shoeprints from Online Shoe Tread Photos
title_zh: 从在线鞋履照片创建鞋印法医数据库
comment: published in WACV 2023; 8 pages including 11 figures and 3 tables; contains reference and appendix
comments: published in WACV 2023; 8 pages including 11 figures and 3 tables; contains reference and appendix
abstract: Shoe tread impressions are one of the most common types of evidence left at crime scenes. However, the utility of such evidence is limited by the lack of databases of footwear prints that cover the large and growing number of distinct shoe models. Moreover, the database is preferred to contain the 3D shape, or depth, of shoe-tread photos so as to allow for extracting shoeprints to match a query (crime-scene) print. We propose to address this gap by leveraging shoe-tread photos collected by online retailers. The core challenge is to predict depth maps for these photos. As they do not have ground-truth 3D shapes allowing for training depth predictors, we exploit synthetic data that does. We develop a method termed ShoeRinsics that learns to predict depth by leveraging a mix of fully supervised synthetic data and unsupervised retail image data. In particular, we find domain adaptation and intrinsic image decomposition techniques effectively mitigate the synthetic-real domain gap and yield significantly better depth prediction. To validate our method, we introduce 2 validation sets consisting of shoe-tread image and print pairs and define a benchmarking protocol to quantify the quality of predicted depth. On this benchmark, ShoeRinsics outperforms existing methods of depth prediction and synthetic-to-real domain adaptation.
summary: Shoe tread impressions are one of the most common types of evidence left at crime scenes. However, the utility of such evidence is limited by the lack of databases of footwear prints that cover the large and growing number of distinct shoe models. Moreover, the database is preferred to contain the 3D shape, or depth, of shoe-tread photos so as to allow for extracting shoeprints to match a query (crime-scene) print. We propose to address this gap by leveraging shoe-tread photos collected by online retailers. The core challenge is to predict depth maps for these photos. As they do not have ground-truth 3D shapes allowing for training depth predictors, we exploit synthetic data that does. We develop a method termed ShoeRinsics that learns to predict depth by leveraging a mix of fully supervised synthetic data and unsupervised retail image data. In particular, we find domain adaptation and intrinsic image decomposition techniques effectively mitigate the synthetic-real domain gap and yield significantly better depth prediction. To validate our method, we introduce 2 validation sets consisting of shoe-tread image and print pairs and define a benchmarking protocol to quantify the quality of predicted depth. On this benchmark, ShoeRinsics outperforms existing methods of depth prediction and synthetic-to-real domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 鞋印是犯罪现场留下的最常见的证据类型之一。然而，由于缺乏涵盖大量且不断增加的不同鞋款的鞋类印刷数据库，此类证据的效用受到限制。此外，数据库优选包含鞋底照片的 3D 形状或深度，以便允许提取鞋印以匹配查询（犯罪现场）打印。我们建议通过利用在线零售商收集的鞋履照片来解决这一差距。核心挑战是预测这些照片的深度图。由于它们没有允许训练深度预测器的真实 3D 形状，因此我们利用了可以训练深度预测器的合成数据。我们开发了一种名为 ShoeRinsics 的方法，该方法通过利用完全监督的合成数据和无监督的零售图像数据的组合来学习预测深度。特别是，我们发现域适应和内在图像分解技术有效地减轻了合成与真实域的差距，并产生了更好的深度预测。为了验证我们的方法，我们引入了 2 个由鞋面图像和打印对组成的验证集，并定义了一个基准测试协议来量化预测深度的质量。在此基准测试中，ShoeRinsics 优于现有的深度预测和合成到真实域适应方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过在线鞋底照片构建包含3D深度信息的法医鞋印数据库，以提升犯罪现场鞋印证据的匹配效率。
AI.motivation: 现有鞋印数据库缺乏覆盖多样鞋款的3D深度数据，导致无法有效匹配犯罪现场的鞋印证据，亟需利用在线零售商图像补充数据并解决合成与真实图像的差异问题。
AI.method: 提出ShoeRinsics方法，结合全监督合成数据与无监督零售图像数据，通过领域自适应和内在图像分解技术减少合成-真实图像差异，实现深度图预测。
AI.result: 在包含鞋底图像与印痕对的验证集上，ShoeRinsics在深度预测任务中显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了鞋印数据库的3D深度数据缺口，提出的深度预测方法为法医鞋印分析提供了新工具，推动了合成数据与真实场景的跨域应用。

title: GitRank: A Framework to Rank GitHub Repositories
title_zh: GitRank：对 GitHub 存储库进行排名的框架
comment: 3 pages, 1 figure; to be published in Mining Software Repositories 2022 conference (hackathon)
comments: 3 pages, 1 figure; to be published in Mining Software Repositories 2022 conference (hackathon)
abstract: Open-source repositories provide wealth of information and are increasingly being used to build artificial intelligence (AI) based systems to solve problems in software engineering. Open-source repositories could be of varying quality levels, and bad-quality repositories could degrade performance of these systems. Evaluating quality of open-source repositories, which is not available directly on code hosting sites such as GitHub, is thus important. In this hackathon, we utilize known code quality measures and GrimoireLab toolkit to implement a framework, named GitRank, to rank open-source repositories on three different criteria. We discuss our findings and preliminary evaluation in this hackathon report.
summary: Open-source repositories provide wealth of information and are increasingly being used to build artificial intelligence (AI) based systems to solve problems in software engineering. Open-source repositories could be of varying quality levels, and bad-quality repositories could degrade performance of these systems. Evaluating quality of open-source repositories, which is not available directly on code hosting sites such as GitHub, is thus important. In this hackathon, we utilize known code quality measures and GrimoireLab toolkit to implement a framework, named GitRank, to rank open-source repositories on three different criteria. We discuss our findings and preliminary evaluation in this hackathon report.
abstract_zh: 开源存储库提供了丰富的信息，并且越来越多地用于构建基于人工智能 (AI) 的系统来解决软件工程中的问题。开源存储库的质量水平可能各不相同，质量差的存储库可能会降低这些系统的性能。因此，评估开源存储库的质量非常重要，因为开源存储库无法直接在 GitHub 等代码托管网站上获得。在本次黑客马拉松中，我们利用已知的代码质量衡量标准和 GrimoireLab 工具包来实现一个名为 GitRank 的框架，根据三个不同的标准对开源存储库进行排名。我们在这份黑客马拉松报告中讨论了我们的发现和初步评估。

AI.tldr: 开发名为GitRank的框架，根据三个标准对GitHub开源仓库进行排名。
AI.motivation: 开源仓库质量参差不齐，低质量仓库可能影响AI系统性能，但GitHub等平台未直接提供质量评估。
AI.method: 结合代码质量度量指标与GrimoireLab工具包，构建GitRank框架实现多维度仓库排名。
AI.result: 完成框架实现并讨论了初步评估结果，但未明确具体数值表现。
AI.conclusion: GitRank为开源仓库质量评估提供了可行方法，需进一步验证其有效性。

authors_text: Xiang Chen,Ningyu Zhang,Lei Li,Shumin Deng,Chuanqi Tan,Changliang Xu,Fei Huang,Luo Si,Huajun Chen
title: Hybrid Transformer with Multi-level Fusion for Multimodal Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 具有多级融合的混合变压器用于多模态知识图补全
comment: Accepted by SIGIR 2022. Fix a severe bug
comments: Accepted by SIGIR 2022. Fix a severe bug
abstract: Multimodal Knowledge Graphs (MKGs), which organize visual-text factual knowledge, have recently been successfully applied to tasks such as information retrieval, question answering, and recommendation system. Since most MKGs are far from complete, extensive knowledge graph completion studies have been proposed focusing on the multimodal entity, relation extraction and link prediction. However, different tasks and modalities require changes to the model architecture, and not all images/objects are relevant to text input, which hinders the applicability to diverse real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a hybrid transformer with multi-level fusion to address those issues. Specifically, we leverage a hybrid transformer architecture with unified input-output for diverse multimodal knowledge graph completion tasks. Moreover, we propose multi-level fusion, which integrates visual and text representation via coarse-grained prefix-guided interaction and fine-grained correlation-aware fusion modules. We conduct extensive experiments to validate that our MKGformer can obtain SOTA performance on four datasets of multimodal link prediction, multimodal RE, and multimodal NER. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/MKGformer.
summary: Multimodal Knowledge Graphs (MKGs), which organize visual-text factual knowledge, have recently been successfully applied to tasks such as information retrieval, question answering, and recommendation system. Since most MKGs are far from complete, extensive knowledge graph completion studies have been proposed focusing on the multimodal entity, relation extraction and link prediction. However, different tasks and modalities require changes to the model architecture, and not all images/objects are relevant to text input, which hinders the applicability to diverse real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a hybrid transformer with multi-level fusion to address those issues. Specifically, we leverage a hybrid transformer architecture with unified input-output for diverse multimodal knowledge graph completion tasks. Moreover, we propose multi-level fusion, which integrates visual and text representation via coarse-grained prefix-guided interaction and fine-grained correlation-aware fusion modules. We conduct extensive experiments to validate that our MKGformer can obtain SOTA performance on four datasets of multimodal link prediction, multimodal RE, and multimodal NER. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/MKGformer.
abstract_zh: 组织视觉文本事实知识的多模态知识图（MKG）最近已成功应用于信息检索、问答和推荐系统等任务。由于大多数 MKG 远未完成，因此人们提出了广泛的知识图补全研究，重点关注多模态实体、关系提取和链接预测。然而，不同的任务和模式需要改变模型架构，并且并非所有图像/对象都与文本输入相关，这阻碍了对不同现实场景的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有多级融合的混合变压器来解决这些问题。具体来说，我们利用具有统一输入输出的混合变压器架构来完成各种多模态知识图任务。此外，我们提出了多级融合，它通过粗粒度前缀引导交互和细粒度相关感知融合模块集成了视觉和文本表示。我们进行了大量的实验来验证我们的 MKGformer 可以在多模态链路预测、多模态 RE 和多模态 NER 四个数据集上获得 SOTA 性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/MKGformer 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合Transformer与多级融合方法，用于解决多模态知识图谱补全任务中的模型架构多样性及模态相关性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需针对不同任务和模态调整模型架构，且非所有图像与文本相关，限制了模型在真实场景中的适用性。
AI.method: 设计统一输入输出的混合Transformer架构，并引入多级融合机制，包含粗粒度前缀引导交互与细粒度关联感知融合模块。
AI.result: 在四个多模态数据集的链接预测、关系抽取和命名实体识别任务中取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一架构和多级融合有效提升多模态知识图谱补全的灵活性与准确性，适用于多样化实际场景。

search_text: Hybrid Transformer with Multi-level Fusion for Multimodal Knowledge Graph Completion 具有多级融合的混合变压器用于多模态知识图补全 Multimodal Knowledge Graphs (MKGs), which organize visual-text factual knowledge, have recently been successfully applied to tasks such as information retrieval, question answering, and recommendation system. Since most MKGs are far from complete, extensive knowledge graph completion studies have been proposed focusing on the multimodal entity, relation extraction and link prediction. However, different tasks and modalities require changes to the model architecture, and not all images/objects are relevant to text input, which hinders the applicability to diverse real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a hybrid transformer with multi-level fusion to address those issues. Specifically, we leverage a hybrid transformer architecture with unified input-output for diverse multimodal knowledge graph completion tasks. Moreover, we propose multi-level fusion, which integrates visual and text representation via coarse-grained prefix-guided interaction and fine-grained correlation-aware fusion modules. We conduct extensive experiments to validate that our MKGformer can obtain SOTA performance on four datasets of multimodal link prediction, multimodal RE, and multimodal NER. Code is available in https://github.com/zjunlp/MKGformer. 组织视觉文本事实知识的多模态知识图（MKG）最近已成功应用于信息检索、问答和推荐系统等任务。由于大多数 MKG 远未完成，因此人们提出了广泛的知识图补全研究，重点关注多模态实体、关系提取和链接预测。然而，不同的任务和模式需要改变模型架构，并且并非所有图像/对象都与文本输入相关，这阻碍了对不同现实场景的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有多级融合的混合变压器来解决这些问题。具体来说，我们利用具有统一输入输出的混合变压器架构来完成各种多模态知识图任务。此外，我们提出了多级融合，它通过粗粒度前缀引导交互和细粒度相关感知融合模块集成了视觉和文本表示。我们进行了大量的实验来验证我们的 MKGformer 可以在多模态链路预测、多模态 RE 和多模态 NER 四个数据集上获得 SOTA 性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/MKGformer 中找到。 本文提出一种混合Transformer与多级融合方法，用于解决多模态知识图谱补全任务中的模型架构多样性及模态相关性问题。 Xiang Chen,Ningyu Zhang,Lei Li,Shumin Deng,Chuanqi Tan,Changliang Xu,Fei Huang,Luo Si,Huajun Chen cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Xiang Chen,Lei Li,Ningyu Zhang,Chuanqi Tan,Fei Huang,Luo Si,Huajun Chen
title: Relation Extraction as Open-book Examination: Retrieval-enhanced Prompt Tuning
title_zh: 关系抽取作为开卷考试：检索增强的提示调优
abstract: Pre-trained language models have contributed significantly to relation extraction by demonstrating remarkable few-shot learning abilities. However, prompt tuning methods for relation extraction may still fail to generalize to those rare or hard patterns. Note that the previous parametric learning paradigm can be viewed as memorization regarding training data as a book and inference as the close-book test. Those long-tailed or hard patterns can hardly be memorized in parameters given few-shot instances. To this end, we regard RE as an open-book examination and propose a new semiparametric paradigm of retrieval-enhanced prompt tuning for relation extraction. We construct an open-book datastore for retrieval regarding prompt-based instance representations and corresponding relation labels as memorized key-value pairs. During inference, the model can infer relations by linearly interpolating the base output of PLM with the non-parametric nearest neighbor distribution over the datastore. In this way, our model not only infers relation through knowledge stored in the weights during training but also assists decision-making by unwinding and querying examples in the open-book datastore. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method can achieve state-of-the-art in both standard supervised and few-shot settings. Code are available in https://github.com/zjunlp/PromptKG/tree/main/research/RetrievalRE.
summary: Pre-trained language models have contributed significantly to relation extraction by demonstrating remarkable few-shot learning abilities. However, prompt tuning methods for relation extraction may still fail to generalize to those rare or hard patterns. Note that the previous parametric learning paradigm can be viewed as memorization regarding training data as a book and inference as the close-book test. Those long-tailed or hard patterns can hardly be memorized in parameters given few-shot instances. To this end, we regard RE as an open-book examination and propose a new semiparametric paradigm of retrieval-enhanced prompt tuning for relation extraction. We construct an open-book datastore for retrieval regarding prompt-based instance representations and corresponding relation labels as memorized key-value pairs. During inference, the model can infer relations by linearly interpolating the base output of PLM with the non-parametric nearest neighbor distribution over the datastore. In this way, our model not only infers relation through knowledge stored in the weights during training but also assists decision-making by unwinding and querying examples in the open-book datastore. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method can achieve state-of-the-art in both standard supervised and few-shot settings. Code are available in https://github.com/zjunlp/PromptKG/tree/main/research/RetrievalRE.
abstract_zh: 预训练的语言模型通过展示出色的小样本学习能力，对关系提取做出了重大贡献。然而，用于关系提取的即时调整方法可能仍然无法推广到那些罕见或困难的模式。请注意，之前的参数学习范式可以被视为将训练数据视为一本书的记忆，将推理视为闭卷测试。在给定少数样本实例的参数中，很难记住那些长尾或硬模式。为此，我们将RE视为一种开卷考试，并提出了一种用于关系提取的检索增强提示调整的新半参数范式。我们构建了一个开放式数据存储，用于检索基于提示的实例表示和相应的关系标签作为记忆的键值对。在推理过程中，模型可以通过将 PLM 的基本输出与数据存储上的非参数最近邻分布进行线性插值来推断关系。这样，我们的模型不仅可以通过训练期间存储在权重中的知识来推断关系，还可以通过展开和查询开卷数据存储中的示例来协助决策。对基准数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以在标准监督和少样本设置中实现最先进的效果。代码可在 https://github.com/zjunlp/PromptKG/tree/main/research/RetrievalRE 中找到。

AI.tldr: 将关系抽取视为开卷考试，提出检索增强的提示调优方法，通过结合预训练模型参数与外部知识库实现更优泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有提示调优方法在处理罕见或复杂关系时泛化能力不足，参数学习范式类似闭卷考试难以有效利用外部知识。
AI.method: 构建开放知识库存储提示表示与关系标签，推理时通过线性插值预训练模型输出与最近邻检索结果实现半参数决策。
AI.result: 在标准监督和少样本基准数据集上达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合参数化知识与检索知识，有效提升了关系抽取模型在长尾和困难模式下的性能。

title: On Preemptive Scheduling of Unrelated Machines Using Linear Programming
title_zh: 利用线性规划对不相关机器进行抢先调度
abstract: We consider a basic problem of preemptive scheduling of $n$ non-simultaneously released jobs on a group of $m$ unrelated parallel machines so as to minimize maximum job completion time, the makespan. In the scheduling literature, the problem is commonly considered to be solvable in polynomial time by linear programming (LP) techniques proposed in Lawler and Labetoulle \cite{ll78}. The authors in \cite{ll78} give a LP formulation of the version with simultaneously released jobs and show how an optimal solution to this LP can be used to construct an optimal schedule to the latter problem. As the current study shows, for non-simultaneously released jobs, unlikely, there exist a linear program such that a schedule with the minimum makespan can be constructed based on an optimal LP solution. We also prove that, in case no splitting of the same job on a machine is allowed (i.e., job part assigned to a machine is to be processed without an interruption on that machine), the problem is NP-hard. As a side result, we obtain that, whenever job splitting is not allowed, given an optimal LP solution, it is NP-hard to find an optimal schedule with the minimum makespan that agrees with that LP solution. We also extend the schedule construction procedure based on an optimal LP solution from Lawler and Labetoulle \cite{ll78} for non-simultaneously released jobs. The extended procedure, among all feasible schedules that agree with any feasible (not necessarily optimal) LP solution, generates one with the minimum makespan. Such procedure is helpful, in particular, because, as we show, there may exist no optimal schedule that agrees with an optimal LP solution if jobs are non-simultaneously released.
summary: We consider a basic problem of preemptive scheduling of $n$ non-simultaneously released jobs on a group of $m$ unrelated parallel machines so as to minimize maximum job completion time, the makespan. In the scheduling literature, the problem is commonly considered to be solvable in polynomial time by linear programming (LP) techniques proposed in Lawler and Labetoulle \cite{ll78}. The authors in \cite{ll78} give a LP formulation of the version with simultaneously released jobs and show how an optimal solution to this LP can be used to construct an optimal schedule to the latter problem. As the current study shows, for non-simultaneously released jobs, unlikely, there exist a linear program such that a schedule with the minimum makespan can be constructed based on an optimal LP solution. We also prove that, in case no splitting of the same job on a machine is allowed (i.e., job part assigned to a machine is to be processed without an interruption on that machine), the problem is NP-hard. As a side result, we obtain that, whenever job splitting is not allowed, given an optimal LP solution, it is NP-hard to find an optimal schedule with the minimum makespan that agrees with that LP solution. We also extend the schedule construction procedure based on an optimal LP solution from Lawler and Labetoulle \cite{ll78} for non-simultaneously released jobs. The extended procedure, among all feasible schedules that agree with any feasible (not necessarily optimal) LP solution, generates one with the minimum makespan. Such procedure is helpful, in particular, because, as we show, there may exist no optimal schedule that agrees with an optimal LP solution if jobs are non-simultaneously released.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个基本问题，即在一组 $m$ 个不相关的并行机器上对 $n$ 个非同时发布的作业进行抢占式调度，以最小化最大作业完成时间（即完工时间）。在调度文献中，该问题通常被认为可以通过 Lawler 和 Labetoulle \cite{ll78} 中提出的线性规划（LP）技术在多项式时间内解决。 \cite{ll78} 中的作者给出了同时发布作业的版本的 LP 公式，并展示了如何使用该 LP 的最优解来构建后一个问题的最优调度。正如目前的研究表明，对于非同时发布的工作，不太可能存在一个线性程序，使得可以基于最优LP解决方案构建具有最小完工时间的进度表。我们还证明，如果不允许在一台机器上拆分同一作业（即分配给一台机器的作业部分要在该机器上不间断地处理），则该问题是 NP 困难的。作为一个附带结果，我们发现，每当不允许作业分割时，给定最佳 LP 解决方案，找到与该 LP 解决方案一致的最小完工时间的最佳调度是 NP 困难的。我们还根据 Lawler 和 Labetoulle \cite{ll78} 的最佳 LP 解决方案扩展了进度表构建过程，以实现非同时发布的作业。在与任何可行（不一定是最佳）LP 解决方案一致的所有可行计划中，扩展程序会生成具有最小完工时间的计划。这种过程特别有用，因为正如我们所表明的，如果作业不同时释放，则可能不存在与最优 LP 解决方案一致的最优调度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非同时释放作业在无关机器上的预调度问题，探讨线性规划方法在该场景下的适用性及复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法认为线性规划可解决同时释放作业的调度问题，但非同时释放场景的可行性尚未明确，且作业分割限制下的复杂性需进一步分析。
AI.method: 扩展Lawler和Labetoulle的线性规划方法，结合理论证明分析非同时释放作业的复杂性，并验证调度构造算法的适用性。
AI.result: 证明非同时释放作业不存在对应的线性规划模型；无作业分割时问题为NP难，且无法从最优LP解直接构造最优调度；扩展算法可生成符合任意LP解的最小makespan调度。
AI.conclusion: 线性规划在非同时释放场景存在局限性，作业分割限制显著提升问题复杂性，扩展方法虽有效但可能无法保证与最优LP解的兼容性。

search_text: On Preemptive Scheduling of Unrelated Machines Using Linear Programming 利用线性规划对不相关机器进行抢先调度 We consider a basic problem of preemptive scheduling of $n$ non-simultaneously released jobs on a group of $m$ unrelated parallel machines so as to minimize maximum job completion time, the makespan. In the scheduling literature, the problem is commonly considered to be solvable in polynomial time by linear programming (LP) techniques proposed in Lawler and Labetoulle \cite{ll78}. The authors in \cite{ll78} give a LP formulation of the version with simultaneously released jobs and show how an optimal solution to this LP can be used to construct an optimal schedule to the latter problem. As the current study shows, for non-simultaneously released jobs, unlikely, there exist a linear program such that a schedule with the minimum makespan can be constructed based on an optimal LP solution. We also prove that, in case no splitting of the same job on a machine is allowed (i.e., job part assigned to a machine is to be processed without an interruption on that machine), the problem is NP-hard. As a side result, we obtain that, whenever job splitting is not allowed, given an optimal LP solution, it is NP-hard to find an optimal schedule with the minimum makespan that agrees with that LP solution. We also extend the schedule construction procedure based on an optimal LP solution from Lawler and Labetoulle \cite{ll78} for non-simultaneously released jobs. The extended procedure, among all feasible schedules that agree with any feasible (not necessarily optimal) LP solution, generates one with the minimum makespan. Such procedure is helpful, in particular, because, as we show, there may exist no optimal schedule that agrees with an optimal LP solution if jobs are non-simultaneously released. 我们考虑一个基本问题，即在一组 $m$ 个不相关的并行机器上对 $n$ 个非同时发布的作业进行抢占式调度，以最小化最大作业完成时间（即完工时间）。在调度文献中，该问题通常被认为可以通过 Lawler 和 Labetoulle \cite{ll78} 中提出的线性规划（LP）技术在多项式时间内解决。 \cite{ll78} 中的作者给出了同时发布作业的版本的 LP 公式，并展示了如何使用该 LP 的最优解来构建后一个问题的最优调度。正如目前的研究表明，对于非同时发布的工作，不太可能存在一个线性程序，使得可以基于最优LP解决方案构建具有最小完工时间的进度表。我们还证明，如果不允许在一台机器上拆分同一作业（即分配给一台机器的作业部分要在该机器上不间断地处理），则该问题是 NP 困难的。作为一个附带结果，我们发现，每当不允许作业分割时，给定最佳 LP 解决方案，找到与该 LP 解决方案一致的最小完工时间的最佳调度是 NP 困难的。我们还根据 Lawler 和 Labetoulle \cite{ll78} 的最佳 LP 解决方案扩展了进度表构建过程，以实现非同时发布的作业。在与任何可行（不一定是最佳）LP 解决方案一致的所有可行计划中，扩展程序会生成具有最小完工时间的计划。这种过程特别有用，因为正如我们所表明的，如果作业不同时释放，则可能不存在与最优 LP 解决方案一致的最优调度。 本文研究了非同时释放作业在无关机器上的预调度问题，探讨线性规划方法在该场景下的适用性及复杂性。 Nodari Vakhania cs.DS

title: Convolutional and Residual Networks Provably Contain Lottery Tickets
title_zh: 卷积网络和残差网络可证明包含彩票
abstract: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis continues to have a profound practical impact on the quest for small scale deep neural networks that solve modern deep learning tasks at competitive performance. These lottery tickets are identified by pruning large randomly initialized neural networks with architectures that are as diverse as their applications. Yet, theoretical insights that attest their existence have been mostly focused on deep fully-connected feed forward networks with ReLU activation functions. We prove that also modern architectures consisting of convolutional and residual layers that can be equipped with almost arbitrary activation functions can contain lottery tickets with high probability.
summary: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis continues to have a profound practical impact on the quest for small scale deep neural networks that solve modern deep learning tasks at competitive performance. These lottery tickets are identified by pruning large randomly initialized neural networks with architectures that are as diverse as their applications. Yet, theoretical insights that attest their existence have been mostly focused on deep fully-connected feed forward networks with ReLU activation functions. We prove that also modern architectures consisting of convolutional and residual layers that can be equipped with almost arbitrary activation functions can contain lottery tickets with high probability.
abstract_zh: 彩票假说继续对寻求小规模深度神经网络产生深远的实际影响，以解决现代深度学习任务的竞争表现。这些彩票是通过修剪大型随机初始化的神经网络来识别的，该神经网络的架构与其应用程序一样多样化。然而，证明它们存在的理论见解主要集中在具有 ReLU 激活函数的深度全连接前馈网络。我们还证明，由卷积层和残差层组成的现代架构可以配备几乎任意的激活函数，并且可以高概率包含彩票。

AI.tldr: 本文证明现代卷积和残差网络结构中存在彩票票证，扩展了彩票票证假说的理论适用范围。
AI.motivation: 彩票票证假说虽在全连接网络中得到验证，但缺乏对现代主流卷积和残差网络结构的理论支持。
AI.method: 通过数学证明分析卷积和残差网络的结构特性，结合任意激活函数的通用性进行理论推导。
AI.result: 证明包含卷积和残差层的现代网络架构以高概率包含彩票票证，突破了原有理论对网络结构的限制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为彩票票证假说提供了更广泛的理论基础，推动小型化深度神经网络的设计与应用。

title: Exploring the Benefits of Teams in Multiagent Learning
title_zh: 探索团队在多智能体学习中的好处
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, Published at IJCAI 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.07471
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, Published at IJCAI 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.07471
abstract: For problems requiring cooperation, many multiagent systems implement solutions among either individual agents or across an entire population towards a common goal. Multiagent teams are primarily studied when in conflict; however, organizational psychology (OP) highlights the benefits of teams among human populations for learning how to coordinate and cooperate. In this paper, we propose a new model of multiagent teams for reinforcement learning (RL) agents inspired by OP and early work on teams in artificial intelligence. We validate our model using complex social dilemmas that are popular in recent multiagent RL and find that agents divided into teams develop cooperative pro-social policies despite incentives to not cooperate. Furthermore, agents are better able to coordinate and learn emergent roles within their teams and achieve higher rewards compared to when the interests of all agents are aligned.
summary: For problems requiring cooperation, many multiagent systems implement solutions among either individual agents or across an entire population towards a common goal. Multiagent teams are primarily studied when in conflict; however, organizational psychology (OP) highlights the benefits of teams among human populations for learning how to coordinate and cooperate. In this paper, we propose a new model of multiagent teams for reinforcement learning (RL) agents inspired by OP and early work on teams in artificial intelligence. We validate our model using complex social dilemmas that are popular in recent multiagent RL and find that agents divided into teams develop cooperative pro-social policies despite incentives to not cooperate. Furthermore, agents are better able to coordinate and learn emergent roles within their teams and achieve higher rewards compared to when the interests of all agents are aligned.
abstract_zh: 对于需要合作的问题，许多多智能体系统在单个智能体之间或整个群体中实现解决方案以实现共同目标。多智能体团队主要在冲突时进行研究；然而，组织心理学（OP）强调了人类团队对于学习如何协调和合作的好处。在本文中，我们受到 OP 和人工智能团队早期工作的启发，提出了一种用于强化学习 (RL) 代理的多代理团队新模型。我们使用最近多智能体强化学习中流行的复杂社会困境来验证我们的模型，并发现分成团队的智能体会制定合作性的亲社会政策，尽管有不合作的激励。此外，与所有代理的利益一致时相比，代理能够更好地协调和学习团队内的新兴角色，并获得更高的奖励。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受组织心理学启发的多智能体团队模型，用于强化学习场景，验证团队结构对合作与协调的促进作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注冲突场景下的多智能体协作，而组织心理学表明人类团队能有效提升学习与合作能力，但该特性在多智能体系统中尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 基于组织心理学理论设计多智能体团队架构，通过复杂社会困境实验验证团队内部分工与协作策略的学习效果。
AI.result: 团队结构使智能体在利益冲突下仍能形成合作政策，实现更高效协调与角色分工，最终获得比全局利益对齐场景更高的奖励。
AI.conclusion: 团队结构可有效增强多智能体系统的协作能力与学习效率，未来需进一步研究团队组织形式与动态调整机制。

title: Most Activation Functions Can Win the Lottery Without Excessive Depth
title_zh: 大多数激活函数不需要太深入就能中奖
abstract: The strong lottery ticket hypothesis has highlighted the potential for training deep neural networks by pruning, which has inspired interesting practical and theoretical insights into how neural networks can represent functions. For networks with ReLU activation functions, it has been proven that a target network with depth $L$ can be approximated by the subnetwork of a randomly initialized neural network that has double the target's depth $2L$ and is wider by a logarithmic factor. We show that a depth $L+1$ network is sufficient. This result indicates that we can expect to find lottery tickets at realistic, commonly used depths while only requiring logarithmic overparametrization. Our novel construction approach applies to a large class of activation functions and is not limited to ReLUs.
summary: The strong lottery ticket hypothesis has highlighted the potential for training deep neural networks by pruning, which has inspired interesting practical and theoretical insights into how neural networks can represent functions. For networks with ReLU activation functions, it has been proven that a target network with depth $L$ can be approximated by the subnetwork of a randomly initialized neural network that has double the target's depth $2L$ and is wider by a logarithmic factor. We show that a depth $L+1$ network is sufficient. This result indicates that we can expect to find lottery tickets at realistic, commonly used depths while only requiring logarithmic overparametrization. Our novel construction approach applies to a large class of activation functions and is not limited to ReLUs.
abstract_zh: 强彩票假说凸显了通过剪枝训练深度神经网络的潜力，这激发了人们对神经网络如何表示函数的有趣的实践和理论见解。对于具有 ReLU 激活函数的网络，已经证明深度为 $L$ 的目标网络可以通过随机初始化的神经网络的子网络来近似，该神经网络的深度为目标深度 $2L$ 的两倍，并且宽度为对数因子。我们证明深度 $L+1$ 网络就足够了。这个结果表明我们可以期望在现实的、常用的深度找到彩票，而只需要对数超参数化。我们新颖的构造方法适用于一大类激活函数，并且不限于 ReLU。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在合理深度下，大多数激活函数可通过剪枝找到彩票子网络，无需过度参数化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示ReLU网络需两倍深度和对数宽度才能逼近目标网络，但实际应用中深度和参数量受限，需探索更高效的剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新型构造方法，适用于广泛激活函数，通过理论分析证明深度仅需目标网络加一即可实现逼近。
AI.result: 证明深度L+1的网络在对数宽度下可逼近目标网络，突破ReLU的两倍深度限制，适用于多种激活函数。
AI.conclusion: 实际常用深度即可找到彩票子网络，无需过度参数化，为神经网络剪枝提供理论支持与实践指导。
