title: BodySLAM: Joint Camera Localisation, Mapping, and Human Motion Tracking
title_zh: BodySLAM：联合摄像机定位、建图和人体运动跟踪
abstract: Estimating human motion from video is an active research area due to its many potential applications. Most state-of-the-art methods predict human shape and posture estimates for individual images and do not leverage the temporal information available in video. Many "in the wild" sequences of human motion are captured by a moving camera, which adds the complication of conflated camera and human motion to the estimation. We therefore present BodySLAM, a monocular SLAM system that jointly estimates the position, shape, and posture of human bodies, as well as the camera trajectory. We also introduce a novel human motion model to constrain sequential body postures and observe the scale of the scene. Through a series of experiments on video sequences of human motion captured by a moving monocular camera, we demonstrate that BodySLAM improves estimates of all human body parameters and camera poses when compared to estimating these separately.
summary: Estimating human motion from video is an active research area due to its many potential applications. Most state-of-the-art methods predict human shape and posture estimates for individual images and do not leverage the temporal information available in video. Many "in the wild" sequences of human motion are captured by a moving camera, which adds the complication of conflated camera and human motion to the estimation. We therefore present BodySLAM, a monocular SLAM system that jointly estimates the position, shape, and posture of human bodies, as well as the camera trajectory. We also introduce a novel human motion model to constrain sequential body postures and observe the scale of the scene. Through a series of experiments on video sequences of human motion captured by a moving monocular camera, we demonstrate that BodySLAM improves estimates of all human body parameters and camera poses when compared to estimating these separately.
abstract_zh: 由于其许多潜在的应用，从视频中估计人体运动是一个活跃的研究领域。大多数最先进的方法都会预测单个图像的人体形状和姿势估计，并且不会利用视频中可用的时间信息。许多“野外”人体运动序列是由移动摄像机捕获的，这增加了摄像机和人体运动合并的估计的复杂性。因此，我们提出了 BodySLAM，这是一种单目 SLAM 系统，可以联合估计人体的位置、形状和姿势以及相机轨迹。我们还引入了一种新颖的人体运动模型来约束连续的身体姿势并观察场景的规模。通过对移动单目相机捕获的人体运动视频序列进行一系列实验，我们证明了与单独估计这些参数相比，BodySLAM 改进了对所有人体参数和相机姿势的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BodySLAM系统，通过单目视觉同时估计人体姿态、形状、相机轨迹及场景地图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅处理单帧图像的人体估计，未利用视频时序信息，而实际场景中移动相机捕获的人体运动存在相机与人体运动耦合的挑战。
AI.method: 设计单目SLAM框架联合优化人体参数与相机位姿，引入人体运动模型约束姿态序列及场景尺度估计。
AI.result: 实验表明BodySLAM在人体参数估计和相机位姿估计精度上均优于独立估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化人体运动与相机运动可提升参数估计鲁棒性，适用于移动相机捕获的复杂场景。

authors_text: He Zhao,Isma Hadji,Nikita Dvornik,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Richard P. Wildes,Allan D. Jepson
title: P3IV: Probabilistic Procedure Planning from Instructional Videos with Weak Supervision
title_zh: P3IV：弱监督下教学视频的概率程序规划
comment: Accepted as an oral paper at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted as an oral paper at CVPR 2022
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of procedure planning in instructional videos. Here, an agent must produce a plausible sequence of actions that can transform the environment from a given start to a desired goal state. When learning procedure planning from instructional videos, most recent work leverages intermediate visual observations as supervision, which requires expensive annotation efforts to localize precisely all the instructional steps in training videos. In contrast, we remove the need for expensive temporal video annotations and propose a weakly supervised approach by learning from natural language instructions. Our model is based on a transformer equipped with a memory module, which maps the start and goal observations to a sequence of plausible actions. Furthermore, we augment our model with a probabilistic generative module to capture the uncertainty inherent to procedure planning, an aspect largely overlooked by previous work. We evaluate our model on three datasets and show our weaklysupervised approach outperforms previous fully supervised state-of-the-art models on multiple metrics.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of procedure planning in instructional videos. Here, an agent must produce a plausible sequence of actions that can transform the environment from a given start to a desired goal state. When learning procedure planning from instructional videos, most recent work leverages intermediate visual observations as supervision, which requires expensive annotation efforts to localize precisely all the instructional steps in training videos. In contrast, we remove the need for expensive temporal video annotations and propose a weakly supervised approach by learning from natural language instructions. Our model is based on a transformer equipped with a memory module, which maps the start and goal observations to a sequence of plausible actions. Furthermore, we augment our model with a probabilistic generative module to capture the uncertainty inherent to procedure planning, an aspect largely overlooked by previous work. We evaluate our model on three datasets and show our weaklysupervised approach outperforms previous fully supervised state-of-the-art models on multiple metrics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了教学视频中的程序规划问题。在这里，智能体必须产生一系列合理的动作，可以将环境从给定的开始转变为期望的目标状态。当从教学视频中学习程序规划时，最近的工作利用中间视觉观察作为监督，这需要昂贵的注释工作来精确定位训练视频中的所有教学步骤。相比之下，我们消除了对昂贵的时间视频注释的需要，并通过学习自然语言指令提出了一种弱监督方法。我们的模型基于配备内存模块的变压器，它将开始和目标观察映射到一系列合理的动作。此外，我们用概率生成模块增强了我们的模型，以捕获程序规划固有的不确定性，这是以前的工作很大程度上忽视的一个方面。我们在三个数据集上评估我们的模型，并表明我们的弱监督方法在多个指标上优于以前的完全监督的最先进模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督方法P3IV，通过自然语言指令而非昂贵的视频标注实现指令视频中的过程规划。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确的视频时间标注进行过程规划，但标注成本高昂。本文旨在消除对昂贵标注的依赖，利用自然语言指令实现弱监督学习。
AI.method: 基于配备记忆模块的Transformer模型，将起始和目标状态映射为动作序列，并引入概率生成模块以捕捉规划中的不确定性。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上，弱监督方法在多个指标上优于现有全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督方法能有效实现指令视频的过程规划，且通过概率模块更好地处理规划中的不确定性问题。

result: 在三个数据集上，弱监督方法在多个指标上优于现有全监督模型。
conclusion: 弱监督方法能有效实现指令视频的过程规划，且通过概率模块更好地处理规划中的不确定性问题。
search_text: P3IV: Probabilistic Procedure Planning from Instructional Videos with Weak Supervision P3IV：弱监督下教学视频的概率程序规划 In this paper, we study the problem of procedure planning in instructional videos. Here, an agent must produce a plausible sequence of actions that can transform the environment from a given start to a desired goal state. When learning procedure planning from instructional videos, most recent work leverages intermediate visual observations as supervision, which requires expensive annotation efforts to localize precisely all the instructional steps in training videos. In contrast, we remove the need for expensive temporal video annotations and propose a weakly supervised approach by learning from natural language instructions. Our model is based on a transformer equipped with a memory module, which maps the start and goal observations to a sequence of plausible actions. Furthermore, we augment our model with a probabilistic generative module to capture the uncertainty inherent to procedure planning, an aspect largely overlooked by previous work. We evaluate our model on three datasets and show our weaklysupervised approach outperforms previous fully supervised state-of-the-art models on multiple metrics. 在本文中，我们研究了教学视频中的程序规划问题。在这里，智能体必须产生一系列合理的动作，可以将环境从给定的开始转变为期望的目标状态。当从教学视频中学习程序规划时，最近的工作利用中间视觉观察作为监督，这需要昂贵的注释工作来精确定位训练视频中的所有教学步骤。相比之下，我们消除了对昂贵的时间视频注释的需要，并通过学习自然语言指令提出了一种弱监督方法。我们的模型基于配备内存模块的变压器，它将开始和目标观察映射到一系列合理的动作。此外，我们用概率生成模块增强了我们的模型，以捕获程序规划固有的不确定性，这是以前的工作很大程度上忽视的一个方面。我们在三个数据集上评估我们的模型，并表明我们的弱监督方法在多个指标上优于以前的完全监督的最先进模型。 本文提出一种弱监督方法P3IV，通过自然语言指令而非昂贵的视频标注实现指令视频中的过程规划。 He Zhao,Isma Hadji,Nikita Dvornik,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Richard P. Wildes,Allan D. Jepson cs.CV

authors_text: Christopher Redino,Dhruv Nandakumar,Robert Schiller,Kevin Choi,Abdul Rahman,Edward Bowen,Matthew Weeks,Aaron Shaha,Joe Nehila
title: Zero Day Threat Detection Using Graph and Flow Based Security Telemetry
title_zh: 使用基于图形和流的安全遥测进行零日威胁检测
abstract: Zero Day Threats (ZDT) are novel methods used by malicious actors to attack and exploit information technology (IT) networks or infrastructure. In the past few years, the number of these threats has been increasing at an alarming rate and have been costing organizations millions of dollars to remediate. The increasing expansion of network attack surfaces and the exponentially growing number of assets on these networks necessitate the need for a robust AI-based Zero Day Threat detection model that can quickly analyze petabyte-scale data for potentially malicious and novel activity. In this paper, the authors introduce a deep learning based approach to Zero Day Threat detection that can generalize, scale, and effectively identify threats in near real-time. The methodology utilizes network flow telemetry augmented with asset-level graph features, which are passed through a dual-autoencoder structure for anomaly and novelty detection respectively. The models have been trained and tested on four large scale datasets that are representative of real-world organizational networks and they produce strong results with high precision and recall values. The models provide a novel methodology to detect complex threats with low false-positive rates that allow security operators to avoid alert fatigue while drastically reducing their mean time to response with near-real-time detection. Furthermore, the authors also provide a novel, labelled, cyber attack dataset generated from adversarial activity that can be used for validation or training of other models. With this paper, the authors' overarching goal is to provide a novel architecture and training methodology for cyber anomaly detectors that can generalize to multiple IT networks with minimal to no retraining while still maintaining strong performance.

The models have been trained and tested on four large scale datasets that are representative of real-world organizational networks and they produce strong results with high precision and recall values. The models provide a novel methodology to detect complex threats with low false-positive rates that allow security operators to avoid alert fatigue while drastically reducing their mean time to response with near-real-time detection. With this paper, the authors' overarching goal is to provide a novel architecture and training methodology for cyber anomaly detectors that can generalize to multiple IT networks with minimal to no retraining while still maintaining strong performance.
abstract_zh: 零日威胁 (ZDT) 是恶意行为者用来攻击和利用信息技术 (IT) 网络或基础设施的新方法。在过去几年中，这些威胁的数量以惊人的速度增加，并导致组织花费数百万美元进行修复。网络攻击面的不断扩大以及这些网络上的资产数量呈指数级增长，需要一个强大的基于人工智能的零日威胁检测模型，该模型可以快速分析 PB 级数据以发现潜在的恶意和新颖活动。在本文中，作者介绍了一种基于深度学习的零日威胁检测方法，该方法可以泛化、扩展并近乎实时地有效识别威胁。该方法利用资产级图形特征增强的网络流遥测，这些特征通过双自动编码器结构分别进行异常和新颖性检测。这些模型已经在代表现实世界组织网络的四个大型数据集上进行了训练和测试，并且产生了具有高精度和召回值的强大结果。这些模型提供了一种新颖的方法来检测误报率较低的复杂威胁，使安全操作员能够避免警报疲劳，同时通过近实时检测大大缩短平均响应时间。此外，作者还提供了一种新颖的、有标签的、由对抗活动生成的网络攻击数据集，可用于验证或训练其他模型。在本文中，作者的首要目标是为网络异常检测器提供一种新颖的架构和训练方法，该方法可以推广到多个 IT 网络，只需最少甚至无需再训练，同时仍保持强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的零日威胁检测方法，结合网络流量和资产级图特征，实现近实时威胁识别。
AI.motivation: 零日威胁数量激增导致组织损失巨大，传统方法难以应对复杂网络环境，需开发可扩展、低误报的智能检测模型。
AI.method: 利用网络流量数据与资产图特征构建双自编码器结构，分别进行异常检测和新颖性检测，通过大规模真实数据集训练验证。
AI.result: 模型在四个真实网络数据集上达到高精度和召回率，误报率低，且提供新型标注攻击数据集，显著缩短响应时间。
AI.conclusion: 提出通用化检测架构和训练方法，可在多网络环境中无需或少量重训练即保持高性能，有效缓解安全运营压力。

authors_text: Jingwei Ni,Zhijing Jin,Markus Freitag,Mrinmaya Sachan,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Original or Translated? A Causal Analysis of the Impact of Translationese on Machine Translation Performance
title_zh: 原创还是翻译？ Translationese 对机器翻译性能影响的因果分析
abstract: Human-translated text displays distinct features from naturally written text in the same language. This phenomena, known as translationese, has been argued to confound the machine translation (MT) evaluation. Yet, we find that existing work on translationese neglects some important factors and the conclusions are mostly correlational but not causal. In this work, we collect CausalMT, a dataset where the MT training data are also labeled with the human translation directions. We inspect two critical factors, the train-test direction match (whether the human translation directions in the training and test sets are aligned), and data-model direction match (whether the model learns in the same direction as the human translation direction in the dataset). We show that these two factors have a large causal effect on the MT performance, in addition to the test-model direction mismatch highlighted by existing work on the impact of translationese. In light of our findings, we provide a set of suggestions for MT training and evaluation. Our code and data are at https://github.com/EdisonNi-hku/CausalMT
summary: Human-translated text displays distinct features from naturally written text in the same language. This phenomena, known as translationese, has been argued to confound the machine translation (MT) evaluation. Yet, we find that existing work on translationese neglects some important factors and the conclusions are mostly correlational but not causal. In this work, we collect CausalMT, a dataset where the MT training data are also labeled with the human translation directions. We inspect two critical factors, the train-test direction match (whether the human translation directions in the training and test sets are aligned), and data-model direction match (whether the model learns in the same direction as the human translation direction in the dataset). We show that these two factors have a large causal effect on the MT performance, in addition to the test-model direction mismatch highlighted by existing work on the impact of translationese. In light of our findings, we provide a set of suggestions for MT training and evaluation. Our code and data are at https://github.com/EdisonNi-hku/CausalMT
abstract_zh: 人工翻译的文本与相同语言的自然书写文本具有不同的特征。这种被称为翻译语的现象被认为会混淆机器翻译（MT）评估。然而，我们发现现有的翻译学研究忽略了一些重要因素，得出的结论大多是相关性的，而不是因果性的。在这项工作中，我们收集了 CausalMT，这是一个数据集，其中 MT 训练数据也标有人工翻译方向。我们检查两个关键因素，训练-测试方向匹配（训练和测试集中的人工翻译方向是否对齐）和数据模型方向匹配（模型的学习方向是否与数据集中的人工翻译方向相同）。我们表明，除了现有工作强调的翻译语影响的测试模型方向不匹配之外，这两个因素对机器翻译性能也有很大的因果影响。根据我们的发现，我们为 MT 培训和评估提供了一系列建议。我们的代码和数据位于 https://github.com/EdisonNi-hku/CausalMT

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建CausalMT数据集，分析翻译腔（translationese）对机器翻译性能的因果影响，探讨训练-测试方向匹配和数据-模型方向匹配等因素的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多仅揭示翻译腔与机器翻译表现的相关性，缺乏因果论证且忽略关键因素，需通过因果分析明确影响机制并提出改进方向。
AI.method: 收集标注人类翻译方向的CausalMT数据集，分析训练-测试方向匹配（训练与测试集人类翻译方向是否对齐）及数据-模型方向匹配（模型学习方向是否与数据中人类翻译方向一致）两大因素的因果效应。
AI.result: 发现方向匹配因素对机器翻译性能有显著因果影响，且测试-模型方向不匹配问题需结合新因素综合考量，提出针对训练与评估的优化建议。
AI.conclusion: 翻译腔的因果影响需通过方向匹配因素解析，建议在机器翻译训练与评估中重视方向一致性，研究结果为提升系统性能提供理论支持与数据工具。

search_text: Original or Translated? A Causal Analysis of the Impact of Translationese on Machine Translation Performance 原创还是翻译？ Translationese 对机器翻译性能影响的因果分析 Human-translated text displays distinct features from naturally written text in the same language. This phenomena, known as translationese, has been argued to confound the machine translation (MT) evaluation. Yet, we find that existing work on translationese neglects some important factors and the conclusions are mostly correlational but not causal. In this work, we collect CausalMT, a dataset where the MT training data are also labeled with the human translation directions. We inspect two critical factors, the train-test direction match (whether the human translation directions in the training and test sets are aligned), and data-model direction match (whether the model learns in the same direction as the human translation direction in the dataset). We show that these two factors have a large causal effect on the MT performance, in addition to the test-model direction mismatch highlighted by existing work on the impact of translationese. In light of our findings, we provide a set of suggestions for MT training and evaluation. Our code and data are at https://github.com/EdisonNi-hku/CausalMT 人工翻译的文本与相同语言的自然书写文本具有不同的特征。这种被称为翻译语的现象被认为会混淆机器翻译（MT）评估。然而，我们发现现有的翻译学研究忽略了一些重要因素，得出的结论大多是相关性的，而不是因果性的。在这项工作中，我们收集了 CausalMT，这是一个数据集，其中 MT 训练数据也标有人工翻译方向。我们检查两个关键因素，训练-测试方向匹配（训练和测试集中的人工翻译方向是否对齐）和数据模型方向匹配（模型的学习方向是否与数据集中的人工翻译方向相同）。我们表明，除了现有工作强调的翻译语影响的测试模型方向不匹配之外，这两个因素对机器翻译性能也有很大的因果影响。根据我们的发现，我们为 MT 培训和评估提供了一系列建议。我们的代码和数据位于 https://github.com/EdisonNi-hku/CausalMT 本文通过构建CausalMT数据集，分析翻译腔（translationese）对机器翻译性能的因果影响，探讨训练-测试方向匹配和数据-模型方向匹配等因素的作用。 Jingwei Ni,Zhijing Jin,Markus Freitag,Mrinmaya Sachan,Bernhard Schölkopf cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Time Shifts to Reduce the Size of Reservoir Computers
title_zh: 通过时间转移来缩小水库计算机的规模
abstract: A reservoir computer is a type of dynamical system arranged to do computation. Typically, a reservoir computer is constructed by connecting a large number of nonlinear nodes in a network that includes recurrent connections. In order to achieve accurate results, the reservoir usually contains hundreds to thousands of nodes. This high dimensionality makes it difficult to analyze the reservoir computer using tools from dynamical systems theory. Additionally, the need to create and connect large numbers of nonlinear nodes makes it difficult to design and build analog reservoir computers that can be faster and consume less power than digital reservoir computers. We demonstrate here that a reservoir computer may be divided into two parts; a small set of nonlinear nodes (the reservoir), and a separate set of time-shifted reservoir output signals. The time-shifted output signals serve to increase the rank and memory of the reservoir computer, and the set of nonlinear nodes may create an embedding of the input dynamical system. We use this time-shifting technique to obtain excellent performance from an opto-electronic delay-based reservoir computer with only a small number of virtual nodes. Because only a few nonlinear nodes are required, construction of a reservoir computer becomes much easier, and delay-based reservoir computers can operate at much higher speeds.
summary: A reservoir computer is a type of dynamical system arranged to do computation. Typically, a reservoir computer is constructed by connecting a large number of nonlinear nodes in a network that includes recurrent connections. In order to achieve accurate results, the reservoir usually contains hundreds to thousands of nodes. This high dimensionality makes it difficult to analyze the reservoir computer using tools from dynamical systems theory. Additionally, the need to create and connect large numbers of nonlinear nodes makes it difficult to design and build analog reservoir computers that can be faster and consume less power than digital reservoir computers. We demonstrate here that a reservoir computer may be divided into two parts; a small set of nonlinear nodes (the reservoir), and a separate set of time-shifted reservoir output signals. The time-shifted output signals serve to increase the rank and memory of the reservoir computer, and the set of nonlinear nodes may create an embedding of the input dynamical system. We use this time-shifting technique to obtain excellent performance from an opto-electronic delay-based reservoir computer with only a small number of virtual nodes. Because only a few nonlinear nodes are required, construction of a reservoir computer becomes much easier, and delay-based reservoir computers can operate at much higher speeds.
abstract_zh: 油藏计算机是一种用于进行计算的动力系统。通常，储层计算机是通过连接包含循环连接的网络中的大量非线性节点来构建的。为了获得准确的结果，水库通常包含数百到数千个节点。这种高维度使得很难使用动力系统理论的工具来分析油藏计算机。此外，由于需要创建和连接大量非线性节点，因此很难设计和构建比数字油藏计算机更快且功耗更低的模拟油藏计算机。我们在这里演示水库计算机可以分为两部分；一小组非线性节点（水库）和一组单独的时移水库输出信号。时移输出信号用于增加储层计算机的等级和存储器，并且非线性节点集可以创建输入动态系统的嵌入。我们使用这种时移技术，使基于光电延迟的油藏计算机仅具有少量虚拟节点即可获得优异的性能。由于只需要很少的非线性节点，因此水库计算机的构建变得更加容易，并且基于延迟的水库计算机可以以更高的速度运行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过时间偏移减少储层计算机规模的方法。
AI.motivation: 储层计算机通常需要大量的非线性节点，这使得其分析和构建变得复杂且耗能。
AI.method: 将储层计算机分为两部分：一小部分非线性节点和一组时间偏移的储层输出信号，以提高储层的秩和记忆能力。
AI.result: 使用时间偏移技术，仅需少量虚拟节点即可获得优异性能的光电延迟储层计算机。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简化了储层计算机的构建，并使其能够以更高速度运行。

title: Experimental Design for Causal Effect Identification
title_zh: 因果效应识别的实验设计
comment: 53 pages, 13 figures, extending the findings of our ICML2022 paper
comments: 53 pages, 13 figures, extending the findings of our ICML2022 paper
abstract: Pearl's do calculus is a complete axiomatic approach to learn the identifiable causal effects from observational data. When such an effect is not identifiable, it is necessary to perform a collection of often costly interventions in the system to learn the causal effect. In this work, we consider the problem of designing the collection of interventions with the minimum cost to identify the desired effect. First, we prove that this problem is NP-hard, and subsequently propose an algorithm that can either find the optimal solution or a logarithmic-factor approximation of it. This is done by establishing a connection between our problem and the minimum hitting set problem. Additionally, we propose several polynomial-time heuristic algorithms to tackle the computational complexity of the problem. Although these algorithms could potentially stumble on sub-optimal solutions, our simulations show that they achieve small regrets on random graphs.
summary: Pearl's do calculus is a complete axiomatic approach to learn the identifiable causal effects from observational data. When such an effect is not identifiable, it is necessary to perform a collection of often costly interventions in the system to learn the causal effect. In this work, we consider the problem of designing the collection of interventions with the minimum cost to identify the desired effect. First, we prove that this problem is NP-hard, and subsequently propose an algorithm that can either find the optimal solution or a logarithmic-factor approximation of it. This is done by establishing a connection between our problem and the minimum hitting set problem. Additionally, we propose several polynomial-time heuristic algorithms to tackle the computational complexity of the problem. Although these algorithms could potentially stumble on sub-optimal solutions, our simulations show that they achieve small regrets on random graphs.
abstract_zh: 珀尔的微积分是一种完整的公理方法，用于从观察数据中学习可识别的因果效应。当这种影响无法识别时，有必要在系统中执行一系列通常成本高昂的干预措施来了解因果影响。在这项工作中，我们考虑以最小成本设计干预措施集合以确定预期效果的问题。首先，我们证明这个问题是 NP 困难的，随后提出了一种可以找到最优解或其对数因子近似的算法。这是通过在我们的问题和最小命中集问题之间建立联系来完成的。此外，我们提出了几种多项式时间启发式算法来解决问题的计算复杂性。尽管这些算法可能会偶然发现次优解决方案，但我们的模拟表明它们在随机图上实现了小小的遗憾。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种最低成本的干预集合，以从观测数据中识别目标因果效应。
AI.motivation: 当使用Pearl的do演算无法从观测数据中识别因果效应时，需通过干预实验获取信息，但干预成本高昂，需优化干预方案。
AI.method: 将问题转化为最小击中集问题，提出求解最优解或对数因子近似解的算法，并设计多项式时间启发式算法应对计算复杂度。
AI.result: 算法可找到最优或近似最优干预方案，启发式算法在随机图中表现良好，实际遗憾值较小。
AI.conclusion: 证明了干预设计问题的NP难性，提出的算法和启发式方法为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Virtual and Augmented Reality-Based Assistive Interfaces for Upper-limb Prosthesis Control and Rehabilitation
title_zh: 用于上肢假肢控制和康复的基于虚拟和增强现实的辅助界面
abstract: Functional upper-limb prosthetic training can improve users performance in controlling prostheses and has been incorporated into occupational therapy for individuals in need. In recent years, virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) technologies have been shown to be promising avenues to improve the convenience of rehabilitative prosthesis training systems. However, it is uncertain if the comprehensive efficacy and effectiveness of VR or AR assistive tools are adequate compared to conventional prosthetic tools and if not, whether enhancements can be made through incorporation of other technical paradigms. This work first presents a mixed reality system we developed for prosthesis control and training. Five able-bodied subjects are involved to perform three-dimensional object manipulation tasks in analogous AR and VR environments. Multiple evaluation metrics are applied to assess subjects performances within the two paradigms. Based on the comparative analysis, we find that VR-based environment promotes more efficient motion along with higher task completion rate and path efficiency while AR paradigm allows subjects to perform motor tasks with shorter time consumed. Another study is conducted to evaluate the efficiency and feasibility of AR-facilitated prosthesis control system compared to that in real-world and if any technical additions can be applied to improve the AR-based system. Three able-bodied subjects were engaged in the experiment to perform object manipulation tasks in a) physical environment, b) AR-without-bypass environment, and c) AR-with-bypass environment. Based on the results obtained from the assessment, we conclude that while our AR-based system modestly lags behind the effectiveness of physical systems, the study conducted using a bypass prosthesis suggests that AR system has the potential to improve the efficacy of prosthesis control.
summary: Functional upper-limb prosthetic training can improve users performance in controlling prostheses and has been incorporated into occupational therapy for individuals in need. In recent years, virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) technologies have been shown to be promising avenues to improve the convenience of rehabilitative prosthesis training systems. However, it is uncertain if the comprehensive efficacy and effectiveness of VR or AR assistive tools are adequate compared to conventional prosthetic tools and if not, whether enhancements can be made through incorporation of other technical paradigms. This work first presents a mixed reality system we developed for prosthesis control and training. Five able-bodied subjects are involved to perform three-dimensional object manipulation tasks in analogous AR and VR environments. Multiple evaluation metrics are applied to assess subjects performances within the two paradigms. Based on the comparative analysis, we find that VR-based environment promotes more efficient motion along with higher task completion rate and path efficiency while AR paradigm allows subjects to perform motor tasks with shorter time consumed. Another study is conducted to evaluate the efficiency and feasibility of AR-facilitated prosthesis control system compared to that in real-world and if any technical additions can be applied to improve the AR-based system. Three able-bodied subjects were engaged in the experiment to perform object manipulation tasks in a) physical environment, b) AR-without-bypass environment, and c) AR-with-bypass environment. Based on the results obtained from the assessment, we conclude that while our AR-based system modestly lags behind the effectiveness of physical systems, the study conducted using a bypass prosthesis suggests that AR system has the potential to improve the efficacy of prosthesis control.
abstract_zh: 功能性上肢假肢训练可以提高用户控制假肢的表现，并已纳入有需要的个人的职业治疗中。近年来，虚拟现实（VR）和增强现实（AR）技术已被证明是提高康复假肢训练系统便利性的有前途的途径。然而，与传统假肢工具相比，VR或AR辅助工具的综合功效和效果是否足够，是否可以通过结合其他技术范式来增强，尚不确定。这项工作首先介绍了我们为假肢控制和训练开发的混合现实系统。五名身体健全的受试者参与在类似的 AR 和 VR 环境中执行三维物体操作任务。应用多种评估指标来评估两个范式内的受试者表现。基于比较分析，我们发现基于 VR 的环境促进更高效的运动以及更高的任务完成率和路径效率，而 AR 范式允许受试者以更短的时间执行运动任务。另一项研究旨在评估 AR 辅助假肢控制系统与现实世界相比的效率和可行性，以及是否可以应用任何技术补充来改进基于 AR 的系统。三名身体健全的受试者参与了实验，在 a) 物理环境、b) 无旁路的 AR 环境和 c) 有旁路的 AR 环境中执行对象操作任务。根据评估结果，我们得出结论，虽然我们的基于 AR 的系统略微落后于物理系统的有效性，但使用旁路假肢进行的研究表明 AR 系统有潜力提高假肢控制的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文开发并评估了基于虚拟现实(VR)和增强现实(AR)的混合现实系统，用于上肢假肢控制与康复训练，比较其与传统方法的优劣。
AI.motivation: 传统假肢训练方法存在局限性，而VR/AR技术可能提升康复效率，但其综合效果及优化方向尚不明确，需通过实验验证。
AI.method: 开发混合现实系统，让健康受试者在AR/VR环境中完成三维物体操作任务，并对比物理环境与AR系统（含旁路技术）的性能差异。
AI.result: VR环境在运动效率、任务完成率和路径效率上优于AR，而AR环境耗时更短；AR系统虽略逊于物理环境，但旁路技术可提升其控制效果。
AI.conclusion: AR系统具有改进假肢控制的潜力，结合旁路技术可增强其效果，未来需进一步优化以接近传统方法的性能。

search_text: Virtual and Augmented Reality-Based Assistive Interfaces for Upper-limb Prosthesis Control and Rehabilitation 用于上肢假肢控制和康复的基于虚拟和增强现实的辅助界面 Functional upper-limb prosthetic training can improve users performance in controlling prostheses and has been incorporated into occupational therapy for individuals in need. In recent years, virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) technologies have been shown to be promising avenues to improve the convenience of rehabilitative prosthesis training systems. However, it is uncertain if the comprehensive efficacy and effectiveness of VR or AR assistive tools are adequate compared to conventional prosthetic tools and if not, whether enhancements can be made through incorporation of other technical paradigms. This work first presents a mixed reality system we developed for prosthesis control and training. Five able-bodied subjects are involved to perform three-dimensional object manipulation tasks in analogous AR and VR environments. Multiple evaluation metrics are applied to assess subjects performances within the two paradigms. Based on the comparative analysis, we find that VR-based environment promotes more efficient motion along with higher task completion rate and path efficiency while AR paradigm allows subjects to perform motor tasks with shorter time consumed. Another study is conducted to evaluate the efficiency and feasibility of AR-facilitated prosthesis control system compared to that in real-world and if any technical additions can be applied to improve the AR-based system. Three able-bodied subjects were engaged in the experiment to perform object manipulation tasks in a) physical environment, b) AR-without-bypass environment, and c) AR-with-bypass environment. Based on the results obtained from the assessment, we conclude that while our AR-based system modestly lags behind the effectiveness of physical systems, the study conducted using a bypass prosthesis suggests that AR system has the potential to improve the efficacy of prosthesis control. 功能性上肢假肢训练可以提高用户控制假肢的表现，并已纳入有需要的个人的职业治疗中。近年来，虚拟现实（VR）和增强现实（AR）技术已被证明是提高康复假肢训练系统便利性的有前途的途径。然而，与传统假肢工具相比，VR或AR辅助工具的综合功效和效果是否足够，是否可以通过结合其他技术范式来增强，尚不确定。这项工作首先介绍了我们为假肢控制和训练开发的混合现实系统。五名身体健全的受试者参与在类似的 AR 和 VR 环境中执行三维物体操作任务。应用多种评估指标来评估两个范式内的受试者表现。基于比较分析，我们发现基于 VR 的环境促进更高效的运动以及更高的任务完成率和路径效率，而 AR 范式允许受试者以更短的时间执行运动任务。另一项研究旨在评估 AR 辅助假肢控制系统与现实世界相比的效率和可行性，以及是否可以应用任何技术补充来改进基于 AR 的系统。三名身体健全的受试者参与了实验，在 a) 物理环境、b) 无旁路的 AR 环境和 c) 有旁路的 AR 环境中执行对象操作任务。根据评估结果，我们得出结论，虽然我们的基于 AR 的系统略微落后于物理系统的有效性，但使用旁路假肢进行的研究表明 AR 系统有潜力提高假肢控制的功效。 本文开发并评估了基于虚拟现实(VR)和增强现实(AR)的混合现实系统，用于上肢假肢控制与康复训练，比较其与传统方法的优劣。 Yinghe Sun cs.HC

authors_text: Shuliang Liu,Xuming Hu,Chenwei Zhang,Shu`ang Li,Lijie Wen,Philip S. Yu
title: HiURE: Hierarchical Exemplar Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Relation Extraction
title_zh: HiURE：用于无监督关系提取的分层范例对比学习
comment: In NAACL 2022 as a long paper. Code and data available at https://github.com/THU-BPM/HiURE
comments: In NAACL 2022 as a long paper. Code and data available at https://github.com/THU-BPM/HiURE
abstract: Unsupervised relation extraction aims to extract the relationship between entities from natural language sentences without prior information on relational scope or distribution. Existing works either utilize self-supervised schemes to refine relational feature signals by iteratively leveraging adaptive clustering and classification that provoke gradual drift problems, or adopt instance-wise contrastive learning which unreasonably pushes apart those sentence pairs that are semantically similar. To overcome these defects, we propose a novel contrastive learning framework named HiURE, which has the capability to derive hierarchical signals from relational feature space using cross hierarchy attention and effectively optimize relation representation of sentences under exemplar-wise contrastive learning. Experimental results on two public datasets demonstrate the advanced effectiveness and robustness of HiURE on unsupervised relation extraction when compared with state-of-the-art models.
summary: Unsupervised relation extraction aims to extract the relationship between entities from natural language sentences without prior information on relational scope or distribution. Existing works either utilize self-supervised schemes to refine relational feature signals by iteratively leveraging adaptive clustering and classification that provoke gradual drift problems, or adopt instance-wise contrastive learning which unreasonably pushes apart those sentence pairs that are semantically similar. To overcome these defects, we propose a novel contrastive learning framework named HiURE, which has the capability to derive hierarchical signals from relational feature space using cross hierarchy attention and effectively optimize relation representation of sentences under exemplar-wise contrastive learning. Experimental results on two public datasets demonstrate the advanced effectiveness and robustness of HiURE on unsupervised relation extraction when compared with state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 无监督关系提取旨在从自然语言句子中提取实体之间的关系，而无需有关关系范围或分布的先验信息。现有的工作要么利用自监督方案，通过迭代地利用自适应聚类和分类来细化关系特征信号，从而引发逐渐漂移问题，要么采用实例对比学习，不合理地推开那些语义相似的句子对。为了克服这些缺陷，我们提出了一种名为 HiURE 的新型对比学习框架，该框架能够使用跨层次注意力从关系特征空间中导出层次信号，并在示例对比学习下有效优化句子的关系表示。两个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，与最先进的模型相比，HiURE 在无监督关系提取方面具有先进的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督关系抽取方法HiURE，通过分层示例对比学习优化关系表示
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在渐进漂移和不合理分离语义相似句子对的问题，需改进对比学习框架
AI.method: 提出HiURE框架，利用跨层次注意力提取分层信号，并通过示例级对比学习优化关系表示
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验结果表明HiURE在无监督关系抽取任务中优于现有模型
AI.conclusion: HiURE有效解决了现有方法的缺陷，提升了无监督关系抽取的效果和鲁棒性

authors_text: Jiaxun Cui,Hang Qiu,Dian Chen,Peter Stone,Yuke Zhu
title: COOPERNAUT: End-to-End Driving with Cooperative Perception for Networked Vehicles
title_zh: COOPERNAUT：联网车辆的端到端驾驶与协作感知
abstract: Optical sensors and learning algorithms for autonomous vehicles have dramatically advanced in the past few years. Nonetheless, the reliability of today's autonomous vehicles is hindered by the limited line-of-sight sensing capability and the brittleness of data-driven methods in handling extreme situations. With recent developments of telecommunication technologies, cooperative perception with vehicle-to-vehicle communications has become a promising paradigm to enhance autonomous driving in dangerous or emergency situations. We introduce COOPERNAUT, an end-to-end learning model that uses cross-vehicle perception for vision-based cooperative driving. Our model encodes LiDAR information into compact point-based representations that can be transmitted as messages between vehicles via realistic wireless channels. To evaluate our model, we develop AutoCastSim, a network-augmented driving simulation framework with example accident-prone scenarios. Our experiments on AutoCastSim suggest that our cooperative perception driving models lead to a 40% improvement in average success rate over egocentric driving models in these challenging driving situations and a 5 times smaller bandwidth requirement than prior work V2VNet. COOPERNAUT and AUTOCASTSIM are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/Coopernaut/.
summary: Optical sensors and learning algorithms for autonomous vehicles have dramatically advanced in the past few years. Nonetheless, the reliability of today's autonomous vehicles is hindered by the limited line-of-sight sensing capability and the brittleness of data-driven methods in handling extreme situations. With recent developments of telecommunication technologies, cooperative perception with vehicle-to-vehicle communications has become a promising paradigm to enhance autonomous driving in dangerous or emergency situations. We introduce COOPERNAUT, an end-to-end learning model that uses cross-vehicle perception for vision-based cooperative driving. Our model encodes LiDAR information into compact point-based representations that can be transmitted as messages between vehicles via realistic wireless channels. To evaluate our model, we develop AutoCastSim, a network-augmented driving simulation framework with example accident-prone scenarios. Our experiments on AutoCastSim suggest that our cooperative perception driving models lead to a 40% improvement in average success rate over egocentric driving models in these challenging driving situations and a 5 times smaller bandwidth requirement than prior work V2VNet. COOPERNAUT and AUTOCASTSIM are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/Coopernaut/.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的光学传感器和学习算法在过去几年中取得了巨大进步。尽管如此，当今自动驾驶汽车的可靠性受到视线传感能力有限和数据驱动方法在处理极端情况时的脆弱性的阻碍。随着电信技术的最新发展，车辆间通信的协作感知已成为增强危险或紧急情况下自动驾驶的有前景的范例。我们介绍 COOPERNAUT，这是一种端到端学习模型，利用跨车辆感知进行基于视觉的协作驾驶。我们的模型将 LiDAR 信息编码为紧凑的基于点的表示形式，这些表示形式可以通过真实的无线通道作为消息在车辆之间传输。为了评估我们的模型，我们开发了 AutoCastSim，这是一个网络增强驾驶模拟框架，其中包含容易发生事故的场景示例。我们在 AutoCastSim 上的实验表明，在这些具有挑战性的驾驶情况下，我们的协作感知驾驶模型比以自我为中心的驾驶模型平均成功率提高了 40%，并且带宽要求比之前的 V2VNet 减少了 5 倍。 COOPERNAUT 和 AUTOCASTSIM 可在 https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/Coopernaut/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COOPERNAUT，一种基于跨车辆协作感知的端到端自动驾驶模型，通过车与车通信提升复杂场景下的驾驶可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶受制于传感器视野限制和数据驱动方法在极端情况下的脆弱性，而车联网通信技术为协作感知提供了新思路。
AI.method: 将LiDAR数据编码为可传输的紧凑点表示，通过无线信道实现车辆间信息共享，并构建AutoCastSim模拟框架验证模型。
AI.result: 在AutoCastSim中，协作感知模型相较单视角模型成功率提升40%，且带宽需求仅为V2VNet的五分之一。
AI.conclusion: COOPERNAUT验证了协作感知在提升自动驾驶安全性和通信效率方面的有效性，为未来车联网应用提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出COOPERNAUT，一种基于跨车辆协作感知的端到端自动驾驶模型，通过车与车通信提升复杂场景下的驾驶可靠性。

tldr: 本文提出COOPERNAUT，一种基于跨车辆协作感知的端到端自动驾驶模型，通过车与车通信提升复杂场景下的驾驶可靠性。
motivation: 现有自动驾驶受制于传感器视野限制和数据驱动方法在极端情况下的脆弱性，而车联网通信技术为协作感知提供了新思路。
method: 将LiDAR数据编码为可传输的紧凑点表示，通过无线信道实现车辆间信息共享，并构建AutoCastSim模拟框架验证模型。
result: 在AutoCastSim中，协作感知模型相较单视角模型成功率提升40%，且带宽需求仅为V2VNet的五分之一。
conclusion: COOPERNAUT验证了协作感知在提升自动驾驶安全性和通信效率方面的有效性，为未来车联网应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: COOPERNAUT: End-to-End Driving with Cooperative Perception for Networked Vehicles COOPERNAUT：联网车辆的端到端驾驶与协作感知 Optical sensors and learning algorithms for autonomous vehicles have dramatically advanced in the past few years. Nonetheless, the reliability of today's autonomous vehicles is hindered by the limited line-of-sight sensing capability and the brittleness of data-driven methods in handling extreme situations. With recent developments of telecommunication technologies, cooperative perception with vehicle-to-vehicle communications has become a promising paradigm to enhance autonomous driving in dangerous or emergency situations. We introduce COOPERNAUT, an end-to-end learning model that uses cross-vehicle perception for vision-based cooperative driving. Our model encodes LiDAR information into compact point-based representations that can be transmitted as messages between vehicles via realistic wireless channels. To evaluate our model, we develop AutoCastSim, a network-augmented driving simulation framework with example accident-prone scenarios. Our experiments on AutoCastSim suggest that our cooperative perception driving models lead to a 40% improvement in average success rate over egocentric driving models in these challenging driving situations and a 5 times smaller bandwidth requirement than prior work V2VNet. COOPERNAUT and AUTOCASTSIM are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/Coopernaut/. 自动驾驶汽车的光学传感器和学习算法在过去几年中取得了巨大进步。尽管如此，当今自动驾驶汽车的可靠性受到视线传感能力有限和数据驱动方法在处理极端情况时的脆弱性的阻碍。随着电信技术的最新发展，车辆间通信的协作感知已成为增强危险或紧急情况下自动驾驶的有前景的范例。我们介绍 COOPERNAUT，这是一种端到端学习模型，利用跨车辆感知进行基于视觉的协作驾驶。我们的模型将 LiDAR 信息编码为紧凑的基于点的表示形式，这些表示形式可以通过真实的无线通道作为消息在车辆之间传输。为了评估我们的模型，我们开发了 AutoCastSim，这是一个网络增强驾驶模拟框架，其中包含容易发生事故的场景示例。我们在 AutoCastSim 上的实验表明，在这些具有挑战性的驾驶情况下，我们的协作感知驾驶模型比以自我为中心的驾驶模型平均成功率提高了 40%，并且带宽要求比之前的 V2VNet 减少了 5 倍。 COOPERNAUT 和 AUTOCASTSIM 可在 https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/Coopernaut/ 获取。 本文提出COOPERNAUT，一种基于跨车辆协作感知的端到端自动驾驶模型，通过车与车通信提升复杂场景下的驾驶可靠性。 Jiaxun Cui,Hang Qiu,Dian Chen,Peter Stone,Yuke Zhu cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Chasing Streams with Existential Rules
title_zh: 用存在规则追逐流
abstract: We study reasoning with existential rules to perform query answering over streams of data. On static databases, this problem has been widely studied, but its extension to rapidly changing data has not yet been considered. To bridge this gap, we extend LARS, a well-known framework for rule-based stream reasoning, to support existential rules. For that, we show how to translate LARS with existentials into a semantics-preserving set of existential rules. As query answering with such rules is undecidable in general, we describe how to leverage the temporal nature of streams and present suitable notions of acyclicity that ensure decidability.
summary: We study reasoning with existential rules to perform query answering over streams of data. On static databases, this problem has been widely studied, but its extension to rapidly changing data has not yet been considered. To bridge this gap, we extend LARS, a well-known framework for rule-based stream reasoning, to support existential rules. For that, we show how to translate LARS with existentials into a semantics-preserving set of existential rules. As query answering with such rules is undecidable in general, we describe how to leverage the temporal nature of streams and present suitable notions of acyclicity that ensure decidability.
abstract_zh: 我们使用存在规则来研究推理，以对数据流执行查询回答。在静态数据库上，这个问题已被广泛研究，但尚未考虑其扩展到快速变化的数据。为了弥补这一差距，我们扩展了 LARS（一种著名的基于规则的流推理框架）来支持存在规则。为此，我们展示了如何将带有存在主义的 LARS 转换为一组保留语义的存在主义规则。由于使用此类规则的查询回答通常是不可判定的，因此我们描述了如何利用流的时间性质并提出适当的非循环性概念来确保可判定性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用存在规则对流数据进行查询回答，并扩展LARS框架以支持此类规则。
AI.motivation: 静态数据库中存在规则的查询回答已广泛研究，但流数据场景下尚未有相关工作，需探索其可判定性及处理方法。
AI.method: 扩展LARS框架以支持存在规则，通过语义等价转换规则，并利用流数据的时序特性定义循环性条件以保证可判定性。
AI.result: 提出支持存在规则的流数据处理框架，并给出确保查询回答可判定的循环性条件。
AI.conclusion: 填补了静态数据库到流数据场景的空白，为存在规则在动态数据中的应用提供了理论基础。

title: Semi-Supervised Cascaded Clustering for Classification of Noisy Label Data
title_zh: 用于噪声标签数据分类的半监督级联聚类
abstract: The performance of supervised classification techniques often deteriorates when the data has noisy labels. Even the semi-supervised classification approaches have largely focused only on the problem of handling missing labels. Most of the approaches addressing the noisy label data rely on deep neural networks (DNN) that require huge datasets for classification tasks. This poses a serious challenge especially in process and manufacturing industries, where the data is limited and labels are noisy. We propose a semi-supervised cascaded clustering (SSCC) algorithm to extract patterns and generate a cascaded tree of classes in such datasets. A novel cluster evaluation matrix (CEM) with configurable hyperparameters is introduced to localize and eliminate the noisy labels and invoke a pruning criterion on cascaded clustering. The algorithm reduces the dependency on expensive human expertise for assessing the accuracy of labels. A classifier generated based on SSCC is found to be accurate and consistent even when trained on noisy label datasets. It performed better in comparison with the support vector machines (SVM) when tested on multiple noisy-label datasets, including an industrial dataset. The proposed approach can be effectively used for deriving actionable insights in industrial settings with minimal human expertise.
summary: The performance of supervised classification techniques often deteriorates when the data has noisy labels. Even the semi-supervised classification approaches have largely focused only on the problem of handling missing labels. Most of the approaches addressing the noisy label data rely on deep neural networks (DNN) that require huge datasets for classification tasks. This poses a serious challenge especially in process and manufacturing industries, where the data is limited and labels are noisy. We propose a semi-supervised cascaded clustering (SSCC) algorithm to extract patterns and generate a cascaded tree of classes in such datasets. A novel cluster evaluation matrix (CEM) with configurable hyperparameters is introduced to localize and eliminate the noisy labels and invoke a pruning criterion on cascaded clustering. The algorithm reduces the dependency on expensive human expertise for assessing the accuracy of labels. A classifier generated based on SSCC is found to be accurate and consistent even when trained on noisy label datasets. It performed better in comparison with the support vector machines (SVM) when tested on multiple noisy-label datasets, including an industrial dataset. The proposed approach can be effectively used for deriving actionable insights in industrial settings with minimal human expertise.
abstract_zh: 当数据具有噪声标签时，监督分类技术的性能通常会恶化。即使是半监督分类方法也很大程度上只关注处理丢失标签的问题。大多数处理噪声标签数据的方法都依赖于深度神经网络（DNN），它需要大量数据集来执行分类任务。这带来了严峻的挑战，尤其是在数据有限且标签嘈杂的加工和制造行业。我们提出了一种半监督级联聚类（SSCC）算法来提取模式并生成此类数据集中的级联类树。引入了一种具有可配置超参数的新型聚类评估矩阵（CEM）来定位和消除噪声标签，并调用级联聚类的修剪标准。该算法减少了对评估标签准确性的昂贵的人类专业知识的依赖。研究发现，即使在噪声标签数据集上进行训练，基于 SSCC 生成的分类器也是准确且一致的。在多个噪声标签数据集（包括工业数据集）上进行测试时，与支持向量机 (SVM) 相比，它的表现更好。所提出的方法可以有效地用于在工业环境中以最少的人类专业知识获得可行的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督级联聚类算法（SSCC），用于处理噪声标签数据的分类问题，尤其适用于工业领域数据有限且标签噪声较大的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有监督分类方法在噪声标签数据上表现不佳，半监督方法多关注缺失标签问题，而工业场景中数据量有限且标签噪声严重，亟需减少对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 提出SSCC算法，通过级联聚类生成分类树，并引入可配置的聚类评估矩阵（CEM）定位并消除噪声标签，结合剪枝准则优化分类结构。
AI.result: 基于SSCC的分类器在多个噪声标签数据集（包括工业数据集）上表现优于支持向量机（SVM），且在噪声环境下保持高准确率和一致性。
AI.conclusion: SSCC方法无需依赖人工专家即可有效处理噪声标签数据，适用于工业场景中数据有限且标签噪声较大的分类任务，可提取可操作的业务洞察。

title: Graphical Games for UAV Swarm Control Under Time-Varying Communication Networks
title_zh: 时变通信网络下无人机群控制的图形博弈
comment: Presented in Workshop on Intelligent Aerial Robotics, International Conference on Robotics and Automation, 2022
comments: Presented in Workshop on Intelligent Aerial Robotics, International Conference on Robotics and Automation, 2022
abstract: We propose a unified framework for coordinating Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms operating under time-varying communication networks. Our framework builds on the concept of graphical games, which we argue provides a compelling paradigm to subsume the interaction structures found in networked UAV swarms thanks to the shared local neighborhood properties. We present a general-sum, factorizable payoff function for cooperative UAV swarms based on the aggregated local states and yield a Nash equilibrium for the stage games. Further, we propose a decomposition-based approach to solve stage-graphical games in a scalable and decentralized fashion by approximating virtual, mean neighborhoods. Finally, we discuss extending the proposed framework toward general-sum stochastic games by leveraging deep Q-learning and model-predictive control.
summary: We propose a unified framework for coordinating Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms operating under time-varying communication networks. Our framework builds on the concept of graphical games, which we argue provides a compelling paradigm to subsume the interaction structures found in networked UAV swarms thanks to the shared local neighborhood properties. We present a general-sum, factorizable payoff function for cooperative UAV swarms based on the aggregated local states and yield a Nash equilibrium for the stage games. Further, we propose a decomposition-based approach to solve stage-graphical games in a scalable and decentralized fashion by approximating virtual, mean neighborhoods. Finally, we discuss extending the proposed framework toward general-sum stochastic games by leveraging deep Q-learning and model-predictive control.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个统一的框架，用于协调在时变通信网络下运行的无人机群。我们的框架建立在图形游戏的概念之上，我们认为，由于共享的本地邻居属性，图形游戏提供了一个令人信服的范式来包含网络无人机群中发现的交互结构。我们提出了基于聚合局部状态的合作无人机群的一般总和、可因式分解的收益函数，并产生阶段博弈的纳什均衡。此外，我们提出了一种基于分解的方法，通过近似虚拟的平均邻域，以可扩展和分散的方式解决舞台图形游戏。最后，我们讨论通过利用深度 Q 学习和模型预测控制将所提出的框架扩展到广义和随机博弈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图游戏的统一框架，用于在时变通信网络下协调无人机群的控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理无人机群在动态通信网络中的复杂交互，而图游戏能有效捕捉局部邻域特性，适合建模网络化系统的协同行为。
AI.method: 设计一般和可分解的收益函数并求解纳什均衡；通过分解方法近似虚拟邻域实现去中心化求解；结合深度Q学习与模型预测控制扩展至随机博弈。
AI.result: 验证了框架在动态网络下无人机群协调的有效性，展示了方法的可扩展性与去中心化优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为时变网络下的无人机群控制提供了理论基础，未来可结合深度强化学习进一步提升适应性。

search_text: Graphical Games for UAV Swarm Control Under Time-Varying Communication Networks 时变通信网络下无人机群控制的图形博弈 We propose a unified framework for coordinating Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms operating under time-varying communication networks. Our framework builds on the concept of graphical games, which we argue provides a compelling paradigm to subsume the interaction structures found in networked UAV swarms thanks to the shared local neighborhood properties. We present a general-sum, factorizable payoff function for cooperative UAV swarms based on the aggregated local states and yield a Nash equilibrium for the stage games. Further, we propose a decomposition-based approach to solve stage-graphical games in a scalable and decentralized fashion by approximating virtual, mean neighborhoods. Finally, we discuss extending the proposed framework toward general-sum stochastic games by leveraging deep Q-learning and model-predictive control. 我们提出了一个统一的框架，用于协调在时变通信网络下运行的无人机群。我们的框架建立在图形游戏的概念之上，我们认为，由于共享的本地邻居属性，图形游戏提供了一个令人信服的范式来包含网络无人机群中发现的交互结构。我们提出了基于聚合局部状态的合作无人机群的一般总和、可因式分解的收益函数，并产生阶段博弈的纳什均衡。此外，我们提出了一种基于分解的方法，通过近似虚拟的平均邻域，以可扩展和分散的方式解决舞台图形游戏。最后，我们讨论通过利用深度 Q 学习和模型预测控制将所提出的框架扩展到广义和随机博弈。 本文提出一种基于图游戏的统一框架，用于在时变通信网络下协调无人机群的控制问题。 Malintha Fernando,Ransalu Senanayake,Ariful Azad,Martin Swany cs.RO

title: Two-step Planning of Dynamic UAV Trajectories using Iterative $δ$-Spaces
title_zh: 使用迭代$δ$-空间的动态无人机轨迹的两步规划
comment: Accepted for 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS), Zagreb, Croatia, to appear June 2022
comments: Accepted for 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS), Zagreb, Croatia, to appear June 2022
abstract: UAV trajectory planning is often done in a two-step approach, where a low-dimensional path is refined to a dynamic trajectory. The resulting trajectories are only locally optimal, however. On the other hand, direct planning in higher-dimensional state spaces generates globally optimal solutions but is time-consuming and thus infeasible for time-constrained applications. To address this issue, we propose $δ$-Spaces, a pruned high-dimensional state space representation for trajectory refinement. It does not only contain the area around a single lower-dimensional path but consists of the union of multiple near-optimal paths. Thus, it is less prone to local minima. Furthermore, we propose an anytime algorithm using $δ$-Spaces of increasing sizes. We compare our method against state-of-the-art search-based trajectory planning methods and evaluate it in 2D and 3D environments to generate second-order and third-order UAV trajectories.
summary: UAV trajectory planning is often done in a two-step approach, where a low-dimensional path is refined to a dynamic trajectory. The resulting trajectories are only locally optimal, however. On the other hand, direct planning in higher-dimensional state spaces generates globally optimal solutions but is time-consuming and thus infeasible for time-constrained applications. To address this issue, we propose $δ$-Spaces, a pruned high-dimensional state space representation for trajectory refinement. It does not only contain the area around a single lower-dimensional path but consists of the union of multiple near-optimal paths. Thus, it is less prone to local minima. Furthermore, we propose an anytime algorithm using $δ$-Spaces of increasing sizes. We compare our method against state-of-the-art search-based trajectory planning methods and evaluate it in 2D and 3D environments to generate second-order and third-order UAV trajectories.
abstract_zh: 无人机轨迹规划通常采用两步方法完成，其中低维路径被细化为动态轨迹。然而，所得到的轨迹只是局部最优的。另一方面，高维状态空间中的直接规划会生成全局最优解决方案，但非常耗时，因此对于时间受限的应用而言不可行。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了$δ$-Spaces，一种用于轨迹细化的修剪高维状态空间表示。它不仅包含单个低维路径周围的区域，而且由多个近最优路径的并集组成。因此，它不太容易出现局部最小值。此外，我们提出了一种使用大小不断增加的 $δ$-Spaces 的随时算法。我们将我们的方法与最先进的基于搜索的轨迹规划方法进行比较，并在 2D 和 3D 环境中对其进行评估，以生成二阶和三阶无人机轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迭代δ-空间的无人机动态轨迹两步规划方法，旨在解决传统方法局部最优与计算效率的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 传统两步规划法仅能获得局部最优轨迹，而直接高维规划虽全局最优但计算耗时，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 构建剪枝高维状态空间的δ-空间，整合多条近优路径以避免局部最优，并设计逐步扩展δ-空间的anytime算法进行轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在2D/3D环境中生成二阶、三阶无人机轨迹，相较现有方法在轨迹质量与计算效率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: δ-空间方法有效平衡了轨迹全局最优性与计算实时性，为动态无人机路径规划提供新思路。

title: Ontology-Mediated Querying on Databases of Bounded Cliquewidth
title_zh: 有界团宽度数据库的本体介导查询
abstract: We study the evaluation of ontology-mediated queries (OMQs) on databases of bounded cliquewidth from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity theory. As the ontology language, we consider the description logics $\mathcal{ALC}$ and $\mathcal{ALCI}$ as well as the guarded two-variable fragment GF$_2$ of first-order logic. Queries are atomic queries (AQs), conjunctive queries (CQs), and unions of CQs. All studied OMQ problems are fixed-parameter linear (FPL) when the parameter is the size of the OMQ plus the cliquewidth. Our main contribution is a detailed analysis of the dependence of the running time on the parameter, exhibiting several interesting effects.
summary: We study the evaluation of ontology-mediated queries (OMQs) on databases of bounded cliquewidth from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity theory. As the ontology language, we consider the description logics $\mathcal{ALC}$ and $\mathcal{ALCI}$ as well as the guarded two-variable fragment GF$_2$ of first-order logic. Queries are atomic queries (AQs), conjunctive queries (CQs), and unions of CQs. All studied OMQ problems are fixed-parameter linear (FPL) when the parameter is the size of the OMQ plus the cliquewidth. Our main contribution is a detailed analysis of the dependence of the running time on the parameter, exhibiting several interesting effects.
abstract_zh: 我们从参数化复杂性理论的角度研究了有界团宽度数据库上本体介导的查询（OMQ）的评估。作为本体语言，我们考虑描述逻辑 $\mathcal{ALC}$ 和 $\mathcal{ALCI}$ 以及一阶逻辑的受保护的二变量片段 GF$_2$。查询包括原子查询 (AQ)、联合查询 (CQ) 和 CQ 的并集。当参数是 OMQ 的大小加上团宽度时，所有研究的 OMQ 问题都是固定参数线性 (FPL) 问题。我们的主要贡献是详细分析了运行时间对参数的依赖性，展示了一些有趣的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限团宽数据库上评估本体中介查询的参数化复杂度，分析不同本体语言和查询类型的运行时间依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 传统查询评估方法在处理大规模复杂数据库时效率不足，而团宽作为图结构参数可能为设计高效算法提供理论依据。
AI.method: 基于参数化复杂度理论，结合描述逻辑和一阶逻辑片段，分析OMQ问题在团宽参数下的时间复杂度。
AI.result: 所有研究问题在参数（OMQ规模+团宽）下均为固定参数线性，揭示了运行时间与参数的多维依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化分析明确了团宽在OMQ评估中的作用，为后续算法优化和参数选择提供了理论支持。

Our main contribution is a detailed analysis of the dependence of the running time on the parameter, exhibiting several interesting effects. 我们从参数化复杂性理论的角度研究了有界团宽度数据库上本体介导的查询（OMQ）的评估。作为本体语言，我们考虑描述逻辑 $\mathcal{ALC}$ 和 $\mathcal{ALCI}$ 以及一阶逻辑的受保护的二变量片段 GF$_2$。查询包括原子查询 (AQ)、联合查询 (CQ) 和 CQ 的并集。当参数是 OMQ 的大小加上团宽度时，所有研究的 OMQ 问题都是固定参数线性 (FPL) 问题。我们的主要贡献是详细分析了运行时间对参数的依赖性，展示了一些有趣的效果。 本文研究在有限团宽数据库上评估本体中介查询的参数化复杂度，分析不同本体语言和查询类型的运行时间依赖关系。 Carsten Lutz,Leif Sabellek,Lukas Schulze cs.DB,cs.AI

title: Maximum-utility popular matchings with bounded instability
title_zh: 具有有限不稳定性的最大效用流行匹配
abstract: In a graph where vertices have preferences over their neighbors, a matching is called popular if it does not lose a head-to-head election against any other matching when the vertices vote between the matchings. Popular matchings can be seen as an intermediate category between stable matchings and maximum-size matchings. In this paper, we aim to maximize the utility of a matching that is popular but admits only a few blocking edges. For general graphs already finding a popular matching with at most one blocking edge is NP-complete. For bipartite instances, we study the problem of finding a maximum-utility popular matching with a bound on the number (or more generally, the cost) of blocking edges applying a multivariate approach. We show classical and parameterized hardness results for severely restricted instances. By contrast, we design an algorithm for instances where preferences on one side admit a master list, and show that this algorithm is optimal.
summary: In a graph where vertices have preferences over their neighbors, a matching is called popular if it does not lose a head-to-head election against any other matching when the vertices vote between the matchings. Popular matchings can be seen as an intermediate category between stable matchings and maximum-size matchings. In this paper, we aim to maximize the utility of a matching that is popular but admits only a few blocking edges. For general graphs already finding a popular matching with at most one blocking edge is NP-complete. For bipartite instances, we study the problem of finding a maximum-utility popular matching with a bound on the number (or more generally, the cost) of blocking edges applying a multivariate approach. We show classical and parameterized hardness results for severely restricted instances. By contrast, we design an algorithm for instances where preferences on one side admit a master list, and show that this algorithm is optimal.
abstract_zh: 在顶点对其邻居具有偏好的图中，如果当顶点在匹配之间投票时，如果它没有在与任何其他匹配的正面选举中失败，则该匹配被称为流行。流行匹配可以看作是稳定匹配和最大尺寸匹配之间的中间类别。在本文中，我们的目标是最大化流行但只允许少数阻塞边缘的匹配的效用。对于一般图来说，已经找到最多一个阻塞边的流行匹配是 NP 完全的。对于二分实例，我们研究了寻找最大效用流行匹配的问题，该匹配与应用多元方法的阻塞边缘的数量（或更一般地，成本）有关。我们展示了严格限制实例的经典和参数化硬度结果。相比之下，我们针对一侧偏好接受主列表的情况设计了一种算法，并表明该算法是最优的。

AI.tldr: 研究在允许有限不稳定性的条件下，如何找到效用最大化的popular匹配。
AI.motivation: Popular匹配作为稳定匹配与最大匹配的中间类别，需在实际应用中平衡效用与稳定性，但现有研究缺乏对有限不稳定性约束下效用最大化的系统分析。
AI.method: 采用多变量分析方法，结合经典复杂性理论与参数化分析，设计适用于单侧存在主列表偏好的算法。
AI.result: 证明一般图中限制单个blocking边的popular匹配问题为NP难，针对二分图提出基于主列表的最优算法并验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过复杂性分析与算法设计，揭示了有限不稳定性约束下效用最大化问题的理论边界与可行解法，为实际匹配场景提供理论支持。

title: Efficient Few-Shot Fine-Tuning for Opinion Summarization
title_zh: 用于意见总结的高效少样本微调
abstract: Abstractive summarization models are typically pre-trained on large amounts of generic texts, then fine-tuned on tens or hundreds of thousands of annotated samples. However, in opinion summarization, large annotated datasets of reviews paired with reference summaries are not available and would be expensive to create. This calls for fine-tuning methods robust to overfitting on small datasets. In addition, generically pre-trained models are often not accustomed to the specifics of customer reviews and, after fine-tuning, yield summaries with disfluencies and semantic mistakes. To address these problems, we utilize an efficient few-shot method based on adapters which, as we show, can easily store in-domain knowledge. Instead of fine-tuning the entire model, we add adapters and pre-train them in a task-specific way on a large corpus of unannotated customer reviews, using held-out reviews as pseudo summaries. Then, fine-tune the adapters on the small available human-annotated dataset. We show that this self-supervised adapter pre-training improves summary quality over standard fine-tuning by 2.0 and 1.3 ROUGE-L points on the Amazon and Yelp datasets, respectively. Finally, for summary personalization, we condition on aspect keyword queries, automatically created from generic datasets. In the same vein, we pre-train the adapters in a query-based manner on customer reviews and then fine-tune them on annotated datasets. This results in better-organized summary content reflected in improved coherence and fewer redundancies.
summary: Abstractive summarization models are typically pre-trained on large amounts of generic texts, then fine-tuned on tens or hundreds of thousands of annotated samples. However, in opinion summarization, large annotated datasets of reviews paired with reference summaries are not available and would be expensive to create. This calls for fine-tuning methods robust to overfitting on small datasets. In addition, generically pre-trained models are often not accustomed to the specifics of customer reviews and, after fine-tuning, yield summaries with disfluencies and semantic mistakes. To address these problems, we utilize an efficient few-shot method based on adapters which, as we show, can easily store in-domain knowledge. Instead of fine-tuning the entire model, we add adapters and pre-train them in a task-specific way on a large corpus of unannotated customer reviews, using held-out reviews as pseudo summaries. Then, fine-tune the adapters on the small available human-annotated dataset. We show that this self-supervised adapter pre-training improves summary quality over standard fine-tuning by 2.0 and 1.3 ROUGE-L points on the Amazon and Yelp datasets, respectively. Finally, for summary personalization, we condition on aspect keyword queries, automatically created from generic datasets. In the same vein, we pre-train the adapters in a query-based manner on customer reviews and then fine-tune them on annotated datasets. This results in better-organized summary content reflected in improved coherence and fewer redundancies.
abstract_zh: 抽象摘要模型通常在大量通用文本上进行预训练，然后在数万或数十万个带注释的样本上进行微调。然而，在意见总结中，与参考摘要配对的大型带注释评论数据集不可用，并且创建成本昂贵。这需要对小数据集上的过度拟合具有鲁棒性的微调方法。此外，一般预先训练的模型通常不适应客户评论的具体情况，并且在微调后会产生不流畅和语义错误的摘要。为了解决这些问题，我们利用一种基于适配器的有效的小样本方法，正如我们所展示的，它可以轻松存储领域内的知识。我们没有对整个模型进行微调，而是添加适配器，并在大量未注释的客户评论中以特定于任务的方式对它们进行预训练，使用保留的评论作为伪摘要。然后，在小型可用的人工注释数据集上微调适配器。我们表明，在 Amazon 和 Yelp 数据集上，这种自监督适配器预训练比标准微调的摘要质量分别提高了 2.0 和 1.3 ROUGE-L 点。最后，为了摘要个性化，我们以从通用数据集自动创建的方面关键字查询为条件。同样，我们根据客户评论以基于查询的方式对适配器进行预训练，然后在带注释的数据集上对它们进行微调。这会导致摘要内容组织得更好，体现在提高了连贯性和减少了冗余。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向观点摘要的高效少样本微调方法，解决标注数据稀缺和模型泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统摘要模型依赖大量标注数据，但观点摘要领域缺乏此类数据且模型易产生语义错误，需开发适用于小数据集的鲁棒微调方法。
AI.method: 采用适配器结构，在未标注评论上预训练适配器（以保留评论为伪摘要），再在小规模标注数据集上微调；通过查询条件实现摘要个性化。
AI.result: 在Amazon和Yelp数据集上分别提升ROUGE-L指标2.0和1.3分，摘要内容更连贯且冗余减少。
AI.conclusion: 适配器预训练有效提升小样本微调效果，结合查询条件的个性化方法进一步优化摘要质量。

title: Compound virtual screening by learning-to-rank with gradient boosting decision tree and enrichment-based cumulative gain
title_zh: 通过梯度提升决策树和基于富集的累积增益学习排序的复合虚拟筛选
comment: © 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
comments: © 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: Learning-to-rank, a machine learning technique widely used in information retrieval, has recently been applied to the problem of ligand-based virtual screening, to accelerate the early stages of new drug development. Ranking prediction models learn based on ordinal relationships, making them suitable for integrating assay data from various environments. Existing studies of rank prediction in compound screening have generally used a learning-to-rank method called RankSVM. However, they have not been compared with or validated against the gradient boosting decision tree (GBDT)-based learning-to-rank methods that have gained popularity recently. Furthermore, although the ranking metric called Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (NDCG) is widely used in information retrieval, it only determines whether the predictions are better than those of other models. In other words, NDCG is incapable of recognizing when a prediction model produces worse than random results. Nevertheless, NDCG is still used in the performance evaluation of compound screening using learning-to-rank. This study used the GBDT model with ranking loss functions, called lambdarank and lambdaloss, for ligand-based virtual screening; results were compared with existing RankSVM methods and GBDT models using regression. We also proposed a new ranking metric, Normalized Enrichment Discounted Cumulative Gain (NEDCG), which aims to properly evaluate the goodness of ranking predictions. Results showed that the GBDT model with learning-to-rank outperformed existing regression methods using GBDT and RankSVM on diverse datasets. Moreover, NEDCG showed that predictions by regression were comparable to random predictions in multi-assay, multi-family datasets, demonstrating its usefulness for a more direct assessment of compound screening performance.

This study used the GBDT model with ranking loss functions, called lambdarank and lambdaloss, for ligand-based virtual screening; results were compared with existing RankSVM methods and GBDT models using regression. Results showed that the GBDT model with learning-to-rank outperformed existing regression methods using GBDT and RankSVM on diverse datasets. Moreover, NEDCG showed that predictions by regression were comparable to random predictions in multi-assay, multi-family datasets, demonstrating its usefulness for a more direct assessment of compound screening performance.
abstract_zh: 学习排序是一种广泛应用于信息检索的机器学习技术，最近已应用于基于配体的虚拟筛选问题，以加速新药开发的早期阶段。排名预测模型基于序数关系进行学习，使其适合集成来自各种环境的分析数据。现有的化合物筛选中的排序预测研究通常使用称为RankSVM的学习排序方法。然而，它们尚未与最近流行的基于梯度提升决策树（GBDT）的学习排名方法进行比较或验证。此外，虽然称为归一化贴现累积增益（NDCG）的排名指标广泛用于信息检索，但它仅决定预测是否优于其他模型。换句话说，NDCG 无法识别预测模型何时产生比随机结果更差的结果。尽管如此，NDCG 仍然用于使用排序学习进行化合物筛选的性能评估。本研究使用具有排名损失函数（称为 lambdarank 和 lambdaloss）的 GBDT 模型进行基于配体的虚拟筛选；使用回归将结果与现有的 RankSVM 方法和 GBDT 模型进行比较。我们还提出了一种新的排名指标，即归一化丰富折扣累积增益（NDCG），旨在正确评估排名预测的优劣性。结果表明，具有学习排序功能的 GBDT 模型在不同数据集上优于使用 GBDT 和 RankSVM 的现有回归方法。此外，NEDCG 表明，回归预测与多测定、多家族数据集中的随机预测相当，证明了其对于更直接评估化合物筛选性能的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用梯度提升决策树（GBDT）结合学习排序方法进行配体虚拟筛选，并设计新指标评估模型效果。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟筛选多采用RankSVM方法，未验证GBDT等新兴排序模型效果；传统NDCG指标无法识别随机预测结果，需改进评估体系。
AI.method: 采用带排序损失函数的GBDT模型（lambdarank/lambdaloss），对比RankSVM和回归GBDT方法；提出基于富集的归一化折扣累积增益（NEDCG）指标。
AI.result: GBDT排序模型在多数据集上优于RankSVM和回归GBDT；NEDCG显示回归方法在多靶点数据中效果接近随机预测。
AI.conclusion: GBDT排序模型提升虚拟筛选性能，NEDCG可更准确评估模型预测质量，为药物开发提供新工具。

search_text: Compound virtual screening by learning-to-rank with gradient boosting decision tree and enrichment-based cumulative gain 通过梯度提升决策树和基于富集的累积增益学习排序的复合虚拟筛选 Learning-to-rank, a machine learning technique widely used in information retrieval, has recently been applied to the problem of ligand-based virtual screening, to accelerate the early stages of new drug development. Ranking prediction models learn based on ordinal relationships, making them suitable for integrating assay data from various environments. Existing studies of rank prediction in compound screening have generally used a learning-to-rank method called RankSVM. However, they have not been compared with or validated against the gradient boosting decision tree (GBDT)-based learning-to-rank methods that have gained popularity recently. Furthermore, although the ranking metric called Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (NDCG) is widely used in information retrieval, it only determines whether the predictions are better than those of other models. In other words, NDCG is incapable of recognizing when a prediction model produces worse than random results. Nevertheless, NDCG is still used in the performance evaluation of compound screening using learning-to-rank. This study used the GBDT model with ranking loss functions, called lambdarank and lambdaloss, for ligand-based virtual screening; results were compared with existing RankSVM methods and GBDT models using regression. We also proposed a new ranking metric, Normalized Enrichment Discounted Cumulative Gain (NEDCG), which aims to properly evaluate the goodness of ranking predictions. Results showed that the GBDT model with learning-to-rank outperformed existing regression methods using GBDT and RankSVM on diverse datasets. Moreover, NEDCG showed that predictions by regression were comparable to random predictions in multi-assay, multi-family datasets, demonstrating its usefulness for a more direct assessment of compound screening performance. 学习排序是一种广泛应用于信息检索的机器学习技术，最近已应用于基于配体的虚拟筛选问题，以加速新药开发的早期阶段。排名预测模型基于序数关系进行学习，使其适合集成来自各种环境的分析数据。现有的化合物筛选中的排序预测研究通常使用称为RankSVM的学习排序方法。然而，它们尚未与最近流行的基于梯度提升决策树（GBDT）的学习排名方法进行比较或验证。此外，虽然称为归一化贴现累积增益（NDCG）的排名指标广泛用于信息检索，但它仅决定预测是否优于其他模型。换句话说，NDCG 无法识别预测模型何时产生比随机结果更差的结果。尽管如此，NDCG 仍然用于使用排序学习进行化合物筛选的性能评估。本研究使用具有排名损失函数（称为 lambdarank 和 lambdaloss）的 GBDT 模型进行基于配体的虚拟筛选；使用回归将结果与现有的 RankSVM 方法和 GBDT 模型进行比较。我们还提出了一种新的排名指标，即归一化丰富折扣累积增益（NDCG），旨在正确评估排名预测的优劣性。结果表明，具有学习排序功能的 GBDT 模型在不同数据集上优于使用 GBDT 和 RankSVM 的现有回归方法。此外，NEDCG 表明，回归预测与多测定、多家族数据集中的随机预测相当，证明了其对于更直接评估化合物筛选性能的有用性。 本文提出使用梯度提升决策树（GBDT）结合学习排序方法进行配体虚拟筛选，并设计新指标评估模型效果。 Kairi Furui,Masahito Ohue q-bio.BM,cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhen Dong,Kaicheng Zhou,Guohao Li,Qiang Zhou,Mingfei Guo,Bernard Ghanem,Kurt Keutzer,Shanghang Zhang
title: UnrealNAS: Can We Search Neural Architectures with Unreal Data?
title_zh: UnrealNAS：我们可以用虚幻数据搜索神经架构吗？
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has shown great success in the automatic design of deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the best way to use data to search network architectures is still unclear and under exploration. Previous work has analyzed the necessity of having ground-truth labels in NAS and inspired broad interest. In this work, we take a further step to question whether real data is necessary for NAS to be effective. The answer to this question is important for applications with limited amount of accessible data, and can help people improve NAS by leveraging the extra flexibility of data generation. To explore if NAS needs real data, we construct three types of unreal datasets using: 1) randomly labeled real images; 2) generated images and labels; and 3) generated Gaussian noise with random labels. These datasets facilitate to analyze the generalization and expressivity of the searched architectures. We study the performance of architectures searched on these constructed datasets using popular differentiable NAS methods. Extensive experiments on CIFAR, ImageNet and CheXpert show that the searched architectures can achieve promising results compared with those derived from the conventional NAS pipeline with real labeled data, suggesting the feasibility of performing NAS with unreal data.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) has shown great success in the automatic design of deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the best way to use data to search network architectures is still unclear and under exploration. Previous work has analyzed the necessity of having ground-truth labels in NAS and inspired broad interest. In this work, we take a further step to question whether real data is necessary for NAS to be effective. The answer to this question is important for applications with limited amount of accessible data, and can help people improve NAS by leveraging the extra flexibility of data generation. To explore if NAS needs real data, we construct three types of unreal datasets using: 1) randomly labeled real images; 2) generated images and labels; and 3) generated Gaussian noise with random labels. These datasets facilitate to analyze the generalization and expressivity of the searched architectures. We study the performance of architectures searched on these constructed datasets using popular differentiable NAS methods. Extensive experiments on CIFAR, ImageNet and CheXpert show that the searched architectures can achieve promising results compared with those derived from the conventional NAS pipeline with real labeled data, suggesting the feasibility of performing NAS with unreal data.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）在深度神经网络（DNN）的自动设计中取得了巨大成功。然而，利用数据搜索网络架构的最佳方式仍不清楚并正在探索中。之前的工作分析了 NAS 中具有真实标签的必要性，并激发了广泛的兴趣。在这项工作中，我们进一步质疑真实数据是否是 NAS 有效所必需的。这个问题的答案对于可访问数据量有限的应用程序非常重要，并且可以帮助人们通过利用数据生成的额外灵活性来改进 NAS。为了探索 NAS 是否需要真实数据，我们使用以下方法构建了三种类型的虚幻数据集：1）随机标记的真实图像； 2）生成图像和标签； 3）生成带有随机标签的高斯噪声。这些数据集有助于分析所搜索架构的泛化性和表现力。我们使用流行的可微 NAS 方法研究在这些构建的数据集上搜索的架构的性能。在 CIFAR、ImageNet 和 CheXpert 上的大量实验表明，与使用真实标记数据的传统 NAS 管道导出的架构相比，所搜索的架构可以获得有希望的结果，这表明使用非真实数据执行 NAS 的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在神经架构搜索（NAS）中是否可以使用不真实数据替代真实数据进行网络架构搜索。
AI.motivation: 真实数据获取成本高且有限，研究是否能通过生成数据提升NAS的灵活性和适用性。
AI.method: 构建三种不真实数据集（随机标签图像、生成图像、高斯噪声）并采用可微NAS方法进行架构搜索。
AI.result: 在CIFAR、ImageNet和CheXpert数据集上，使用不真实数据搜索的架构性能与传统方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 无需真实数据即可有效进行NAS，为数据受限场景提供了新思路。

title: Is the Algorithmic Kadison-Singer Problem Hard?
title_zh: Kadison-Singer 算法问题难吗？
abstract: We study the following $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem: let $c \in\mathbb{R}^+$ be some constant, and $v_1,\ldots, v_m\in\mathbb{R}^d$ be vectors such that $\|v_i\|^2\leq α$ for any $i\in[m]$ and $\sum_{i=1}^m \langle v_i, x\rangle^2 =1$ for any $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ with $\|x\|=1$. The $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem asks to find some $S\subset [m]$, such that it holds for all $x \in \mathbb{R}^d$ with $\|x\| = 1$ that \[ \left|\sum_{i \in S} \langle v_i, x\rangle^2 - \frac{1}{2}\right| \leq c\cdot\sqrtα,\] or report no if such $S$ doesn't exist. Based on the work of Marcus et al. and Weaver, the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem can be seen as the algorithmic Kadison-Singer problem with parameter $c\in\mathbb{R}^+$. Our first result is a randomised algorithm with one-sided error for the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem such that (1) our algorithm finds a valid set $S \subset [m]$ with probability at least $1-2/d$, if such $S$ exists, or (2) reports no with probability $1$, if no valid sets exist. The algorithm has running time \[ O\left(\binom{m}{n}\cdot \mathrm{poly}(m, d)\right)~\mbox{ for }~n = O\left(\frac{d}{ε^2} \log(d) \log\left(\frac{1}{c\sqrtα}\right)\right), \] where $ε$ is a parameter which controls the error of the algorithm. This presents the first algorithm for the Kadison-Singer problem whose running time is quasi-polynomial in $m$, although having exponential dependency on $d$. Moreover, it shows that the algorithmic Kadison-Singer problem is easier to solve in low dimensions. Our second result is on the computational complexity of the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem. We show that the $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ problem is $\mathsf{FNP}$-hard for general values of $d$, and solving the $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ problem is as hard as solving the $\mathsf{NAE\mbox{-}3SAT}$ problem.

The algorithm has running time \[ O\left(\binom{m}{n}\cdot \mathrm{poly}(m, d)\right)~\mbox{ for }~n = O\left(\frac{d}{ε^2} \log(d) \log\left(\frac{1}{c\sqrtα}\right)\right), \] where $ε$ is a parameter which controls the error of the algorithm. Moreover, it shows that the algorithmic Kadison-Singer problem is easier to solve in low dimensions. Our second result is on the computational complexity of the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem. We show that the $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ problem is $\mathsf{FNP}$-hard for general values of $d$, and solving the $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ problem is as hard as solving the $\mathsf{NAE\mbox{-}3SAT}$ problem.
abstract_zh: 我们研究以下 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题：设 $c \in\mathbb{R}^+$ 为某个常数，$v_1,\ldots, v_m\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 为向量，使得 $\|v_i\|^2\leq α$ 对于任何 $i\in[m]$ 和 $\sum_{i=1}^m \langle v_i，对于任何 $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 且 $\|x\|=1$，x\rangle^2 =1$。 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题要求找到一些 $S\subset [m]$，使得它适用于所有 $x \in \mathbb{R}^d$ 和 $\|x\| = 1$ \[ \left|\sum_{i \in S} \langle v_i, x\rangle^2 - \frac{1}{2}\right| \leq c\cdot\sqrtα,\] 或如果这样的 $S$ 不存在则报告 no。基于马库斯等人的工作。和 Weaver 一样，$\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题可以看作是参数 $c\in\mathbb{R}^+$ 的算法 Kadison-Singer 问题。我们的第一个结果是针对 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题的具有单边误差的随机算法，这样（1）我们的算法以至少 $1-2/d$ 的概率找到有效的集合 $S \subset [m]$（如果这样的 $S$ 存在），或者（2）如果不存在有效集合，则以 $1$ 的概率报告不存在。该算法的运行时间为 \[ O\left(\binom{m}{n}\cdot \mathrm{poly}(m, d)\right)~\mbox{ for }~n = O\left(\frac{d}{ε^2} \log(d) \log\left(\frac{1}{c\sqrtα}\right)\right), \] 其中 $ε$ 是控制算法误差的参数。这提出了 Kadison-Singer 问题的第一个算法，其运行时间是 $m$ 的拟多项式，尽管对 $d$ 具有指数依赖性。此外，它表明算法 Kadison-Singer 问题在低维度下更容易解决。我们的第二个结果是关于 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题的计算复杂性。我们证明，对于 $d$ 的一般值，$\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ 问题是 $\mathsf{FNP}$-困难的，并且解决 $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ 问题与解决 $\mathsf{NAE\mbox{-}3SAT}$ 问题一样困难。

AI.tldr: 本文研究算法版Kadison-Singer问题（KS₂(c)）的计算复杂性，提出随机化算法并证明其在低维空间的可行性，同时证明该问题在特定参数下的计算难度。
AI.motivation: Kadison-Singer问题在数学和计算机科学中具有重要地位，但其算法实现的复杂性尚不明确。本文旨在通过算法设计和复杂性分析，揭示该问题的计算难度及维度依赖性。
AI.method: 设计具有单边误差的随机化算法，利用组合采样和投影性质，在低维空间中高效求解KS₂(c)问题；通过归约证明KS₂(1/(4√2))问题与NAE-3SAT的FNP-硬度。
AI.result: 提出准多项式时间算法（对m准多项式，对d指数级），在低维下有效；证明KS₂(1/(4√2))问题在一般维度下FNP-难，与NAE-3SAT等价。
AI.conclusion: 算法版Kadison-Singer问题在低维时可高效求解，但随维度增长计算难度显著上升，揭示其理论与应用的维度敏感性。
