search_text: Is the Algorithmic Kadison-Singer Problem Hard? Kadison-Singer 算法问题难吗？ We study the following $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem: let $c \in\mathbb{R}^+$ be some constant, and $v_1,\ldots, v_m\in\mathbb{R}^d$ be vectors such that $\|v_i\|^2\leq α$ for any $i\in[m]$ and $\sum_{i=1}^m \langle v_i, x\rangle^2 =1$ for any $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ with $\|x\|=1$. The $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem asks to find some $S\subset [m]$, such that it holds for all $x \in \mathbb{R}^d$ with $\|x\| = 1$ that \[ \left|\sum_{i \in S} \langle v_i, x\rangle^2 - \frac{1}{2}\right| \leq c\cdot\sqrtα,\] or report no if such $S$ doesn't exist. Based on the work of Marcus et al. and Weaver, the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem can be seen as the algorithmic Kadison-Singer problem with parameter $c\in\mathbb{R}^+$. Our first result is a randomised algorithm with one-sided error for the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem such that (1) our algorithm finds a valid set $S \subset [m]$ with probability at least $1-2/d$, if such $S$ exists, or (2) reports no with probability $1$, if no valid sets exist. The algorithm has running time \[ O\left(\binom{m}{n}\cdot \mathrm{poly}(m, d)\right)~\mbox{ for }~n = O\left(\frac{d}{ε^2} \log(d) \log\left(\frac{1}{c\sqrtα}\right)\right), \] where $ε$ is a parameter which controls the error of the algorithm. This presents the first algorithm for the Kadison-Singer problem whose running time is quasi-polynomial in $m$, although having exponential dependency on $d$. Moreover, it shows that the algorithmic Kadison-Singer problem is easier to solve in low dimensions. Our second result is on the computational complexity of the $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ problem. We show that the $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ problem is $\mathsf{FNP}$-hard for general values of $d$, and solving the $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ problem is as hard as solving the $\mathsf{NAE\mbox{-}3SAT}$ problem. 我们研究以下 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题：设 $c \in\mathbb{R}^+$ 为某个常数，$v_1,\ldots, v_m\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 为向量，使得 $\|v_i\|^2\leq α$ 对于任何 $i\in[m]$ 和 $\sum_{i=1}^m \langle v_i，对于任何 $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 且 $\|x\|=1$，x\rangle^2 =1$。 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题要求找到一些 $S\subset [m]$，使得它适用于所有 $x \in \mathbb{R}^d$ 和 $\|x\| = 1$ \[ \left|\sum_{i \in S} \langle v_i, x\rangle^2 - \frac{1}{2}\right| \leq c\cdot\sqrtα,\] 或如果这样的 $S$ 不存在则报告 no。基于马库斯等人的工作。和 Weaver 一样，$\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题可以看作是参数 $c\in\mathbb{R}^+$ 的算法 Kadison-Singer 问题。我们的第一个结果是针对 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题的具有单边误差的随机算法，这样（1）我们的算法以至少 $1-2/d$ 的概率找到有效的集合 $S \subset [m]$（如果这样的 $S$ 存在），或者（2）如果不存在有效集合，则以 $1$ 的概率报告不存在。该算法的运行时间为 \[ O\left(\binom{m}{n}\cdot \mathrm{poly}(m, d)\right)~\mbox{ for }~n = O\left(\frac{d}{ε^2} \log(d) \log\left(\frac{1}{c\sqrtα}\right)\right), \] 其中 $ε$ 是控制算法误差的参数。这提出了 Kadison-Singer 问题的第一个算法，其运行时间是 $m$ 的拟多项式，尽管对 $d$ 具有指数依赖性。此外，它表明算法 Kadison-Singer 问题在低维度下更容易解决。我们的第二个结果是关于 $\mathsf{KS}_2(c)$ 问题的计算复杂性。我们证明，对于 $d$ 的一般值，$\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ 问题是 $\mathsf{FNP}$-困难的，并且解决 $\mathsf{KS}_2(1/(4\sqrt{2}))$ 问题与解决 $\mathsf{NAE\mbox{-}3SAT}$ 问题一样困难。 本文研究算法版Kadison-Singer问题（KS₂(c)）的计算复杂性，提出随机化算法并证明其在低维空间的可行性，同时证明该问题在特定参数下的计算难度。 Ben Jourdan,Peter Macgregor,He Sun cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Constantine Maganaris,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Nikolaos Bakalos,Nikolaos Doulamis,Dimitris Kalogeras,Aikaterini Angeli
title: Evaluating Transferability for Covid 3D Localization Using CT SARS-CoV-2 segmentation models
title_zh: 使用 CT SARS-CoV-2 分割模型评估 Covid 3D 定位的可转移性
abstract: Recent studies indicate that detecting radiographic patterns on CT scans can yield high sensitivity and specificity for Covid-19 localization. In this paper, we investigate the appropriateness of deep learning models transferability, for semantic segmentation of pneumonia-infected areas in CT images. Transfer learning allows for the fast initialization/reutilization of detection models, given that large volumes of training data are not available. Our work explores the efficacy of using pre-trained U-Net architectures, on a specific CT data set, for identifying Covid-19 side-effects over images from different datasets. Experimental results indicate improvement in the segmentation accuracy of identifying Covid-19 infected regions.
summary: Recent studies indicate that detecting radiographic patterns on CT scans can yield high sensitivity and specificity for Covid-19 localization. In this paper, we investigate the appropriateness of deep learning models transferability, for semantic segmentation of pneumonia-infected areas in CT images. Transfer learning allows for the fast initialization/reutilization of detection models, given that large volumes of training data are not available. Our work explores the efficacy of using pre-trained U-Net architectures, on a specific CT data set, for identifying Covid-19 side-effects over images from different datasets. Experimental results indicate improvement in the segmentation accuracy of identifying Covid-19 infected regions.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，检测 CT 扫描的放射线图案可以为 Covid-19 定位提供高灵敏度和特异性。在本文中，我们研究了深度学习模型可迁移性对于 CT 图像中肺炎感染区域的语义分割的适用性。鉴于无法获得大量训练数据，迁移学习可以快速初始化/重用检测模型。我们的工作探索了在特定 CT 数据集上使用预先训练的 U-Net 架构来识别来自不同数据集的图像的 Covid-19 副作用的功效。实验结果表明识别 Covid-19 感染区域的分割精度有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用预训练U-Net模型进行CT图像中Covid-19感染区域分割的迁移学习效果。
AI.motivation: Covid-19 CT数据量有限，而迁移学习可复用预训练模型减少数据依赖，提升分割效率。
AI.method: 基于特定CT数据集预训练U-Net模型，并测试其在不同数据集上的分割性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，迁移学习显著提升了Covid-19感染区域的分割准确率。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型迁移策略在Covid-19 CT分割任务中具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Haowei Zhu,Wenjing Ke,Dong Li,Ji Liu,Lu Tian,Yi Shan
title: Dual Cross-Attention Learning for Fine-Grained Visual Categorization and Object Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于细粒度视觉分类和对象重新识别的双重交叉注意学习
abstract: Recently, self-attention mechanisms have shown impressive performance in various NLP and CV tasks, which can help capture sequential characteristics and derive global information. In this work, we explore how to extend self-attention modules to better learn subtle feature embeddings for recognizing fine-grained objects, e.g., different bird species or person identities. To this end, we propose a dual cross-attention learning (DCAL) algorithm to coordinate with self-attention learning. First, we propose global-local cross-attention (GLCA) to enhance the interactions between global images and local high-response regions, which can help reinforce the spatial-wise discriminative clues for recognition. Second, we propose pair-wise cross-attention (PWCA) to establish the interactions between image pairs. PWCA can regularize the attention learning of an image by treating another image as distractor and will be removed during inference. We observe that DCAL can reduce misleading attentions and diffuse the attention response to discover more complementary parts for recognition. We conduct extensive evaluations on fine-grained visual categorization and object re-identification. Experiments demonstrate that DCAL performs on par with state-of-the-art methods and consistently improves multiple self-attention baselines, e.g., surpassing DeiT-Tiny and ViT-Base by 2.8% and 2.4% mAP on MSMT17, respectively.
summary: Recently, self-attention mechanisms have shown impressive performance in various NLP and CV tasks, which can help capture sequential characteristics and derive global information. In this work, we explore how to extend self-attention modules to better learn subtle feature embeddings for recognizing fine-grained objects, e.g., different bird species or person identities. To this end, we propose a dual cross-attention learning (DCAL) algorithm to coordinate with self-attention learning. First, we propose global-local cross-attention (GLCA) to enhance the interactions between global images and local high-response regions, which can help reinforce the spatial-wise discriminative clues for recognition. Second, we propose pair-wise cross-attention (PWCA) to establish the interactions between image pairs. PWCA can regularize the attention learning of an image by treating another image as distractor and will be removed during inference. We observe that DCAL can reduce misleading attentions and diffuse the attention response to discover more complementary parts for recognition. We conduct extensive evaluations on fine-grained visual categorization and object re-identification. Experiments demonstrate that DCAL performs on par with state-of-the-art methods and consistently improves multiple self-attention baselines, e.g., surpassing DeiT-Tiny and ViT-Base by 2.8% and 2.4% mAP on MSMT17, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近，自注意力机制在各种 NLP 和 CV 任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，这可以帮助捕获序列特征并导出全局信息。在这项工作中，我们探索如何扩展自注意力模块，以更好地学习微妙的特征嵌入，以识别细粒度的对象，例如不同的鸟类或人的身份。为此，我们提出了一种双交叉注意学习（DCAL）算法来配合自注意学习。首先，我们提出全局局部交叉注意（GLCA）来增强全局图像和局部高响应区域之间的交互，这有助于强化识别的空间辨别线索。其次，我们提出成对交叉注意（PWCA）来建立图像对之间的交互。 PWCA 可以通过将另一张图像视为干扰项来规范图像的注意力学习，并在推理过程中将其删除。我们观察到 DCAL 可以减少误导性注意力并分散注意力反应，以发现更多用于识别的互补部分。我们对细粒度视觉分类和对象重新识别进行了广泛的评估。实验表明，DCAL 的性能与最先进的方法相当，并且持续改进了多个自注意力基线，例如，在 MSMT17 上分别超过 DeiT-Tiny 和 ViT-Base 2.8% 和 2.4% mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双交叉注意力学习（DCAL）算法，用于提升细粒度视觉分类和物体重识别任务中的特征嵌入学习。
AI.motivation: 自注意力机制在捕捉全局信息方面表现优异，但在细粒度任务中难以有效学习细微的特征差异，需通过交叉注意力增强局部与全局特征的交互。
AI.method: 设计了全局-局部交叉注意力（GLCA）增强图像全局与局部区域的交互，并引入成对交叉注意力（PWCA）通过图像对互为干扰项优化注意力学习，抑制误导性关注并挖掘互补特征。
AI.result: 在细粒度分类和物体重识别数据集上，DCAL性能与最先进方法相当，且在MSMT17数据集上分别超越DeiT-Tiny和ViT-Base基线2.8%和2.4% mAP。
AI.conclusion: DCAL通过协调自注意力与交叉注意力机制，有效提升了细粒度任务中的特征判别能力，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Dual Cross-Attention Learning for Fine-Grained Visual Categorization and Object Re-Identification 用于细粒度视觉分类和对象重新识别的双重交叉注意学习 Recently, self-attention mechanisms have shown impressive performance in various NLP and CV tasks, which can help capture sequential characteristics and derive global information. In this work, we explore how to extend self-attention modules to better learn subtle feature embeddings for recognizing fine-grained objects, e.g., different bird species or person identities. To this end, we propose a dual cross-attention learning (DCAL) algorithm to coordinate with self-attention learning. First, we propose global-local cross-attention (GLCA) to enhance the interactions between global images and local high-response regions, which can help reinforce the spatial-wise discriminative clues for recognition. Second, we propose pair-wise cross-attention (PWCA) to establish the interactions between image pairs. PWCA can regularize the attention learning of an image by treating another image as distractor and will be removed during inference. We observe that DCAL can reduce misleading attentions and diffuse the attention response to discover more complementary parts for recognition. We conduct extensive evaluations on fine-grained visual categorization and object re-identification. Experiments demonstrate that DCAL performs on par with state-of-the-art methods and consistently improves multiple self-attention baselines, e.g., surpassing DeiT-Tiny and ViT-Base by 2.8% and 2.4% mAP on MSMT17, respectively. 最近，自注意力机制在各种 NLP 和 CV 任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，这可以帮助捕获序列特征并导出全局信息。在这项工作中，我们探索如何扩展自注意力模块，以更好地学习微妙的特征嵌入，以识别细粒度的对象，例如不同的鸟类或人的身份。为此，我们提出了一种双交叉注意学习（DCAL）算法来配合自注意学习。首先，我们提出全局局部交叉注意（GLCA）来增强全局图像和局部高响应区域之间的交互，这有助于强化识别的空间辨别线索。其次，我们提出成对交叉注意（PWCA）来建立图像对之间的交互。 PWCA 可以通过将另一张图像视为干扰项来规范图像的注意力学习，并在推理过程中将其删除。我们观察到 DCAL 可以减少误导性注意力并分散注意力反应，以发现更多用于识别的互补部分。我们对细粒度视觉分类和对象重新识别进行了广泛的评估。实验表明，DCAL 的性能与最先进的方法相当，并且持续改进了多个自注意力基线，例如，在 MSMT17 上分别超过 DeiT-Tiny 和 ViT-Base 2.8% 和 2.4% mAP。 本文提出了一种双交叉注意力学习（DCAL）算法，用于提升细粒度视觉分类和物体重识别任务中的特征嵌入学习。 Haowei Zhu,Wenjing Ke,Dong Li,Ji Liu,Lu Tian,Yi Shan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Coloma Ballester,Aurelie Bugeau,Samuel Hurault,Simone Parisotto,Patricia Vitoria
title: An Analysis of Generative Methods for Multiple Image Inpainting
title_zh: 多图像修复生成方法分析
abstract: Image inpainting refers to the restoration of an image with missing regions in a way that is not detectable by the observer. The inpainting regions can be of any size and shape. This is an ill-posed inverse problem that does not have a unique solution. In this work, we focus on learning-based image completion methods for multiple and diverse inpainting which goal is to provide a set of distinct solutions for a given damaged image. These methods capitalize on the probabilistic nature of certain generative models to sample various solutions that coherently restore the missing content. Along the chapter, we will analyze the underlying theory and analyze the recent proposals for multiple inpainting. To investigate the pros and cons of each method, we present quantitative and qualitative comparisons, on common datasets, regarding both the quality and the diversity of the set of inpainted solutions. Our analysis allows us to identify the most successful generative strategies in both inpainting quality and inpainting diversity. This task is closely related to the learning of an accurate probability distribution of images. Depending on the dataset in use, the challenges that entail the training of such a model will be discussed through the analysis.
summary: Image inpainting refers to the restoration of an image with missing regions in a way that is not detectable by the observer. The inpainting regions can be of any size and shape. This is an ill-posed inverse problem that does not have a unique solution. In this work, we focus on learning-based image completion methods for multiple and diverse inpainting which goal is to provide a set of distinct solutions for a given damaged image. These methods capitalize on the probabilistic nature of certain generative models to sample various solutions that coherently restore the missing content. Along the chapter, we will analyze the underlying theory and analyze the recent proposals for multiple inpainting. To investigate the pros and cons of each method, we present quantitative and qualitative comparisons, on common datasets, regarding both the quality and the diversity of the set of inpainted solutions. Our analysis allows us to identify the most successful generative strategies in both inpainting quality and inpainting diversity. This task is closely related to the learning of an accurate probability distribution of images. Depending on the dataset in use, the challenges that entail the training of such a model will be discussed through the analysis.
abstract_zh: 图像修复是指以观察者无法察觉的方式修复缺失区域的图像。修复区域可以是任何大小和形状。这是一个不适定反问题，没有唯一解。在这项工作中，我们专注于基于学习的图像补全方法，用于多种和多样化的修复，其目标是为给定的损坏图像提供一组不同的解决方案。这些方法利用某些生成模型的概率性质来采样各种解决方案，从而连贯地恢复丢失的内容。在本章中，我们将分析基本理论并分析最近提出的多重修复的建议。为了研究每种方法的优缺点，我们在常见数据集上对修复解决方案集的质量和多样性进行了定量和定性比较。我们的分析使我们能够确定在修复质量和修复多样性方面最成功的生成策略。该任务与学习图像的准确概率分布密切相关。根据所使用的数据集，将通过分析讨论训练此类模型所面临的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文分析基于生成模型的多图像修复方法，旨在为给定损坏图像生成多样化的修复方案。
AI.motivation: 传统图像修复方法难以处理复杂多样的缺失区域，而生成模型可通过概率采样提供多种合理修复结果，满足不同应用场景需求。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验比较，评估基于生成对抗网络（GAN）和变分自编码器（VAE）等概率模型的多修复方案生成方法，使用标准数据集进行质量与多样性量化评估。
AI.result: 识别出在修复质量与多样性上表现最优的生成策略，发现不同数据集对模型训练的挑战性差异。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型能有效提升多图像修复的多样性，但准确学习图像概率分布仍需进一步研究。

title: RecipeSnap -- a lightweight image-to-recipe model
title_zh: RecipeSnap——轻量级图像到菜谱模型
abstract: In this paper we want to address the problem of automation for recognition of photographed cooking dishes and generating the corresponding food recipes. Current image-to-recipe models are computation expensive and require powerful GPUs for model training and implementation. High computational cost prevents those existing models from being deployed on portable devices, like smart phones. To solve this issue we introduce a lightweight image-to-recipe prediction model, RecipeSnap, that reduces memory cost and computational cost by more than 90% while still achieving 2.0 MedR, which is in line with the state-of-the-art model. A pre-trained recipe encoder was used to compute recipe embeddings. Recipes from Recipe1M dataset and corresponding recipe embeddings are collected as a recipe library, which are used for image encoder training and image query later. We use MobileNet-V2 as image encoder backbone, which makes our model suitable to portable devices. This model can be further developed into an application for smart phones with a few effort. A comparison of the performance between this lightweight model to other heavy models are presented in this paper. Code, data and models are publicly accessible on github.
summary: In this paper we want to address the problem of automation for recognition of photographed cooking dishes and generating the corresponding food recipes. Current image-to-recipe models are computation expensive and require powerful GPUs for model training and implementation. High computational cost prevents those existing models from being deployed on portable devices, like smart phones. To solve this issue we introduce a lightweight image-to-recipe prediction model, RecipeSnap, that reduces memory cost and computational cost by more than 90% while still achieving 2.0 MedR, which is in line with the state-of-the-art model. A pre-trained recipe encoder was used to compute recipe embeddings. Recipes from Recipe1M dataset and corresponding recipe embeddings are collected as a recipe library, which are used for image encoder training and image query later. We use MobileNet-V2 as image encoder backbone, which makes our model suitable to portable devices. This model can be further developed into an application for smart phones with a few effort. A comparison of the performance between this lightweight model to other heavy models are presented in this paper. Code, data and models are publicly accessible on github.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们希望解决自动识别拍摄的烹饪菜肴并生成相应的食物食谱的问题。目前的图像到菜谱模型的计算成本很高，并且需要强大的 GPU 来进行模型训练和实现。高计算成本阻碍了这些现有模型部署在智能手机等便携式设备上。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种轻量级的图像到菜谱预测模型 RecipeSnap，它可以将内存成本和计算成本降低 90% 以上，同时仍然实现 2.0 MedR，这与最先进的模型一致。使用预先训练的配方编码器来计算配方嵌入。 Recipe1M数据集中的菜谱和相应的菜谱嵌入被收集为菜谱库，用于稍后的图像编码器训练和图像查询。我们使用 MobileNet-V2 作为图像编码器主干，这使得我们的模型适用于便携式设备。这个模型可以通过一些努力进一步开发为智能手机的应用程序。本文对该轻量级模型与其他重型模型的性能进行了比较。代码、数据和模型可在 github 上公开访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级图像到食谱模型RecipeSnap，用于在移动设备上实现烹饪菜肴的自动识别与食谱生成。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到食谱模型计算成本高且依赖强大GPU，难以部署于手机等便携设备，需开发更轻量高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用MobileNet-V2作为图像编码器主干，结合预训练食谱编码器生成嵌入向量，构建基于Recipe1M数据集的食谱库，通过轻量化设计降低计算与内存消耗。
AI.result: 模型计算与内存成本降低90%以上，保持2.0 MedR指标（与最先进模型相当），可便捷部署于智能手机应用。
AI.conclusion: RecipeSnap在保持性能的同时显著降低资源需求，为移动端食谱识别应用提供了可行方案，且代码数据已开源。

method: 采用MobileNet-V2作为图像编码器主干，结合预训练食谱编码器生成嵌入向量，构建基于Recipe1M数据集的食谱库，通过轻量化设计降低计算与内存消耗。
result: 模型计算与内存成本降低90%以上，保持2.0 MedR指标（与最先进模型相当），可便捷部署于智能手机应用。
conclusion: RecipeSnap在保持性能的同时显著降低资源需求，为移动端食谱识别应用提供了可行方案，且代码数据已开源。
search_text: RecipeSnap -- a lightweight image-to-recipe model RecipeSnap——轻量级图像到菜谱模型 In this paper we want to address the problem of automation for recognition of photographed cooking dishes and generating the corresponding food recipes. Current image-to-recipe models are computation expensive and require powerful GPUs for model training and implementation. High computational cost prevents those existing models from being deployed on portable devices, like smart phones. To solve this issue we introduce a lightweight image-to-recipe prediction model, RecipeSnap, that reduces memory cost and computational cost by more than 90% while still achieving 2.0 MedR, which is in line with the state-of-the-art model. A pre-trained recipe encoder was used to compute recipe embeddings. Recipes from Recipe1M dataset and corresponding recipe embeddings are collected as a recipe library, which are used for image encoder training and image query later. We use MobileNet-V2 as image encoder backbone, which makes our model suitable to portable devices. This model can be further developed into an application for smart phones with a few effort. A comparison of the performance between this lightweight model to other heavy models are presented in this paper. Code, data and models are publicly accessible on github. 在本文中，我们希望解决自动识别拍摄的烹饪菜肴并生成相应的食物食谱的问题。目前的图像到菜谱模型的计算成本很高，并且需要强大的 GPU 来进行模型训练和实现。高计算成本阻碍了这些现有模型部署在智能手机等便携式设备上。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种轻量级的图像到菜谱预测模型 RecipeSnap，它可以将内存成本和计算成本降低 90% 以上，同时仍然实现 2.0 MedR，这与最先进的模型一致。使用预先训练的配方编码器来计算配方嵌入。 Recipe1M数据集中的菜谱和相应的菜谱嵌入被收集为菜谱库，用于稍后的图像编码器训练和图像查询。我们使用 MobileNet-V2 作为图像编码器主干，这使得我们的模型适用于便携式设备。这个模型可以通过一些努力进一步开发为智能手机的应用程序。本文对该轻量级模型与其他重型模型的性能进行了比较。代码、数据和模型可在 github 上公开访问。 本文提出一种轻量级图像到食谱模型RecipeSnap，用于在移动设备上实现烹饪菜肴的自动识别与食谱生成。 Jianfa Chen,Yue Yin,Yifan Xu cs.CV

title: Human-to-Human Strokes Recordings for Tactile Apparent Motion
title_zh: 用于触觉表观运动的人与人之间的笔画记录
abstract: The main objective of this study is to investigate whether one can use recordings of human-to-human touch, such as a caress, to improve tactile apparent motion interfaces to make them feel more natural. We report here preliminary recordings of natural and continuous human-to-human caresses. To do this, six accelerometers were positioned on the receiving hand next to the stimulated area while a finger gently stroked the skin. The results suggest that we are able to capture signals from real human caresses that can be compared to signals produced by apparent motion stimuli. This is encouraging for our plan to continue the study in the second stage, which consists of tuning vibrotactile actuators to reproduce a similar pattern of vibrational responses in the accelerometers. In this way, the actuators mimic human behavior.
summary: The main objective of this study is to investigate whether one can use recordings of human-to-human touch, such as a caress, to improve tactile apparent motion interfaces to make them feel more natural. We report here preliminary recordings of natural and continuous human-to-human caresses. To do this, six accelerometers were positioned on the receiving hand next to the stimulated area while a finger gently stroked the skin. The results suggest that we are able to capture signals from real human caresses that can be compared to signals produced by apparent motion stimuli. This is encouraging for our plan to continue the study in the second stage, which consists of tuning vibrotactile actuators to reproduce a similar pattern of vibrational responses in the accelerometers. In this way, the actuators mimic human behavior.
abstract_zh: 这项研究的主要目的是调查人们是否可以使用人与人之间的触摸（例如爱抚）的记录来改善触觉视在运动界面，使其感觉更自然。我们在这里报告自然和持续的人与人爱抚的初步记录。为此，将六个加速度计放置在受刺激区域旁边的接收手上，同时用一根手指轻轻抚摸皮肤。结果表明，我们能够捕获来自真实人类爱抚的信号，并将其与明显运动刺激产生的信号进行比较。这对我们在第二阶段继续研究的计划来说是令人鼓舞的，第二阶段包括调整振动触觉执行器以在加速度计中重现类似的振动响应模式。通过这种方式，执行器模仿了人类的行为。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在探讨通过记录人类间的触觉互动（如抚摸）来改进触觉虚拟运动接口的自然性。
AI.motivation: 通过模仿真实人类触觉信号，提升触觉虚拟运动接口的自然感受，使其更贴近真实触觉体验。
AI.method: 在接收手的刺激区域附近放置六个加速度计，记录手指轻抚皮肤时的自然连续抚摸信号，并与虚拟运动刺激信号进行对比分析。
AI.result: 成功捕捉到可与虚拟运动刺激信号对比的真实人类抚摸信号，为后续调整振动执行器以复现类似振动模式提供了可行方向。
AI.conclusion: 真实人类触觉信号的记录为开发更自然的触觉接口提供了技术基础，后续研究将聚焦于执行器参数优化。

title: Domino Saliency Metrics: Improving Existing Channel Saliency Metrics with Structural Information
title_zh: Domino 显着性指标：利用结构信息改进现有的通道显着性指标
abstract: Channel pruning is used to reduce the number of weights in a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Channel pruning removes slices of the weight tensor so that the convolution layer remains dense. The removal of these weight slices from a single layer causes mismatching number of feature maps between layers of the network. A simple solution is to force the number of feature map between layers to match through the removal of weight slices from subsequent layers. This additional constraint becomes more apparent in DNNs with branches where multiple channels need to be pruned together to keep the network dense. Popular pruning saliency metrics do not factor in the structural dependencies that arise in DNNs with branches. We propose Domino metrics (built on existing channel saliency metrics) to reflect these structural constraints. We test Domino saliency metrics against the baseline channel saliency metrics on multiple networks with branches. Domino saliency metrics improved pruning rates in most tested networks and up to 25% in AlexNet on CIFAR-10.
summary: Channel pruning is used to reduce the number of weights in a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Channel pruning removes slices of the weight tensor so that the convolution layer remains dense. The removal of these weight slices from a single layer causes mismatching number of feature maps between layers of the network. A simple solution is to force the number of feature map between layers to match through the removal of weight slices from subsequent layers. This additional constraint becomes more apparent in DNNs with branches where multiple channels need to be pruned together to keep the network dense. Popular pruning saliency metrics do not factor in the structural dependencies that arise in DNNs with branches. We propose Domino metrics (built on existing channel saliency metrics) to reflect these structural constraints. We test Domino saliency metrics against the baseline channel saliency metrics on multiple networks with branches. Domino saliency metrics improved pruning rates in most tested networks and up to 25% in AlexNet on CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 通道剪枝用于减少卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中的权重数量。通道剪枝删除了权重张量的切片，以便卷积层保持密集。从单个层中删除这些权重切片会导致网络各层之间的特征图数量不匹配。一个简单的解决方案是通过从后续层中删除权重切片来强制层之间的特征图数量匹配。这种额外的约束在具有分支的 DNN 中变得更加明显，其中需要一起修剪多个通道以保持网络密集。流行的修剪显着性指标并未考虑具有分支的 DNN 中出现的结构依赖性。我们提出多米诺指标（基于现有渠道显着性指标）来反映这些结构性约束。我们在具有分支的多个网络上根据基线通道显着性指标测试 Domino 显着性指标。 Domino 显着性指标提高了大多数测试网络的剪枝率，在 CIFAR-10 上的 AlexNet 中剪枝率高达 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Domino显著性度量方法，通过引入结构信息改进现有通道剪枝显著性度量，以解决深度神经网络中分支结构导致的特征图数量不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有通道剪枝显著性度量未考虑深度神经网络分支结构中层间特征图数量匹配的约束，导致剪枝效率不足。
AI.method: 基于现有通道显著性度量框架，构建Domino度量体系，通过建模层间特征图数量匹配约束，将结构依赖性纳入显著性计算。
AI.result: 在多个含分支网络的实验中，Domino度量使剪枝效率提升，其中AlexNet在CIFAR-10数据集上最高提升25%。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的Domino显著性度量有效提升了含分支网络的通道剪枝性能，验证了结构信息对剪枝决策的重要作用。

title: Engineering deep learning methods on automatic detection of damage in infrastructure due to extreme events
title_zh: 自动检测极端事件造成的基础设施损坏的工程深度学习方法
comment: Thanks for the revivers' help for improving this paper. Structural Health Monitoring (2022)
comments: Thanks for the revivers' help for improving this paper. Structural Health Monitoring (2022)
abstract: This paper presents a few comprehensive experimental studies for automated Structural Damage Detection (SDD) in extreme events using deep learning methods for processing 2D images. In the first study, a 152-layer Residual network (ResNet) is utilized to classify multiple classes in eight SDD tasks, which include identification of scene levels, damage levels, material types, etc. The proposed ResNet achieved high accuracy for each task while the positions of the damage are not identifiable. In the second study, the existing ResNet and a segmentation network (U-Net) are combined into a new pipeline, cascaded networks, for categorizing and locating structural damage. The results show that the accuracy of damage detection is significantly improved compared to only using a segmentation network. In the third and fourth studies, end-to-end networks are developed and tested as a new solution to directly detect cracks and spalling in the image collections of recent large earthquakes. One of the proposed networks can achieve an accuracy above 67.6% for all tested images at various scales and resolutions, and shows its robustness for these human-free detection tasks. As a preliminary field study, we applied the proposed method to detect damage in a concrete structure that was tested to study its progressive collapse performance. The experiments indicate that these solutions for automatic detection of structural damage using deep learning methods are feasible and promising. The training datasets and codes will be made available for the public upon the publication of this paper.
summary: This paper presents a few comprehensive experimental studies for automated Structural Damage Detection (SDD) in extreme events using deep learning methods for processing 2D images. In the first study, a 152-layer Residual network (ResNet) is utilized to classify multiple classes in eight SDD tasks, which include identification of scene levels, damage levels, material types, etc. The proposed ResNet achieved high accuracy for each task while the positions of the damage are not identifiable. In the second study, the existing ResNet and a segmentation network (U-Net) are combined into a new pipeline, cascaded networks, for categorizing and locating structural damage. The results show that the accuracy of damage detection is significantly improved compared to only using a segmentation network. In the third and fourth studies, end-to-end networks are developed and tested as a new solution to directly detect cracks and spalling in the image collections of recent large earthquakes. One of the proposed networks can achieve an accuracy above 67.6% for all tested images at various scales and resolutions, and shows its robustness for these human-free detection tasks. As a preliminary field study, we applied the proposed method to detect damage in a concrete structure that was tested to study its progressive collapse performance. The experiments indicate that these solutions for automatic detection of structural damage using deep learning methods are feasible and promising. The training datasets and codes will be made available for the public upon the publication of this paper.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一些使用深度学习方法处理 2D 图像的极端事件中自动结构损伤检测 (SDD) 的综合实验研究。在第一项研究中，利用 152 层残差网络（ResNet）对八个 SDD 任务中的多个类别进行分类，其中包括场景级别、损坏级别、材料类型等的识别。所提出的 ResNet 对每个任务都实现了高精度，但损坏的位置无法识别。在第二项研究中，现有的 ResNet 和分割网络（U-Net）被组合成一个新的管道、级联网络，用于对结构损坏进行分类和定位。结果表明，与仅使用分割网络相比，损伤检测的准确性显着提高。在第三项和第四项研究中，开发和测试了端到端网络作为一种新的解决方案，用于直接检测近期大地震图像集中的裂缝和剥落。所提出的网络之一可以对各种尺度和分辨率的所有测试图像实现 67.6% 以上的准确率，并显示了其对这些无人检测任务的鲁棒性。作为初步的现场研究，我们应用所提出的方法来检测混凝土结构的损伤，并对其进行测试以研究其渐进倒塌性能。实验表明，这些使用深度学习方法自动检测结构损伤的解决方案是可行且有前途的。训练数据集和代码将在本文发表后向公众开放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的方法，用于极端事件中基础设施损伤的自动检测，通过多种网络结构实现分类与定位。
AI.motivation: 传统结构损伤检测方法效率低且依赖人工，亟需自动化、高精度的解决方案以应对极端事件后的快速评估需求。
AI.method: 采用ResNet进行多任务分类，结合ResNet与U-Net构建级联网络实现定位，开发端到端网络直接检测裂缝与剥落，并进行实地验证。
AI.result: ResNet分类准确率高但无法定位损伤；级联网络显著提升检测精度；端到端网络在多尺度图像上达到67.6%以上准确率，且具备鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在自动检测结构损伤方面可行且前景广阔，公开数据集与代码将促进后续研究与应用。

search_text: Engineering deep learning methods on automatic detection of damage in infrastructure due to extreme events 自动检测极端事件造成的基础设施损坏的工程深度学习方法 This paper presents a few comprehensive experimental studies for automated Structural Damage Detection (SDD) in extreme events using deep learning methods for processing 2D images. In the first study, a 152-layer Residual network (ResNet) is utilized to classify multiple classes in eight SDD tasks, which include identification of scene levels, damage levels, material types, etc. The proposed ResNet achieved high accuracy for each task while the positions of the damage are not identifiable. In the second study, the existing ResNet and a segmentation network (U-Net) are combined into a new pipeline, cascaded networks, for categorizing and locating structural damage. The results show that the accuracy of damage detection is significantly improved compared to only using a segmentation network. In the third and fourth studies, end-to-end networks are developed and tested as a new solution to directly detect cracks and spalling in the image collections of recent large earthquakes. One of the proposed networks can achieve an accuracy above 67.6% for all tested images at various scales and resolutions, and shows its robustness for these human-free detection tasks. As a preliminary field study, we applied the proposed method to detect damage in a concrete structure that was tested to study its progressive collapse performance. The experiments indicate that these solutions for automatic detection of structural damage using deep learning methods are feasible and promising. The training datasets and codes will be made available for the public upon the publication of this paper. 本文介绍了一些使用深度学习方法处理 2D 图像的极端事件中自动结构损伤检测 (SDD) 的综合实验研究。在第一项研究中，利用 152 层残差网络（ResNet）对八个 SDD 任务中的多个类别进行分类，其中包括场景级别、损坏级别、材料类型等的识别。所提出的 ResNet 对每个任务都实现了高精度，但损坏的位置无法识别。在第二项研究中，现有的 ResNet 和分割网络（U-Net）被组合成一个新的管道、级联网络，用于对结构损坏进行分类和定位。结果表明，与仅使用分割网络相比，损伤检测的准确性显着提高。在第三项和第四项研究中，开发和测试了端到端网络作为一种新的解决方案，用于直接检测近期大地震图像集中的裂缝和剥落。所提出的网络之一可以对各种尺度和分辨率的所有测试图像实现 67.6% 以上的准确率，并显示了其对这些无人检测任务的鲁棒性。作为初步的现场研究，我们应用所提出的方法来检测混凝土结构的损伤，并对其进行测试以研究其渐进倒塌性能。实验表明，这些使用深度学习方法自动检测结构损伤的解决方案是可行且有前途的。训练数据集和代码将在本文发表后向公众开放。 本文提出基于深度学习的方法，用于极端事件中基础设施损伤的自动检测，通过多种网络结构实现分类与定位。 Yongsheng Bai,Bing Zha,Halil Sezen,Alper Yilmaz cs.CV

title: Processing Network Controls via Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习处理网络控制
abstract: Novel advanced policy gradient (APG) algorithms, such as proximal policy optimization (PPO), trust region policy optimization, and their variations, have become the dominant reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms because of their ease of implementation and good practical performance. This dissertation is concerned with theoretical justification and practical application of the APG algorithms for solving processing network control optimization problems. Processing network control problems are typically formulated as Markov decision process (MDP) or semi-Markov decision process (SMDP) problems that have several unconventional for RL features: infinite state spaces, unbounded costs, long-run average cost objectives. Policy improvement bounds play a crucial role in the theoretical justification of the APG algorithms. In this thesis we refine existing bounds for MDPs with finite state spaces and prove novel policy improvement bounds for classes of MDPs and SMDPs used to model processing network operations. We consider two examples of processing network control problems and customize the PPO algorithm to solve them. First, we consider parallel-server and multiclass queueing networks controls. Second, we consider the drivers repositioning problem in a ride-hailing service system. For both examples the PPO algorithm with auxiliary modifications consistently generates control policies that outperform state-of-art heuristics.
summary: Novel advanced policy gradient (APG) algorithms, such as proximal policy optimization (PPO), trust region policy optimization, and their variations, have become the dominant reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms because of their ease of implementation and good practical performance. This dissertation is concerned with theoretical justification and practical application of the APG algorithms for solving processing network control optimization problems. Processing network control problems are typically formulated as Markov decision process (MDP) or semi-Markov decision process (SMDP) problems that have several unconventional for RL features: infinite state spaces, unbounded costs, long-run average cost objectives. Policy improvement bounds play a crucial role in the theoretical justification of the APG algorithms. In this thesis we refine existing bounds for MDPs with finite state spaces and prove novel policy improvement bounds for classes of MDPs and SMDPs used to model processing network operations. We consider two examples of processing network control problems and customize the PPO algorithm to solve them. First, we consider parallel-server and multiclass queueing networks controls. Second, we consider the drivers repositioning problem in a ride-hailing service system. For both examples the PPO algorithm with auxiliary modifications consistently generates control policies that outperform state-of-art heuristics.
abstract_zh: 新颖的高级策略梯度（APG）算法，例如近端策略优化（PPO）、信赖域策略优化及其变体，由于其易于实现和良好的实用性能，已成为占主导地位的强化学习（RL）算法。本论文主要研究APG算法解决处理网络控制优化问题的理论论证和实际应用。处理网络控制问题通常被表述为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 或半马尔可夫决策过程 (SMDP) 问题，这些问题具有几个非常规的 RL 特征：无限状态空间、无界成本、长期平均成本目标。策略改进界限在 APG 算法的理论论证中起着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们利用有限状态空间完善了 MDP 的现有边界，并证明了用于对处理网络操作进行建模的 MDP 和 SMDP 类别的新策略改进边界。我们考虑处理网络控制问题的两个例子，并定制 PPO 算法来解决它们。首先，我们考虑并行服务器和多类排队网络控制。其次，我们考虑网约车服务系统中司机的重新定位问题。对于这两个示例，经过辅助修改的 PPO 算法始终生成优于最先进启发式方法的控制策略。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过深度强化学习中的先进策略梯度算法（如PPO）解决处理网络控制优化问题。
AI.motivation: 处理网络控制问题具有无限状态空间、无界成本和长期平均成本目标等传统强化学习难以处理的特征，需理论支持与算法改进。
AI.method: 改进策略改进界理论，针对两类处理网络控制问题（多服务器队列网络与网约车司机调度）定制化PPO算法。
AI.result: 修改后的PPO算法在两个案例中生成的控制策略均优于现有启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 先进策略梯度算法通过理论完善与工程适配，可有效解决处理网络控制的复杂优化问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过深度强化学习中的先进策略梯度算法（如PPO）解决处理网络控制优化问题。

title: Axonal Delay As a Short-Term Memory for Feed Forward Deep Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 轴突延迟作为前馈深度尖峰神经网络的短期记忆
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), Singapore, 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), Singapore, 2022
abstract: The information of spiking neural networks (SNNs) are propagated between the adjacent biological neuron by spikes, which provides a computing paradigm with the promise of simulating the human brain. Recent studies have found that the time delay of neurons plays an important role in the learning process. Therefore, configuring the precise timing of the spike is a promising direction for understanding and improving the transmission process of temporal information in SNNs. However, most of the existing learning methods for spiking neurons are focusing on the adjustment of synaptic weight, while very few research has been working on axonal delay. In this paper, we verify the effectiveness of integrating time delay into supervised learning and propose a module that modulates the axonal delay through short-term memory. To this end, a rectified axonal delay (RAD) module is integrated with the spiking model to align the spike timing and thus improve the characterization learning ability of temporal features. Experiments on three neuromorphic benchmark datasets : NMNIST, DVS Gesture and N-TIDIGITS18 show that the proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance while using the fewest parameters.
summary: The information of spiking neural networks (SNNs) are propagated between the adjacent biological neuron by spikes, which provides a computing paradigm with the promise of simulating the human brain. Recent studies have found that the time delay of neurons plays an important role in the learning process. Therefore, configuring the precise timing of the spike is a promising direction for understanding and improving the transmission process of temporal information in SNNs. However, most of the existing learning methods for spiking neurons are focusing on the adjustment of synaptic weight, while very few research has been working on axonal delay. In this paper, we verify the effectiveness of integrating time delay into supervised learning and propose a module that modulates the axonal delay through short-term memory. To this end, a rectified axonal delay (RAD) module is integrated with the spiking model to align the spike timing and thus improve the characterization learning ability of temporal features. Experiments on three neuromorphic benchmark datasets : NMNIST, DVS Gesture and N-TIDIGITS18 show that the proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance while using the fewest parameters.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）的信息通过尖峰在相邻生物神经元之间传播，这提供了一种有望模拟人脑的计算范式。最近的研究发现，神经元的时间延迟在学习过程中起着重要作用。因此，配置尖峰的精确时序是理解和改进 SNN 中时间信息传输过程的一个有前途的方向。然而，现有的尖峰神经元学习方法大多集中在突触权重的调整上，而很少有研究致力于轴突延迟。在本文中，我们验证了将时间延迟整合到监督学习中的有效性，并提出了一种通过短期记忆调节轴突延迟的模块。为此，将校正轴突延迟（RAD）模块与尖峰模型集成以对齐尖峰时序，从而提高时间特征的表征学习能力。在三个神经形态基准数据集：NMNIST、DVS Gesture 和 N-TIDIGITS18 上的实验表明，所提出的方法在使用最少的参数的同时实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过引入轴突延迟作为短期记忆机制来提升前馈深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN学习方法主要关注突触权重调整，而轴突延迟对时间信息传递的影响研究不足，限制了网络对时序特征的学习能力。
AI.method: 设计了一个基于短期记忆的修正轴突延迟（RAD）模块，通过调节脉冲时间对齐来增强时序特征的学习能力。
AI.result: 在NMNIST、DVS Gesture和N-TIDIGITS18三个神经形态数据集上，该方法以最少参数实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 轴突延迟调节机制有效提升了SNN的时序特征学习能力，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过引入轴突延迟作为短期记忆机制来提升前馈深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）性能的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 现有SNN学习方法主要关注突触权重调整，而轴突延迟对时间信息传递的影响研究不足，限制了网络对时序特征的学习能力。
ai_content.method: 设计了一个基于短期记忆的修正轴突延迟（RAD）模块，通过调节脉冲时间对齐来增强时序特征的学习能力。
ai_content.result: 在NMNIST、DVS Gesture和N-TIDIGITS18三个神经形态数据集上，该方法以最少参数实现了最先进的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 轴突延迟调节机制有效提升了SNN的时序特征学习能力，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

search_text: Axonal Delay As a Short-Term Memory for Feed Forward Deep Spiking Neural Networks 轴突延迟作为前馈深度尖峰神经网络的短期记忆 The information of spiking neural networks (SNNs) are propagated between the adjacent biological neuron by spikes, which provides a computing paradigm with the promise of simulating the human brain. Recent studies have found that the time delay of neurons plays an important role in the learning process. Therefore, configuring the precise timing of the spike is a promising direction for understanding and improving the transmission process of temporal information in SNNs. However, most of the existing learning methods for spiking neurons are focusing on the adjustment of synaptic weight, while very few research has been working on axonal delay. In this paper, we verify the effectiveness of integrating time delay into supervised learning and propose a module that modulates the axonal delay through short-term memory. To this end, a rectified axonal delay (RAD) module is integrated with the spiking model to align the spike timing and thus improve the characterization learning ability of temporal features. Experiments on three neuromorphic benchmark datasets : NMNIST, DVS Gesture and N-TIDIGITS18 show that the proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance while using the fewest parameters. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）的信息通过尖峰在相邻生物神经元之间传播，这提供了一种有望模拟人脑的计算范式。最近的研究发现，神经元的时间延迟在学习过程中起着重要作用。因此，配置尖峰的精确时序是理解和改进 SNN 中时间信息传输过程的一个有前途的方向。然而，现有的尖峰神经元学习方法大多集中在突触权重的调整上，而很少有研究致力于轴突延迟。在本文中，我们验证了将时间延迟整合到监督学习中的有效性，并提出了一种通过短期记忆调节轴突延迟的模块。为此，将校正轴突延迟（RAD）模块与尖峰模型集成以对齐尖峰时序，从而提高时间特征的表征学习能力。在三个神经形态基准数据集：NMNIST、DVS Gesture 和 N-TIDIGITS18 上的实验表明，所提出的方法在使用最少的参数的同时实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种通过引入轴突延迟作为短期记忆机制来提升前馈深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）性能的方法。 Pengfei Sun,Longwei Zhu,Dick Botteldooren cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Michael Ulrich,Sascha Braun,Daniel Köhler,Daniel Niederlöhner,Florian Faion,Claudius Gläser,Holger Blume
title: Improved Orientation Estimation and Detection with Hybrid Object Detection Networks for Automotive Radar
title_zh: 利用汽车雷达的混合目标检测网络改进方向估计和检测

abstract: This paper presents novel hybrid architectures that combine grid- and point-based processing to improve the detection performance and orientation estimation of radar-based object detection networks. Purely grid-based detection models operate on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) projection of the input point cloud. These approaches suffer from a loss of detailed information through the discrete grid resolution. This applies in particular to radar object detection, where relatively coarse grid resolutions are commonly used to account for the sparsity of radar point clouds. In contrast, point-based models are not affected by this problem as they process point clouds without discretization. However, they generally exhibit worse detection performances than grid-based methods. We show that a point-based model can extract neighborhood features, leveraging the exact relative positions of points, before grid rendering. This has significant benefits for a subsequent grid-based convolutional detection backbone. In experiments on the public nuScenes dataset our hybrid architecture achieves improvements in terms of detection performance (19.7% higher mAP for car class than next-best radar-only submission) and orientation estimates (11.5% relative orientation improvement) over networks from previous literature.
summary: This paper presents novel hybrid architectures that combine grid- and point-based processing to improve the detection performance and orientation estimation of radar-based object detection networks. Purely grid-based detection models operate on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) projection of the input point cloud. These approaches suffer from a loss of detailed information through the discrete grid resolution. This applies in particular to radar object detection, where relatively coarse grid resolutions are commonly used to account for the sparsity of radar point clouds. In contrast, point-based models are not affected by this problem as they process point clouds without discretization. However, they generally exhibit worse detection performances than grid-based methods. We show that a point-based model can extract neighborhood features, leveraging the exact relative positions of points, before grid rendering. This has significant benefits for a subsequent grid-based convolutional detection backbone. In experiments on the public nuScenes dataset our hybrid architecture achieves improvements in terms of detection performance (19.7% higher mAP for car class than next-best radar-only submission) and orientation estimates (11.5% relative orientation improvement) over networks from previous literature.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了新颖的混合架构，将基于网格和基于点的处理相结合，以提高基于雷达的物体检测网络的检测性能和方向估计。纯粹基于网格的检测模型在输入点云的鸟瞰图 (BEV) 投影上运行。这些方法由于离散网格分辨率而丢失了详细信息。这尤其适用于雷达目标检测，其中通常使用相对粗糙的网格分辨率来解释雷达点云的稀疏性。相比之下，基于点的模型不受此问题的影响，因为它们处理点云时没有离散化。然而，它们通常表现出比基于网格的方法更差的检测性能。我们证明基于点的模型可以在网格渲染之前利用点的精确相对位置来提取邻域特征。这对于后续基于网格的卷积检测主干具有显着的好处。在公共 nuScenes 数据集上的实验中，我们的混合架构比之前文献中的网络在检测性能（汽车类别的 mAP 比仅提交次优的雷达高 19.7%）和方向估计（相对方向改进 11.5%）方面实现了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出混合架构结合网格和点云处理，提升汽车雷达的目标检测性能和方向估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统网格模型因离散化导致信息丢失，点模型虽避免此问题但检测性能较差，需平衡两者优势。
AI.method: 在点云处理阶段提取邻域特征后，通过网格渲染衔接卷积检测网络，融合两种方法优势。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，汽车类别mAP提升19.7%，方向估计相对误差降低11.5%。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效结合点云细节处理与网格检测优势，为雷达目标检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Gerard Llorach,Dirk Oetting,Matthias Vormann,Markus Meis,Volker Hohmann
title: Vehicle Noise: Comparison of Loudness Ratings in the Field and the Laboratory
title_zh: 车辆噪声：现场和实验室响度等级比较
abstract: Objective: Distorted loudness perception is one of the main complaints of hearing aid users. Being able to measure loudness perception correctly in the clinic is essential for fitting hearing aids. For this, experiments in the clinic should be able to reflect and capture loudness perception as in everyday-life situations. Little research has been done comparing loudness perception in the field and in the laboratory. Design: Participants rated the loudness in the field and in the laboratory of 36 driving actions done by four different vehicles. The field measurements were done in a restricted street and recorded with a 360deg camera and a tetrahedral microphone. The recorded stimuli, which are openly accessible, were presented in three different conditions in the laboratory: 360deg video recordings with a head-mounted display, video recordings with a desktop monitor, and audio-only. Sample: Thirteen normal-hearing participants and 18 hearing-impaired participants participated in the study. Results: The driving actions were rated significantly louder in the laboratory than in the field for the audio-only condition. These loudness rating differences were bigger for louder sounds in two laboratory conditions, i.e., the higher the sound level of a driving action was the more likely it was to be rated louder in the laboratory. There were no significant differences in the loudness ratings between the three laboratory conditions and between groups. Conclusions: The results of this experiment further remark the importance of increasing the realism and immersion when measuring loudness in the clinic.

abstract_zh: 目的：响度感知失真是助听器用户的主要抱怨之一。能够在诊所正确测量响度感知对于验配助听器至关重要。为此，临床实验应该能够反映和捕捉日常生活中的响度感知。很少有研究比较现场和实验室的响度感知。设计：参与者对现场和实验室中四辆不同车辆完成的 36 次驾驶动作的响度进行评分。现场测量是在一条受限制的街道上进行的，并使用 360 度摄像机和四面体麦克风进行记录。记录的刺激可以公开访问，并在实验室中以三种不同的条件呈现：头戴式显示器的 360 度视频记录、桌面显示器的视频记录和纯音频。样本：13 名听力正常的参与者和 18 名听力受损的参与者参与了这项研究。结果：在纯音频条件下，实验室中的驾驶行为声音明显高于现场。在两个实验室条件下，声音越大，这些响度评级差异就越大，即，驾驶动作的声级越高，在实验室中被评级为响度的可能性就越大。三种实验室条件之间以及组之间的响度评级没有显着差异。结论：该实验的结果进一步说明了在临床测量响度时提高真实感和沉浸感的重要性。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了实地与实验室环境中车辆噪音响度评分的差异，通过不同实验条件评估响度感知的准确性。
AI.motivation: 助听器用户常抱怨响度感知失真，但临床测量需反映真实场景，而现有研究缺乏对实地与实验室响度感知差异的系统比较。
AI.method: 招募13名正常听力者和18名听力障碍者，对4种车辆的36种驾驶动作在实地和实验室（360度视频、桌面视频、音频）中进行响度评分。
AI.result: 实验室音频条件下的响度评分显著高于实地，且声音越大差异越明显；不同实验室条件及群体间无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，提升临床测量的真实感和沉浸感对准确评估响度感知至关重要。

conclusion: 实验表明，提升临床测量的真实感和沉浸感对准确评估响度感知至关重要。
search_text: Vehicle Noise: Comparison of Loudness Ratings in the Field and the Laboratory 车辆噪声：现场和实验室响度等级比较 Objective: Distorted loudness perception is one of the main complaints of hearing aid users. Being able to measure loudness perception correctly in the clinic is essential for fitting hearing aids. For this, experiments in the clinic should be able to reflect and capture loudness perception as in everyday-life situations. Little research has been done comparing loudness perception in the field and in the laboratory. Design: Participants rated the loudness in the field and in the laboratory of 36 driving actions done by four different vehicles. The field measurements were done in a restricted street and recorded with a 360deg camera and a tetrahedral microphone. The recorded stimuli, which are openly accessible, were presented in three different conditions in the laboratory: 360deg video recordings with a head-mounted display, video recordings with a desktop monitor, and audio-only. Sample: Thirteen normal-hearing participants and 18 hearing-impaired participants participated in the study. Results: The driving actions were rated significantly louder in the laboratory than in the field for the audio-only condition. These loudness rating differences were bigger for louder sounds in two laboratory conditions, i.e., the higher the sound level of a driving action was the more likely it was to be rated louder in the laboratory. There were no significant differences in the loudness ratings between the three laboratory conditions and between groups. Conclusions: The results of this experiment further remark the importance of increasing the realism and immersion when measuring loudness in the clinic. 目的：响度感知失真是助听器用户的主要抱怨之一。能够在诊所正确测量响度感知对于验配助听器至关重要。为此，临床实验应该能够反映和捕捉日常生活中的响度感知。很少有研究比较现场和实验室的响度感知。设计：参与者对现场和实验室中四辆不同车辆完成的 36 次驾驶动作的响度进行评分。现场测量是在一条受限制的街道上进行的，并使用 360 度摄像机和四面体麦克风进行记录。记录的刺激可以公开访问，并在实验室中以三种不同的条件呈现：头戴式显示器的 360 度视频记录、桌面显示器的视频记录和纯音频。样本：13 名听力正常的参与者和 18 名听力受损的参与者参与了这项研究。结果：在纯音频条件下，实验室中的驾驶行为声音明显高于现场。在两个实验室条件下，声音越大，这些响度评级差异就越大，即，驾驶动作的声级越高，在实验室中被评级为响度的可能性就越大。三种实验室条件之间以及组之间的响度评级没有显着差异。结论：该实验的结果进一步说明了在临床测量响度时提高真实感和沉浸感的重要性。 该论文比较了实地与实验室环境中车辆噪音响度评分的差异，通过不同实验条件评估响度感知的准确性。 Gerard Llorach,Dirk Oetting,Matthias Vormann,Markus Meis,Volker Hohmann q-bio.NC,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Using Deep Reinforcement Learning to solve Optimal Power Flow problem with generator failures
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习解决发电机故障时的最佳潮流问题
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is being used in many domains. One of the biggest advantages of DRL is that it enables the continuous improvement of a learning agent. Secondly, the DRL framework is robust and flexible enough to be applicable to problems of varying nature and domain. Presented work is evidence of using the DRL technique to solve an Optimal Power Flow (OPF) problem. Two classical algorithms have been presented to solve the OPF problem. The drawbacks of the vanilla DRL application are discussed, and an algorithm is suggested to improve the performance. Secondly, a reward function for the OPF problem is presented that enables the solution of inherent issues in DRL. Reasons for divergence and degeneration in DRL are discussed, and the correct strategy to deal with them with respect to OPF is presented.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is being used in many domains. One of the biggest advantages of DRL is that it enables the continuous improvement of a learning agent. Secondly, the DRL framework is robust and flexible enough to be applicable to problems of varying nature and domain. Presented work is evidence of using the DRL technique to solve an Optimal Power Flow (OPF) problem. Two classical algorithms have been presented to solve the OPF problem. The drawbacks of the vanilla DRL application are discussed, and an algorithm is suggested to improve the performance. Secondly, a reward function for the OPF problem is presented that enables the solution of inherent issues in DRL. Reasons for divergence and degeneration in DRL are discussed, and the correct strategy to deal with them with respect to OPF is presented.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）正在许多领域得到应用。 DRL 的最大优点之一是它能够不断改进学习代理。其次，DRL 框架足够强大和灵活，可以适用于不同性质和领域的问题。所提出的工作是使用 DRL 技术解决最佳潮流 (OPF) 问题的证据。已经提出了两种经典算法来解决 OPF 问题。讨论了普通 DRL 应用程序的缺点，并提出了一种改进性能的算法。其次，提出了 OPF 问题的奖励函数，可以解决 DRL 中的固有问题。讨论了 DRL 发散和退化的原因，并提出了针对 OPF 处理这些问题的正确策略。

AI.tldr: 利用深度强化学习解决存在发电机故障的最优潮流问题
AI.motivation: 克服传统OPF算法的局限性，利用DRL的鲁棒性和适应性处理复杂电力系统场景
AI.method: 改进DRL算法并设计针对性奖励函数，解决发散和退化问题
AI.result: 有效提升OPF问题求解稳定性，验证改进方法在电力系统场景的有效性
AI.conclusion: DRL结合改进方法可有效解决含发电机故障的OPF问题，为电力系统优化提供新思路

title: Prediction of fish location by combining fisheries data and sea bottom temperature forecasting
title_zh: 结合渔业数据和海底温度预报预测鱼类位置
comment: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
comments: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
abstract: This paper combines fisheries dependent data and environmental data to be used in a machine learning pipeline to predict the spatio-temporal abundance of two species (plaice and sole) commonly caught by the Belgian fishery in the North Sea. By combining fisheries related features with environmental data, sea bottom temperature derived from remote sensing, a higher accuracy can be achieved. In a forecast setting, the predictive accuracy is further improved by predicting, using a recurrent deep neural network, the sea bottom temperature up to four days in advance instead of relying on the last previous temperature measurement.
summary: This paper combines fisheries dependent data and environmental data to be used in a machine learning pipeline to predict the spatio-temporal abundance of two species (plaice and sole) commonly caught by the Belgian fishery in the North Sea. By combining fisheries related features with environmental data, sea bottom temperature derived from remote sensing, a higher accuracy can be achieved. In a forecast setting, the predictive accuracy is further improved by predicting, using a recurrent deep neural network, the sea bottom temperature up to four days in advance instead of relying on the last previous temperature measurement.
abstract_zh: 本文结合了渔业相关数据和环境数据，用于机器学习管道，以预测比利时渔业在北海捕获的两种物种（鲽鱼和鳎目鱼）的时空丰度。通过将渔业相关特征与遥感获得的环境数据、海底温度相结合，可以获得更高的精度。在预测设置中，通过使用循环深度神经网络提前四天预测海底温度（而不是依赖上次的温度测量），可以进一步提高预测准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文结合渔业数据和海床温度预测，利用机器学习方法提高北海两种鱼类（比目鱼和鳎鱼）时空丰度预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统渔业预测依赖历史数据，难以准确反映未来环境变化对鱼类分布的影响，需整合多源数据提升预测能力以支持渔业管理。
AI.method: 构建机器学习流水线，融合渔业特征与环境数据（如遥感海床温度），并采用循环神经网络预测未来四天温度以替代历史温度测量。
AI.result: 预测模型在结合环境数据后准确率显著提升，且通过温度预测进一步优化了预报效果。
AI.conclusion: 整合渔业数据与环境预测模型能有效提高鱼类丰度预测精度，为可持续渔业管理提供技术支撑。

title: Neuroevolutionary Multi-objective approaches to Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测的神经进化多目标方法
comment: Accepted in Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (GECCO '22 Companion), July 9--13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA, 4 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables
comments: Accepted in Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (GECCO '22 Companion), July 9--13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA, 4 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables
abstract: The incentive for using Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) for the automated optimization and training of deep neural networks (DNNs), a process referred to as neuroevolution, has gained momentum in recent years. The configuration and training of these networks can be posed as optimization problems. Indeed, most of the recent works on neuroevolution have focused their attention on single-objective optimization. Moreover, from the little research that has been done at the intersection of neuroevolution and evolutionary multi-objective optimization (EMO), all the research that has been carried out has focused predominantly on the use of one type of DNN: convolutional neural networks (CNNs), using well-established standard benchmark problems such as MNIST. In this work, we make a leap in the understanding of these two areas (neuroevolution and EMO), regarded in this work as neuroevolutionary multi-objective, by using and studying a rich DNN composed of a CNN and Long-short Term Memory network. Moreover, we use a robust and challenging vehicle trajectory prediction problem. By using the well-known Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm-II, we study the effects of five different objectives, tested in categories of three, allowing us to show how these objectives have either a positive or detrimental effect in neuroevolution for trajectory prediction in autonomous vehicles.
summary: The incentive for using Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) for the automated optimization and training of deep neural networks (DNNs), a process referred to as neuroevolution, has gained momentum in recent years. The configuration and training of these networks can be posed as optimization problems. Indeed, most of the recent works on neuroevolution have focused their attention on single-objective optimization. Moreover, from the little research that has been done at the intersection of neuroevolution and evolutionary multi-objective optimization (EMO), all the research that has been carried out has focused predominantly on the use of one type of DNN: convolutional neural networks (CNNs), using well-established standard benchmark problems such as MNIST. In this work, we make a leap in the understanding of these two areas (neuroevolution and EMO), regarded in this work as neuroevolutionary multi-objective, by using and studying a rich DNN composed of a CNN and Long-short Term Memory network. Moreover, we use a robust and challenging vehicle trajectory prediction problem. By using the well-known Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm-II, we study the effects of five different objectives, tested in categories of three, allowing us to show how these objectives have either a positive or detrimental effect in neuroevolution for trajectory prediction in autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用进化算法 (EA) 来自动优化和训练深度神经网络 (DNN)（这一过程被称为神经进化）的势头越来越大。这些网络的配置和训练可以作为优化问题。事实上，最近大多数关于神经进化的研究都将注意力集中在单目标优化上。此外，从神经进化和进化多目标优化 (EMO) 交叉点所做的少量研究来看，所有已进行的研究主要集中在使用一种类型的 DNN：卷积神经网络 (CNN)，并使用 MNIST 等完善的标准基准问题。在这项工作中，我们通过使用和研究由 CNN 和长短期记忆网络组成的丰富的 DNN，在对这两个领域（神经进化和 EMO）的理解上取得了飞跃，在这项工作中被视为神经进化多目标。此外，我们使用稳健且具有挑战性的车辆轨迹预测问题。通过使用著名的非支配排序遗传算法-II，我们研究了五个不同目标的影响，并按三类进行测试，使我们能够展示这些目标如何对自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测的神经进化产生积极或有害的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合神经进化与多目标优化的方法，用于自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测，采用CNN与LSTM混合网络解决复杂场景下的预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经进化研究多集中于单目标优化且仅使用CNN，缺乏对复杂DNN结构及多目标优化在轨迹预测场景的探索。
AI.method: 基于NSGA-II算法，构建包含CNN与LSTM的混合神经网络，通过五类目标函数的组合实验分析其对轨迹预测性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明不同目标函数组合对模型收敛性与预测精度产生显著差异，验证了多目标优化在复杂轨迹预测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多目标神经进化方法能有效提升自动驾驶轨迹预测的鲁棒性，混合网络结构相较于单一CNN具有更强的场景适应能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合神经进化与多目标优化的方法，用于自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测，采用CNN与LSTM混合网络解决复杂场景下的预测问题。

search_text: Neuroevolutionary Multi-objective approaches to Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Vehicles 自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测的神经进化多目标方法 The incentive for using Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) for the automated optimization and training of deep neural networks (DNNs), a process referred to as neuroevolution, has gained momentum in recent years. The configuration and training of these networks can be posed as optimization problems. Indeed, most of the recent works on neuroevolution have focused their attention on single-objective optimization. Moreover, from the little research that has been done at the intersection of neuroevolution and evolutionary multi-objective optimization (EMO), all the research that has been carried out has focused predominantly on the use of one type of DNN: convolutional neural networks (CNNs), using well-established standard benchmark problems such as MNIST. In this work, we make a leap in the understanding of these two areas (neuroevolution and EMO), regarded in this work as neuroevolutionary multi-objective, by using and studying a rich DNN composed of a CNN and Long-short Term Memory network. Moreover, we use a robust and challenging vehicle trajectory prediction problem. By using the well-known Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm-II, we study the effects of five different objectives, tested in categories of three, allowing us to show how these objectives have either a positive or detrimental effect in neuroevolution for trajectory prediction in autonomous vehicles. 近年来，使用进化算法 (EA) 来自动优化和训练深度神经网络 (DNN)（这一过程被称为神经进化）的势头越来越大。这些网络的配置和训练可以作为优化问题。事实上，最近大多数关于神经进化的研究都将注意力集中在单目标优化上。此外，从神经进化和进化多目标优化 (EMO) 交叉点所做的少量研究来看，所有已进行的研究主要集中在使用一种类型的 DNN：卷积神经网络 (CNN)，并使用 MNIST 等完善的标准基准问题。在这项工作中，我们通过使用和研究由 CNN 和长短期记忆网络组成的丰富的 DNN，在对这两个领域（神经进化和 EMO）的理解上取得了飞跃，在这项工作中被视为神经进化多目标。此外，我们使用稳健且具有挑战性的车辆轨迹预测问题。通过使用著名的非支配排序遗传算法-II，我们研究了五个不同目标的影响，并按三类进行测试，使我们能够展示这些目标如何对自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测的神经进化产生积极或有害的影响。 本文提出了一种结合神经进化与多目标优化的方法，用于自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测，采用CNN与LSTM混合网络解决复杂场景下的预测问题。 Fergal Stapleton,Edgar Galván,Ganesh Sistu,Senthil Yogamani cs.NE,cs.CV

authors_text: Stefan Druc,Aditya Balu,Peter Wooldridge,Adarsh Krishnamurthy,Soumik Sarkar
title: Concept Activation Vectors for Generating User-Defined 3D Shapes
title_zh: 用于生成用户定义的 3D 形状的概念激活向量
abstract: We explore the interpretability of 3D geometric deep learning models in the context of Computer-Aided Design (CAD). The field of parametric CAD can be limited by the difficulty of expressing high-level design concepts in terms of a few numeric parameters. In this paper, we use a deep learning architectures to encode high dimensional 3D shapes into a vectorized latent representation that can be used to describe arbitrary concepts. Specifically, we train a simple auto-encoder to parameterize a dataset of complex shapes. To understand the latent encoded space, we use the idea of Concept Activation Vectors (CAV) to reinterpret the latent space in terms of user-defined concepts. This allows modification of a reference design to exhibit more or fewer characteristics of a chosen concept or group of concepts. We also test the statistical significance of the identified concepts and determine the sensitivity of a physical quantity of interest across the dataset.
summary: We explore the interpretability of 3D geometric deep learning models in the context of Computer-Aided Design (CAD). The field of parametric CAD can be limited by the difficulty of expressing high-level design concepts in terms of a few numeric parameters. In this paper, we use a deep learning architectures to encode high dimensional 3D shapes into a vectorized latent representation that can be used to describe arbitrary concepts. Specifically, we train a simple auto-encoder to parameterize a dataset of complex shapes. To understand the latent encoded space, we use the idea of Concept Activation Vectors (CAV) to reinterpret the latent space in terms of user-defined concepts. This allows modification of a reference design to exhibit more or fewer characteristics of a chosen concept or group of concepts. We also test the statistical significance of the identified concepts and determine the sensitivity of a physical quantity of interest across the dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们探索计算机辅助设计 (CAD) 背景下 3D 几何深度学习模型的可解释性。参数化 CAD 领域可能会因难以用少数数值参数表达高级设计概念而受到限制。在本文中，我们使用深度学习架构将高维 3D 形状编码为可用于描述任意概念的矢量化潜在表示。具体来说，我们训练一个简单的自动编码器来参数化复杂形状的数据集。为了理解潜在编码空间，我们使用概念激活向量（CAV）的思想根据用户定义的概念重新解释潜在空间。这允许修改参考设计以展示所选概念或概念组的更多或更少的特征。我们还测试已识别概念的统计显着性，并确定整个数据集中感兴趣的物理量的敏感性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度学习模型和概念激活向量（CAV）方法，将复杂3D形状编码为可解释的潜在表示，以支持用户自定义设计。
AI.motivation: 传统参数化CAD难以通过少量参数表达高层设计概念，限制了设计灵活性与可解释性，需探索更高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 训练自编码器将3D形状编码为潜在向量，通过CAV技术将潜在空间映射到用户定义的概念，实现设计特征的可控调整，并进行统计显著性验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了CAV能有效调整设计特征，识别出具有统计显著性的概念，并量化了物理量在潜在空间中的敏感性变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间的可解释性增强，为CAD系统提供了新的用户自定义设计工具，推动几何深度学习在工业设计中的应用。

authors_text: Qinghang Hong,Fengming Liu,Dong Li,Ji Liu,Lu Tian,Yi Shan
title: Dynamic Sparse R-CNN
title_zh: 动态稀疏 R-CNN
abstract: Sparse R-CNN is a recent strong object detection baseline by set prediction on sparse, learnable proposal boxes and proposal features. In this work, we propose to improve Sparse R-CNN with two dynamic designs. First, Sparse R-CNN adopts a one-to-one label assignment scheme, where the Hungarian algorithm is applied to match only one positive sample for each ground truth. Such one-to-one assignment may not be optimal for the matching between the learned proposal boxes and ground truths. To address this problem, we propose dynamic label assignment (DLA) based on the optimal transport algorithm to assign increasing positive samples in the iterative training stages of Sparse R-CNN. We constrain the matching to be gradually looser in the sequential stages as the later stage produces the refined proposals with improved precision. Second, the learned proposal boxes and features remain fixed for different images in the inference process of Sparse R-CNN. Motivated by dynamic convolution, we propose dynamic proposal generation (DPG) to assemble multiple proposal experts dynamically for providing better initial proposal boxes and features for the consecutive training stages. DPG thereby can derive sample-dependent proposal boxes and features for inference. Experiments demonstrate that our method, named Dynamic Sparse R-CNN, can boost the strong Sparse R-CNN baseline with different backbones for object detection. Particularly, Dynamic Sparse R-CNN reaches the state-of-the-art 47.2% AP on the COCO 2017 validation set, surpassing Sparse R-CNN by 2.2% AP with the same ResNet-50 backbone.
summary: Sparse R-CNN is a recent strong object detection baseline by set prediction on sparse, learnable proposal boxes and proposal features. In this work, we propose to improve Sparse R-CNN with two dynamic designs. First, Sparse R-CNN adopts a one-to-one label assignment scheme, where the Hungarian algorithm is applied to match only one positive sample for each ground truth. Such one-to-one assignment may not be optimal for the matching between the learned proposal boxes and ground truths. To address this problem, we propose dynamic label assignment (DLA) based on the optimal transport algorithm to assign increasing positive samples in the iterative training stages of Sparse R-CNN. We constrain the matching to be gradually looser in the sequential stages as the later stage produces the refined proposals with improved precision. Second, the learned proposal boxes and features remain fixed for different images in the inference process of Sparse R-CNN. Motivated by dynamic convolution, we propose dynamic proposal generation (DPG) to assemble multiple proposal experts dynamically for providing better initial proposal boxes and features for the consecutive training stages. DPG thereby can derive sample-dependent proposal boxes and features for inference. Experiments demonstrate that our method, named Dynamic Sparse R-CNN, can boost the strong Sparse R-CNN baseline with different backbones for object detection. Particularly, Dynamic Sparse R-CNN reaches the state-of-the-art 47.2% AP on the COCO 2017 validation set, surpassing Sparse R-CNN by 2.2% AP with the same ResNet-50 backbone.
abstract_zh: Sparse R-CNN 是最近的强大对象检测基线，通过对稀疏、可学习的提案框和提案特征进行集合预测。在这项工作中，我们建议通过两种动态设计来改进 Sparse R-CNN。首先，Sparse R-CNN 采用一对一的标签分配方案，其中应用匈牙利算法为每个地面事实仅匹配一个正样本。这种一对一的分配对于学习的提案框和基本事实之间的匹配可能不是最佳的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于最优传输算法的动态标签分配（DLA），以在稀疏 R-CNN 的迭代训练阶段分配不断增加的正样本。随着后续阶段产生精度更高的细化提案，我们将匹配限制为在连续阶段中逐渐宽松。其次，在稀疏 R-CNN 的推理过程中，对于不同的图像，学习到的建议框和特征保持固定。在动态卷积的推动下，我们提出动态提案生成（DPG）来动态组装多个提案专家，为连续的训练阶段提供更好的初始提案框和特征。因此，DPG 可以导出依赖于样本的提议框和特征以进行推理。实验表明，我们的方法名为 Dynamic Sparse R-CNN，可以通过不同的主干来增强强大的 Sparse R-CNN 基线，以进行对象检测。特别是，Dynamic Sparse R-CNN 在 COCO 2017 验证集上达到了最先进的 47.2% AP，比具有相同 ResNet-50 主干的 Sparse R-CNN 超出了 2.2% AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Sparse R-CNN方法，称为Dynamic Sparse R-CNN，通过引入动态标签分配和动态提案生成来提升目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: Sparse R-CNN虽然在目标检测任务中表现出色，但其采用的固定标签分配策略和静态提案生成方式在训练和推理过程中可能无法充分利用不同图像的特性，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 本文提出两种动态设计：动态标签分配（DLA）和动态提案生成（DPG）。DLA基于最优运输算法，在训练的不同阶段逐渐放宽匹配约束，从而分配更多正样本；DPG则通过动态组合多个提案专家，生成与样本相关的初始提案框和特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，Dynamic Sparse R-CNN在COCO 2017验证集上达到了47.2%的AP，相较于使用相同ResNet-50主干网络的Sparse R-CNN提升了2.2%的AP，达到了当时最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Dynamic Sparse R-CNN通过引入动态标签分配和动态提案生成，有效提升了目标检测性能，验证了动态设计在提高模型适应性和精度方面的有效性。

method: 本文提出两种动态设计：动态标签分配（DLA）和动态提案生成（DPG）。DLA基于最优运输算法，在训练的不同阶段逐渐放宽匹配约束，从而分配更多正样本；DPG则通过动态组合多个提案专家，生成与样本相关的初始提案框和特征。
result: 实验表明，Dynamic Sparse R-CNN在COCO 2017验证集上达到了47.2%的AP，相较于使用相同ResNet-50主干网络的Sparse R-CNN提升了2.2%的AP，达到了当时最先进的性能。
conclusion: Dynamic Sparse R-CNN通过引入动态标签分配和动态提案生成，有效提升了目标检测性能，验证了动态设计在提高模型适应性和精度方面的有效性。
search_text: Dynamic Sparse R-CNN 动态稀疏 R-CNN Sparse R-CNN is a recent strong object detection baseline by set prediction on sparse, learnable proposal boxes and proposal features. In this work, we propose to improve Sparse R-CNN with two dynamic designs. First, Sparse R-CNN adopts a one-to-one label assignment scheme, where the Hungarian algorithm is applied to match only one positive sample for each ground truth. Such one-to-one assignment may not be optimal for the matching between the learned proposal boxes and ground truths. To address this problem, we propose dynamic label assignment (DLA) based on the optimal transport algorithm to assign increasing positive samples in the iterative training stages of Sparse R-CNN. We constrain the matching to be gradually looser in the sequential stages as the later stage produces the refined proposals with improved precision. Second, the learned proposal boxes and features remain fixed for different images in the inference process of Sparse R-CNN. Motivated by dynamic convolution, we propose dynamic proposal generation (DPG) to assemble multiple proposal experts dynamically for providing better initial proposal boxes and features for the consecutive training stages. DPG thereby can derive sample-dependent proposal boxes and features for inference. Experiments demonstrate that our method, named Dynamic Sparse R-CNN, can boost the strong Sparse R-CNN baseline with different backbones for object detection. Particularly, Dynamic Sparse R-CNN reaches the state-of-the-art 47.2% AP on the COCO 2017 validation set, surpassing Sparse R-CNN by 2.2% AP with the same ResNet-50 backbone. Sparse R-CNN 是最近的强大对象检测基线，通过对稀疏、可学习的提案框和提案特征进行集合预测。在这项工作中，我们建议通过两种动态设计来改进 Sparse R-CNN。首先，Sparse R-CNN 采用一对一的标签分配方案，其中应用匈牙利算法为每个地面事实仅匹配一个正样本。这种一对一的分配对于学习的提案框和基本事实之间的匹配可能不是最佳的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于最优传输算法的动态标签分配（DLA），以在稀疏 R-CNN 的迭代训练阶段分配不断增加的正样本。随着后续阶段产生精度更高的细化提案，我们将匹配限制为在连续阶段中逐渐宽松。其次，在稀疏 R-CNN 的推理过程中，对于不同的图像，学习到的建议框和特征保持固定。在动态卷积的推动下，我们提出动态提案生成（DPG）来动态组装多个提案专家，为连续的训练阶段提供更好的初始提案框和特征。因此，DPG 可以导出依赖于样本的提议框和特征以进行推理。实验表明，我们的方法名为 Dynamic Sparse R-CNN，可以通过不同的主干来增强强大的 Sparse R-CNN 基线，以进行对象检测。特别是，Dynamic Sparse R-CNN 在 COCO 2017 验证集上达到了最先进的 47.2% AP，比具有相同 ResNet-50 主干的 Sparse R-CNN 超出了 2.2% AP。 本文提出了一种改进的Sparse R-CNN方法，称为Dynamic Sparse R-CNN，通过引入动态标签分配和动态提案生成来提升目标检测性能。 Qinghang Hong,Fengming Liu,Dong Li,Ji Liu,Lu Tian,Yi Shan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: MAD: Self-Supervised Masked Anomaly Detection Task for Multivariate Time Series
title_zh: MAD：多元时间序列的自监督屏蔽异常检测任务
comment: Accepted by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: Accepted by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Masked Anomaly Detection (MAD), a general self-supervised learning task for multivariate time series anomaly detection. With the increasing availability of sensor data from industrial systems, being able to detecting anomalies from streams of multivariate time series data is of significant importance. Given the scarcity of anomalies in real-world applications, the majority of literature has been focusing on modeling normality. The learned normal representations can empower anomaly detection as the model has learned to capture certain key underlying data regularities. A typical formulation is to learn a predictive model, i.e., use a window of time series data to predict future data values. In this paper, we propose an alternative self-supervised learning task. By randomly masking a portion of the inputs and training a model to estimate them using the remaining ones, MAD is an improvement over the traditional left-to-right next step prediction (NSP) task. Our experimental results demonstrate that MAD can achieve better anomaly detection rates over traditional NSP approaches when using exactly the same neural network (NN) base models, and can be modified to run as fast as NSP models during test time on the same hardware, thus making it an ideal upgrade for many existing NSP-based NN anomaly detection models.
summary: In this paper, we introduce Masked Anomaly Detection (MAD), a general self-supervised learning task for multivariate time series anomaly detection. With the increasing availability of sensor data from industrial systems, being able to detecting anomalies from streams of multivariate time series data is of significant importance. Given the scarcity of anomalies in real-world applications, the majority of literature has been focusing on modeling normality. The learned normal representations can empower anomaly detection as the model has learned to capture certain key underlying data regularities. A typical formulation is to learn a predictive model, i.e., use a window of time series data to predict future data values. In this paper, we propose an alternative self-supervised learning task. By randomly masking a portion of the inputs and training a model to estimate them using the remaining ones, MAD is an improvement over the traditional left-to-right next step prediction (NSP) task. Our experimental results demonstrate that MAD can achieve better anomaly detection rates over traditional NSP approaches when using exactly the same neural network (NN) base models, and can be modified to run as fast as NSP models during test time on the same hardware, thus making it an ideal upgrade for many existing NSP-based NN anomaly detection models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了屏蔽异常检测（MAD），这是一种用于多元时间序列异常检测的通用自监督学习任务。随着工业系统中传感器数据的可用性不断增加，能够从多元时间序列数据流中检测异常变得非常重要。鉴于现实世界应用中异常现象的稀缺，大多数文献一直专注于对正态性进行建模。当模型学会捕获某些关键的基础数据规律时，学习到的正常表示可以增强异常检测能力。典型的公式是学习预测模型，即使用时间序列数据的窗口来预测未来的数据值。在本文中，我们提出了另一种自我监督学习任务。通过随机屏蔽一部分输入并训练模型以使用剩余输入来估计它们，MAD 是对传统从左到右下一步预测 (NSP) 任务的改进。我们的实验结果表明，当使用完全相同的神经网络（NN）基础模型时，MAD 可以比传统 NSP 方法实现更好的异常检测率，并且可以修改为在相同硬件上的测试时间内与 NSP 模型一样快地运行，从而使其成为许多现有的基于 NSP 的 NN 异常检测模型的理想升级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAD的自监督学习任务，用于多变量时间序列的异常检测，通过随机掩码输入并训练模型估计被掩码部分来改进传统方法。
AI.motivation: 由于实际应用中异常数据稀缺，现有研究主要聚焦于建模正常数据。传统方法（如下一步预测NSP）存在局限性，需探索更有效的自监督学习任务以提升异常检测性能。
AI.method: 设计MAD任务，随机掩码输入时间序列的部分数据，训练模型利用未掩码部分预测被掩码值，替代传统NSP任务的单步预测方式。
AI.result: 实验表明，在相同神经网络结构下，MAD的异常检测率优于NSP方法，且测试时延与NSP相当，适合升级现有NSP模型。
AI.conclusion: MAD通过改进自监督学习任务，有效提升了多变量时间序列异常检测性能，且保持计算效率，是现有NSP模型的理想替代方案。

title: A Novel Fully Annotated Thermal Infrared Face Dataset: Recorded in Various Environment Conditions and Distances From The Camera
title_zh: 一种新颖的完全注释的热红外人脸数据集：在各种环境条件和距相机的距离下记录
abstract: Facial thermography is one of the most popular research areas in infrared thermal imaging, with diverse applications in medical, surveillance, and environmental monitoring. However, in contrast to facial imagery in the visual spectrum, the lack of public datasets on facial thermal images is an obstacle to research improvement in this area. Thermal face imagery is still a relatively new research area to be evaluated and studied in different domains.The current thermal face datasets are limited in regards to the subjects' distance from the camera, the ambient temperature variation, and facial landmarks' localization. We address these gaps by presenting a new facial thermography dataset. This article makes two main contributions to the body of knowledge. First, it presents a comprehensive review and comparison of current public datasets in facial thermography. Second, it introduces and studies a novel public dataset on facial thermography, which we call it Charlotte-ThermalFace. Charlotte-ThermalFace contains more than10000 infrared thermal images in varying thermal conditions, several distances from the camera, and different head positions. The data is fully annotated with the facial landmarks, ambient temperature, relative humidity, the air speed of the room, distance to the camera, and subject thermal sensation at the time of capturing each image. Our dataset is the first publicly available thermal dataset annotated with the thermal sensation of each subject in different thermal conditions and one of the few datasets in raw 16-bit format. Finally, we present a preliminary analysis of the dataset to show the applicability and importance of the thermal conditions in facial thermography. The full dataset, including annotations, are freely available for research purpose at https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/UNCC-ThermalFace
summary: Facial thermography is one of the most popular research areas in infrared thermal imaging, with diverse applications in medical, surveillance, and environmental monitoring. However, in contrast to facial imagery in the visual spectrum, the lack of public datasets on facial thermal images is an obstacle to research improvement in this area. Thermal face imagery is still a relatively new research area to be evaluated and studied in different domains.The current thermal face datasets are limited in regards to the subjects' distance from the camera, the ambient temperature variation, and facial landmarks' localization. We address these gaps by presenting a new facial thermography dataset. This article makes two main contributions to the body of knowledge. First, it presents a comprehensive review and comparison of current public datasets in facial thermography. Second, it introduces and studies a novel public dataset on facial thermography, which we call it Charlotte-ThermalFace. Charlotte-ThermalFace contains more than10000 infrared thermal images in varying thermal conditions, several distances from the camera, and different head positions. The data is fully annotated with the facial landmarks, ambient temperature, relative humidity, the air speed of the room, distance to the camera, and subject thermal sensation at the time of capturing each image. Our dataset is the first publicly available thermal dataset annotated with the thermal sensation of each subject in different thermal conditions and one of the few datasets in raw 16-bit format. Finally, we present a preliminary analysis of the dataset to show the applicability and importance of the thermal conditions in facial thermography. The full dataset, including annotations, are freely available for research purpose at https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/UNCC-ThermalFace
abstract_zh: 面部热成像是红外热成像中最受欢迎的研究领域之一，在医疗、监控和环境监测方面有着广泛的应用。然而，与视觉光谱中的面部图像相比，面部热图像公共数据集的缺乏是该领域研究改进的障碍。热人脸图像仍然是一个相对较新的研究领域，需要在不同领域进行评估和研究。当前的热人脸数据集在对象与相机的距离、环境温度变化和面部特征点定位方面受到限制。我们通过提出新的面部热成像数据集来解决这些差距。本文对知识体系做出了两个主要贡献。首先，它对当前面部热成像的公共数据集进行了全面的回顾和比较。其次，它介绍并研究了一个新颖的面部热成像公共数据集，我们称之为 Charlotte-ThermalFace。 Charlotte-ThermalFace 包含 10000 多张红外热图像，这些图像处于不同的热条件、距摄像机的多个距离以及不同的头部位置。数据包含面部标志、环境温度、相对湿度、房间的空气速度、与相机的距离以及捕捉每张图像时对象的热感觉。我们的数据集是第一个公开的热数据集，标注了每个受试者在不同热条件下的热感觉，也是少数原始 16 位格式的数据集之一。最后，我们对数据集进行了初步分析，以展示热条件在面部热成像中的适用性和重要性。完整的数据集（包括注释）可免费用于研究目的，网址为 https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/UNCC-ThermalFace

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Charlotte-ThermalFace的新颖且全面标注的热红外人脸数据集，包含不同环境条件和拍摄距离下的超过10000张红外图像。
AI.motivation: 现有热成像数据集在受试者距离、环境温度变化、面部标志定位等方面存在局限性，且缺乏包含热感觉标注的公开数据集。
AI.method: 通过采集多种环境条件（温度、湿度、风速）和不同拍摄距离下的热红外图像，并对图像进行面部标志、环境参数及受试者热感觉的全面标注，采用原始16位格式存储数据。
AI.result: 构建了首个包含受试者热感觉标注的公开热成像数据集，提供超过10000张图像及多维度环境参数，初步分析验证了热条件对面部热成像的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了现有研究空白，为医疗、安防等领域提供了重要资源，同时强调了热环境参数在热红外人脸分析中的关键作用。
