tldr: 本文提出一个名为Charlotte-ThermalFace的新颖且全面标注的热红外人脸数据集，包含不同环境条件和拍摄距离下的超过10000张红外图像。
motivation: 现有热成像数据集在受试者距离、环境温度变化、面部标志定位等方面存在局限性，且缺乏包含热感觉标注的公开数据集。
method: 通过采集多种环境条件（温度、湿度、风速）和不同拍摄距离下的热红外图像，并对图像进行面部标志、环境参数及受试者热感觉的全面标注，采用原始16位格式存储数据。
result: 构建了首个包含受试者热感觉标注的公开热成像数据集，提供超过10000张图像及多维度环境参数，初步分析验证了热条件对面部热成像的重要性。
conclusion: 该数据集填补了现有研究空白，为医疗、安防等领域提供了重要资源，同时强调了热环境参数在热红外人脸分析中的关键作用。
search_text: A Novel Fully Annotated Thermal Infrared Face Dataset: Recorded in Various Environment Conditions and Distances From The Camera 一种新颖的完全注释的热红外人脸数据集：在各种环境条件和距相机的距离下记录 Facial thermography is one of the most popular research areas in infrared thermal imaging, with diverse applications in medical, surveillance, and environmental monitoring. However, in contrast to facial imagery in the visual spectrum, the lack of public datasets on facial thermal images is an obstacle to research improvement in this area. Thermal face imagery is still a relatively new research area to be evaluated and studied in different domains.The current thermal face datasets are limited in regards to the subjects' distance from the camera, the ambient temperature variation, and facial landmarks' localization. We address these gaps by presenting a new facial thermography dataset. This article makes two main contributions to the body of knowledge. First, it presents a comprehensive review and comparison of current public datasets in facial thermography. Second, it introduces and studies a novel public dataset on facial thermography, which we call it Charlotte-ThermalFace. Charlotte-ThermalFace contains more than10000 infrared thermal images in varying thermal conditions, several distances from the camera, and different head positions. The data is fully annotated with the facial landmarks, ambient temperature, relative humidity, the air speed of the room, distance to the camera, and subject thermal sensation at the time of capturing each image. Our dataset is the first publicly available thermal dataset annotated with the thermal sensation of each subject in different thermal conditions and one of the few datasets in raw 16-bit format. Finally, we present a preliminary analysis of the dataset to show the applicability and importance of the thermal conditions in facial thermography. The full dataset, including annotations, are freely available for research purpose at https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/UNCC-ThermalFace 面部热成像是红外热成像中最受欢迎的研究领域之一，在医疗、监控和环境监测方面有着广泛的应用。然而，与视觉光谱中的面部图像相比，面部热图像公共数据集的缺乏是该领域研究改进的障碍。热人脸图像仍然是一个相对较新的研究领域，需要在不同领域进行评估和研究。当前的热人脸数据集在对象与相机的距离、环境温度变化和面部特征点定位方面受到限制。我们通过提出新的面部热成像数据集来解决这些差距。本文对知识体系做出了两个主要贡献。首先，它对当前面部热成像的公共数据集进行了全面的回顾和比较。其次，它介绍并研究了一个新颖的面部热成像公共数据集，我们称之为 Charlotte-ThermalFace。 Charlotte-ThermalFace 包含 10000 多张红外热图像，这些图像处于不同的热条件、距摄像机的多个距离以及不同的头部位置。数据包含面部标志、环境温度、相对湿度、房间的空气速度、与相机的距离以及捕捉每张图像时对象的热感觉。我们的数据集是第一个公开的热数据集，标注了每个受试者在不同热条件下的热感觉，也是少数原始 16 位格式的数据集之一。最后，我们对数据集进行了初步分析，以展示热条件在面部热成像中的适用性和重要性。完整的数据集（包括注释）可免费用于研究目的，网址为 https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/UNCC-ThermalFace 本文提出一个名为Charlotte-ThermalFace的新颖且全面标注的热红外人脸数据集，包含不同环境条件和拍摄距离下的超过10000张红外图像。 Roshanak Ashrafi,Mona Azarbayjania,Hamed Tabkhi cs.CV

title: Learning Abstract and Transferable Representations for Planning
title_zh: 学习规划的抽象和可转移表示
comment: Accepted to the 5th Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM), 2022
comments: Accepted to the 5th Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM), 2022
abstract: We are concerned with the question of how an agent can acquire its own representations from sensory data. We restrict our focus to learning representations for long-term planning, a class of problems that state-of-the-art learning methods are unable to solve. We propose a framework for autonomously learning state abstractions of an agent's environment, given a set of skills. Importantly, these abstractions are task-independent, and so can be reused to solve new tasks. We demonstrate how an agent can use an existing set of options to acquire representations from ego- and object-centric observations. These abstractions can immediately be reused by the same agent in new environments. We show how to combine these portable representations with problem-specific ones to generate a sound description of a specific task that can be used for abstract planning. Finally, we show how to autonomously construct a multi-level hierarchy consisting of increasingly abstract representations. Since these hierarchies are transferable, higher-order concepts can be reused in new tasks, relieving the agent from relearning them and improving sample efficiency. Our results demonstrate that our approach allows an agent to transfer previous knowledge to new tasks, improving sample efficiency as the number of tasks increases.
summary: We are concerned with the question of how an agent can acquire its own representations from sensory data. We restrict our focus to learning representations for long-term planning, a class of problems that state-of-the-art learning methods are unable to solve. We propose a framework for autonomously learning state abstractions of an agent's environment, given a set of skills. Importantly, these abstractions are task-independent, and so can be reused to solve new tasks. We demonstrate how an agent can use an existing set of options to acquire representations from ego- and object-centric observations. These abstractions can immediately be reused by the same agent in new environments. We show how to combine these portable representations with problem-specific ones to generate a sound description of a specific task that can be used for abstract planning. Finally, we show how to autonomously construct a multi-level hierarchy consisting of increasingly abstract representations. Since these hierarchies are transferable, higher-order concepts can be reused in new tasks, relieving the agent from relearning them and improving sample efficiency. Our results demonstrate that our approach allows an agent to transfer previous knowledge to new tasks, improving sample efficiency as the number of tasks increases.
abstract_zh: 我们关心的问题是智能体如何从感知数据中获取自己的表征。我们将注意力集中在学习长期规划的表示上，这是最先进的学习方法无法解决的一类问题。我们提出了一个框架，用于在给定一组技能的情况下自主学习代理环境的状态抽象。重要的是，这些抽象是独立于任务的，因此可以重用来解决新任务。我们演示了代理如何使用现有的一组选项来从以自我和对象为中心的观察中获取表示。这些抽象可以立即被新环境中的同一代理重用。我们展示了如何将这些可移植的表示与特定问题的表示相结合，以生成可用于抽象规划的特定任务的合理描述。最后，我们展示了如何自主构建由越来越抽象的表示组成的多级层次结构。由于这些层次结构是可转移的，因此可以在新任务中重用高阶概念，从而使代理无需重新学习它们并提高样本效率。我们的结果表明，我们的方法允许代理将先前的知识转移到新任务中，随着任务数量的增加而提高样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自主学习可迁移抽象表示的框架，用于解决长期规划问题，并能在新任务中复用已学知识。
AI.motivation: 现有学习方法难以处理长期规划任务，且缺乏跨任务的知识迁移能力，需学习任务无关的抽象表示以提高效率。
AI.method: 基于技能集自主生成环境状态抽象，结合自我/对象视角观察，构建可复用的多层级表示体系并整合任务特定信息。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能有效迁移知识至新任务，随着任务数量增加样本效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过可迁移的层次化表示学习，智能体可复用历史知识提升规划效率，减少重复学习成本。

title: Improve Discourse Dependency Parsing with Contextualized Representations
title_zh: 使用上下文表示改进语篇依存解析
abstract: Recent works show that discourse analysis benefits from modeling intra- and inter-sentential levels separately, where proper representations for text units of different granularities are desired to capture both the meaning of text units and their relations to the context. In this paper, we propose to take advantage of transformers to encode contextualized representations of units of different levels to dynamically capture the information required for discourse dependency analysis on intra- and inter-sentential levels. Motivated by the observation of writing patterns commonly shared across articles, we propose a novel method that treats discourse relation identification as a sequence labelling task, which takes advantage of structural information from the context of extracted discourse trees, and substantially outperforms traditional direct-classification methods. Experiments show that our model achieves state-of-the-art results on both English and Chinese datasets.
summary: Recent works show that discourse analysis benefits from modeling intra- and inter-sentential levels separately, where proper representations for text units of different granularities are desired to capture both the meaning of text units and their relations to the context. In this paper, we propose to take advantage of transformers to encode contextualized representations of units of different levels to dynamically capture the information required for discourse dependency analysis on intra- and inter-sentential levels. Motivated by the observation of writing patterns commonly shared across articles, we propose a novel method that treats discourse relation identification as a sequence labelling task, which takes advantage of structural information from the context of extracted discourse trees, and substantially outperforms traditional direct-classification methods. Experiments show that our model achieves state-of-the-art results on both English and Chinese datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，话语分析受益于分别对句子内和句子间级别进行建模，其中需要对不同粒度的文本单元进行适当的表示，以捕获文本单元的含义及其与上下文的关系。在本文中，我们建议利用变压器对不同级别的单元的上下文表示进行编码，以动态捕获句子内和句子间级别的话语依赖分析所需的信息。受对文章间常见写作模式的观察的启发，我们提出了一种将话语关系识别视为序列标记任务的新颖方法，该方法利用了提取的话语树上下文中的结构信息，并且大大优于传统的直接分类方法。实验表明，我们的模型在英语和中文数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用上下文化表示改进话语依存句法分析，通过建模句内与句间层次关系提升解析效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以同时捕捉文本单元的粒度差异与上下文关联，而文章写作模式的共性启发了对结构化信息建模的需求。
AI.method: 采用Transformer编码多粒度上下文表示，并将话语关系识别转化为序列标注任务，结合提取的话语树结构信息进行建模。
AI.result: 模型在英文和中文数据集上均达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 基于上下文化表示的序列标注方法能有效捕捉话语层次结构，为跨语言话语分析提供新思路。

title: A New Dimensionality Reduction Method Based on Hensel's Compression for Privacy Protection in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中基于Hensel压缩的隐私保护降维新方法
abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is considered a de-facto standard for protecting users' privacy in data analysis, machine, and deep learning. Existing DP-based privacy-preserving training approaches consist of adding noise to the clients' gradients before sharing them with the server. However, implementing DP on the gradient is not efficient as the privacy leakage increases by increasing the synchronization training epochs due to the composition theorem. Recently researchers were able to recover images used in the training dataset using Generative Regression Neural Network (GRNN) even when the gradient was protected by DP. In this paper, we propose two layers of privacy protection approach to overcome the limitations of the existing DP-based approaches. The first layer reduces the dimension of the training dataset based on Hensel's Lemma. We are the first to use Hensel's Lemma for reducing the dimension (i.e., compress) of a dataset. The new dimensionality reduction method allows reducing the dimension of a dataset without losing information since Hensel's Lemma guarantees uniqueness. The second layer applies DP to the compressed dataset generated by the first layer. The proposed approach overcomes the problem of privacy leakage due to composition by applying DP only once before the training; clients train their local model on the privacy-preserving dataset generated by the second layer. Experimental results show that the proposed approach ensures strong privacy protection while achieving good accuracy. The new dimensionality reduction method achieves an accuracy of 97%, with only 25 % of the original data size.
summary: Differential privacy (DP) is considered a de-facto standard for protecting users' privacy in data analysis, machine, and deep learning. Existing DP-based privacy-preserving training approaches consist of adding noise to the clients' gradients before sharing them with the server. Recently researchers were able to recover images used in the training dataset using Generative Regression Neural Network (GRNN) even when the gradient was protected by DP. In this paper, we propose two layers of privacy protection approach to overcome the limitations of the existing DP-based approaches. The first layer reduces the dimension of the training dataset based on Hensel's Lemma. We are the first to use Hensel's Lemma for reducing the dimension (i.e., compress) of a dataset. The new dimensionality reduction method allows reducing the dimension of a dataset without losing information since Hensel's Lemma guarantees uniqueness. The second layer applies DP to the compressed dataset generated by the first layer. The proposed approach overcomes the problem of privacy leakage due to composition by applying DP only once before the training; clients train their local model on the privacy-preserving dataset generated by the second layer. Experimental results show that the proposed approach ensures strong privacy protection while achieving good accuracy. The new dimensionality reduction method achieves an accuracy of 97%, with only 25 % of the original data size.
abstract_zh: 差分隐私（DP）被认为是数据分析、机器和深度学习中保护用户隐私的事实上的标准。现有的基于 DP 的隐私保护训练方法包括在与服务器共享客户端梯度之前向其添加噪声。然而，在梯度上实现 DP 效率不高，因为根据合成定理，增加同步训练周期会增加隐私泄漏。最近，即使梯度受到 DP 保护，研究人员也能够使用生成回归神经网络 (GRNN) 恢复训练数据集中使用的图像。在本文中，我们提出了两层隐私保护方法来克服现有基于DP的方法的局限性。第一层根据亨塞尔引理减少训练数据集的维度。我们是第一个使用 Hensel 引理来降低数据集维度（即压缩）的人。新的降维方法允许在不丢失信息的情况下降低数据集的维度，因为亨塞尔引理保证了唯一性。第二层将DP应用于第一层生成的压缩数据集。所提出的方法通过在训练前仅应用一次DP来克服由于合成而造成的隐私泄露问题；客户端在第二层生成的隐私保护数据集上训练其本地模型。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在保证良好的准确性的同时，保证了强大的隐私保护。新的降维方法实现了 97% 的准确率，而数据量仅为原始数据的 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Hensel压缩的隐私保护联邦学习方法，通过双重保护层减少数据维度并应用差分隐私，以解决现有方法隐私泄露和效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私方法在联邦学习中因同步训练轮次增加导致隐私泄露加剧，且压缩后的梯度仍可能被GRNN恢复原始数据，需更高效隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 第一层使用Hensel引理压缩数据集（保证唯一性且无信息损失），第二层对压缩数据应用差分隐私，仅在训练前添加一次噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在数据量仅为原数据25%时达到97%准确率，有效防止隐私泄露且保持高模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过Hensel压缩与单次差分隐私结合，解决了隐私累积泄露问题，在保证精度的同时实现更强的隐私保护。

search_text: A New Dimensionality Reduction Method Based on Hensel's Compression for Privacy Protection in Federated Learning 联邦学习中基于Hensel压缩的隐私保护降维新方法 Differential privacy (DP) is considered a de-facto standard for protecting users' privacy in data analysis, machine, and deep learning. Existing DP-based privacy-preserving training approaches consist of adding noise to the clients' gradients before sharing them with the server. However, implementing DP on the gradient is not efficient as the privacy leakage increases by increasing the synchronization training epochs due to the composition theorem. Recently researchers were able to recover images used in the training dataset using Generative Regression Neural Network (GRNN) even when the gradient was protected by DP. In this paper, we propose two layers of privacy protection approach to overcome the limitations of the existing DP-based approaches. The first layer reduces the dimension of the training dataset based on Hensel's Lemma. We are the first to use Hensel's Lemma for reducing the dimension (i.e., compress) of a dataset. The new dimensionality reduction method allows reducing the dimension of a dataset without losing information since Hensel's Lemma guarantees uniqueness. The second layer applies DP to the compressed dataset generated by the first layer. The proposed approach overcomes the problem of privacy leakage due to composition by applying DP only once before the training; clients train their local model on the privacy-preserving dataset generated by the second layer. Experimental results show that the proposed approach ensures strong privacy protection while achieving good accuracy. The new dimensionality reduction method achieves an accuracy of 97%, with only 25 % of the original data size. 差分隐私（DP）被认为是数据分析、机器和深度学习中保护用户隐私的事实上的标准。现有的基于 DP 的隐私保护训练方法包括在与服务器共享客户端梯度之前向其添加噪声。然而，在梯度上实现 DP 效率不高，因为根据合成定理，增加同步训练周期会增加隐私泄漏。最近，即使梯度受到 DP 保护，研究人员也能够使用生成回归神经网络 (GRNN) 恢复训练数据集中使用的图像。在本文中，我们提出了两层隐私保护方法来克服现有基于DP的方法的局限性。第一层根据亨塞尔引理减少训练数据集的维度。我们是第一个使用 Hensel 引理来降低数据集维度（即压缩）的人。新的降维方法允许在不丢失信息的情况下降低数据集的维度，因为亨塞尔引理保证了唯一性。第二层将DP应用于第一层生成的压缩数据集。所提出的方法通过在训练前仅应用一次DP来克服由于合成而造成的隐私泄露问题；客户端在第二层生成的隐私保护数据集上训练其本地模型。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在保证良好的准确性的同时，保证了强大的隐私保护。新的降维方法实现了 97% 的准确率，而数据量仅为原始数据的 25%。 本文提出一种基于Hensel压缩的隐私保护联邦学习方法，通过双重保护层减少数据维度并应用差分隐私，以解决现有方法隐私泄露和效率问题。 Ahmed El Ouadrhiri,Ahmed Abdelhadi cs.CR,cs.AI

title: Hypercomplex Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 超复杂的图像到图像转换
comment: ef:2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
comments: ef:2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
abstract: Image-to-image translation (I2I) aims at transferring the content representation from an input domain to an output one, bouncing along different target domains. Recent I2I generative models, which gain outstanding results in this task, comprise a set of diverse deep networks each with tens of million parameters. Moreover, images are usually three-dimensional being composed of RGB channels and common neural models do not take dimensions correlation into account, losing beneficial information. In this paper, we propose to leverage hypercomplex algebra properties to define lightweight I2I generative models capable of preserving pre-existing relations among image dimensions, thus exploiting additional input information. On manifold I2I benchmarks, we show how the proposed Quaternion StarGANv2 and parameterized hypercomplex StarGANv2 (PHStarGANv2) reduce parameters and storage memory amount while ensuring high domain translation performance and good image quality as measured by FID and LPIPS scores. Full code is available at: https://github.com/ispamm/HI2I.
summary: Image-to-image translation (I2I) aims at transferring the content representation from an input domain to an output one, bouncing along different target domains. Recent I2I generative models, which gain outstanding results in this task, comprise a set of diverse deep networks each with tens of million parameters. Moreover, images are usually three-dimensional being composed of RGB channels and common neural models do not take dimensions correlation into account, losing beneficial information. In this paper, we propose to leverage hypercomplex algebra properties to define lightweight I2I generative models capable of preserving pre-existing relations among image dimensions, thus exploiting additional input information. On manifold I2I benchmarks, we show how the proposed Quaternion StarGANv2 and parameterized hypercomplex StarGANv2 (PHStarGANv2) reduce parameters and storage memory amount while ensuring high domain translation performance and good image quality as measured by FID and LPIPS scores. Full code is available at: https://github.com/ispamm/HI2I.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像翻译（I2I）旨在将内容表示从输入域转移到输出域，并沿着不同的目标域跳跃。最近的 I2I 生成模型在这项任务中取得了出色的成果，它由一组不同的深度网络组成，每个网络都有数千万个参数。此外，图像通常是由 RGB 通道组成的三维图像，常见的神经模型不考虑维度相关性，从而丢失了有用的信息。在本文中，我们建议利用超复杂代数特性来定义轻量级 I2I 生成模型，该模型能够保留图像维度之间预先存在的关系，从而利用额外的输入信息。在多种 I2I 基准测试中，我们展示了所提出的四元数 StarGANv2 和参数化超复杂 StarGANv2 (PHStarGANv2) 如何减少参数和存储内存量，同时确保高域转换性能和良好的图像质量（通过 FID 和 LPIPS 分数衡量）。完整代码位于：https://github.com/ispamm/HI2I。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用超复数代数构建轻量级图像到图像翻译模型，以提升跨域翻译性能并减少参数量。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到图像翻译模型参数量大且忽略图像维度间相关性，导致信息丢失和计算效率低下。
AI.method: 基于四元数代数设计Quaternion StarGANv2及参数化超复数StarGANv2（PHStarGANv2），通过超复数运算保留图像维度间关系。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，模型参数量和内存占用显著降低，同时保持高翻译质量（FID/LPIPS指标表现优异）。
AI.conclusion: 超复数代数为图像翻译提供了高效且信息保留完整的建模方式，具有参数轻量化与性能兼顾的优势。

title: Does a PESQNet (Loss) Require a Clean Reference Input? The Original PESQ Does, But ACR Listening Tests Don't
title_zh: PESQNet（损耗）是否需要干净的参考输入？原始 PESQ 可以，但 ACR 听力测试不行
abstract: Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) requires a clean speech reference as input, but predicts the results from (reference-free) absolute category rating (ACR) tests. In this work, we train a fully convolutional recurrent neural network (FCRN) as deep noise suppression (DNS) model, with either a non-intrusive or an intrusive PESQNet, where only the latter has access to a clean speech reference. The PESQNet is used as a mediator providing a perceptual loss during the DNS training to maximize the PESQ score of the enhanced speech signal. For the intrusive PESQNet, we investigate two topologies, called early-fusion (EF) and middle-fusion (MF) PESQNet, and compare to the non-intrusive PESQNet to evaluate and to quantify the benefits of employing a clean speech reference input during DNS training. Detailed analyses show that the DNS trained with the MF-intrusive PESQNet outperforms the Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge baseline and the same DNS trained with an MSE loss by 0.23 and 0.12 PESQ points, respectively. Furthermore, we can show that only marginal benefits are obtained compared to the DNS trained with the non-intrusive PESQNet. Therefore, as ACR listening tests, the PESQNet does not necessarily require a clean speech reference input, opening the possibility of using real data for DNS training.
summary: Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) requires a clean speech reference as input, but predicts the results from (reference-free) absolute category rating (ACR) tests. In this work, we train a fully convolutional recurrent neural network (FCRN) as deep noise suppression (DNS) model, with either a non-intrusive or an intrusive PESQNet, where only the latter has access to a clean speech reference. The PESQNet is used as a mediator providing a perceptual loss during the DNS training to maximize the PESQ score of the enhanced speech signal. For the intrusive PESQNet, we investigate two topologies, called early-fusion (EF) and middle-fusion (MF) PESQNet, and compare to the non-intrusive PESQNet to evaluate and to quantify the benefits of employing a clean speech reference input during DNS training. Detailed analyses show that the DNS trained with the MF-intrusive PESQNet outperforms the Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge baseline and the same DNS trained with an MSE loss by 0.23 and 0.12 PESQ points, respectively. Furthermore, we can show that only marginal benefits are obtained compared to the DNS trained with the non-intrusive PESQNet. Therefore, as ACR listening tests, the PESQNet does not necessarily require a clean speech reference input, opening the possibility of using real data for DNS training.
abstract_zh: 语音质量感知评估 (PESQ) 需要干净的语音参考作为输入，但预测（无参考）绝对类别评级 (ACR) 测试的结果。在这项工作中，我们使用非侵入式或侵入式 PESQNet 来训练完全卷积循环神经网络 (FCRN) 作为深度噪声抑制 (DNS) 模型，其中只有后者才能访问干净的语音参考。 PESQNet 用作中介器，在 DNS 训练期间提供感知损失，以最大化增强语音信号的 PESQ 分数。对于侵入式 PESQNet，我们研究了两种拓扑，称为早期融合 (EF) 和中期融合 (MF) PESQNet，并与非侵入式 PESQNet 进行比较，以评估和量化在 DNS 训练期间使用干净语音参考输入的好处。详细分析表明，使用 MF 侵入式 PESQNet 训练的 DNS 的性能优于 Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge 基线，并且使用 MSE 损失训练的相同 DNS 分别优于 0.23 和 0.12 PESQ 点。此外，我们可以证明，与使用非侵入式 PESQNet 训练的 DNS 相比，仅获得了边际效益。因此，作为 ACR 听力测试，PESQNet 不一定需要干净的语音参考输入，这为使用真实数据进行 DNS 训练提供了可能性。

AI.tldr: 研究PESQNet是否需要干净参考输入，并通过对比侵入式和非侵入式模型评估其在语音增强中的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统PESQ需要干净参考输入，但ACR听觉测试无需参考。研究旨在验证训练过程中使用干净参考的必要性。
AI.method: 训练全卷积循环神经网络（FCRN）作为DNS模型，采用侵入式（EF/MF拓扑）和非侵入式PESQNet，通过感知损失优化增强语音的PESQ分数。
AI.result: MF-侵入式PESQNet在DNS任务中优于基线和MSE损失模型，但与非侵入式模型差距较小。
AI.conclusion: ACR测试中PESQNet无需干净参考输入，为使用真实数据训练DNS提供了可能性。

ai_content.tldr: 研究PESQNet是否需要干净参考输入，并通过对比侵入式和非侵入式模型评估其在语音增强中的效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统PESQ需要干净参考输入，但ACR听觉测试无需参考。研究旨在验证训练过程中使用干净参考的必要性。
ai_content.method: 训练全卷积循环神经网络（FCRN）作为DNS模型，采用侵入式（EF/MF拓扑）和非侵入式PESQNet，通过感知损失优化增强语音的PESQ分数。
ai_content.result: MF-侵入式PESQNet在DNS任务中优于基线和MSE损失模型，但与非侵入式模型差距较小。
ai_content.conclusion: ACR测试中PESQNet无需干净参考输入，为使用真实数据训练DNS提供了可能性。

search_text: Does a PESQNet (Loss) Require a Clean Reference Input? The Original PESQ Does, But ACR Listening Tests Don't PESQNet（损耗）是否需要干净的参考输入？原始 PESQ 可以，但 ACR 听力测试不行 Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) requires a clean speech reference as input, but predicts the results from (reference-free) absolute category rating (ACR) tests. In this work, we train a fully convolutional recurrent neural network (FCRN) as deep noise suppression (DNS) model, with either a non-intrusive or an intrusive PESQNet, where only the latter has access to a clean speech reference. The PESQNet is used as a mediator providing a perceptual loss during the DNS training to maximize the PESQ score of the enhanced speech signal. For the intrusive PESQNet, we investigate two topologies, called early-fusion (EF) and middle-fusion (MF) PESQNet, and compare to the non-intrusive PESQNet to evaluate and to quantify the benefits of employing a clean speech reference input during DNS training. Detailed analyses show that the DNS trained with the MF-intrusive PESQNet outperforms the Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge baseline and the same DNS trained with an MSE loss by 0.23 and 0.12 PESQ points, respectively. Furthermore, we can show that only marginal benefits are obtained compared to the DNS trained with the non-intrusive PESQNet. Therefore, as ACR listening tests, the PESQNet does not necessarily require a clean speech reference input, opening the possibility of using real data for DNS training. 语音质量感知评估 (PESQ) 需要干净的语音参考作为输入，但预测（无参考）绝对类别评级 (ACR) 测试的结果。在这项工作中，我们使用非侵入式或侵入式 PESQNet 来训练完全卷积循环神经网络 (FCRN) 作为深度噪声抑制 (DNS) 模型，其中只有后者才能访问干净的语音参考。 PESQNet 用作中介器，在 DNS 训练期间提供感知损失，以最大化增强语音信号的 PESQ 分数。对于侵入式 PESQNet，我们研究了两种拓扑，称为早期融合 (EF) 和中期融合 (MF) PESQNet，并与非侵入式 PESQNet 进行比较，以评估和量化在 DNS 训练期间使用干净语音参考输入的好处。详细分析表明，使用 MF 侵入式 PESQNet 训练的 DNS 的性能优于 Interspeech 2021 DNS Challenge 基线，并且使用 MSE 损失训练的相同 DNS 分别优于 0.23 和 0.12 PESQ 点。此外，我们可以证明，与使用非侵入式 PESQNet 训练的 DNS 相比，仅获得了边际效益。因此，作为 ACR 听力测试，PESQNet 不一定需要干净的语音参考输入，这为使用真实数据进行 DNS 训练提供了可能性。 研究PESQNet是否需要干净参考输入，并通过对比侵入式和非侵入式模型评估其在语音增强中的效果。 Ziyi Xu,Maximilian Strake,Tim Fingscheidt eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Video Extrapolation in Space and Time
title_zh: 空间和时间中的视频外推
abstract: Novel view synthesis (NVS) and video prediction (VP) are typically considered disjoint tasks in computer vision. However, they can both be seen as ways to observe the spatial-temporal world: NVS aims to synthesize a scene from a new point of view, while VP aims to see a scene from a new point of time. These two tasks provide complementary signals to obtain a scene representation, as viewpoint changes from spatial observations inform depth, and temporal observations inform the motion of cameras and individual objects. Inspired by these observations, we propose to study the problem of Video Extrapolation in Space and Time (VEST). We propose a model that leverages the self-supervision and the complementary cues from both tasks, while existing methods can only solve one of them. Experiments show that our method achieves performance better than or comparable to several state-of-the-art NVS and VP methods on indoor and outdoor real-world datasets.
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) and video prediction (VP) are typically considered disjoint tasks in computer vision. However, they can both be seen as ways to observe the spatial-temporal world: NVS aims to synthesize a scene from a new point of view, while VP aims to see a scene from a new point of time. These two tasks provide complementary signals to obtain a scene representation, as viewpoint changes from spatial observations inform depth, and temporal observations inform the motion of cameras and individual objects. Inspired by these observations, we propose to study the problem of Video Extrapolation in Space and Time (VEST). We propose a model that leverages the self-supervision and the complementary cues from both tasks, while existing methods can only solve one of them. Experiments show that our method achieves performance better than or comparable to several state-of-the-art NVS and VP methods on indoor and outdoor real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 新视图合成（NVS）和视频预测（VP）通常被认为是计算机视觉中不相交的任务。然而，它们都可以被视为观察时空世界的方式：NVS旨在从新的角度合成场景，而VP旨在从新的时间点看待场景。这两个任务提供互补信号来获得场景表示，因为空间观察的视点变化告知深度，时间观察告知相机​​和单个对象的运动。受这些观察的启发，我们建议研究时空视频外推（VEST）问题。我们提出了一种模型，利用自我监督和两项任务的互补线索，而现有方法只能解决其中一个任务。实验表明，我们的方法在室内和室外真实数据集上的性能优于或媲美几种最先进的 NVS 和 VP 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种视频时空外推方法（VEST），结合了新视角合成（NVS）和视频预测（VP）任务。
AI.motivation: 传统上，新视角合成和视频预测被视为独立任务，但它们在空间和时间上提供了互补的信息，可以更好地理解场景的表示。
AI.method: 提出了一种模型，利用自监督学习和两种任务的互补线索，以解决视频时空外推问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在室内外真实数据集上的性能优于或与最先进的NVS和VP方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合NVS和VP任务，本文的方法在视频时空外推任务上取得了良好的效果。

title: SDF-based RGB-D Camera Tracking in Neural Scene Representations
title_zh: 神经场景表示中基于 SDF 的 RGB-D 相机跟踪
comment: Accepted to the "Motion Planning with Implicit Neural Representations of Geometry" Workshop at ICRA 2022
comments: Accepted to the "Motion Planning with Implicit Neural Representations of Geometry" Workshop at ICRA 2022
abstract: We consider the problem of tracking the 6D pose of a moving RGB-D camera in a neural scene representation. Different such representations have recently emerged, and we investigate the suitability of them for the task of camera tracking. In particular, we propose to track an RGB-D camera using a signed distance field-based representation and show that compared to density-based representations, tracking can be sped up, which enables more robust and accurate pose estimates when computation time is limited.
summary: We consider the problem of tracking the 6D pose of a moving RGB-D camera in a neural scene representation. Different such representations have recently emerged, and we investigate the suitability of them for the task of camera tracking. In particular, we propose to track an RGB-D camera using a signed distance field-based representation and show that compared to density-based representations, tracking can be sped up, which enables more robust and accurate pose estimates when computation time is limited.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在神经场景表示中跟踪移动 RGB-D 相机的 6D 姿态的问题。最近出现了不同的此类表示，我们研究了它们对于相机跟踪任务的适用性。特别是，我们建议使用基于有符号距离场的表示来跟踪 RGB-D 相机，并表明与基于密度的表示相比，可以加快跟踪速度，从而在计算时间有限时实现更稳健和更准确的姿态估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号距离场（SDF）的神经场景表示方法，用于跟踪RGB-D相机的6D姿态，并证明其在计算时间有限的情况下比密度基方法更高效、准确。
AI.motivation: 随着神经场景表示的发展，需要评估不同表示方法在相机跟踪任务中的适用性，尤其在计算资源有限时，亟需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 采用符号距离场（SDF）作为神经场景表示的基础，通过优化SDF来跟踪RGB-D相机的6D姿态，并与基于密度的表示方法进行对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于SDF的方法显著提高了跟踪速度，从而在计算时间受限的情况下实现了更稳健和准确的相机姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: 基于SDF的神经场景表示在RGB-D相机跟踪任务中优于密度基方法，尤其在计算效率方面具有优势，为实时跟踪提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yang Liu,Jiyao Yang,Madhawa Perera,Pan Ji,Dongwoo Kim,Min Xu,Tianyang Wang,Saeed Anwar,Tom Gedeon,Lei Wang,Zhenyue Qin
title: Representation-Centric Survey of Skeletal Action Recognition and the ANUBIS Benchmark
title_zh: 以表征为中心的骨骼动作识别调查和 ANUBIS 基准
abstract: 3D skeleton-based human action recognition has emerged as a powerful alternative to traditional RGB and depth-based approaches, offering robustness to environmental variations, computational efficiency, and enhanced privacy. Despite remarkable progress, current research remains fragmented across diverse input representations and lacks evaluation under scenarios that reflect modern real-world challenges. This paper presents a representation-centric survey of skeleton-based action recognition, systematically categorizing state-of-the-art methods by their input feature types: joint coordinates, bone vectors, motion flows, and extended representations, and analyzing how these choices influence spatial-temporal modeling strategies. Building on the insights from this review, we introduce ANUBIS, a large-scale, challenging skeleton action dataset designed to address critical gaps in existing benchmarks. ANUBIS incorporates multi-view recordings with back-view perspectives, complex multi-person interactions, fine-grained and violent actions, and contemporary social behaviors. We benchmark a diverse set of state-of-the-art models on ANUBIS and conduct an in-depth analysis of how different feature types affect recognition performance across 102 action categories. Our results show strong action-feature dependencies, highlight the limitations of naïve multi-representational fusion, and point toward the need for task-aware, semantically aligned integration strategies. This work offers both a comprehensive foundation and a practical benchmarking resource, aiming to guide the next generation of robust, generalizable skeleton-based action recognition systems for complex real-world scenarios. The dataset website, benchmarking framework, and download link are available at https://yliu1082.github.io/ANUBIS/.
summary: 3D skeleton-based human action recognition has emerged as a powerful alternative to traditional RGB and depth-based approaches, offering robustness to environmental variations, computational efficiency, and enhanced privacy. Despite remarkable progress, current research remains fragmented across diverse input representations and lacks evaluation under scenarios that reflect modern real-world challenges. This paper presents a representation-centric survey of skeleton-based action recognition, systematically categorizing state-of-the-art methods by their input feature types: joint coordinates, bone vectors, motion flows, and extended representations, and analyzing how these choices influence spatial-temporal modeling strategies. Building on the insights from this review, we introduce ANUBIS, a large-scale, challenging skeleton action dataset designed to address critical gaps in existing benchmarks. ANUBIS incorporates multi-view recordings with back-view perspectives, complex multi-person interactions, fine-grained and violent actions, and contemporary social behaviors. We benchmark a diverse set of state-of-the-art models on ANUBIS and conduct an in-depth analysis of how different feature types affect recognition performance across 102 action categories. Our results show strong action-feature dependencies, highlight the limitations of naïve multi-representational fusion, and point toward the need for task-aware, semantically aligned integration strategies. This work offers both a comprehensive foundation and a practical benchmarking resource, aiming to guide the next generation of robust, generalizable skeleton-based action recognition systems for complex real-world scenarios. The dataset website, benchmarking framework, and download link are available at https://yliu1082.github.io/ANUBIS/.
abstract_zh: 基于 3D 骨架的人体动作识别已成为传统 RGB 和基于深度的方法的强大替代方案，提供对环境变化的鲁棒性、计算效率和增强的隐私性。尽管取得了显着的进展，但当前的研究仍然分散在不同的输入表示中，并且缺乏在反映现代现实世界挑战的场景下的评估。本文提出了基于骨架的动作识别的以表示为中心的调查，按输入特征类型（关节坐标、骨骼向量、运动流和扩展表示）对最先进的方法进行系统分类，并分析这些选择如何影响时空建模策略。基于本次审查的见解，我们引入了 ANUBIS，这是一个大规模的、具有挑战性的骨架动作数据集，旨在解决现有基准中的关键差距。 ANUBIS融合了后视视角的多视角记录、复杂的多人互动、细粒度的暴力行为以及当代社会行为。我们在 ANUBIS 上对一组不同的最先进模型进行基准测试，并深入分析不同特征类型如何影响 102 个动作类别的识别性能。我们的结果显示了强烈的动作特征依赖性，突出了朴素的多表示融合的局限性，并指出需要任务感知、语义一致的集成策略。这项工作提供了全面的基础和实用的基准测试资源，旨在指导下一代强大的、可通用的基于骨架的动作识别系统，用于复杂的现实场景。数据集网站、基准测试框架和下载链接可在 https://yliu1082.github.io/ANUBIS/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于骨骼的动作识别方法进行分类综述，并提出包含多视角和复杂交互的ANUBIS数据集以评估模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在骨骼表示形式和真实场景评估方面存在碎片化问题，缺乏对复杂现实挑战的基准测试。
AI.method: 按输入特征类型（关节坐标、骨骼向量等）系统分类方法，构建包含多视角、多人交互及精细动作的ANUBIS数据集并进行模型基准测试。
AI.result: 发现动作与特征类型存在强依赖关系，证明简单多表示融合的局限性，揭示需语义对齐的融合策略。
AI.conclusion: 为构建鲁棒的骨骼动作识别系统提供理论基础和实践基准，推动复杂场景下的通用性研究。

search_text: Representation-Centric Survey of Skeletal Action Recognition and the ANUBIS Benchmark 以表征为中心的骨骼动作识别调查和 ANUBIS 基准 3D skeleton-based human action recognition has emerged as a powerful alternative to traditional RGB and depth-based approaches, offering robustness to environmental variations, computational efficiency, and enhanced privacy. Despite remarkable progress, current research remains fragmented across diverse input representations and lacks evaluation under scenarios that reflect modern real-world challenges. This paper presents a representation-centric survey of skeleton-based action recognition, systematically categorizing state-of-the-art methods by their input feature types: joint coordinates, bone vectors, motion flows, and extended representations, and analyzing how these choices influence spatial-temporal modeling strategies. Building on the insights from this review, we introduce ANUBIS, a large-scale, challenging skeleton action dataset designed to address critical gaps in existing benchmarks. ANUBIS incorporates multi-view recordings with back-view perspectives, complex multi-person interactions, fine-grained and violent actions, and contemporary social behaviors. We benchmark a diverse set of state-of-the-art models on ANUBIS and conduct an in-depth analysis of how different feature types affect recognition performance across 102 action categories. Our results show strong action-feature dependencies, highlight the limitations of naïve multi-representational fusion, and point toward the need for task-aware, semantically aligned integration strategies. This work offers both a comprehensive foundation and a practical benchmarking resource, aiming to guide the next generation of robust, generalizable skeleton-based action recognition systems for complex real-world scenarios. The dataset website, benchmarking framework, and download link are available at https://yliu1082.github.io/ANUBIS/. 基于 3D 骨架的人体动作识别已成为传统 RGB 和基于深度的方法的强大替代方案，提供对环境变化的鲁棒性、计算效率和增强的隐私性。尽管取得了显着的进展，但当前的研究仍然分散在不同的输入表示中，并且缺乏在反映现代现实世界挑战的场景下的评估。本文提出了基于骨架的动作识别的以表示为中心的调查，按输入特征类型（关节坐标、骨骼向量、运动流和扩展表示）对最先进的方法进行系统分类，并分析这些选择如何影响时空建模策略。基于本次审查的见解，我们引入了 ANUBIS，这是一个大规模的、具有挑战性的骨架动作数据集，旨在解决现有基准中的关键差距。 ANUBIS融合了后视视角的多视角记录、复杂的多人互动、细粒度的暴力行为以及当代社会行为。我们在 ANUBIS 上对一组不同的最先进模型进行基准测试，并深入分析不同特征类型如何影响 102 个动作类别的识别性能。我们的结果显示了强烈的动作特征依赖性，突出了朴素的多表示融合的局限性，并指出需要任务感知、语义一致的集成策略。这项工作提供了全面的基础和实用的基准测试资源，旨在指导下一代强大的、可通用的基于骨架的动作识别系统，用于复杂的现实场景。数据集网站、基准测试框架和下载链接可在 https://yliu1082.github.io/ANUBIS/ 获取。 本文对基于骨骼的动作识别方法进行分类综述，并提出包含多视角和复杂交互的ANUBIS数据集以评估模型性能。 Yang Liu,Jiyao Yang,Madhawa Perera,Pan Ji,Dongwoo Kim,Min Xu,Tianyang Wang,Saeed Anwar,Tom Gedeon,Lei Wang,Zhenyue Qin cs.CV

authors_text: Xian Wu,Chen Wang,Hongbo Fu,Ariel Shamir,Song-Hai Zhang,Shi-Min Hu
title: DeepPortraitDrawing: Generating Human Body Images from Freehand Sketches
title_zh: DeepPortraitDrawing：从手绘草图生成人体图像
abstract: Researchers have explored various ways to generate realistic images from freehand sketches, e.g., for objects and human faces. However, how to generate realistic human body images from sketches is still a challenging problem. It is, first because of the sensitivity to human shapes, second because of the complexity of human images caused by body shape and pose changes, and third because of the domain gap between realistic images and freehand sketches. In this work, we present DeepPortraitDrawing, a deep generative framework for converting roughly drawn sketches to realistic human body images. To encode complicated body shapes under various poses, we take a local-to-global approach. Locally, we employ semantic part auto-encoders to construct part-level shape spaces, which are useful for refining the geometry of an input pre-segmented hand-drawn sketch. Globally, we employ a cascaded spatial transformer network to refine the structure of body parts by adjusting their spatial locations and relative proportions. Finally, we use a global synthesis network for the sketch-to-image translation task, and a face refinement network to enhance facial details. Extensive experiments have shown that given roughly sketched human portraits, our method produces more realistic images than the state-of-the-art sketch-to-image synthesis techniques.
summary: Researchers have explored various ways to generate realistic images from freehand sketches, e.g., for objects and human faces. However, how to generate realistic human body images from sketches is still a challenging problem. It is, first because of the sensitivity to human shapes, second because of the complexity of human images caused by body shape and pose changes, and third because of the domain gap between realistic images and freehand sketches. In this work, we present DeepPortraitDrawing, a deep generative framework for converting roughly drawn sketches to realistic human body images. To encode complicated body shapes under various poses, we take a local-to-global approach. Locally, we employ semantic part auto-encoders to construct part-level shape spaces, which are useful for refining the geometry of an input pre-segmented hand-drawn sketch. Globally, we employ a cascaded spatial transformer network to refine the structure of body parts by adjusting their spatial locations and relative proportions. Finally, we use a global synthesis network for the sketch-to-image translation task, and a face refinement network to enhance facial details. Extensive experiments have shown that given roughly sketched human portraits, our method produces more realistic images than the state-of-the-art sketch-to-image synthesis techniques.
abstract_zh: 研究人员探索了多种方法来从徒手草图生成逼真的图像，例如物体和人脸。然而，如何从草图生成逼真的人体图像仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。一是因为对人体形状的敏感性，二是因为体形和姿势变化导致人体图像的复杂性，三是因为写实图像和写意草图之间的领域差距。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DeepPortraitDrawing，一个深度生成框架，用于将粗略绘制的草图转换为真实的人体图像。为了对各种姿势下的复杂身体形状进行编码，我们采用局部到全局的方法。在本地，我们采用语义零件自动编码器来构造零件级形状空间，这对于细化输入预分割手绘草图的几何形状非常有用。在全球范围内，我们采用级联空间变换器网络通过调整身体部位的空间位置和相对比例来细化身体部位的结构。最后，我们使用全局合成网络来完成草图到图像的转换任务，并使用面部细化网络来增强面部细节。大量的实验表明，给定粗略的人物肖像草图，我们的方法比最先进的草图到图像合成技术产生更真实的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepPortraitDrawing框架，旨在从自由手绘草图生成逼真的人体图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成人体图像时面临形状敏感性、姿态复杂性及草图与真实图像域差距等挑战，需开发更有效的生成框架。
AI.method: 采用局部到全局策略：局部使用语义部分自编码器构建形状空间，全局利用级联空间变换网络调整结构比例，结合全局合成网络与面部细化网络完成生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在粗糙草图输入下生成的图像质量优于现有最先进的草图到图像合成技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部细节优化与全局结构调整相结合，DeepPortraitDrawing有效解决了人体图像生成中的关键难题。

title: Dual Branch Neural Network for Sea Fog Detection in Geostationary Ocean Color Imager
title_zh: 用于对地静止海洋彩色成像仪海雾检测的双分支神经网络
abstract: Sea fog significantly threatens the safety of maritime activities. This paper develops a sea fog dataset (SFDD) and a dual branch sea fog detection network (DB-SFNet). We investigate all the observed sea fog events in the Yellow Sea and the Bohai Sea (118.1°E-128.1°E, 29.5°N-43.8°N) from 2010 to 2020, and collect the sea fog images for each event from the Geostationary Ocean Color Imager (GOCI) to comprise the dataset SFDD. The location of the sea fog in each image in SFDD is accurately marked. The proposed dataset is characterized by a long-time span, large number of samples, and accurate labeling, that can substantially improve the robustness of various sea fog detection models. Furthermore, this paper proposes a dual branch sea fog detection network to achieve accurate and holistic sea fog detection. The poporsed DB-SFNet is composed of a knowledge extraction module and a dual branch optional encoding decoding module. The two modules jointly extracts discriminative features from both visual and statistical domain. Experiments show promising sea fog detection results with an F1-score of 0.77 and a critical success index of 0.63. Compared with existing advanced deep learning networks, DB-SFNet is superior in detection performance and stability, particularly in the mixed cloud and fog areas.
summary: Sea fog significantly threatens the safety of maritime activities. This paper develops a sea fog dataset (SFDD) and a dual branch sea fog detection network (DB-SFNet). We investigate all the observed sea fog events in the Yellow Sea and the Bohai Sea (118.1°E-128.1°E, 29.5°N-43.8°N) from 2010 to 2020, and collect the sea fog images for each event from the Geostationary Ocean Color Imager (GOCI) to comprise the dataset SFDD. The location of the sea fog in each image in SFDD is accurately marked. The proposed dataset is characterized by a long-time span, large number of samples, and accurate labeling, that can substantially improve the robustness of various sea fog detection models. Furthermore, this paper proposes a dual branch sea fog detection network to achieve accurate and holistic sea fog detection. The poporsed DB-SFNet is composed of a knowledge extraction module and a dual branch optional encoding decoding module. The two modules jointly extracts discriminative features from both visual and statistical domain. Experiments show promising sea fog detection results with an F1-score of 0.77 and a critical success index of 0.63. Compared with existing advanced deep learning networks, DB-SFNet is superior in detection performance and stability, particularly in the mixed cloud and fog areas.
abstract_zh: 海雾严重威胁海上活动的安全。本文开发了海雾数据集（SFDD）和双分支海雾检测网络（DB-SFNet）。我们调查了2010年至2020年黄海和渤海（118.1°E-128.1°E，29.5°N-43.8°N）观测到的所有海雾事件，并从地球静止海洋颜色成像仪（GOCI）收集每个事件的海雾图像，组成数据集SFDD。 SFDD中每幅图像中海雾的位置都被准确标记。该数据集具有时间跨度长、样本量大、标注准确等特点，可以大幅提高各种海雾检测模型的鲁棒性。此外，本文提出了一种双分支海雾检测网络，以实现准确、整体的海雾检测。流行的DB-SFNet由知识提取模块和双分支可选编码解码模块组成。这两个模块联合从视觉和统计领域提取判别特征。实验显示出良好的海雾检测结果，F1 分数为 0.77，关键成功指数为 0.63。与现有的先进深度学习网络相比，DB-SFNet在检测性能和稳定性方面具有优越性，特别是在混合云雾区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双分支神经网络（DB-SFNet）及对应数据集（SFDD），用于提升静止海洋色彩成像仪（GOCI）观测的海雾检测性能。
AI.motivation: 海雾对海上活动安全构成重大威胁，现有检测模型在复杂云雾混合区域存在性能不足，需构建高质量数据集与更鲁棒的检测算法。
AI.method: 基于2010-2020年黄海与渤海GOCI影像构建长时序标注数据集SFDD，设计包含知识提取模块与双分支编码解码结构的DB-SFNet，融合视觉与统计特征域信息。
AI.result: 在混合云雾区域检测中取得F1-score 0.77、临界成功指数0.63的指标，较先进深度学习模型在检测精度与稳定性方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SFDD数据集与DB-SFNet算法有效解决了复杂气象条件下的海雾检测难题，为海上交通安全提供了更可靠的遥感监测技术支撑。

search_text: Dual Branch Neural Network for Sea Fog Detection in Geostationary Ocean Color Imager 用于对地静止海洋彩色成像仪海雾检测的双分支神经网络 Sea fog significantly threatens the safety of maritime activities. This paper develops a sea fog dataset (SFDD) and a dual branch sea fog detection network (DB-SFNet). We investigate all the observed sea fog events in the Yellow Sea and the Bohai Sea (118.1°E-128.1°E, 29.5°N-43.8°N) from 2010 to 2020, and collect the sea fog images for each event from the Geostationary Ocean Color Imager (GOCI) to comprise the dataset SFDD. The location of the sea fog in each image in SFDD is accurately marked. The proposed dataset is characterized by a long-time span, large number of samples, and accurate labeling, that can substantially improve the robustness of various sea fog detection models. Furthermore, this paper proposes a dual branch sea fog detection network to achieve accurate and holistic sea fog detection. The poporsed DB-SFNet is composed of a knowledge extraction module and a dual branch optional encoding decoding module. The two modules jointly extracts discriminative features from both visual and statistical domain. Experiments show promising sea fog detection results with an F1-score of 0.77 and a critical success index of 0.63. Compared with existing advanced deep learning networks, DB-SFNet is superior in detection performance and stability, particularly in the mixed cloud and fog areas. 海雾严重威胁海上活动的安全。本文开发了海雾数据集（SFDD）和双分支海雾检测网络（DB-SFNet）。我们调查了2010年至2020年黄海和渤海（118.1°E-128.1°E，29.5°N-43.8°N）观测到的所有海雾事件，并从地球静止海洋颜色成像仪（GOCI）收集每个事件的海雾图像，组成数据集SFDD。 SFDD中每幅图像中海雾的位置都被准确标记。该数据集具有时间跨度长、样本量大、标注准确等特点，可以大幅提高各种海雾检测模型的鲁棒性。此外，本文提出了一种双分支海雾检测网络，以实现准确、整体的海雾检测。流行的DB-SFNet由知识提取模块和双分支可选编码解码模块组成。这两个模块联合从视觉和统计领域提取判别特征。实验显示出良好的海雾检测结果，F1 分数为 0.77，关键成功指数为 0.63。与现有的先进深度学习网络相比，DB-SFNet在检测性能和稳定性方面具有优越性，特别是在混合云雾区域。 本文提出一种双分支神经网络（DB-SFNet）及对应数据集（SFDD），用于提升静止海洋色彩成像仪（GOCI）观测的海雾检测性能。 Yuan Zhou,Keran Chen,Xiaofeng Li cs.CV

title: Mobile-URSONet: an Embeddable Neural Network for Onboard Spacecraft Pose Estimation
title_zh: Mobile-URSONet：用于星载航天器姿态估计的嵌入式神经网络
abstract: Spacecraft pose estimation is an essential computer vision application that can improve the autonomy of in-orbit operations. An ESA/Stanford competition brought out solutions that seem hardly compatible with the constraints imposed on spacecraft onboard computers. URSONet is among the best in the competition for its generalization capabilities but at the cost of a tremendous number of parameters and high computational complexity. In this paper, we propose Mobile-URSONet: a spacecraft pose estimation convolutional neural network with 178 times fewer parameters while degrading accuracy by no more than four times compared to URSONet.
summary: Spacecraft pose estimation is an essential computer vision application that can improve the autonomy of in-orbit operations. An ESA/Stanford competition brought out solutions that seem hardly compatible with the constraints imposed on spacecraft onboard computers. URSONet is among the best in the competition for its generalization capabilities but at the cost of a tremendous number of parameters and high computational complexity. In this paper, we propose Mobile-URSONet: a spacecraft pose estimation convolutional neural network with 178 times fewer parameters while degrading accuracy by no more than four times compared to URSONet.
abstract_zh: 航天器位姿估计是一种重要的计算机视觉应用，可以提高在轨操作的自主性。欧空局/斯坦福大学竞赛提出的解决方案似乎与航天器机载计算机所受到的限制几乎不兼容。 URSONet 因其泛化能力而在竞争中名列前茅，但代价是参数数量巨大且计算复杂度较高。在本文中，我们提出了 Mobile-URSONet：一种航天器姿态估计卷积神经网络，与 URSONet 相比，参数减少了 178 倍，但精度降低不超过四倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Mobile-URSONet的轻量级卷积神经网络，用于航天器在轨姿态估计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有最优方案URSONet参数量大且计算复杂度高，难以满足航天器 onboard 计算机的资源约束。
AI.method: 设计参数量仅为URSONet的1/178的Mobile-URSONet网络结构，在保持较高泛化能力的同时降低计算需求。
AI.result: 相比URSONet实现参数量缩减178倍，精度损失不超过4倍的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: Mobile-URSONet在保持姿态估计性能的前提下显著降低计算开销，适合航天器嵌入式部署。

title: Estimation of Standard Auction Models
title_zh: 标准拍卖模型的估算
abstract: We provide efficient estimation methods for first- and second-price auctions under independent (asymmetric) private values and partial observability. Given a finite set of observations, each comprising the identity of the winner and the price they paid in a sequence of identical auctions, we provide algorithms for non-parametrically estimating the bid distribution of each bidder, as well as their value distributions under equilibrium assumptions. We provide finite-sample estimation bounds which are uniform in that their error rates do not depend on the bid/value distributions being estimated. Our estimation guarantees advance a body of work in Econometrics wherein only identification results have been obtained, unless the setting is symmetric, parametric, or all bids are observable. Our guarantees also provide computationally and statistically effective alternatives to classical techniques from reliability theory. Finally, our results are immediately applicable to Dutch and English auctions.
summary: We provide efficient estimation methods for first- and second-price auctions under independent (asymmetric) private values and partial observability. Given a finite set of observations, each comprising the identity of the winner and the price they paid in a sequence of identical auctions, we provide algorithms for non-parametrically estimating the bid distribution of each bidder, as well as their value distributions under equilibrium assumptions. We provide finite-sample estimation bounds which are uniform in that their error rates do not depend on the bid/value distributions being estimated. Our estimation guarantees advance a body of work in Econometrics wherein only identification results have been obtained, unless the setting is symmetric, parametric, or all bids are observable. Our guarantees also provide computationally and statistically effective alternatives to classical techniques from reliability theory. Finally, our results are immediately applicable to Dutch and English auctions.
abstract_zh: 我们为独立（不对称）私人价值和部分可观察性下的第一和第二价格拍卖提供有效的估计方法。给定一组有限的观察值，每个观察值都包含获胜者的身份以及他们在一系列相同拍卖中支付的价格，我们提供用于非参数估计每个投标人的出价分布以及均衡假设下的价值分布的算法。我们提供统一的有限样本估计范围，因为它们的错误率不依赖于所估计的出价/价值分布。我们的估计保证推进计量经济学的工作，其中仅获得识别结果，除非设置是对称的、参数的或所有出价都是可观察的。我们的保证还为可靠性理论中的经典技术提供了计算和统计上有效的替代方案。最后，我们的结果立即适用于荷兰语和英语拍卖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的非参数估计方法，用于在独立私人价值和部分可观测性条件下，估计第一价格和第二价格拍卖中的投标人出价分布及价值分布。
AI.motivation: 传统计量经济学方法在非对称、非参数或部分可观测场景下缺乏有效估计手段，本文旨在填补这一空白并提供更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于均衡假设，设计非参数算法估计投标人分布，并建立与分布无关的有限样本误差界，同时结合可靠性理论方法改进计算效率。
AI.result: 实现了统一的有限样本估计误差界，提供了计算与统计效率更高的替代方法，并可直接应用于荷兰式和英式拍卖。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法突破了对称性、参数化或全观测的限制，为非参数拍卖模型估计提供了理论保证与实用工具，推动了计量经济学相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Rodrigo Mira,Alexandros Haliassos,Stavros Petridis,Björn W. Schuller,Maja Pantic
title: SVTS: Scalable Video-to-Speech Synthesis
title_zh: SVTS：可扩展的视频到语音合成
abstract: Video-to-speech synthesis (also known as lip-to-speech) refers to the translation of silent lip movements into the corresponding audio. This task has received an increasing amount of attention due to its self-supervised nature (i.e., can be trained without manual labelling) combined with the ever-growing collection of audio-visual data available online. Despite these strong motivations, contemporary video-to-speech works focus mainly on small- to medium-sized corpora with substantial constraints in both vocabulary and setting. In this work, we introduce a scalable video-to-speech framework consisting of two components: a video-to-spectrogram predictor and a pre-trained neural vocoder, which converts the mel-frequency spectrograms into waveform audio. We achieve state-of-the art results for GRID and considerably outperform previous approaches on LRW. More importantly, by focusing on spectrogram prediction using a simple feedforward model, we can efficiently and effectively scale our method to very large and unconstrained datasets: To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to show intelligible results on the challenging LRS3 dataset.
summary: Video-to-speech synthesis (also known as lip-to-speech) refers to the translation of silent lip movements into the corresponding audio. This task has received an increasing amount of attention due to its self-supervised nature (i.e., can be trained without manual labelling) combined with the ever-growing collection of audio-visual data available online. Despite these strong motivations, contemporary video-to-speech works focus mainly on small- to medium-sized corpora with substantial constraints in both vocabulary and setting. In this work, we introduce a scalable video-to-speech framework consisting of two components: a video-to-spectrogram predictor and a pre-trained neural vocoder, which converts the mel-frequency spectrograms into waveform audio. We achieve state-of-the art results for GRID and considerably outperform previous approaches on LRW. More importantly, by focusing on spectrogram prediction using a simple feedforward model, we can efficiently and effectively scale our method to very large and unconstrained datasets: To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to show intelligible results on the challenging LRS3 dataset.
abstract_zh: 视频转语音合成（也称为唇语转语音）是指将无声的嘴唇运动转换为相应的音频。由于其自我监督的性质（即可以在没有手动标记的情况下进行训练）以及不断增长的在线可用视听数据集合，该任务受到了越来越多的关注。尽管有这些强烈的动机，当代视频转语音作品主要关注中小型语料库，在词汇和环境方面都受到很大限制。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个可扩展的视频到语音框架，由两个组件组成：视频到频谱图预测器和预训练的神经声码器，它将梅尔频谱图转换为波形音频。我们在 GRID 上取得了最先进的结果，并且在 LRW 上远远优于以前的方法。更重要的是，通过使用简单的前馈模型专注于频谱图预测，我们可以高效地将我们的方法扩展到非常大且不受约束的数据集：据我们所知，我们是第一个在具有挑战性的 LRS3 数据集上显示可理解结果的人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的视频到语音合成框架SVTS，通过视频预测频谱图并结合预训练声码器生成语音。
AI.motivation: 现有视频到语音合成方法受限于小规模语料库和场景约束，难以处理大规模无约束数据，需提升模型扩展性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 框架包含两部分：基于前馈模型的视频到梅尔频谱预测器，以及预训练神经声码器将频谱转换为波形，通过简单模型设计实现高效扩展。
AI.result: 在GRID数据集达到SOTA，在LRW显著优于现有方法，并首次在LRS3挑战数据集实现可理解语音合成。
AI.conclusion: SVTS通过频谱预测模块设计突破数据规模限制，验证了视频到语音合成方法在大规模无约束场景下的可行性。

title: A Perfect Sampler for Hypergraph Independent Sets
title_zh: 超图独立集的完美采样器
comment: fixed an error in the definition of the witness graphs; added analysis for linear hypergraphs; the bound in Theorem 2 is affected by a 1/k factor
comments: fixed an error in the definition of the witness graphs; added analysis for linear hypergraphs; the bound in Theorem 2 is affected by a 1/k factor
abstract: The problem of uniformly sampling hypergraph independent sets is revisited. We design an efficient perfect sampler for the problem under a condition similar to that of the asymmetric Lovász Local Lemma. When applied to $d$-regular $k$-uniform hypergraphs on $n$ vertices, our sampler terminates in expected $O(n\log n)$ time provided $d\le c\cdot 2^{k/2}/k$ for some constant $c>0$. If in addition the hypergraph is linear, the condition can be weaken to $d\le c\cdot 2^{k}/k^2$ for some constant $c>0$, matching the rapid mixing condition for Glauber dynamics in Hermon, Sly and Zhang [HSZ19].
summary: The problem of uniformly sampling hypergraph independent sets is revisited. We design an efficient perfect sampler for the problem under a condition similar to that of the asymmetric Lovász Local Lemma. When applied to $d$-regular $k$-uniform hypergraphs on $n$ vertices, our sampler terminates in expected $O(n\log n)$ time provided $d\le c\cdot 2^{k/2}/k$ for some constant $c>0$. If in addition the hypergraph is linear, the condition can be weaken to $d\le c\cdot 2^{k}/k^2$ for some constant $c>0$, matching the rapid mixing condition for Glauber dynamics in Hermon, Sly and Zhang [HSZ19].
abstract_zh: 重新审视超图独立集的均匀采样问题。我们在类似于非对称 Lovász 局部引理的条件下为该问题设计了一个高效的完美采样器。当应用于 $n$ 顶点上的 $d$-正则 $k$-均匀超图时，我们的采样器在 $d\le c\cdot 2^{k/2}/k$ 对于某些常量 $c>0$ 的情况下，在预期的 $O(n\log n)$ 时间内终止。另外，如果超图是线性的，则对于某个常数 $c>0$，条件可以弱化为 $d\le c\cdot 2^{k}/k^2$，匹配 Hermon、Sly 和Zhang [HSZ19] 中的 Glauber 动力学的快速混合条件。

AI.tldr: 设计了一个针对超图独立集的完美均匀采样器
AI.motivation: 解决超图独立集的均匀采样问题，尤其是在稀疏超图上实现高效完美采样
AI.method: 基于类似于非对称Lovász局部引理的条件，设计了一个高效完美采样器
AI.result: 对于d-正则k-均匀超图，当d ≤ c·2^{k/2}/k时，采样器在期望O(n log n)时间内终止；对于线性超图，条件可放宽至d ≤ c·2^k/k^2
AI.conclusion: 所提出的采样器在更宽松的条件下实现了高效完美采样，匹配了Glauber动力学的快速混合条件

title: Self-Supervised Learning for Invariant Representations from Multi-Spectral and SAR Images
title_zh: 多光谱和 SAR 图像不变表示的自监督学习
abstract: Self-Supervised learning (SSL) has become the new state-of-art in several domain classification and segmentation tasks. Of these, one popular category in SSL is distillation networks such as BYOL. This work proposes RSDnet, which applies the distillation network (BYOL) in the remote sensing (RS) domain where data is non-trivially different from natural RGB images. Since Multi-spectral (MS) and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) sensors provide varied spectral and spatial resolution information, we utilised them as an implicit augmentation to learn invariant feature embeddings. In order to learn RS based invariant features with SSL, we trained RSDnet in two ways, i.e., single channel feature learning and three channel feature learning. This work explores the usefulness of single channel feature learning from random MS and SAR bands compared to the common notion of using three or more bands. In our linear evaluation, these single channel features reached a 0.92 F1 score on the EuroSAT classification task and 59.6 mIoU on the DFC segmentation task for certain single bands. We also compared our results with ImageNet weights and showed that the RS based SSL model outperforms the supervised ImageNet based model. We further explored the usefulness of multi-modal data compared to single modality data, and it is shown that utilising MS and SAR data learn better invariant representations than utilising only MS data.
summary: Self-Supervised learning (SSL) has become the new state-of-art in several domain classification and segmentation tasks. Of these, one popular category in SSL is distillation networks such as BYOL. This work proposes RSDnet, which applies the distillation network (BYOL) in the remote sensing (RS) domain where data is non-trivially different from natural RGB images. Since Multi-spectral (MS) and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) sensors provide varied spectral and spatial resolution information, we utilised them as an implicit augmentation to learn invariant feature embeddings. In order to learn RS based invariant features with SSL, we trained RSDnet in two ways, i.e., single channel feature learning and three channel feature learning. This work explores the usefulness of single channel feature learning from random MS and SAR bands compared to the common notion of using three or more bands. In our linear evaluation, these single channel features reached a 0.92 F1 score on the EuroSAT classification task and 59.6 mIoU on the DFC segmentation task for certain single bands. We also compared our results with ImageNet weights and showed that the RS based SSL model outperforms the supervised ImageNet based model. We further explored the usefulness of multi-modal data compared to single modality data, and it is shown that utilising MS and SAR data learn better invariant representations than utilising only MS data.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 已成为多个领域分类和分割任务的最新技术。其中，SSL 中的一个流行类别是蒸馏网络，例如 BYOL。这项工作提出了 RSDnet，它将蒸馏网络 (BYOL) 应用在遥感 (RS) 域中，其中数据与自然 RGB 图像有很大不同。由于多光谱（MS）和合成孔径雷达（SAR）传感器提供不同的光谱和空间分辨率信息，我们利用它们作为隐式增强来学习不变特征嵌入。为了使用 SSL 学习基于 RS 的不变特征，我们以两种方式训练 RSDnet，即单通道特征学习和三通道特征学习。这项工作探讨了与使用三个或更多频段的常见概念相比，从随机 MS 和 SAR 频段进行单通道特征学习的有用性。在我们的线性评估中，这些单通道特征在 EuroSAT 分类任务上达到了 0.92 F1 分数，在某些单频段的 DFC 分割任务上达到了 59.6 mIoU。我们还将结果与 ImageNet 权重进行了比较，结果表明基于 RS 的 SSL 模型优于基于 ImageNet 的监督模型。我们进一步探讨了多模态数据与单模态数据相比的有用性，结果表明，利用 MS 和 SAR 数据比仅利用 MS 数据能够学习更好的不变表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RSDnet方法，利用多光谱和SAR图像进行自监督学习，以学习遥感领域的不变特征表示。
AI.motivation: 遥感数据与自然RGB图像存在显著差异，传统多波段特征学习方法复杂且效果有限，需探索单通道特征学习的有效性及多模态数据的优势。
AI.method: 基于BYOL框架设计RSDnet，通过单通道和三通道特征学习两种方式训练模型，利用多光谱和SAR图像作为隐式增强，对比单模态与多模态数据的表现。
AI.result: 单通道特征在EuroSAT分类任务中达到0.92 F1分数，在DFC分割任务中达到59.6 mIoU，优于ImageNet预训练模型；多模态数据比单模态数据学习到更优的不变表示。
AI.conclusion: 单通道自监督学习在遥感领域有效，结合多光谱与SAR多模态数据可进一步提升不变特征表示能力，优于传统方法与ImageNet模型。

tldr: 本文提出RSDnet方法，利用多光谱和SAR图像进行自监督学习，以学习遥感领域的不变特征表示。
motivation: 遥感数据与自然RGB图像存在显著差异，传统多波段特征学习方法复杂且效果有限，需探索单通道特征学习的有效性及多模态数据的优势。
method: 基于BYOL框架设计RSDnet，通过单通道和三通道特征学习两种方式训练模型，利用多光谱和SAR图像作为隐式增强，对比单模态与多模态数据的表现。
result: 单通道特征在EuroSAT分类任务中达到0.92 F1分数，在DFC分割任务中达到59.6 mIoU，优于ImageNet预训练模型；多模态数据比单模态数据学习到更优的不变表示。
conclusion: 单通道自监督学习在遥感领域有效，结合多光谱与SAR多模态数据可进一步提升不变特征表示能力，优于传统方法与ImageNet模型。
search_text: Self-Supervised Learning for Invariant Representations from Multi-Spectral and SAR Images 多光谱和 SAR 图像不变表示的自监督学习 Self-Supervised learning (SSL) has become the new state-of-art in several domain classification and segmentation tasks. Of these, one popular category in SSL is distillation networks such as BYOL. This work proposes RSDnet, which applies the distillation network (BYOL) in the remote sensing (RS) domain where data is non-trivially different from natural RGB images. Since Multi-spectral (MS) and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) sensors provide varied spectral and spatial resolution information, we utilised them as an implicit augmentation to learn invariant feature embeddings. In order to learn RS based invariant features with SSL, we trained RSDnet in two ways, i.e., single channel feature learning and three channel feature learning. This work explores the usefulness of single channel feature learning from random MS and SAR bands compared to the common notion of using three or more bands. In our linear evaluation, these single channel features reached a 0.92 F1 score on the EuroSAT classification task and 59.6 mIoU on the DFC segmentation task for certain single bands. We also compared our results with ImageNet weights and showed that the RS based SSL model outperforms the supervised ImageNet based model. We further explored the usefulness of multi-modal data compared to single modality data, and it is shown that utilising MS and SAR data learn better invariant representations than utilising only MS data. 自监督学习 (SSL) 已成为多个领域分类和分割任务的最新技术。其中，SSL 中的一个流行类别是蒸馏网络，例如 BYOL。这项工作提出了 RSDnet，它将蒸馏网络 (BYOL) 应用在遥感 (RS) 域中，其中数据与自然 RGB 图像有很大不同。由于多光谱（MS）和合成孔径雷达（SAR）传感器提供不同的光谱和空间分辨率信息，我们利用它们作为隐式增强来学习不变特征嵌入。为了使用 SSL 学习基于 RS 的不变特征，我们以两种方式训练 RSDnet，即单通道特征学习和三通道特征学习。这项工作探讨了与使用三个或更多频段的常见概念相比，从随机 MS 和 SAR 频段进行单通道特征学习的有用性。在我们的线性评估中，这些单通道特征在 EuroSAT 分类任务上达到了 0.92 F1 分数，在某些单频段的 DFC 分割任务上达到了 59.6 mIoU。我们还将结果与 ImageNet 权重进行了比较，结果表明基于 RS 的 SSL 模型优于基于 ImageNet 的监督模型。我们进一步探讨了多模态数据与单模态数据相比的有用性，结果表明，利用 MS 和 SAR 数据比仅利用 MS 数据能够学习更好的不变表示。 本文提出RSDnet方法，利用多光谱和SAR图像进行自监督学习，以学习遥感领域的不变特征表示。 Pallavi Jain,Bianca Schoen-Phelan,Robert Ross cs.CV

title: Few-Shot Document-Level Relation Extraction
title_zh: 少样本文档级关系提取
abstract: We present FREDo, a few-shot document-level relation extraction (FSDLRE) benchmark. As opposed to existing benchmarks which are built on sentence-level relation extraction corpora, we argue that document-level corpora provide more realism, particularly regarding none-of-the-above (NOTA) distributions. Therefore, we propose a set of FSDLRE tasks and construct a benchmark based on two existing supervised learning data sets, DocRED and sciERC. We adapt the state-of-the-art sentence-level method MNAV to the document-level and develop it further for improved domain adaptation. We find FSDLRE to be a challenging setting with interesting new characteristics such as the ability to sample NOTA instances from the support set. The data, code, and trained models are available online (https://github.com/nicpopovic/FREDo).
summary: We present FREDo, a few-shot document-level relation extraction (FSDLRE) benchmark. As opposed to existing benchmarks which are built on sentence-level relation extraction corpora, we argue that document-level corpora provide more realism, particularly regarding none-of-the-above (NOTA) distributions. Therefore, we propose a set of FSDLRE tasks and construct a benchmark based on two existing supervised learning data sets, DocRED and sciERC. We adapt the state-of-the-art sentence-level method MNAV to the document-level and develop it further for improved domain adaptation. We find FSDLRE to be a challenging setting with interesting new characteristics such as the ability to sample NOTA instances from the support set. The data, code, and trained models are available online (https://github.com/nicpopovic/FREDo).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 FREDo，一个几次文档级关系提取 (FSDLRE) 基准测试。与建立在句子级关系提取语料库上的现有基准相反，我们认为文档级语料库提供了更多的真实性，特别是对于非上述（NOTA）分布。因此，我们提出了一组 FSDLRE 任务，并基于两个现有的监督学习数据集 DocRED 和 sciERC 构建了基准。我们将最先进的句子级方法 MNAV 应用于文档级，并进一步开发它以改进域适应。我们发现 FSDLRE 是一个具有挑战性的设置，具有有趣的新特性，例如从支持集中采样 NOTA 实例的能力。数据、代码和训练模型可在线获取 (https://github.com/nicpopovic/FREDo)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FREDo基准，用于解决少样本文档级关系抽取任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基准基于句子级关系抽取数据，无法真实反映文档级场景中的'非上述任何一项'（NOTA）分布特点。
AI.method: 基于DocRED和sciERC数据集构建基准，改进句子级方法MNAV以适应文档级任务并增强领域适应能力。
AI.result: 验证了文档级少样本关系抽取的挑战性，发现支持集中可采样NOTA实例等新特性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了首个文档级少样本关系抽取基准，并提供了相应数据、代码和预训练模型。

authors_text: Fazal Hameed,Asif Ali Khan,Sebastien Ollivier,Alex K. Jones,Jeronimo Castrillon
title: DNA Pre-alignment Filter using Processing Near Racetrack Memory
title_zh: 使用处理近赛道内存的 DNA 预对齐过滤器
abstract: Recent DNA pre-alignment filter designs employ DRAM for storing the reference genome and its associated meta-data. However, DRAM incurs increasingly high energy consumption background and refresh energy as devices scale. To overcome this problem, this paper explores a design with racetrack memory (RTM)--an emerging non-volatile memory that promises higher storage density, faster access latency, and lower energy consumption. Multi-bit storage cells in RTM are inherently sequential and thus require data placement strategies to mitigate the performance and energy impacts of shifting during data accesses. We propose a near-memory pre-alignment filter with a novel data mapping and several shift reduction strategies designed explicitly for RTM. On a set of four input genomes from the 1000 Genome Project, our approach improves performance and energy efficiency by 68% and 52%, respectively, compared to the state of the art proposed DRAM-based architecture.
summary: Recent DNA pre-alignment filter designs employ DRAM for storing the reference genome and its associated meta-data. However, DRAM incurs increasingly high energy consumption background and refresh energy as devices scale. To overcome this problem, this paper explores a design with racetrack memory (RTM)--an emerging non-volatile memory that promises higher storage density, faster access latency, and lower energy consumption. Multi-bit storage cells in RTM are inherently sequential and thus require data placement strategies to mitigate the performance and energy impacts of shifting during data accesses. We propose a near-memory pre-alignment filter with a novel data mapping and several shift reduction strategies designed explicitly for RTM. On a set of four input genomes from the 1000 Genome Project, our approach improves performance and energy efficiency by 68% and 52%, respectively, compared to the state of the art proposed DRAM-based architecture.
abstract_zh: 最近的 DNA 预对准过滤器设计采用 DRAM 来存储参考基因组及其相关元数据。然而，随着设备规模的扩大，DRAM 会产生越来越高的能耗背景和刷新能量。为了克服这个问题，本文探索了一种赛道存储器（RTM）的设计，这是一种新兴的非易失性存储器，可以实现更高的存储密度、更快的访问延迟和更低的能耗。 RTM 中的多位存储单元本质上是顺序的，因此需要数据放置策略来减轻数据访问期间移位对性能和能耗的影响。我们提出了一种近内存预对齐滤波器，具有新颖的数据映射和几种专为 RTM 设计的移位减少策略。在来自 1000 基因组计划的一组四个输入基因组上，与最先进的基于 DRAM 的架构相比，我们的方法将性能和能源效率分别提高了 68% 和 52%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于赛道存储器（RTM）的DNA预比对过滤器设计，以替代传统DRAM方案，提升性能和能效。
AI.motivation: DRAM在存储参考基因组时面临高能耗和刷新开销问题，而RTM作为新型非易失性存储器具有高密度、低能耗和低延迟优势，需针对其特性优化数据布局以减少移位操作的影响。
AI.method: 设计了面向RTM的近存预比对过滤器，提出新型数据映射策略及多级移位减少技术，通过优化数据布局降低RTM的顺序访问开销。
AI.result: 在1000 Genome Project的四个基因组数据集上，相较DRAM方案性能提升68%，能效提升52%。
AI.conclusion: RTM可作为DRAM的可行替代方案，所提方法有效解决了其顺序存储特性带来的性能瓶颈，为基因组数据分析提供了高效能硬件支持。

Jones,Jeronimo Castrillon cs.ET,cs.AR

title: Who Will Support My Project? Interactive Search of Potential Crowdfunding Investors Through InSearch
title_zh: 谁将支持我的项目？通过InSearch互动搜索潜在众筹投资者
abstract: Crowdfunding provides project founders with a convenient way to reach online investors. However, it is challenging for founders to find the most potential investors and successfully raise money for their projects on crowdfunding platforms. A few machine learning based methods have been proposed to recommend investors' interest in a specific crowdfunding project, but they fail to provide project founders with explanations in detail for these recommendations, thereby leading to an erosion of trust in predicted investors. To help crowdfunding founders find truly interested investors, we conducted semi-structured interviews with four crowdfunding experts and presents inSearch, a visual analytic system. inSearch allows founders to search for investors interactively on crowdfunding platforms. It supports an effective overview of potential investors by leveraging a Graph Neural Network to model investor preferences. Besides, it enables interactive exploration and comparison of the temporal evolution of different investors' investment details.
summary: Crowdfunding provides project founders with a convenient way to reach online investors. However, it is challenging for founders to find the most potential investors and successfully raise money for their projects on crowdfunding platforms. A few machine learning based methods have been proposed to recommend investors' interest in a specific crowdfunding project, but they fail to provide project founders with explanations in detail for these recommendations, thereby leading to an erosion of trust in predicted investors. To help crowdfunding founders find truly interested investors, we conducted semi-structured interviews with four crowdfunding experts and presents inSearch, a visual analytic system. inSearch allows founders to search for investors interactively on crowdfunding platforms. It supports an effective overview of potential investors by leveraging a Graph Neural Network to model investor preferences. Besides, it enables interactive exploration and comparison of the temporal evolution of different investors' investment details.
abstract_zh: 众筹为项目创始人提供了接触在线投资者的便捷方式。然而，对于创始人来说，找到最有潜力的投资者并在众筹平台上成功为其项目筹集资金具有挑战性。人们提出了一些基于机器学习的方法来推荐投资者对特定众筹项目的兴趣，但它们未能为项目创始人提供这些建议的详细解释，从而导致对预测投资者的信任受到侵蚀。为了帮助众筹创始人​​找到真正感兴趣的投资者，我们对四位众筹专家进行了半结构化访谈，并展示了 inSearch，一个视觉分析系统。 inSearch允许创始人在众筹平台上交互式地寻找投资者。它通过利用图神经网络对投资者偏好进行建模，支持对潜在投资者的有效概述。此外，它还可以交互式探索和比较不同投资者投资细节的时间演变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出inSearch系统，通过图神经网络和交互式可视化帮助众筹项目创始人识别潜在投资者。
AI.motivation: 现有众筹推荐方法缺乏透明性，导致创始人对推荐投资者的信任度不足。
AI.method: 基于半结构化访谈设计可视化分析系统，结合图神经网络建模投资者偏好并支持交互式探索。
AI.result: 系统能有效展示投资者兴趣演变并支持动态比较，提升众筹项目匹配效率。
AI.conclusion: inSearch通过可解释的交互式分析增强了众筹投资者匹配的可信度与实用性。

search_text: Who Will Support My Project? Interactive Search of Potential Crowdfunding Investors Through InSearch 谁将支持我的项目？通过InSearch互动搜索潜在众筹投资者 Crowdfunding provides project founders with a convenient way to reach online investors. However, it is challenging for founders to find the most potential investors and successfully raise money for their projects on crowdfunding platforms. A few machine learning based methods have been proposed to recommend investors' interest in a specific crowdfunding project, but they fail to provide project founders with explanations in detail for these recommendations, thereby leading to an erosion of trust in predicted investors. To help crowdfunding founders find truly interested investors, we conducted semi-structured interviews with four crowdfunding experts and presents inSearch, a visual analytic system. inSearch allows founders to search for investors interactively on crowdfunding platforms. It supports an effective overview of potential investors by leveraging a Graph Neural Network to model investor preferences. Besides, it enables interactive exploration and comparison of the temporal evolution of different investors' investment details. 众筹为项目创始人提供了接触在线投资者的便捷方式。然而，对于创始人来说，找到最有潜力的投资者并在众筹平台上成功为其项目筹集资金具有挑战性。人们提出了一些基于机器学习的方法来推荐投资者对特定众筹项目的兴趣，但它们未能为项目创始人提供这些建议的详细解释，从而导致对预测投资者的信任受到侵蚀。为了帮助众筹创始人​​找到真正感兴趣的投资者，我们对四位众筹专家进行了半结构化访谈，并展示了 inSearch，一个视觉分析系统。 inSearch允许创始人在众筹平台上交互式地寻找投资者。它通过利用图神经网络对投资者偏好进行建模，支持对潜在投资者的有效概述。此外，它还可以交互式探索和比较不同投资者投资细节的时间演变。 本文提出inSearch系统，通过图神经网络和交互式可视化帮助众筹项目创始人识别潜在投资者。 Songheng Zhang,Yong Wang,Haotian Li,Wanyu Zhang cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Ngoc Long Nguyen,Jérémy Anger,Axel Davy,Pablo Arias,Gabriele Facciolo
title: Self-Supervised Super-Resolution for Multi-Exposure Push-Frame Satellites
title_zh: 多次曝光推架卫星的自监督超分辨率
abstract: Modern Earth observation satellites capture multi-exposure bursts of push-frame images that can be super-resolved via computational means. In this work, we propose a super-resolution method for such multi-exposure sequences, a problem that has received very little attention in the literature. The proposed method can handle the signal-dependent noise in the inputs, process sequences of any length, and be robust to inaccuracies in the exposure times. Furthermore, it can be trained end-to-end with self-supervision, without requiring ground truth high resolution frames, which makes it especially suited to handle real data. Central to our method are three key contributions: i) a base-detail decomposition for handling errors in the exposure times, ii) a noise-level-aware feature encoding for improved fusion of frames with varying signal-to-noise ratio and iii) a permutation invariant fusion strategy by temporal pooling operators. We evaluate the proposed method on synthetic and real data and show that it outperforms by a significant margin existing single-exposure approaches that we adapted to the multi-exposure case.
summary: Modern Earth observation satellites capture multi-exposure bursts of push-frame images that can be super-resolved via computational means. In this work, we propose a super-resolution method for such multi-exposure sequences, a problem that has received very little attention in the literature. The proposed method can handle the signal-dependent noise in the inputs, process sequences of any length, and be robust to inaccuracies in the exposure times. Furthermore, it can be trained end-to-end with self-supervision, without requiring ground truth high resolution frames, which makes it especially suited to handle real data. Central to our method are three key contributions: i) a base-detail decomposition for handling errors in the exposure times, ii) a noise-level-aware feature encoding for improved fusion of frames with varying signal-to-noise ratio and iii) a permutation invariant fusion strategy by temporal pooling operators. We evaluate the proposed method on synthetic and real data and show that it outperforms by a significant margin existing single-exposure approaches that we adapted to the multi-exposure case.
abstract_zh: 现代地球观测卫星捕获多重曝光的推帧图像，这些图像可以通过计算手段进行超分辨率。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对此类多重曝光序列的超分辨率方法，这个问题在文献中很少受到关注。所提出的方法可以处理输入中与信号相关的噪声，处理任何长度的序列，并且对曝光时间的不准确性具有鲁棒性。此外，它可以通过自我监督进行端到端训练，而不需要地面实况高分辨率帧，这使得它特别适合处理真实数据。我们的方法的核心是三个关键贡献：i）用于处理曝光时间中的错误的基本细节分解，ii）用于改进具有不同信噪比的帧融合的噪声水平感知特征编码，以及iii）时间池算子的排列不变融合策略。我们在合成和真实数据上评估了所提出的方法，并表明它明显优于我们适应多重曝光情况的现有单次曝光方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督多曝光推扫式卫星图像超分辨率方法，解决现有研究中对多曝光序列处理不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法多针对单曝光图像，难以处理卫星多曝光推扫序列中的信号依赖噪声、曝光时间误差及无需真实高分辨率标签的现实数据需求。
AI.method: 提出三种核心方法：基于基底-细节分解的曝光误差处理、噪声水平感知的特征编码、以及时序池化操作的排列不变融合策略，并通过自监督端到端训练。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上显著优于适配多曝光场景的单曝光方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效处理多曝光卫星图像的噪声与曝光误差问题，为真实场景下的超分辨率任务提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Xin Wang,Yasheng Wang,Yao Wan,Jiawei Wang,Pingyi Zhou,Li Li,Hao Wu,Jin Liu
title: CODE-MVP: Learning to Represent Source Code from Multiple Views with Contrastive Pre-Training
title_zh: CODE-MVP：通过对比预训练学习从多个视图表示源代码
abstract: Recent years have witnessed increasing interest in code representation learning, which aims to represent the semantics of source code into distributed vectors. Currently, various works have been proposed to represent the complex semantics of source code from different views, including plain text, Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), and several kinds of code graphs (e.g., Control/Data Flow Graph). However, most of them only consider a single view of source code independently, ignoring the correspondences among different views. In this paper, we propose to integrate different views with the natural-language description of source code into a unified framework with Multi-View contrastive Pre-training, and name our model as CODE-MVP. Specifically, we first extract multiple code views using compiler tools, and learn the complementary information among them under a contrastive learning framework. Inspired by the type checking in compilation, we also design a fine-grained type inference objective in the pre-training. Experiments on three downstream tasks over five datasets demonstrate the superiority of CODE-MVP when compared with several state-of-the-art baselines. For example, we achieve 2.4/2.3/1.1 gain in terms of MRR/MAP/Accuracy metrics on natural language code retrieval, code similarity, and code defect detection tasks, respectively.
summary: Recent years have witnessed increasing interest in code representation learning, which aims to represent the semantics of source code into distributed vectors. Currently, various works have been proposed to represent the complex semantics of source code from different views, including plain text, Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), and several kinds of code graphs (e.g., Control/Data Flow Graph). However, most of them only consider a single view of source code independently, ignoring the correspondences among different views. In this paper, we propose to integrate different views with the natural-language description of source code into a unified framework with Multi-View contrastive Pre-training, and name our model as CODE-MVP. Specifically, we first extract multiple code views using compiler tools, and learn the complementary information among them under a contrastive learning framework. Inspired by the type checking in compilation, we also design a fine-grained type inference objective in the pre-training. Experiments on three downstream tasks over five datasets demonstrate the superiority of CODE-MVP when compared with several state-of-the-art baselines. For example, we achieve 2.4/2.3/1.1 gain in terms of MRR/MAP/Accuracy metrics on natural language code retrieval, code similarity, and code defect detection tasks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对代码表示学习的兴趣日益浓厚，其目的是将源代码的语义表示为分布式向量。目前，已经提出了各种工作来从不同的角度表示源代码的复杂语义，包括纯文本、抽象语法树（AST）和几种代码图（例如控制/数据流图）。然而，大多数人只独立考虑源代码的单一视图，忽略了不同视图之间的对应关系。在本文中，我们提出将不同视图与源代码的自然语言描述集成到一个具有多视图对比预训练的统一框架中，并将我们的模型命名为 CODE-MVP。具体来说，我们首先使用编译器工具提取多个代码视图，并在对比学习框架下学习它们之间的互补信息。受编译中类型检查的启发，我们还在预训练中设计了细粒度的类型推断目标。对五个数据集的三个下游任务进行的实验证明了 CODE-MVP 与几个最先进的基线相比的优越性。例如，我们在自然语言代码检索、代码相似性和代码缺陷检测任务的 MRR/MAP/准确性指标方面分别实现了 2.4/2.3/1.1 的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CODE-MVP模型，通过多视角对比预训练学习源代码的分布式语义表示。
AI.motivation: 现有代码表示学习方法通常仅考虑单一视角，忽略了不同视角间的关联性，导致语义表征不全面。
AI.method: 提取代码的文本、AST及控制/数据流图等多视角表示，基于对比学习框架挖掘视角间互补信息，并设计细粒度类型推断目标增强预训练效果。
AI.result: 在自然语言代码检索、代码相似性及缺陷检测三个任务上，相比基线模型分别提升2.4/2.3/1.1的MRR/MAP/准确率指标。
AI.conclusion: CODE-MVP通过整合多视角代码表示与类型推断目标，显著提升了代码语义表征能力，验证了多视角对比学习框架的有效性。
