Inspired by the type checking in compilation, we also design a fine-grained type inference objective in the pre-training. Experiments on three downstream tasks over five datasets demonstrate the superiority of CODE-MVP when compared with several state-of-the-art baselines. For example, we achieve 2.4/2.3/1.1 gain in terms of MRR/MAP/Accuracy metrics on natural language code retrieval, code similarity, and code defect detection tasks, respectively. 近年来，人们对代码表示学习的兴趣日益浓厚，其目的是将源代码的语义表示为分布式向量。目前，已经提出了各种工作来从不同的角度表示源代码的复杂语义，包括纯文本、抽象语法树（AST）和几种代码图（例如控制/数据流图）。然而，大多数人只独立考虑源代码的单一视图，忽略了不同视图之间的对应关系。在本文中，我们提出将不同视图与源代码的自然语言描述集成到一个具有多视图对比预训练的统一框架中，并将我们的模型命名为 CODE-MVP。具体来说，我们首先使用编译器工具提取多个代码视图，并在对比学习框架下学习它们之间的互补信息。受编译中类型检查的启发，我们还在预训练中设计了细粒度的类型推断目标。对五个数据集的三个下游任务进行的实验证明了 CODE-MVP 与几个最先进的基线相比的优越性。例如，我们在自然语言代码检索、代码相似性和代码缺陷检测任务的 MRR/MAP/准确性指标方面分别实现了 2.4/2.3/1.1 的增益。 本文提出CODE-MVP模型，通过多视角对比预训练学习源代码的分布式语义表示。 Xin Wang,Yasheng Wang,Yao Wan,Jiawei Wang,Pingyi Zhou,Li Li,Hao Wu,Jin Liu cs.PL,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: TransRank: Self-supervised Video Representation Learning via Ranking-based Transformation Recognition
title_zh: TransRank：通过基于排序的变换识别进行自监督视频表示学习
abstract: Recognizing transformation types applied to a video clip (RecogTrans) is a long-established paradigm for self-supervised video representation learning, which achieves much inferior performance compared to instance discrimination approaches (InstDisc) in recent works. However, based on a thorough comparison of representative RecogTrans and InstDisc methods, we observe the great potential of RecogTrans on both semantic-related and temporal-related downstream tasks. Based on hard-label classification, existing RecogTrans approaches suffer from noisy supervision signals in pre-training. To mitigate this problem, we developed TransRank, a unified framework for recognizing Transformations in a Ranking formulation. TransRank provides accurate supervision signals by recognizing transformations relatively, consistently outperforming the classification-based formulation. Meanwhile, the unified framework can be instantiated with an arbitrary set of temporal or spatial transformations, demonstrating good generality. With a ranking-based formulation and several empirical practices, we achieve competitive performance on video retrieval and action recognition. Under the same setting, TransRank surpasses the previous state-of-the-art method by 6.4% on UCF101 and 8.3% on HMDB51 for action recognition (Top1 Acc); improves video retrieval on UCF101 by 20.4% (R@1). The promising results validate that RecogTrans is still a worth exploring paradigm for video self-supervised learning. Codes will be released at https://github.com/kennymckormick/TransRank.
summary: Recognizing transformation types applied to a video clip (RecogTrans) is a long-established paradigm for self-supervised video representation learning, which achieves much inferior performance compared to instance discrimination approaches (InstDisc) in recent works. However, based on a thorough comparison of representative RecogTrans and InstDisc methods, we observe the great potential of RecogTrans on both semantic-related and temporal-related downstream tasks. Based on hard-label classification, existing RecogTrans approaches suffer from noisy supervision signals in pre-training. To mitigate this problem, we developed TransRank, a unified framework for recognizing Transformations in a Ranking formulation. TransRank provides accurate supervision signals by recognizing transformations relatively, consistently outperforming the classification-based formulation. Meanwhile, the unified framework can be instantiated with an arbitrary set of temporal or spatial transformations, demonstrating good generality. With a ranking-based formulation and several empirical practices, we achieve competitive performance on video retrieval and action recognition. Under the same setting, TransRank surpasses the previous state-of-the-art method by 6.4% on UCF101 and 8.3% on HMDB51 for action recognition (Top1 Acc); improves video retrieval on UCF101 by 20.4% (R@1). The promising results validate that RecogTrans is still a worth exploring paradigm for video self-supervised learning. Codes will be released at https://github.com/kennymckormick/TransRank.
abstract_zh: 识别应用于视频剪辑的变换类型（RecogTrans）是一种长期建立的自监督视频表示学习范例，与最近的作品中的实例判别方法（InstDisc）相比，其性能要差得多。然而，基于对代表性 RecogTrans 和 InstDisc 方法的彻底比较，我们观察到 RecogTrans 在语义相关和时间相关下游任务上的巨大潜力。基于硬标签分类，现有的 RecogTrans 方法在预训练中受到嘈杂的监督信号的影响。为了缓解这个问题，我们开发了 TransRank，这是一个用于识别排名公式中的变换的统一框架。 TransRank 通过相对地识别变换来提供准确的监督信号，始终优于基于分类的公式。同时，统一框架可以用任意一组时间或空间变换来实例化，表现出良好的通用性。通过基于排名的公式和一些实证实践，我们在视频检索和动作识别方面取得了有竞争力的表现。相同设置下，对于动作识别，TransRank 在 UCF101 上超越了之前的 state-of-the-art 方法 6.4%，在 HMDB51 上超越了 8.3%（Top1 Acc）；将 UCF101 上的视频检索提高了 20.4% (R@1)。这些有希望的结果证明 RecogTrans 仍然是一个值得探索的视频自监督学习范例。代码将在 https://github.com/kennymckormick/TransRank 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransRank框架，通过基于排序的变换识别方法改进自监督视频表征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统RecogTrans方法因硬标签分类导致的噪声监督信号影响性能，而基于排序的相对变换识别能提供更准确的监督信号。
AI.method: 设计统一框架TransRank，通过相对排序识别时空变换，支持任意变换集，并结合经验实践优化模型。
AI.result: 在UCF101动作识别任务上Top1准确率提升6.4%，HMDB51提升8.3%；视频检索任务R@1提升20.4%。
AI.conclusion: RecogTrans范式通过排序机制仍具潜力，TransRank验证了其在自监督视频学习中的有效性。

authors_text: Bill Yuchen Lin,Sida Wang,Xi Victoria Lin,Robin Jia,Lin Xiao,Xiang Ren,Wen-tau Yih
title: On Continual Model Refinement in Out-of-Distribution Data Streams
title_zh: 关于分布外数据流中的持续模型细化
comment: Accepted to ACL 2022; Project website: https://cmr-nlp.github.io/
comments: Accepted to ACL 2022; Project website: https://cmr-nlp.github.io/
abstract: Real-world natural language processing (NLP) models need to be continually updated to fix the prediction errors in out-of-distribution (OOD) data streams while overcoming catastrophic forgetting. However, existing continual learning (CL) problem setups cannot cover such a realistic and complex scenario. In response to this, we propose a new CL problem formulation dubbed continual model refinement (CMR). Compared to prior CL settings, CMR is more practical and introduces unique challenges (boundary-agnostic and non-stationary distribution shift, diverse mixtures of multiple OOD data clusters, error-centric streams, etc.). We extend several existing CL approaches to the CMR setting and evaluate them extensively. For benchmarking and analysis, we propose a general sampling algorithm to obtain dynamic OOD data streams with controllable non-stationarity, as well as a suite of metrics measuring various aspects of online performance. Our experiments and detailed analysis reveal the promise and challenges of the CMR problem, supporting that studying CMR in dynamic OOD streams can benefit the longevity of deployed NLP models in production.
summary: Real-world natural language processing (NLP) models need to be continually updated to fix the prediction errors in out-of-distribution (OOD) data streams while overcoming catastrophic forgetting. However, existing continual learning (CL) problem setups cannot cover such a realistic and complex scenario. In response to this, we propose a new CL problem formulation dubbed continual model refinement (CMR). Compared to prior CL settings, CMR is more practical and introduces unique challenges (boundary-agnostic and non-stationary distribution shift, diverse mixtures of multiple OOD data clusters, error-centric streams, etc.). We extend several existing CL approaches to the CMR setting and evaluate them extensively. For benchmarking and analysis, we propose a general sampling algorithm to obtain dynamic OOD data streams with controllable non-stationarity, as well as a suite of metrics measuring various aspects of online performance. Our experiments and detailed analysis reveal the promise and challenges of the CMR problem, supporting that studying CMR in dynamic OOD streams can benefit the longevity of deployed NLP models in production.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的自然语言处理（NLP）模型需要不断更新，以修复分布外（OOD）数据流中的预测错误，同时克服灾难性遗忘。然而，现有的持续学习（CL）问题设置无法涵盖如此现实和复杂的场景。针对这一点，我们提出了一种新的 CL 问题表述，称为连续模型细化 (CMR)。与之前的 CL 设置相比，CMR 更加实用，并带来了独特的挑战（边界不可知和非平稳分布偏移、多个 OOD 数据集群的不同混合、以错误为中心的流等）。我们将几种现有的 CL 方法扩展到 CMR 设置并对其进行广泛评估。对于基准测试和分析，我们提出了一种通用采样算法来获取具有可控非平稳性的动态 OOD 数据流，以及一套衡量在线性能各个方面的指标。我们的实验和详细分析揭示了 CMR 问题的前景和挑战，支持研究动态 OOD 流中的 CMR 可以有利于生产中部署的 NLP 模型的寿命。

AI.tldr: 本文提出持续模型优化（CMR）框架，解决分布外数据流中的持续学习问题，克服灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法无法应对真实场景中的非平稳分布、多簇混合等复杂挑战，需新框架提升模型长期性能。
AI.method: 扩展CL方法至CMR场景，设计动态生成分布外数据流的采样算法，并构建多维度在线性能评估指标体系。
AI.result: 实验揭示CMR的潜力与挑战，验证框架有效性，不同方法在CMR场景下表现存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究CMR有助于提升生产环境NLP模型寿命，未来需进一步探索动态分布下的优化策略。

authors_text: Tom Hope,Doug Downey,Oren Etzioni,Daniel S. Weld,Eric Horvitz
title: A Computational Inflection for Scientific Discovery
title_zh: 科学发现的计算变形
abstract: We stand at the foot of a significant inflection in the trajectory of scientific discovery. As society continues on its fast-paced digital transformation, so does humankind's collective scientific knowledge and discourse. We now read and write papers in digitized form, and a great deal of the formal and informal processes of science are captured digitally -- including papers, preprints and books, code and datasets, conference presentations, and interactions in social networks and collaboration and communication platforms. The transition has led to the creation and growth of a tremendous amount of information -- much of which is available for public access -- opening exciting opportunities for computational models and systems that analyze and harness it. In parallel, exponential growth in data processing power has fueled remarkable advances in artificial intelligence, including large neural language models capable of learning powerful representations from unstructured text. Dramatic changes in scientific communication -- such as the advent of the first scientific journal in the 17th century -- have historically catalyzed revolutions in scientific thought. The confluence of societal and computational trends suggests that computer science is poised to ignite a revolution in the scientific process itself.
summary: We stand at the foot of a significant inflection in the trajectory of scientific discovery. We now read and write papers in digitized form, and a great deal of the formal and informal processes of science are captured digitally -- including papers, preprints and books, code and datasets, conference presentations, and interactions in social networks and collaboration and communication platforms. The transition has led to the creation and growth of a tremendous amount of information -- much of which is available for public access -- opening exciting opportunities for computational models and systems that analyze and harness it. In parallel, exponential growth in data processing power has fueled remarkable advances in artificial intelligence, including large neural language models capable of learning powerful representations from unstructured text. Dramatic changes in scientific communication -- such as the advent of the first scientific journal in the 17th century -- have historically catalyzed revolutions in scientific thought. The confluence of societal and computational trends suggests that computer science is poised to ignite a revolution in the scientific process itself.
abstract_zh: 我们正处于科学发现轨迹的重大转折的脚下。随着社会继续快速进行数字化转型，人类的集体科学知识和话语也在不断发展。我们现在以数字化形式阅读和撰写论文，大量正式和非正式的科学过程都是以数字方式捕获的——包括论文、预印本和书籍、代码和数据集、会议演示以及社交网络和协作和通信平台中的交互。这一转变导致了大量信息的创建和增长——其中大部分可供公众访问——为分析和利用这些信息的计算模型和系统提供了令人兴奋的机会。与此同时，数据处理能力的指数级增长推动了人工智能的显着进步，包括能够从非结构化文本中学习强大表示的大型神经语言模型。科学传播的巨大变化——例如 17 世纪第一份科学期刊的出现——历史上催化了科学思想的革命。社会趋势和计算趋势的融合表明，计算机科学有望引发科学过程本身的一场革命。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了计算技术如何成为科学发现的重要转折点，分析数字化转型与人工智能发展对科学研究的深远影响。
AI.motivation: 随着科学数据的指数级增长和人工智能技术的突破，传统科研模式面临转型需求，需探索计算技术如何重塑科学发现过程。
AI.method: 通过分析数字化科研流程、历史科学传播变革案例及当前AI技术进展，结合社会趋势与计算能力发展进行跨学科论证。
AI.result: 提出计算机科学可能引发科学方法论革命，构建基于大规模数据与智能模型的新型科研范式。
AI.conclusion: 计算技术正推动科学发现进入新阶段，需加强跨学科协作以充分释放数据与智能模型的科研潜力。

search_text: A Computational Inflection for Scientific Discovery 科学发现的计算变形 We stand at the foot of a significant inflection in the trajectory of scientific discovery. As society continues on its fast-paced digital transformation, so does humankind's collective scientific knowledge and discourse. We now read and write papers in digitized form, and a great deal of the formal and informal processes of science are captured digitally -- including papers, preprints and books, code and datasets, conference presentations, and interactions in social networks and collaboration and communication platforms. The transition has led to the creation and growth of a tremendous amount of information -- much of which is available for public access -- opening exciting opportunities for computational models and systems that analyze and harness it. In parallel, exponential growth in data processing power has fueled remarkable advances in artificial intelligence, including large neural language models capable of learning powerful representations from unstructured text. Dramatic changes in scientific communication -- such as the advent of the first scientific journal in the 17th century -- have historically catalyzed revolutions in scientific thought. The confluence of societal and computational trends suggests that computer science is poised to ignite a revolution in the scientific process itself. 我们正处于科学发现轨迹的重大转折的脚下。随着社会继续快速进行数字化转型，人类的集体科学知识和话语也在不断发展。我们现在以数字化形式阅读和撰写论文，大量正式和非正式的科学过程都是以数字方式捕获的——包括论文、预印本和书籍、代码和数据集、会议演示以及社交网络和协作和通信平台中的交互。这一转变导致了大量信息的创建和增长——其中大部分可供公众访问——为分析和利用这些信息的计算模型和系统提供了令人兴奋的机会。与此同时，数据处理能力的指数级增长推动了人工智能的显着进步，包括能够从非结构化文本中学习强大表示的大型神经语言模型。科学传播的巨大变化——例如 17 世纪第一份科学期刊的出现——历史上催化了科学思想的革命。社会趋势和计算趋势的融合表明，计算机科学有望引发科学过程本身的一场革命。 本文探讨了计算技术如何成为科学发现的重要转折点，分析数字化转型与人工智能发展对科学研究的深远影响。 Tom Hope,Doug Downey,Oren Etzioni,Daniel S. title: A Framework to Generate High-Quality Datapoints for Multiple Novel Intent Detection
title_zh: 为多种新颖意图检测生成高质量数据点的框架
comment: Accepted as Full Paper at Findings of NAACL, 2022
comments: Accepted as Full Paper at Findings of NAACL, 2022
abstract: Systems like Voice-command based conversational agents are characterized by a pre-defined set of skills or intents to perform user specified tasks. In the course of time, newer intents may emerge requiring retraining. However, the newer intents may not be explicitly announced and need to be inferred dynamically. Thus, there are two important tasks at hand (a). identifying emerging new intents, (b). annotating data of the new intents so that the underlying classifier can be retrained efficiently. The tasks become specially challenging when a large number of new intents emerge simultaneously and there is a limited budget of manual annotation. In this paper, we propose MNID (Multiple Novel Intent Detection) which is a cluster based framework to detect multiple novel intents with budgeted human annotation cost. Empirical results on various benchmark datasets (of different sizes) demonstrate that MNID, by intelligently using the budget for annotation, outperforms the baseline methods in terms of accuracy and F1-score.
summary: Systems like Voice-command based conversational agents are characterized by a pre-defined set of skills or intents to perform user specified tasks. In the course of time, newer intents may emerge requiring retraining. However, the newer intents may not be explicitly announced and need to be inferred dynamically. Thus, there are two important tasks at hand (a). identifying emerging new intents, (b). annotating data of the new intents so that the underlying classifier can be retrained efficiently. The tasks become specially challenging when a large number of new intents emerge simultaneously and there is a limited budget of manual annotation. In this paper, we propose MNID (Multiple Novel Intent Detection) which is a cluster based framework to detect multiple novel intents with budgeted human annotation cost. Empirical results on various benchmark datasets (of different sizes) demonstrate that MNID, by intelligently using the budget for annotation, outperforms the baseline methods in terms of accuracy and F1-score.
abstract_zh: 像基于语音命令的会话代理这样的系统的特征是一组预定义的技能或意图来执行用户指定的任务。随着时间的推移，可能会出现需要重新培训的新意图。然而，新的意图可能不会被明确宣布，需要动态推断。因此，手头有两个重要任务（a）。确定正在出现的新意图，(b)。注释新意图的数据，以便可以有效地重新训练底层分类器。当大量新意图同时出现并且手动注释预算有限时，任务变得特别具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 MNID（多重新颖意图检测），它是一个基于集群的框架，用于以预算的人工注释成本检测多个新颖意图。各种基准数据集（不同大小）的实证结果表明，MNID 通过智能地使用注释预算，在准确性和 F1 分数方面优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MNID的基于聚类的框架，用于在有限的人工标注预算下高效检测和生成多个新意图的高质量数据点。
AI.motivation: 语音命令等对话系统面临新意图动态涌现的问题，传统方法需依赖大量人工标注数据，但新意图可能未被明确宣布且标注成本高昂，亟需一种预算友好的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计MNID框架，通过聚类算法识别潜在新意图簇，并智能分配标注预算以最大化标注数据质量，从而提升分类器的重训练效率。
AI.result: 在多个不同规模的基准数据集上，MNID在准确率和F1分数上均优于现有基线方法，验证了其在预算约束下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MNID框架通过聚类与预算优化策略，成功解决了多新意图检测中的标注成本问题，为动态意图识别提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xinyi Yu,Jianan Hu,Yuehai Fan,Wancai Zheng,Linlin Ou
title: Multi-subgoal Robot Navigation in Crowds with History Information and Interactions
title_zh: 具有历史信息和交互的人群中的多子目标机器人导航
abstract: Robot navigation in dynamic environments shared with humans is an important but challenging task, which suffers from performance deterioration as the crowd grows. In this paper, multi-subgoal robot navigation approach based on deep reinforcement learning is proposed, which can reason about more comprehensive relationships among all agents (robot and humans). Specifically, the next position point is planned for the robot by introducing history information and interactions in our work. Firstly, based on subgraph network, the history information of all agents is aggregated before encoding interactions through a graph neural network, so as to improve the ability of the robot to anticipate the future scenarios implicitly. Further consideration, in order to reduce the probability of unreliable next position points, the selection module is designed after policy network in the reinforcement learning framework. In addition, the next position point generated from the selection module satisfied the task requirements better than that obtained directly from the policy network. The experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of both success rate and collision rate, especially in crowded human environments.
summary: Robot navigation in dynamic environments shared with humans is an important but challenging task, which suffers from performance deterioration as the crowd grows. In this paper, multi-subgoal robot navigation approach based on deep reinforcement learning is proposed, which can reason about more comprehensive relationships among all agents (robot and humans). Specifically, the next position point is planned for the robot by introducing history information and interactions in our work. Firstly, based on subgraph network, the history information of all agents is aggregated before encoding interactions through a graph neural network, so as to improve the ability of the robot to anticipate the future scenarios implicitly. Further consideration, in order to reduce the probability of unreliable next position points, the selection module is designed after policy network in the reinforcement learning framework. In addition, the next position point generated from the selection module satisfied the task requirements better than that obtained directly from the policy network. The experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of both success rate and collision rate, especially in crowded human environments.
abstract_zh: 与人类共享的动态环境中的机器人导航是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，随着人群的增长，其性能会下降。本文提出了基于深度强化学习的多子目标机器人导航方法，该方法可以推理所有代理（机器人和人类）之间更全面的关系。具体来说，通过在我们的工作中引入历史信息和交互来规划机器人的下一个位置点。首先，基于子图网络，在通过图神经网络对交互进行编码之前聚合所有智能体的历史信息，从而提高机器人隐式预测未来场景的能力。进一步考虑，为了降低下一个位置点不可靠的概率，在强化学习框架中的策略网络之后设计了选择模块。此外，选择模块生成的下一个位置点比直接从策略网络获得的下一个位置点更能满足任务要求。实验表明，我们的方法在成功率和碰撞率方面都优于最先进的方法，特别是在拥挤的人类环境中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的多子目标机器人导航方法，用于在人群密集的动态环境中提升机器人导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人导航方法在人群密集场景中易出现性能下降，难以有效处理多智能体间的复杂交互关系。
AI.method: 通过子图网络聚合所有智能体的历史信息，结合图神经网络建模交互关系，并设计选择模块优化下一位置点的可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在成功率和碰撞率指标上优于现有先进方法，尤其在高密度人群环境中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 融合历史信息与交互建模的深度强化学习框架能有效提升机器人在复杂人群场景中的导航能力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的多子目标机器人导航方法，用于在人群密集的动态环境中提升机器人导航性能。
motivation: 现有机器人导航方法在人群密集场景中易出现性能下降，难以有效处理多智能体间的复杂交互关系。
method: 通过子图网络聚合所有智能体的历史信息，结合图神经网络建模交互关系，并设计选择模块优化下一位置点的可靠性。
result: 实验表明，该方法在成功率和碰撞率指标上优于现有先进方法，尤其在高密度人群环境中表现突出。
conclusion: 融合历史信息与交互建模的深度强化学习框架能有效提升机器人在复杂人群场景中的导航能力。
search_text: Multi-subgoal Robot Navigation in Crowds with History Information and Interactions 具有历史信息和交互的人群中的多子目标机器人导航 Robot navigation in dynamic environments shared with humans is an important but challenging task, which suffers from performance deterioration as the crowd grows. In this paper, multi-subgoal robot navigation approach based on deep reinforcement learning is proposed, which can reason about more comprehensive relationships among all agents (robot and humans). Specifically, the next position point is planned for the robot by introducing history information and interactions in our work. Firstly, based on subgraph network, the history information of all agents is aggregated before encoding interactions through a graph neural network, so as to improve the ability of the robot to anticipate the future scenarios implicitly. Further consideration, in order to reduce the probability of unreliable next position points, the selection module is designed after policy network in the reinforcement learning framework. In addition, the next position point generated from the selection module satisfied the task requirements better than that obtained directly from the policy network. The experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of both success rate and collision rate, especially in crowded human environments. 与人类共享的动态环境中的机器人导航是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，随着人群的增长，其性能会下降。本文提出了基于深度强化学习的多子目标机器人导航方法，该方法可以推理所有代理（机器人和人类）之间更全面的关系。具体来说，通过在我们的工作中引入历史信息和交互来规划机器人的下一个位置点。首先，基于子图网络，在通过图神经网络对交互进行编码之前聚合所有智能体的历史信息，从而提高机器人隐式预测未来场景的能力。进一步考虑，为了降低下一个位置点不可靠的概率，在强化学习框架中的策略网络之后设计了选择模块。此外，选择模块生成的下一个位置点比直接从策略网络获得的下一个位置点更能满足任务要求。实验表明，我们的方法在成功率和碰撞率方面都优于最先进的方法，特别是在拥挤的人类环境中。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的多子目标机器人导航方法，用于在人群密集的动态环境中提升机器人导航性能。 Xinyi Yu,Jianan Hu,Yuehai Fan,Wancai Zheng,Linlin Ou cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Design of a novel Korean learning application for efficient pronunciation correction
title_zh: 一种新颖的韩语学习应用程序的设计，用于高效的发音纠正
abstract: The Korean wave, which denotes the global popularity of South Korea's cultural economy, contributes to the increasing demand for the Korean language. However, as there does not exist any application for foreigners to learn Korean, this paper suggested a design of a novel Korean learning application. Speech recognition, speech-to-text, and speech-to-waveform are the three key systems in the proposed system. The Google API and the librosa library will transform the user's voice into a sentence and MFCC. The software will then display the user's phrase and answer, with mispronounced elements highlighted in red, allowing users to more easily recognize the incorrect parts of their pronunciation. Furthermore, the Siamese network might utilize those translated spectrograms to provide a similarity score, which could subsequently be used to offer feedback to the user. Despite the fact that we were unable to collect sufficient foreigner data for this research, it is notable that we presented a novel Korean pronunciation correction method for foreigners.
summary: The Korean wave, which denotes the global popularity of South Korea's cultural economy, contributes to the increasing demand for the Korean language. However, as there does not exist any application for foreigners to learn Korean, this paper suggested a design of a novel Korean learning application. abstract_zh: 韩流代表韩国文化经济在全球的受欢迎程度，导致对韩语的需求不断增加。然而，由于目前还没有任何可供外国人学习韩语的应用程序，因此本文建议设计一种新颖的韩语学习应用程序。语音识别、语音转文本和语音转波形是该系统中的三个关键系统。 Google API和librosa库将把用户的声音转换成句子和MFCC。然后，软件将显示用户的短语和答案，并以红色突出显示发音错误的元素，使用户能够更轻松地识别其发音中不正确的部分。此外，暹罗网络可以利用这些翻译后的频谱图来提供相似性分数，随后可以使用该分数向用户提供反馈。尽管我们无法为这项研究收集足够的外国人数据，但值得注意的是，我们为外国人提出了一种新颖的韩语发音纠正方法。

AI.tldr: 设计一款利用语音识别和机器学习技术的韩语学习应用，以高效纠正外国学习者的发音错误。
AI.motivation: 随着韩流推动韩语学习需求增长，现有应用不足，需开发专门工具帮助外国学习者提高发音准确性。
AI.method: 采用Google API和librosa库将语音转换为文本和MFCC特征，结合Siamese网络分析频谱图相似度，高亮错误发音部分并提供反馈。
AI.result: 虽因缺乏外国人数据未能充分验证，但提出了基于语音分析和深度学习的韩语发音校正新方法。
AI.conclusion: 尽管数据限制，但为韩语学习者提供了创新的发音纠正方案，未来需更多数据验证有效性。

authors_text: Alejandro López-Cifuentes,Marcos Escudero-Viñolo,Jesús Bescós,Juan C. SanMiguel
title: Attention-based Knowledge Distillation in Multi-attention Tasks: The Impact of a DCT-driven Loss
title_zh: 多注意力任务中基于注意力的知识蒸馏：DCT 驱动损失的影响
comment: Preprint under review in TCSVT Journal
comments: Preprint under review in TCSVT Journal
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a strategy for the definition of a set of transferability gangways to improve the efficiency of Convolutional Neural Networks. Feature-based Knowledge Distillation is a subfield of KD that relies on intermediate network representations, either unaltered or depth-reduced via maximum activation maps, as the source knowledge. In this paper, we propose and analyse the use of a 2D frequency transform of the activation maps before transferring them. We pose that\textemdash by using global image cues rather than pixel estimates, this strategy enhances knowledge transferability in tasks such as scene recognition, defined by strong spatial and contextual relationships between multiple and varied concepts. To validate the proposed method, an extensive evaluation of the state-of-the-art in scene recognition is presented. Experimental results provide strong evidences that the proposed strategy enables the student network to better focus on the relevant image areas learnt by the teacher network, hence leading to better descriptive features and higher transferred performance than every other state-of-the-art alternative. We publicly release the training and evaluation framework used along this paper at http://www-vpu.eps.uam.es/publications/DCTBasedKDForSceneRecognition.
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a strategy for the definition of a set of transferability gangways to improve the efficiency of Convolutional Neural Networks. Feature-based Knowledge Distillation is a subfield of KD that relies on intermediate network representations, either unaltered or depth-reduced via maximum activation maps, as the source knowledge. In this paper, we propose and analyse the use of a 2D frequency transform of the activation maps before transferring them. We pose that\textemdash by using global image cues rather than pixel estimates, this strategy enhances knowledge transferability in tasks such as scene recognition, defined by strong spatial and contextual relationships between multiple and varied concepts. To validate the proposed method, an extensive evaluation of the state-of-the-art in scene recognition is presented. Experimental results provide strong evidences that the proposed strategy enables the student network to better focus on the relevant image areas learnt by the teacher network, hence leading to better descriptive features and higher transferred performance than every other state-of-the-art alternative. We publicly release the training and evaluation framework used along this paper at http://www-vpu.eps.uam.es/publications/DCTBasedKDForSceneRecognition.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是一种定义一组可转移通道以提高卷积神经网络效率的策略。基于特征的知识蒸馏是 KD 的一个子领域，它依赖于中间网络表示（未改变或通过最大激活图降低深度）作为源知识。在本文中，我们提出并分析了在传输激活图之前使用激活图的二维频率变换。我们提出，通过使用全局图像线索而不是像素估计，该策略增强了场景识别等任务中的知识可转移性，这些任务是由多个不同概念之间强大的空间和上下文关系定义的。为了验证所提出的方法，对场景识别的最新技术进行了广泛的评估。实验结果提供了强有力的证据，表明所提出的策略使学生网络能够更好地关注教师网络学到的相关图像区域，从而比其他最先进的替代方案获得更好的描述性特征和更高的迁移性能。我们在 http://www-vpu.eps.uam.es/publications/DCTBasedKDForSceneRecognition 上公开发布了本文使用的训练和评估框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的知识蒸馏方法，利用DCT驱动的损失函数来提升多注意力任务中的知识迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于特征的知识蒸馏方法依赖于像素级的激活图，难以捕捉图像中的全局上下文信息。因此，本文提出通过二维频率变换（如DCT）来增强知识迁移的效率。
AI.method: 在知识蒸馏过程中，对教师网络的激活图进行二维离散余弦变换（DCT），从而提取全局图像线索，作为知识迁移的依据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够使学生网络更好地聚焦于教师网络学习到的相关图像区域，从而获得更优的描述性特征和更高的迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于DCT的知识蒸馏方法在场景识别等多注意力任务中表现出色，能够有效提升学生网络的性能。

title: EmoBank: Studying the Impact of Annotation Perspective and Representation Format on Dimensional Emotion Analysis
title_zh: EmoBank：研究注释视角和表示格式对维度情感分析的影响
comment: Originally published at EACL 2017. Revised version with fixed typos and an additional appendix featuring the original instructions of the dataset
comments: Originally published at EACL 2017. Revised version with fixed typos and an additional appendix featuring the original instructions of the dataset
abstract: We describe EmoBank, a corpus of 10k English sentences balancing multiple genres, which we annotated with dimensional emotion metadata in the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) representation format. EmoBank excels with a bi-perspectival and bi-representational design. On the one hand, we distinguish between writer's and reader's emotions, on the other hand, a subset of the corpus complements dimensional VAD annotations with categorical ones based on Basic Emotions. We find evidence for the supremacy of the reader's perspective in terms of IAA and rating intensity, and achieve close-to-human performance when mapping between dimensional and categorical formats.
summary: We describe EmoBank, a corpus of 10k English sentences balancing multiple genres, which we annotated with dimensional emotion metadata in the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) representation format. EmoBank excels with a bi-perspectival and bi-representational design. On the one hand, we distinguish between writer's and reader's emotions, on the other hand, a subset of the corpus complements dimensional VAD annotations with categorical ones based on Basic Emotions. We find evidence for the supremacy of the reader's perspective in terms of IAA and rating intensity, and achieve close-to-human performance when mapping between dimensional and categorical formats.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了 EmoBank，这是一个平衡多种流派的 10k 英语句子的语料库，我们用效价-唤醒-主导（VAD）表示格式的维度情感元数据对其进行了注释。 EmoBank 擅长双视角和双表征设计。一方面，我们区分作者和读者的情感，另一方面，语料库的子集用基于基本情感的分类注释来补充维度 VAD 注释。我们找到了读者观点在 IAA 和评级强度方面至高无上的证据，并在维度和分类格式之间映射时实现了接近人类的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了EmoBank语料库，研究注释视角和表示格式对维度情感分析的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有情感分析研究缺乏对注释视角（作者 vs. 读者）和表示格式（维度 vs. 类别）的系统比较，限制了模型性能优化。
AI.method: 构建包含10k条英语句子的EmoBank语料库，采用双视角（作者/读者）和双表示（VAD维度+基本情绪类别）设计，通过IAA和映射性能评估方法进行分析。
AI.result: 读者视角在IAA和评分强度上表现更优，维度与类别格式间映射性能接近人类水平。
AI.conclusion: EmoBank为情感分析提供了标准化基准，证实了读者视角的有效性及跨表示格式映射的可行性。

search_text: EmoBank: Studying the Impact of Annotation Perspective and Representation Format on Dimensional Emotion Analysis EmoBank：研究注释视角和表示格式对维度情感分析的影响 We describe EmoBank, a corpus of 10k English sentences balancing multiple genres, which we annotated with dimensional emotion metadata in the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) representation format. EmoBank excels with a bi-perspectival and bi-representational design. On the one hand, we distinguish between writer's and reader's emotions, on the other hand, a subset of the corpus complements dimensional VAD annotations with categorical ones based on Basic Emotions. We find evidence for the supremacy of the reader's perspective in terms of IAA and rating intensity, and achieve close-to-human performance when mapping between dimensional and categorical formats. 我们描述了 EmoBank，这是一个平衡多种流派的 10k 英语句子的语料库，我们用效价-唤醒-主导（VAD）表示格式的维度情感元数据对其进行了注释。 EmoBank 擅长双视角和双表征设计。一方面，我们区分作者和读者的情感，另一方面，语料库的子集用基于基本情感的分类注释来补充维度 VAD 注释。我们找到了读者观点在 IAA 和评级强度方面至高无上的证据，并在维度和分类格式之间映射时实现了接近人类的表现。 本文介绍了EmoBank语料库，研究注释视角和表示格式对维度情感分析的影响。 Sven Buechel,Udo Hahn cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Antonio Emanuele Cinà,Kathrin Grosse,Ambra Demontis,Sebastiano Vascon,Werner Zellinger,Bernhard A. Moser,Alina Oprea,Battista Biggio,Marcello Pelillo,Fabio Roli
title: Wild Patterns Reloaded: A Survey of Machine Learning Security against Training Data Poisoning
title_zh: 狂野模式重装上阵：针对训练数据中毒的机器学习安全性调查
comment: 35 pages, Accepted at ACM Computing Surveys
comments: 35 pages, Accepted at ACM Computing Surveys
abstract: The success of machine learning is fueled by the increasing availability of computing power and large training datasets. The training data is used to learn new models or update existing ones, assuming that it is sufficiently representative of the data that will be encountered at test time. This assumption is challenged by the threat of poisoning, an attack that manipulates the training data to compromise the model's performance at test time. Although poisoning has been acknowledged as a relevant threat in industry applications, and a variety of different attacks and defenses have been proposed so far, a complete systematization and critical review of the field is still missing. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive systematization of poisoning attacks and defenses in machine learning, reviewing more than 100 papers published in the field in the last 15 years. We start by categorizing the current threat models and attacks, and then organize existing defenses accordingly. While we focus mostly on computer-vision applications, we argue that our systematization also encompasses state-of-the-art attacks and defenses for other data modalities. Finally, we discuss existing resources for research in poisoning, and shed light on the current limitations and open research questions in this research field.
summary: The success of machine learning is fueled by the increasing availability of computing power and large training datasets. The training data is used to learn new models or update existing ones, assuming that it is sufficiently representative of the data that will be encountered at test time. This assumption is challenged by the threat of poisoning, an attack that manipulates the training data to compromise the model's performance at test time. Although poisoning has been acknowledged as a relevant threat in industry applications, and a variety of different attacks and defenses have been proposed so far, a complete systematization and critical review of the field is still missing. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive systematization of poisoning attacks and defenses in machine learning, reviewing more than 100 papers published in the field in the last 15 years. We start by categorizing the current threat models and attacks, and then organize existing defenses accordingly. While we focus mostly on computer-vision applications, we argue that our systematization also encompasses state-of-the-art attacks and defenses for other data modalities. Finally, we discuss existing resources for research in poisoning, and shed light on the current limitations and open research questions in this research field.
abstract_zh: 计算能力和大型训练数据集的可用性不断提高，推动了机器学习的成功。训练数据用于学习新模型或更新现有模型，假设它足以代表测试时遇到的数据。这一假设受到中毒威胁的挑战，中毒威胁是一种操纵训练数据以损害模型在测试时性能的攻击。尽管中毒已被认为是行业应用中的相关威胁，并且迄今为止已经提出了各种不同的攻击和防御，但仍然缺乏对该领域的完整系统化和严格审查。在本次调查中，我们对机器学习中的投毒攻击和防御进行了全面的系统化分析，回顾了过去 15 年该领域发表的 100 多篇论文。我们首先对当前的威胁模型和攻击进行分类，然后相应地组织现有的防御措施。虽然我们主要关注计算机视觉应用，但我们认为我们的系统化还涵盖其他数据模式的最先进的攻击和防御。最后，我们讨论了中毒研究的现有资源，并阐明了该研究领域当前的局限性和开放的研究问题。

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了过去15年中关于机器学习训练数据投毒攻击与防御的100余篇论文，建立分类框架并分析现状。
AI.motivation: 尽管训练数据投毒已被视为重要威胁，但该领域缺乏全面系统的综述与批判性分析，阻碍了研究进展。
AI.method: 通过分类威胁模型与攻击类型，组织现有防御方法，重点分析计算机视觉领域并扩展至其他数据模态，总结资源与开放问题。
AI.result: 构建了投毒攻击与防御的系统化分类体系，揭示了当前研究的局限性及未来研究方向，为后续工作提供参考框架。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为机器学习安全领域提供了结构化知识图谱，强调跨模态防御机制研究与真实场景验证的重要性。

authors_text: Gullal S. Cheema,Sherzod Hakimov,Abdul Sittar,Eric Müller-Budack,Christian Otto,Ralph Ewerth
title: MM-Claims: A Dataset for Multimodal Claim Detection in Social Media
title_zh: MM-Claims：社交媒体中多模式索赔检测的数据集
abstract: In recent years, the problem of misinformation on the web has become widespread across languages, countries, and various social media platforms. Although there has been much work on automated fake news detection, the role of images and their variety are not well explored. In this paper, we investigate the roles of image and text at an earlier stage of the fake news detection pipeline, called claim detection. For this purpose, we introduce a novel dataset, MM-Claims, which consists of tweets and corresponding images over three topics: COVID-19, Climate Change and broadly Technology. The dataset contains roughly 86000 tweets, out of which 3400 are labeled manually by multiple annotators for the training and evaluation of multimodal models. We describe the dataset in detail, evaluate strong unimodal and multimodal baselines, and analyze the potential and drawbacks of current models.
summary: In recent years, the problem of misinformation on the web has become widespread across languages, countries, and various social media platforms. Although there has been much work on automated fake news detection, the role of images and their variety are not well explored. In this paper, we investigate the roles of image and text at an earlier stage of the fake news detection pipeline, called claim detection. For this purpose, we introduce a novel dataset, MM-Claims, which consists of tweets and corresponding images over three topics: COVID-19, Climate Change and broadly Technology. The dataset contains roughly 86000 tweets, out of which 3400 are labeled manually by multiple annotators for the training and evaluation of multimodal models. We describe the dataset in detail, evaluate strong unimodal and multimodal baselines, and analyze the potential and drawbacks of current models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，网络上的错误信息问题在不同语言、国家和各种社交媒体平台上变得普遍存在。尽管在自动假新闻检测方面已经做了很多工作，但图像的作用及其多样性尚未得到很好的探索。在本文中，我们研究了图像和文本在假新闻检测管道的早期阶段（称为声明检测）的作用。为此，我们引入了一个新颖的数据集 MM-Claims，它由三个主题的推文和相应图像组成：COVID-19、气候变化和广泛的技术。该数据集包含大约 86000 条推文，其中 3400 条由多个注释器手动标记，用于多模态模型的训练和评估。我们详细描述了数据集，评估了强大的单峰和多峰基线，并分析了当前模型的潜力和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为MM-Claims的多模态数据集，用于社交媒体中的虚假信息检测，包含推文及其对应图片，并标注了3400条用于训练和评估。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假新闻检测研究较少关注图像的作用，而图像在社交媒体传播中至关重要，因此需要一个包含多模态数据的标注数据集以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 收集涵盖新冠疫情、气候变化和技术主题的86000条推文及对应图片，由多名标注者手动标注3400条用于训练，评估单模态和多模态模型基线，并分析模型潜力与不足。
AI.result: 验证了多模态模型在虚假声明检测中的有效性，发现当前模型在处理图像与文本关联性时仍存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: MM-Claims数据集为多模态虚假信息检测提供了重要资源，未来需进一步优化模型以更有效地融合视觉与文本信息。

method: 收集涵盖新冠疫情、气候变化和技术主题的86000条推文及对应图片，由多名标注者手动标注3400条用于训练，评估单模态和多模态模型基线，并分析模型潜力与不足。
result: 验证了多模态模型在虚假声明检测中的有效性，发现当前模型在处理图像与文本关联性时仍存在局限性。
conclusion: MM-Claims数据集为多模态虚假信息检测提供了重要资源，未来需进一步优化模型以更有效地融合视觉与文本信息。
search_text: MM-Claims: A Dataset for Multimodal Claim Detection in Social Media MM-Claims：社交媒体中多模式索赔检测的数据集 In recent years, the problem of misinformation on the web has become widespread across languages, countries, and various social media platforms. Although there has been much work on automated fake news detection, the role of images and their variety are not well explored. In this paper, we investigate the roles of image and text at an earlier stage of the fake news detection pipeline, called claim detection. For this purpose, we introduce a novel dataset, MM-Claims, which consists of tweets and corresponding images over three topics: COVID-19, Climate Change and broadly Technology. The dataset contains roughly 86000 tweets, out of which 3400 are labeled manually by multiple annotators for the training and evaluation of multimodal models. We describe the dataset in detail, evaluate strong unimodal and multimodal baselines, and analyze the potential and drawbacks of current models. 近年来，网络上的错误信息问题在不同语言、国家和各种社交媒体平台上变得普遍存在。尽管在自动假新闻检测方面已经做了很多工作，但图像的作用及其多样性尚未得到很好的探索。在本文中，我们研究了图像和文本在假新闻检测管道的早期阶段（称为声明检测）的作用。为此，我们引入了一个新颖的数据集 MM-Claims，它由三个主题的推文和相应图像组成：COVID-19、气候变化和广泛的技术。该数据集包含大约 86000 条推文，其中 3400 条由多个注释器手动标记，用于多模态模型的训练和评估。我们详细描述了数据集，评估了强大的单峰和多峰基线，并分析了当前模型的潜力和缺点。 本文提出一个名为MM-Claims的多模态数据集，用于社交媒体中的虚假信息检测，包含推文及其对应图片，并标注了3400条用于训练和评估。 Gullal S. Cheema,Sherzod Hakimov,Abdul Sittar,Eric Müller-Budack,Christian Otto,Ralph Ewerth cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SI

authors_text: Marcely Zanon Boito,John Ortega,Hugo Riguidel,Antoine Laurent,Loïc Barrault,Fethi Bougares,Firas Chaabani,Ha Nguyen,Florentin Barbier,Souhir Gahbiche,Yannick Estève
title: ON-TRAC Consortium Systems for the IWSLT 2022 Dialect and Low-resource Speech Translation Tasks
title_zh: 用于 IWSLT 2022 方言和低资源语音翻译任务的 ON-TRAC 联盟系统
abstract: This paper describes the ON-TRAC Consortium translation systems developed for two challenge tracks featured in the Evaluation Campaign of IWSLT 2022: low-resource and dialect speech translation. For the Tunisian Arabic-English dataset (low-resource and dialect tracks), we build an end-to-end model as our joint primary submission, and compare it against cascaded models that leverage a large fine-tuned wav2vec 2.0 model for ASR. Our results show that in our settings pipeline approaches are still very competitive, and that with the use of transfer learning, they can outperform end-to-end models for speech translation (ST). For the Tamasheq-French dataset (low-resource track) our primary submission leverages intermediate representations from a wav2vec 2.0 model trained on 234 hours of Tamasheq audio, while our contrastive model uses a French phonetic transcription of the Tamasheq audio as input in a Conformer speech translation architecture jointly trained on automatic speech recognition, ST and machine translation losses. Our results highlight that self-supervised models trained on smaller sets of target data are more effective to low-resource end-to-end ST fine-tuning, compared to large off-the-shelf models. Results also illustrate that even approximate phonetic transcriptions can improve ST scores.
summary: This paper describes the ON-TRAC Consortium translation systems developed for two challenge tracks featured in the Evaluation Campaign of IWSLT 2022: low-resource and dialect speech translation. For the Tunisian Arabic-English dataset (low-resource and dialect tracks), we build an end-to-end model as our joint primary submission, and compare it against cascaded models that leverage a large fine-tuned wav2vec 2.0 model for ASR. Our results show that in our settings pipeline approaches are still very competitive, and that with the use of transfer learning, they can outperform end-to-end models for speech translation (ST). For the Tamasheq-French dataset (low-resource track) our primary submission leverages intermediate representations from a wav2vec 2.0 model trained on 234 hours of Tamasheq audio, while our contrastive model uses a French phonetic transcription of the Tamasheq audio as input in a Conformer speech translation architecture jointly trained on automatic speech recognition, ST and machine translation losses. Our results highlight that self-supervised models trained on smaller sets of target data are more effective to low-resource end-to-end ST fine-tuning, compared to large off-the-shelf models. Results also illustrate that even approximate phonetic transcriptions can improve ST scores.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 ON-TRAC 联盟翻译系统，该系统是为 IWSLT 2022 评估活动中的两个挑战赛道而开发的：低资源和方言语音翻译。对于突尼斯阿拉伯语-英语数据集（低资源和方言轨道），我们构建了一个端到端模型作为我们的联合主要提交，并将其与利用大型微调 wav2vec 2.0 模型进行 ASR 的级联模型进行比较。我们的结果表明，在我们的设置中，管道方法仍然非常有竞争力，并且通过使用迁移学习，它们可以优于语音翻译（ST）的端到端模型。对于 Tamasheq-French 数据集（低资源轨道），我们的主要提交利用了在 234 小时 Tamasheq 音频上训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型的中间表示，而我们的对比模型使用 Tamasheq 音频的法语语音转录作为 Conformer 语音翻译架构的输入，该架构在自动语音识别、ST 和机器翻译损失方面联合训练。我们的结果强调，与大型现成模型相比，在较小目标数据集上训练的自监督模型对于低资源端到端 ST 微调更有效。结果还表明，即使是近似的音标也可以提高 ST 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ON-TRAC联盟为IWSLT 2022低资源和方言语音翻译任务开发的系统，重点比较了端到端模型与级联模型的效果，并探索了自监督学习在低资源场景下的应用。
AI.motivation: 针对低资源语言和方言语音翻译中数据稀缺、模型性能受限的问题，探索更有效的建模方法以提升翻译质量。
AI.method: 对于突尼斯阿拉伯语-英语任务，采用端到端模型与基于wav2vec 2.0的级联模型对比；对于塔马舍克语-法语任务，利用wav2vec 2.0中间表示及结合语音识别、翻译损失的Conformer架构进行联合训练。
AI.result: 级联模型在迁移学习下优于端到端模型；基于小规模目标数据训练的自监督模型比大型预训练模型更适用于低资源场景；近似音素转录可提升翻译效果。
AI.conclusion: 低资源语音翻译中，迁移学习与自监督模型结合能有效提升性能，且音素级信息即使不精确也能带来收益。

title: Swendsen-Wang dynamics for the ferromagnetic Ising model with external fields
title_zh: 具有外部场的铁磁 Ising 模型的 Swendsen-Wang 动力学
abstract: We study the sampling problem for the ferromagnetic Ising model with consistent external fields, and in particular, Swendsen-Wang dynamics on this model. We introduce a new grand model unifying two closely related models: the subgraph world and the random cluster model. Through this new viewpoint, we show: (1) polynomial mixing time bounds for Swendsen-Wang dynamics and (edge-flipping) Glauber dynamics of the random cluster model, generalising the bounds and simplifying the proofs for the no-field case by Guo and Jerrum (2018); (2) near linear mixing time for the two dynamics above if the maximum degree is bounded and all fields are (consistent and) bounded away from $1$.
summary: We study the sampling problem for the ferromagnetic Ising model with consistent external fields, and in particular, Swendsen-Wang dynamics on this model. We introduce a new grand model unifying two closely related models: the subgraph world and the random cluster model. Through this new viewpoint, we show: (1) polynomial mixing time bounds for Swendsen-Wang dynamics and (edge-flipping) Glauber dynamics of the random cluster model, generalising the bounds and simplifying the proofs for the no-field case by Guo and Jerrum (2018); (2) near linear mixing time for the two dynamics above if the maximum degree is bounded and all fields are (consistent and) bounded away from $1$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有一致外部场的铁磁 Ising 模型的采样问题，特别是该模型上的 Swendsen-Wang 动力学。我们引入了一个新的大模型，它统一了两个密切相关的模型：子图世界和随机集群模型。通过这个新观点，我们展示了：（1）随机聚类模型的 Swendsen-Wang 动力学和（边缘翻转）Glauber 动力学的多项式混合时间界限，概括了界限并简化了Guo和Jerrum（2018）对无场情况的证明； (2) 如果最大程度有界并且所有场（一致且）远离 $1$，则上述两种动态的接近线性混合时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带有外部场的铁磁Ising模型中Swendsen-Wang动力学的采样问题，并通过引入新的统一模型分析其混合时间。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注无外部场的Ising模型，而外部场的存在可能显著影响动力学行为，需扩展理论分析并简化证明过程。
AI.method: 引入统一子图世界与随机簇模型的grand模型，结合多项式混合时间分析与条件约束下的近线性时间证明。
AI.result: 证明Swendsen-Wang动力学及随机簇模型的边翻转Glauber动力学具有多项式混合时间，并在最大度数有界且场强受限时达到近线性混合时间。
AI.conclusion: 新模型有效推广了无场情况下的结果，简化了证明并揭示了外部场对混合时间的影响，为相关算法设计提供理论支持。

Through this new viewpoint, we show: (1) polynomial mixing time bounds for Swendsen-Wang dynamics and (edge-flipping) Glauber dynamics of the random cluster model, generalising the bounds and simplifying the proofs for the no-field case by Guo and Jerrum (2018); (2) near linear mixing time for the two dynamics above if the maximum degree is bounded and all fields are (consistent and) bounded away from $1$. 我们研究具有一致外部场的铁磁 Ising 模型的采样问题，特别是该模型上的 Swendsen-Wang 动力学。我们引入了一个新的大模型，它统一了两个密切相关的模型：子图世界和随机集群模型。通过这个新观点，我们展示了：（1）随机聚类模型的 Swendsen-Wang 动力学和（边缘翻转）Glauber 动力学的多项式混合时间界限，概括了界限并简化了Guo和Jerrum（2018）对无场情况的证明； (2) 如果最大程度有界并且所有场（一致且）远离 $1$，则上述两种动态的接近线性混合时间。 本文研究了带有外部场的铁磁Ising模型中Swendsen-Wang动力学的采样问题，并通过引入新的统一模型分析其混合时间。 Weiming Feng,Heng Guo,Jiaheng Wang cs.DS,math.PR

title: Lifelong Ensemble Learning based on Multiple Representations for Few-Shot Object Recognition
title_zh: 基于多重表示的终身集成学习用于少样本目标识别
comment: The paper has been accepted for publication in the Robotics and Autonomous Systems journal
comments: The paper has been accepted for publication in the Robotics and Autonomous Systems journal
abstract: Service robots are integrating more and more into our daily lives to help us with various tasks. In such environments, robots frequently face new objects while working in the environment and need to learn them in an open-ended fashion. Furthermore, such robots must be able to recognize a wide range of object categories. In this paper, we present a lifelong ensemble learning approach based on multiple representations to address the few-shot object recognition problem. In particular, we form ensemble methods based on deep representations and handcrafted 3D shape descriptors. To facilitate lifelong learning, each approach is equipped with a memory unit for storing and retrieving object information instantly. The proposed model is suitable for open-ended learning scenarios where the number of 3D object categories is not fixed and can grow over time. We have performed extensive sets of experiments to assess the performance of the proposed approach in offline, and open-ended scenarios. For the evaluation purpose, in addition to real object datasets, we generate a large synthetic household objects dataset consisting of 27000 views of 90 objects. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on online few-shot 3D object recognition tasks, as well as its superior performance over the state-of-the-art open-ended learning approaches. Furthermore, our results show that while ensemble learning is modestly beneficial in offline settings, it is significantly beneficial in lifelong few-shot learning situations. Additionally, we demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach in both simulated and real-robot settings, where the robot rapidly learned new categories from limited examples.
summary: Service robots are integrating more and more into our daily lives to help us with various tasks. In such environments, robots frequently face new objects while working in the environment and need to learn them in an open-ended fashion. Furthermore, such robots must be able to recognize a wide range of object categories. In this paper, we present a lifelong ensemble learning approach based on multiple representations to address the few-shot object recognition problem. In particular, we form ensemble methods based on deep representations and handcrafted 3D shape descriptors. To facilitate lifelong learning, each approach is equipped with a memory unit for storing and retrieving object information instantly. The proposed model is suitable for open-ended learning scenarios where the number of 3D object categories is not fixed and can grow over time. We have performed extensive sets of experiments to assess the performance of the proposed approach in offline, and open-ended scenarios. For the evaluation purpose, in addition to real object datasets, we generate a large synthetic household objects dataset consisting of 27000 views of 90 objects. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on online few-shot 3D object recognition tasks, as well as its superior performance over the state-of-the-art open-ended learning approaches. Furthermore, our results show that while ensemble learning is modestly beneficial in offline settings, it is significantly beneficial in lifelong few-shot learning situations. Additionally, we demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach in both simulated and real-robot settings, where the robot rapidly learned new categories from limited examples.
abstract_zh: 服务机器人越来越多地融入我们的日常生活，帮助我们完成各种任务。在这样的环境中，机器人在环境中工作时经常面对新的物体，并且需要以开放式的方式学习它们。此外，此类机器人必须能够识别广泛的物体类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多重表示的终身集成学习方法，以解决少样本目标识别问题。特别是，我们基于深度表示和手工制作的 3D 形状描述符形成集成方法。为了促进终身学习，每种方法都配备了一个存储单元，用于立即存储和检索对象信息。所提出的模型适用于开放式学习场景，其中 3D 对象类别的数量不固定，并且会随着时间的推移而增长。我们进行了大量的实验来评估所提出的方法在离线和开放场景中的性能。出于评估目的，除了真实物体数据集之外，我们还生成了一个大型综合家居物体数据集，其中包含 90 个物体的 27000 个视图。实验结果证明了该方法在在线少镜头 3D 对象识别任务上的有效性，以及其优于最先进的开放式学习方法的性能。此外，我们的结果表明，虽然集成学习在离线环境中具有一定的益处，但它在终身几次学习的情况下却非常有益。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法在模拟和真实机器人设置中的有效性，其中机器人从有限的示例中快速学习新类别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多表示的终身集成学习方法，用于解决少样本物体识别问题，使机器人能在开放环境中持续学习新物体。
AI.motivation: 服务机器人需在开放环境中持续学习新物体，传统方法难以应对类别数量动态增长的挑战，需开发支持终身学习的少样本识别框架。
AI.method: 结合深度表征与手工3D形状描述子，构建集成学习模型，每个方法配备记忆单元存储检索物体信息，适应开放场景中类别数量动态增长。
AI.result: 在真实数据集和生成的27000视角90物体合成数据集上验证，模型在在线少样本3D识别任务中优于现有方法，集成学习在终身学习场景中显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效支持终身少样本学习，通过多表示集成与记忆单元设计，在模拟与真实机器人环境中均能快速学习新类别。

authors_text: Zarathustra A. Goertzel,Jan Jakubův,Cezary Kaliszyk,Miroslav Olšák,Jelle Piepenbrock,Josef Urban
title: The Isabelle ENIGMA
title_zh: 伊莎贝尔之谜
abstract: We significantly improve the performance of the E automated theorem prover on the Isabelle Sledgehammer problems by combining learning and theorem proving in several ways. In particular, we develop targeted versions of the ENIGMA guidance for the Isabelle problems, targeted versions of neural premise selection, and targeted strategies for E. The methods are trained in several iterations over hundreds of thousands untyped and typed first-order problems extracted from Isabelle. Our final best single-strategy ENIGMA and premise selection system improves the best previous version of E by 25.3% in 15 seconds, outperforming also all other previous ATP and SMT systems.
summary: We significantly improve the performance of the E automated theorem prover on the Isabelle Sledgehammer problems by combining learning and theorem proving in several ways. In particular, we develop targeted versions of the ENIGMA guidance for the Isabelle problems, targeted versions of neural premise selection, and targeted strategies for E. The methods are trained in several iterations over hundreds of thousands untyped and typed first-order problems extracted from Isabelle. Our final best single-strategy ENIGMA and premise selection system improves the best previous version of E by 25.3% in 15 seconds, outperforming also all other previous ATP and SMT systems.
abstract_zh: 我们通过多种方式结合学习和定理证明，显着提高了 E 自动定理证明器在 Isabelle Sledgehammer 问题上的性能。特别是，我们开发了针对 Isabelle 问题的 ENIGMA 指导的目标版本、神经前提选择的目标版本以及 E 的目标策略。这些方法在从 Isabelle 中提取的数十万个非类型和类型一阶问题上进行了多次迭代训练。我们最终的最佳单策略 ENIGMA 和前提选择系统在 15 秒内将 E 的最佳先前版本提高了 25.3%，性能也优于所有其他先前的 ATP 和 SMT 系统。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过结合机器学习与定理证明技术，显著提升了E自动定理证明器在Isabelle Sledgehammer问题上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动定理证明工具在处理Isabelle复杂问题时效率不足，需通过智能化方法提升求解速度与准确率。
AI.method: 开发针对Isabelle问题的ENIGMA指导机制、神经前提选择模型及定制策略，并在数百万未类型化/类型化首阶问题上多轮训练。
AI.result: 最终系统在15秒内比E最佳旧版本提升25.3%，超越所有先前ATP和SMT系统。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习与定理证明的深度融合可显著提升自动化推理性能，为相关领域研究提供新方向。

title: EqVIO: An Equivariant Filter for Visual Inertial Odometry
title_zh: EqVIO：视觉惯性里程计的等变滤波器
comment: 28 pages, 17 figures, published in IEEE TRO
comments: 28 pages, 17 figures, published in IEEE TRO
abstract: Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) is the problem of estimating a robot's trajectory by combining information from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) and a camera, and is of great interest to the robotics community. This paper develops a novel Lie group symmetry for the VIO problem and applies the recently proposed equivariant filter. The proposed symmetry is compatible with the invariance of the VIO reference frame, leading to improved filter consistency. The bias-free IMU dynamics are group-affine, ensuring that filter linearisation errors depend only on the bias estimation error and measurement noise. Furthermore, visual measurements are equivariant with respect to the symmetry, enabling the application of the higher-order equivariant output approximation to reduce approximation error in the filter update equation. As a result, the equivariant filter (EqF) based on this Lie group is a consistent estimator for VIO with lower linearisation error in the propagation of state dynamics and a higher order equivariant output approximation than standard formulations. Experimental results on the popular EuRoC and UZH FPV datasets demonstrate that the proposed system outperforms other state-of-the-art VIO algorithms in terms of both speed and accuracy.
summary: Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) is the problem of estimating a robot's trajectory by combining information from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) and a camera, and is of great interest to the robotics community. This paper develops a novel Lie group symmetry for the VIO problem and applies the recently proposed equivariant filter. The proposed symmetry is compatible with the invariance of the VIO reference frame, leading to improved filter consistency. The bias-free IMU dynamics are group-affine, ensuring that filter linearisation errors depend only on the bias estimation error and measurement noise. Furthermore, visual measurements are equivariant with respect to the symmetry, enabling the application of the higher-order equivariant output approximation to reduce approximation error in the filter update equation. As a result, the equivariant filter (EqF) based on this Lie group is a consistent estimator for VIO with lower linearisation error in the propagation of state dynamics and a higher order equivariant output approximation than standard formulations. Experimental results on the popular EuRoC and UZH FPV datasets demonstrate that the proposed system outperforms other state-of-the-art VIO algorithms in terms of both speed and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 视觉惯性里程计（VIO）是通过结合来自惯性测量单元（IMU）和相机的信息来估计机器人轨迹的问题，并且引起了机器人社区的极大兴趣。本文针对 VIO 问题开发了一种新颖的李群对称性，并应用了最近提出的等变滤波器。所提出的对称性与 VIO 参考系的不变性兼容，从而提高了滤波器的一致性。无偏差 IMU 动态是群仿射的，确保滤波器线性化误差仅取决于偏差估计误差和测量噪声。此外，视觉测量相对于对称性是等变的，从而能够应用高阶等变输出近似来减少滤波器更新方程中的近似误差。因此，基于该李群的等变滤波器 (EqF) 是 VIO 的一致估计器，与标准公式相比，在状态动力学传播中具有较低的线性化误差和更高阶的等变输出近似。在流行的 EuRoC 和 UZH FPV 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的系统在速度和准确性方面均优于其他最先进的 VIO 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于李群对称性的等变滤波器（EqF），用于改进视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的轨迹估计，通过降低线性化误差和提升近似阶数实现更高的精度和速度。
AI.motivation: 传统VIO方法在滤波器线性化和视觉测量近似中存在误差累积问题，导致估计不一致。本文通过引入李群对称性与等变滤波框架，旨在提升滤波器对IMU动态和视觉观测的建模精度。
AI.method: 设计兼容VIO参考系不变性的李群对称性，利用无偏IMU动态的群仿射特性分离线性化误差，结合视觉测量的等变性应用高阶输出近似，构建等变滤波器（EqF）。
AI.result: 在EuRoC和UZH FPV数据集上，EqVIO系统在速度和定位精度上均优于现有SOTA算法，验证了等变滤波器降低线性化误差和提升近似阶数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于李群对称性的等变滤波器通过高阶近似和误差解耦机制，为VIO提供了更一致的估计框架，为视觉惯性融合算法提供了新的理论分析和实现路径。

search_text: EqVIO: An Equivariant Filter for Visual Inertial Odometry EqVIO：视觉惯性里程计的等变滤波器 Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) is the problem of estimating a robot's trajectory by combining information from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) and a camera, and is of great interest to the robotics community. This paper develops a novel Lie group symmetry for the VIO problem and applies the recently proposed equivariant filter. The proposed symmetry is compatible with the invariance of the VIO reference frame, leading to improved filter consistency. The bias-free IMU dynamics are group-affine, ensuring that filter linearisation errors depend only on the bias estimation error and measurement noise. Furthermore, visual measurements are equivariant with respect to the symmetry, enabling the application of the higher-order equivariant output approximation to reduce approximation error in the filter update equation. As a result, the equivariant filter (EqF) based on this Lie group is a consistent estimator for VIO with lower linearisation error in the propagation of state dynamics and a higher order equivariant output approximation than standard formulations. Experimental results on the popular EuRoC and UZH FPV datasets demonstrate that the proposed system outperforms other state-of-the-art VIO algorithms in terms of both speed and accuracy. 视觉惯性里程计（VIO）是通过结合来自惯性测量单元（IMU）和相机的信息来估计机器人轨迹的问题，并且引起了机器人社区的极大兴趣。本文针对 VIO 问题开发了一种新颖的李群对称性，并应用了最近提出的等变滤波器。所提出的对称性与 VIO 参考系的不变性兼容，从而提高了滤波器的一致性。无偏差 IMU 动态是群仿射的，确保滤波器线性化误差仅取决于偏差估计误差和测量噪声。此外，视觉测量相对于对称性是等变的，从而能够应用高阶等变输出近似来减少滤波器更新方程中的近似误差。因此，基于该李群的等变滤波器 (EqF) 是 VIO 的一致估计器，与标准公式相比，在状态动力学传播中具有较低的线性化误差和更高阶的等变输出近似。在流行的 EuRoC 和 UZH FPV 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的系统在速度和准确性方面均优于其他最先进的 VIO 算法。 本文提出一种基于李群对称性的等变滤波器（EqF），用于改进视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的轨迹估计，通过降低线性化误差和提升近似阶数实现更高的精度和速度。 Pieter van Goor,Robert Mahony cs.RO,eess.SY

title: ASP-Based Declarative Process Mining (Extended Abstract)
title_zh: 基于 ASP 的声明式流程挖掘（扩展摘要）
comment: ef:38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP2022)
comments: ef:38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP2022)
abstract: We propose Answer Set Programming (ASP) as an approach for modeling and solving problems from the area of Declarative Process Mining (DPM). We consider here three classical problems, namely, Log Generation, Conformance Checking, and Query Checking. These problems are addressed from both a control-flow and a data-aware perspective. The approach is based on the representation of process specifications as (finite-state) automata. Since these are strictly more expressive than the de facto DPM standard specification language DECLARE, more general specifications than those typical of DPM can be handled, such as formulas in linear-time temporal logic over finite traces. (Full version available in the Proceedings of the 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence).
summary: We propose Answer Set Programming (ASP) as an approach for modeling and solving problems from the area of Declarative Process Mining (DPM). We consider here three classical problems, namely, Log Generation, Conformance Checking, and Query Checking. These problems are addressed from both a control-flow and a data-aware perspective. The approach is based on the representation of process specifications as (finite-state) automata. Since these are strictly more expressive than the de facto DPM standard specification language DECLARE, more general specifications than those typical of DPM can be handled, such as formulas in linear-time temporal logic over finite traces. (Full version available in the Proceedings of the 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence).
abstract_zh: 我们提出答案集编程（ASP）作为声明性过程挖掘（DPM）领域的建模和解决问题的方法。我们在这里考虑三个经典问题，即日志生成、一致性检查和查询检查。这些问题可以从控制流和数据感知的角度来解决。该方法基于将过程规范表示为（有限状态）自动机。由于这些严格地比事实上的 DPM 标准规范语言 DECLARE 更具表现力，因此可以处理比典型 DPM 更通用的规范，例如有限轨迹上的线性时间时序逻辑中的公式。 （完整版本可参见第 36 届 AAAI 人工智能会议论文集）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用答案集编程（ASP）解决声明式流程挖掘中的日志生成、符合性检查和查询检查问题，通过有限状态自动机表示流程规范以处理更复杂的逻辑。
AI.motivation: 现有声明式流程挖掘标准语言DECLARE表达能力有限，无法处理如线性时序逻辑等复杂规范，需更强大的建模方法。
AI.method: 基于ASP建模，将流程规范表示为有限状态自动机，从控制流和数据感知角度解决三个核心问题。
AI.result: 验证了ASP方法在处理DECLARE无法覆盖的复杂流程规范（如线性时序逻辑公式）上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ASP为声明式流程挖掘提供了更通用的解决方案，扩展了DPM的适用范围，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Liwei Jiang,Maarten Sap,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Yejin Choi
title: Aligning to Social Norms and Values in Interactive Narratives
title_zh: 符合互动叙事中的社会规范和价值观
abstract: We focus on creating agents that act in alignment with socially beneficial norms and values in interactive narratives or text-based games -- environments wherein an agent perceives and interacts with a world through natural language. Such interactive agents are often trained via reinforcement learning to optimize task performance, even when such rewards may lead to agent behaviors that violate societal norms -- causing harm either to the agent itself or other entities in the environment. Social value alignment refers to creating agents whose behaviors conform to expected moral and social norms for a given context and group of people -- in our case, it means agents that behave in a manner that is less harmful and more beneficial for themselves and others. We build on the Jiminy Cricket benchmark (Hendrycks et al. 2021), a set of 25 annotated interactive narratives containing thousands of morally salient scenarios covering everything from theft and bodily harm to altruism. We introduce the GALAD (Game-value ALignment through Action Distillation) agent that uses the social commonsense knowledge present in specially trained language models to contextually restrict its action space to only those actions that are aligned with socially beneficial values. An experimental study shows that the GALAD agent makes decisions efficiently enough to improve state-of-the-art task performance by 4% while reducing the frequency of socially harmful behaviors by 25% compared to strong contemporary value alignment approaches.
summary: We focus on creating agents that act in alignment with socially beneficial norms and values in interactive narratives or text-based games -- environments wherein an agent perceives and interacts with a world through natural language. Such interactive agents are often trained via reinforcement learning to optimize task performance, even when such rewards may lead to agent behaviors that violate societal norms -- causing harm either to the agent itself or other entities in the environment. Social value alignment refers to creating agents whose behaviors conform to expected moral and social norms for a given context and group of people -- in our case, it means agents that behave in a manner that is less harmful and more beneficial for themselves and others. We build on the Jiminy Cricket benchmark (Hendrycks et al. 2021), a set of 25 annotated interactive narratives containing thousands of morally salient scenarios covering everything from theft and bodily harm to altruism. We introduce the GALAD (Game-value ALignment through Action Distillation) agent that uses the social commonsense knowledge present in specially trained language models to contextually restrict its action space to only those actions that are aligned with socially beneficial values. An experimental study shows that the GALAD agent makes decisions efficiently enough to improve state-of-the-art task performance by 4% while reducing the frequency of socially harmful behaviors by 25% compared to strong contemporary value alignment approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于创建在交互式叙事或基于文本的游戏（代理通过自然语言感知世界并与世界互动的环境）中符合社会有益规范和价值观的代理。这种交互式智能体通常通过强化学习进行训练，以优化任务绩效，即使这种奖励可能会导致智能体行为违反社会规范——对智能体本身或环境中的其他实体造成伤害。社会价值一致性是指创造出行为符合给定环境和人群的预期道德和社会规范的代理人——在我们的例子中，这意味着代理人的行为方式对自己和他人危害更小、更有利。我们以 Jiminy Cricket 基准（Hendrycks 等人，2021）为基础，这是一组 25 个带注释的互动叙述，包含数千个道德上突出的场景，涵盖从盗窃、身体伤害到利他主义的一切。我们引入了 GALAD（通过行动蒸馏进行游戏价值调整）代理，它使用经过特殊训练的语言模型中存在的社会常识知识，根据上下文将其行动空间限制为仅那些与社会有益价值观一致的行动。一项实验研究表明，与强大的当代价值调整方法相比，GALAD 代理的决策效率足以将最先进的任务绩效提高 4%，同时将社会有害行为的频率降低 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发能够在交互式叙事中遵循社会规范和价值观的智能体，减少有害行为的同时提升任务表现。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习训练的智能体可能因优化任务性能而产生违反社会规范的行为，导致对自身或环境中的其他实体造成伤害。
AI.method: 提出GALAD智能体，通过利用预训练语言模型中的社会常识知识，动态限制行动空间，仅选择符合社会价值观的动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，GALAD在保持任务性能提升4%的同时，将有害行为频率降低了25%，优于现有价值对齐方法。
AI.conclusion: GALAD方法有效平衡了智能体的任务效率与社会价值对齐，为交互式叙事中的道德决策提供了可行方案。

search_text: Aligning to Social Norms and Values in Interactive Narratives 符合互动叙事中的社会规范和价值观 We focus on creating agents that act in alignment with socially beneficial norms and values in interactive narratives or text-based games -- environments wherein an agent perceives and interacts with a world through natural language. Such interactive agents are often trained via reinforcement learning to optimize task performance, even when such rewards may lead to agent behaviors that violate societal norms -- causing harm either to the agent itself or other entities in the environment. Social value alignment refers to creating agents whose behaviors conform to expected moral and social norms for a given context and group of people -- in our case, it means agents that behave in a manner that is less harmful and more beneficial for themselves and others. We build on the Jiminy Cricket benchmark (Hendrycks et al. 2021), a set of 25 annotated interactive narratives containing thousands of morally salient scenarios covering everything from theft and bodily harm to altruism. We introduce the GALAD (Game-value ALignment through Action Distillation) agent that uses the social commonsense knowledge present in specially trained language models to contextually restrict its action space to only those actions that are aligned with socially beneficial values. An experimental study shows that the GALAD agent makes decisions efficiently enough to improve state-of-the-art task performance by 4% while reducing the frequency of socially harmful behaviors by 25% compared to strong contemporary value alignment approaches. 我们专注于创建在交互式叙事或基于文本的游戏（代理通过自然语言感知世界并与世界互动的环境）中符合社会有益规范和价值观的代理。这种交互式智能体通常通过强化学习进行训练，以优化任务绩效，即使这种奖励可能会导致智能体行为违反社会规范——对智能体本身或环境中的其他实体造成伤害。社会价值一致性是指创造出行为符合给定环境和人群的预期道德和社会规范的代理人——在我们的例子中，这意味着代理人的行为方式对自己和他人危害更小、更有利。我们以 Jiminy Cricket 基准（Hendrycks 等人，2021）为基础，这是一组 25 个带注释的互动叙述，包含数千个道德上突出的场景，涵盖从盗窃、身体伤害到利他主义的一切。我们引入了 GALAD（通过行动蒸馏进行游戏价值调整）代理，它使用经过特殊训练的语言模型中存在的社会常识知识，根据上下文将其行动空间限制为仅那些与社会有益价值观一致的行动。一项实验研究表明，与强大的当代价值调整方法相比，GALAD 代理的决策效率足以将最先进的任务绩效提高 4%，同时将社会有害行为的频率降低 25%。 本文旨在开发能够在交互式叙事中遵循社会规范和价值观的智能体，减少有害行为的同时提升任务表现。 Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Liwei Jiang,Maarten Sap,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Yejin Choi cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Sequencer: Deep LSTM for Image Classification
title_zh: 序列器：用于图像分类的深度 LSTM
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2022; camera ready edition
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2022; camera ready edition
abstract: In recent computer vision research, the advent of the Vision Transformer (ViT) has rapidly revolutionized various architectural design efforts: ViT achieved state-of-the-art image classification performance using self-attention found in natural language processing, and MLP-Mixer achieved competitive performance using simple multi-layer perceptrons. In contrast, several studies have also suggested that carefully redesigned convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can achieve advanced performance comparable to ViT without resorting to these new ideas. Against this background, there is growing interest in what inductive bias is suitable for computer vision. Here we propose Sequencer, a novel and competitive architecture alternative to ViT that provides a new perspective on these issues. Unlike ViTs, Sequencer models long-range dependencies using LSTMs rather than self-attention layers. We also propose a two-dimensional version of Sequencer module, where an LSTM is decomposed into vertical and horizontal LSTMs to enhance performance. Despite its simplicity, several experiments demonstrate that Sequencer performs impressively well: Sequencer2D-L, with 54M parameters, realizes 84.6% top-1 accuracy on only ImageNet-1K. Not only that, we show that it has good transferability and the robust resolution adaptability on double resolution-band.
summary: In recent computer vision research, the advent of the Vision Transformer (ViT) has rapidly revolutionized various architectural design efforts: ViT achieved state-of-the-art image classification performance using self-attention found in natural language processing, and MLP-Mixer achieved competitive performance using simple multi-layer perceptrons. In contrast, several studies have also suggested that carefully redesigned convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can achieve advanced performance comparable to ViT without resorting to these new ideas. Against this background, there is growing interest in what inductive bias is suitable for computer vision. Here we propose Sequencer, a novel and competitive architecture alternative to ViT that provides a new perspective on these issues. Unlike ViTs, Sequencer models long-range dependencies using LSTMs rather than self-attention layers. We also propose a two-dimensional version of Sequencer module, where an LSTM is decomposed into vertical and horizontal LSTMs to enhance performance. Despite its simplicity, several experiments demonstrate that Sequencer performs impressively well: Sequencer2D-L, with 54M parameters, realizes 84.6% top-1 accuracy on only ImageNet-1K. Not only that, we show that it has good transferability and the robust resolution adaptability on double resolution-band.
abstract_zh: 在最近的计算机视觉研究中，视觉变换器 (ViT) 的出现迅速彻底改变了各种架构设计工作：ViT 使用自然语言处理中的自注意力实现了最先进的图像分类性能，而 MLP-Mixer 使用简单的多层感知器实现了具有竞争力的性能。相比之下，一些研究还表明，精心重新设计的卷积神经网络（CNN）可以在不诉诸这些新想法的情况下实现与 ViT 相当的高级性能。在此背景下，人们对什么归纳偏差适合计算机视觉越来越感兴趣。在这里，我们提出了 Sequencer，这是 ViT 的一种新颖且有竞争力的架构替代方案，它为这些问题提供了新的视角。与 ViT 不同，Sequencer 使用 LSTM 而不是自注意力层来建模远程依赖关系。我们还提出了一个二维版本的 Sequencer 模块，其中 LSTM 被分解为垂直和水平 LSTM 以提高性能。尽管很简单，但多项实验表明 Sequencer 的性能令人印象深刻：具有 54M 参数的 Sequencer2D-L 仅在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 84.6% 的 top-1 准确率。不仅如此，我们还表明它具有良好的可迁移性和双分辨率带上强大的分辨率适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度LSTM的图像分类架构Sequencer，作为Vision Transformer的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管Vision Transformer和MLP-Mixer等新方法表现优异，但研究发现精心设计的卷积神经网络也能达到类似效果，因此需要探索适合计算机视觉的归纳偏置。
AI.method: 使用LSTM替代自注意力机制建模长距离依赖，并设计二维Sequencer模块将LSTM分解为垂直和水平方向以增强性能。
AI.result: Sequencer2D-L在ImageNet-1K上达到84.6% top-1准确率（54M参数），且具有良好的迁移能力和分辨率适应性。
AI.conclusion: Sequencer通过LSTM架构在图像分类任务中展现出竞争力，为计算机视觉归纳偏置研究提供了新视角。

title: Word Tour: One-dimensional Word Embeddings via the Traveling Salesman Problem
title_zh: 词之旅：通过旅行商问题进行一维词嵌入
abstract: Word embeddings are one of the most fundamental technologies used in natural language processing. Existing word embeddings are high-dimensional and consume considerable computational resources. In this study, we propose WordTour, unsupervised one-dimensional word embeddings. To achieve the challenging goal, we propose a decomposition of the desiderata of word embeddings into two parts, completeness and soundness, and focus on soundness in this paper. Owing to the single dimensionality, WordTour is extremely efficient and provides a minimal means to handle word embeddings. We experimentally confirmed the effectiveness of the proposed method via user study and document classification.
summary: Word embeddings are one of the most fundamental technologies used in natural language processing. Existing word embeddings are high-dimensional and consume considerable computational resources. In this study, we propose WordTour, unsupervised one-dimensional word embeddings. To achieve the challenging goal, we propose a decomposition of the desiderata of word embeddings into two parts, completeness and soundness, and focus on soundness in this paper. Owing to the single dimensionality, WordTour is extremely efficient and provides a minimal means to handle word embeddings. We experimentally confirmed the effectiveness of the proposed method via user study and document classification.
abstract_zh: 词嵌入是自然语言处理中使用的最基本的技术之一。现有的词嵌入是高维的并且消耗大量的计算资源。在这项研究中，我们提出了 WordTour，无监督的一维词嵌入。为了实现这一具有挑战性的目标，我们提出将词嵌入的需求分解为完整性和健全性两部分，并在本文中重点关注健全性。由于单一维度，WordTour 非常高效，并提供了处理词嵌入的最小方法。我们通过用户研究和文档分类实验证实了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于旅行商问题（TSP）的一维词嵌入方法WordTour，通过分解词嵌入的完整性与正确性目标，实现高效低维表示。
AI.motivation: 现有词嵌入模型维度高且计算资源消耗大，需探索更高效的低维表示方法以降低计算成本。
AI.method: 将词嵌入目标分解为完整性与正确性两部分，聚焦正确性并通过TSP构建单维度词向量，利用无监督学习实现嵌入。
AI.result: 通过用户研究和文档分类实验验证了WordTour在保持语义信息的同时显著降低维度和计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: WordTour为词嵌入提供了高效的一维解决方案，在保证有效性前提下适用于资源受限场景。

title: Dynamic Median Consensus for Marine Multi-Robot Systems Using Acoustic Communication
title_zh: 使用声学通信的海洋多机器人系统的动态中值共识
comment: ef:in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 5, no. 4, pp. 5299-5306, Oct. 2020
comments: ef:in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 5, no. 4, pp. 5299-5306, Oct. 2020
abstract: In this paper, we present a dynamic median consensus protocol for multi-agent systems using acoustic communication. The motivating target scenario is a multi-agent system consisting of underwater robots acting as intelligent sensors, applied to continuous monitoring of the state of a marine environment. The proposed protocol allows each agent to track the median value of individual measurements of all agents through local communication with neighbouring agents. Median is chosen as a measure robust to outliers, as opposed to average value, which is usually used. In contrast to the existing consensus protocols, the proposed protocol is dynamic, uses a switching communication topology and converges to median of measured signals. Stability and correctness of the protocol are theoretically proven. The protocol is tested in simulation, and accuracy and influence of protocol parameters on the system output are analyzed. The protocol is implemented and validated by a set of experiments on an underwater group of robots comprising of aMussel units. This experimental setup is one of the first deployments of any type of consensus protocol for an underwater setting. Both simulation and experimental results confirm the correctness of the presented approach.
summary: In this paper, we present a dynamic median consensus protocol for multi-agent systems using acoustic communication. The motivating target scenario is a multi-agent system consisting of underwater robots acting as intelligent sensors, applied to continuous monitoring of the state of a marine environment. The proposed protocol allows each agent to track the median value of individual measurements of all agents through local communication with neighbouring agents. Median is chosen as a measure robust to outliers, as opposed to average value, which is usually used. In contrast to the existing consensus protocols, the proposed protocol is dynamic, uses a switching communication topology and converges to median of measured signals. Stability and correctness of the protocol are theoretically proven. The protocol is tested in simulation, and accuracy and influence of protocol parameters on the system output are analyzed. The protocol is implemented and validated by a set of experiments on an underwater group of robots comprising of aMussel units. This experimental setup is one of the first deployments of any type of consensus protocol for an underwater setting. Both simulation and experimental results confirm the correctness of the presented approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用声学通信的多智能体系统的动态中值共识协议。激励目标场景是由水下机器人作为智能传感器组成的多智能体系统，应用于连续监测海洋环境的状态。所提出的协议允许每个代理通过与相邻代理的本地通信来跟踪所有代理的单独测量的中值。选择中位数作为对异常值稳健的度量，而不是通常使用的平均值。与现有的共识协议相比，所提出的协议是动态的，使用交换通信拓扑并收敛到测量信号的中值。理论上证明了协议的稳定性和正确性。对协议进行了仿真测试，分析了协议参数的准确性以及对系统输出的影响。该协议是通过对由 aMussel 单元组成的水下机器人组进行的一组实验来实现和验证的。该实验设置是水下环境中任何类型共识协议的首批部署之一。仿真和实验结果都证实了所提出方法的正确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声学通信的动态中位数共识协议，用于水下多机器人系统，通过局部通信实现对环境状态测量值的鲁棒中位数跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有共识协议多采用平均值易受异常值影响，而水下环境监测需应对传感器噪声和通信干扰，需更鲁棒的中位数估计方法。
AI.method: 设计动态切换通信拓扑的中位数共识算法，通过局部邻居交互实现中位数收敛，理论证明稳定性并进行仿真与实物实验验证。
AI.result: 仿真与水下机器人实验均验证协议有效性，参数分析显示系统鲁棒性，首次实现水下环境共识协议的实际部署。
AI.conclusion: 动态中位数共识协议在水下多机器人系统中可行，为复杂海洋环境监测提供了新的分布式协同方法。
